1.1: Ubvur unang Uyesu Ukiristo, ungwɛ̃ Udauda uwuruwi aka awu ungwɛ̃ Uibrahim.
1.2: Uibrahim unga awu utɛ Uishaku, Uishaku unga awu utɛ Uyakubu, Uyakubu unga awu utɛ Uyahuda nu angwɛ̃mbɔ,
1.3: Uyahuda unga awu utɛ Ufereza nu Uzera, uyisumbɔ aka awu Utamar, Ufereza unga awu utɛ Uhezuron, Uhezuron unga awu utɛ Uaram,
1.4: Uaram unga awu utɛ Uamminadab, Uamminadab unga awu utɛ Unashon Unashon unga awu utɛ Usarhmon,
1.5: Usarhmon unga awu utɛ Ubo'aza. Urahab unga amar Ubo'aza, Ubo'aza unga awu utɛ Uobida. Urut unga amar Uobida, Uobida unga awu utɛ Ujesse,
1.6: Ujesse unga awu utɛ Uyɛrhe Udauda. Udauda unga awu utɛ Usorhomon. Utsɛrha Uriya unga amar Usorhomon,
1.7: Usorhomon unga awu utɛ Urhehobowam, Urhehobowam unga awu utɛ Uabijah, Uabijah unga awu utɛ Uasa,
1.8: Uasa unga awu utɛ Uyehoshafat, Uyehoshafat unga awu utɛ Uyoram, Uyoram unga awu utɛ Uazariya,
1.9: Uazariya unga awu utɛ Uyotam, Uyotam unga awu utɛ Uahaz, Uahaz unga awu utɛ Uhezekiya,
1.10: Uhezekiya unga awu utɛ Umanasse, Umanasse unga awu utɛ Uaman, Uaman unga awu utɛ Uyosiya,
1.11: Uyosiya unga awu utɛ Uyekoniya nu angwɛ̃mbɔ ri ivangyɛ umbɔ aka akarha umbɔ azĩ abĩ akase ru Ubabirha.
1.12: Umbɔ aka akarha umbɔ azĩ atsĩ abĩ akase ru Ubabirha, Uyekoniya unga awu utɛ Usheyarhtiyerh, Usheyarhtiyerh unga awu utɛ Uzerubaberh,
1.13: Uzerubaberh unga awu utɛ Uabihudu, Uabihudu unga awu utɛ Uerhiyakim, Uerhiyakim unga awu utɛ Uazor,
1.14: Uazor unga awu utɛ Uzadak, Uzadak unga awu utɛ Uakim, Uakim unga awu utɛ Uarhiyud,
1.15: Uarhiyud unga awu utɛ Uerhiyeza, Uerhiyeza unga awu utɛ Umatana, Umatana unga awu utɛ Uyakubu,
1.16: Uyakubu unga awu utɛ Uyusuf utsaka Umaryamu, uya Uyesu, umbɔ aki iyisa Ukiristo.
1.17: Kishoo andanna udzur ri Uibrahim uba utsĩ Udauda awu usɔka na anaa. Udzur nu Udauda uba utsĩ ri ivangyɛ umbɔ aka akarha abi Uisrairha azĩ abĩ akase ru Ubabirha, andanna awu usɔka na anaa. Udzur umɔ uba utsĩ Ukiristo, andanna awu usɔka na anaa. Imar Uyesu Ukiristo (Irh 2.1-7)
1.18: Imar Uyesu Ukiristo iwe riminɛ. Uyanga Umaryamu awu ukarh Uyusuf. Umbɔ anasi ipfunumbɔ, nu umbɔ anyã unga awu ra anaa ru ubok Ipfu Isarsatangge.
1.19: Ukarhnga Uyusuf arhiku uner asi ibeenga idzowe unga atsa ra asu anera, unga akaifɛrhkɔ iyiki ibɔre unga ri iwɔk.
1.20: Bɔr unga ana akaifɛrhkɔ akɛrɛ ha na arheyirhɔ anyã ipfu itser Uteijee kapɛɛng ru unga ni igɔr unga igɛ, <<A Uyusuf ungwɛ̃ Udauda, niba ugũo iwei iyɛi Umaryamu unga awu utsɛ̃ngo, ubinkutsu anaa hã unga aka akɔ̃ adzeki Ipfu Isarsatangge.
1.21: Awuri imar ungwɛ̃ nu ungo utare itsoknga igburh Uyesu, ubinkutsu unga awuri ifɔrh anernga ra arhimmbɔ.>>
1.22: Kishoo akɛrɛ ha akorhe rimi ngge itsuifɛr ubinkpi Uteijee aka arherhe ra angwĩ uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num agɛ,
1.23: <<Unakugbĩrhĩ awuri ikɔ̃ anaa na amar ungwɛ̃ umbɔ ayisi itsoknga Uimmanuwerh,>> agbena agburh <<Unum awu nggu umɛn.>>
1.24: Ivangyɛ Uyusuf aka azir ru urhɔ, unga adɔsa arherhe ha ipfu itser Uteijee iki irherhe na ayɛi Umaryamu unga awea utsɛ̃nga.
1.25: Bɔr asi irhaa nggu unga utsɛku unga aka amar ungwɛ̃nga. Uyusuf atare itsoknga igburh Uyesu.

2.1: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka amar Uyesu ru uteu Ubaitarhami ru Uyahudiya ri ivang Uhiridu aka awu uyɛrhe, abika ahwɛng ídzɛɛr adzeki igɔ̃kpee aba Urusharhima.
2.2: Na arhusa agɛ, <<Ungwɛ̃ hã umbɔ aka amar awe rinɛɛ uyɛrhe abi Uyahuda? Umɛn inyãmɛn idzɛrnga ri igɔ̃kpee nu umɛn ĩba idzowe unga igɔng.>>
2.3: Ivangyɛ Uyɛrhe Uhiridu aka agũ rimi, amɛnnga adake nu kishoo abi Urusharhima.
2.4: Ivangyɛ unga aka akɔng kishoo ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu abika amesuwe Ikpem, unga arhusa umbɔ anangkɛ umbɔ aka imar Ukiristo.
2.5: Umbɔ agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ru uteu Ubaitarhami ru Uyahudiya. Ubinkpi uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num aka atsɛng,
2.6: << <Bɔr ungo, Ubaitarhami ra abĩ Uyahuda, ungo usi iweɔ uwuku uci ri iteu Uyahuda. Ubinkutsu awu ru ungo uyɛrhu uwɔɔ aka idzeka, uwuruwi aka idarh anermum Uisrairha.> >>
2.7: Mɔcɛ Uhiridu aghɔ̃rhã ayisa abika ahwɛng ídzɛɛr ha arhusa abee ihwɛng ivangyɛ umbɔ aka anyã idzɛɛr ha.
2.8: Mɔcɛ unga adene umbɔ azĩmbɔ Ubaitarhami agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka azĩ angwɛ̃dzɛn na arhisuwa irheng ungwɛ̃ hã. Ivangyɛ umbi aka anyãmbi unga, umbi aba asɔma umum nu umum igamum izĩ indzowe unga igɔng.>>
2.9: Umbɔ aka agũ arherhe uyɛrhe amaa, umbɔ azĩmbɔ udĩmbɔ. Idzɛɛr ha umbɔ aka anyã ri igɔ̃kpee ha izɛ̃rhã ra asumbɔ, umbɔ adɔsa ngge utsɛku ngge iki iba idɛ̃ɛ̃ ra anangkɛ ungwɛ̃ hã aka awe.
2.10: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka anyã idzɛɛr ha, umbɔ agɔm anggɔm akarhãrhã.
2.11: Umbɔ aka atsĩ ri iya ha, umbɔ anyã irheng ungwɛ̃ hã nggu uyanga Umaryamu, umbɔ atararhu ra anangnga adzowe unga igɔng. Mɔcɛ umbɔ agarha akpokambɔ adzowe ízũwã uzinarhi nu atsei umbɔ iki iyisa ufirankisen nu umur.
2.12: Umbɔ aka awu ri irheyirhɔ, Unum adɛyika umbɔ niba ibvui azĩmbɔ ru Uhiridu. Umbɔ adɔsu udĩ ukpɔɔ azĩmbɔ abĩmbɔ. Atĩ azĩmbɔ Umasar
2.13: Umbɔ aka azĩmbɔ, Uyusuf arheyirhɔ anyã ipfu itser Uteijee iki igɔr unga igɛ, <<Usisok, ushupu irheng ungwɛ̃ hã nu uyanga na atĩ azĩmbi abĩ Umasar. Àka asei nggɔɔ ha utsɛku umum iki indɛyiwa umbi. Uhiridu awuri ibeenga irheng ungwɛ̃ hã na afɛre unga.>>
2.14: Nggee unga asok ashupu irheng ungwɛ̃ hã nu uyanga ru untsuuka akũ azĩã Umasar.
2.15: Umbɔ asei nggɔɔ ha utsɛku Uhiridu aka akpe. Akɛrɛ ha akorhe rimi ngge itsuifɛr ubinkpi Uteijee aka arherhe ra angwĩ uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num agɛ, <<Umum iyisu ungwɛ̃mum adzek ru Umasar.>> Afɛyiwe awɛkaci ru Uyahudiya
2.16: Ivangyɛ Uhiridu aka ahwɛng ugɛ abika ahwɛng ídzɛɛr ha arhɛm unga, unga agũ avɔm akarhãrhã. Unga atsu umbɔ afɛyiwe irheng awɛkatsa kishoo ru Ubaitarhami nu ikãwãngge, udzur ra awɛkatsa abi imɛka ivaa uba ra andzing. Unga akorha akɛrɛ ha ubinkutsu udzur ri ivang hã abika ahwɛng ídzɛɛr ha aka asɔme unga imar ungwɛ̃ hã iki iwe imɛka ivaa.
2.17: Ivang hã niyɔ ngge iki itsuifɛr ubinkpi uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num Uirimiya aka arherhe agɛ,
2.18: <<Agũmbɔ urhɛm ru Urama, ididɔng nu ifakpe irhɛirhɛ, Urahirha unga adɛ̃ɛ̃ iciu akpe angwɛ̃nga, na akpɛ̃ɛ̃ iyɛi idɔngamɛn ru unera, ubinkutsu aka ashembɔ.>> Abvui azĩ Unazarat
2.19: Uhiridu aka akpe, Uyusuf arheyirhɔ ru Umasar anyã ipfu itser Uteijee iki igɔr unga igɛ,
2.20: <<Usok ushupu irheng ungwɛ̃ hã nu uyanga ukũ uzĩ abĩ Uisrairha. Abika abee ifɛr ungwɛ̃ hã aka akpembɔ.>>
2.21: Nggee unga asok, ashupu ungwɛ̃ nu uyanga akũ azĩã abĩ Uisrairha.
2.22: Bɔr unga aka agũ ugɛ Uarkirhayu ungwɛ̃ Uhiridu aka anyangu ukam utɛnga awu uyɛrhe Uyahudiya, unga agũã iwei izĩ nggɔɔ ha. Bɔr unga aka arheyirhɔ umbɔ agbiite atonga, unga atsĩã ru Ugarhirhi.
2.23: Azĩ aseisa ru uteu ukpɔɔ umbɔ iki iyisa Unazarat. Ngge itsuifɛr ubinkpi abika asɔm Arherhu-Num aka arherhe agɛ, <<Awuri iyisa unga uner Unazarat.>>

3.1: Ivang hã niyɔ Uyohana Uner Ubɔtisima aka aba adzowe isarhe ra arhum Uyahudiya,
3.2: anu igɔr agɛ, <<Àka adzipa, Iyɛrhe afã iki iyongge!>>
3.3: Uner ha nuwɔ uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num Uishaya aka arherhe ra arherhanga agɛ, <<Urhɛm uwɔɔ uyisa ra arhum ugɛ, <Àka agbishuwe udĩ Uteijee, àka avii atsĩndĩã uku urhirhiki ru unga!> >>
3.4: Atorho Uyohana awu igwar urhakumi, abow ikpɔm ubvur nu upfurhsĩnga. Ubinghanga uwu asusu nu utoo arhum.
3.5: Mɔcɛ aner Urusharhima nu abi Uyahudiya kishoo nu abĩ akɔɔ ru ugbɛr Azɛ̃ Urdun adzeyi aba ru unga.
3.6: Adɛ̃ɛ̃ asɔm arhimmbɔ nu unga asorhuwe umbɔ ubɔtisima ra Azɛ̃ Urdun.
3.7: Bɔr unga aka anyã abi Ufarisi nu abi Usaduki arhɛrhɛ aka aba ra anangkɛ unga aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ isorhu ubɔtisima, unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi angwɛ̃ íbvui! Ungaa adɛyiwa umbi itĩ avɔm Unum aka iba unuma?
3.8: Àka atɔ̃ itseryɛ iki idɛyiwe idzidzipambi.
3.9: Àka aneke ikaifɛrhkɔ ra amɛnmbi agɛ, <Uibrahim unga awu utɛmɛn.> Umum idɛyiwa umbi Unum awea ri ijee unga aka itsu atarh akɛrɛ ake awe awɛkaci ru Uibrahim.
3.10: Aka atsumbɔ anggãi ru unang acucii. Ubɛn ucucii uku usi ighwɛrmgbɔ ikpũrhã iyiki ize, awuri igbɛr umgbɔ atsu ru urha.
3.11: <<Umum ikorhuwa umbi ubɔtisima nggu amɛ̃ utsar idzidzipambi. Bɔr uwuruwi aka ananga umum ijee nggawɔ awuri iba ru undzingmum, abadaknga umum isi ímɛ̃ɛ̃mum ishipa. Unga awuri isorhuwa umbi ubɔtisima nggu Ipfu Isarsatangge nu urha.
3.12: Akpɔm nggu utaknga, awuri itsɛki ishaa itsemnga na akarha ngge atsuku ungbanga na akpĩĩwe uhweenga ru urhakpi uku usi írhimkpɔ.>> Ubɔtisima Uyesu (Umar 1.9-11; Irh 3.21-22)
3.13: Mɔcɛ Uyesu aka adzeku Ugarhirhi aba ru Uyohana asorhuwe unga ubɔtisima ra Azɛ̃ Urdun.
3.14: Uyohana abee ikɛn unga, agɔr agɛ, <<Umum ibee ungo usorhuwa umum ubɔtisima, ungo usok uba ru umum?>>
3.15: Bɔr Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Uneke ngge iwe rimi icɛrɛ. Azea umɛn ikorhe ri iminɛ ngge itsuifɛr kishoo ubinkpi Unum aka abee.>> Mɔcɛ Uyohana abemuwe unga.
3.16: Umbɔ aka asorhuwe Uyesu ubɔtisima, unga adzeka ra amɛ̃. Kanying afã ayanga, unga anyã Ipfu-Num iki icipuwa ru nyaku unurhɛu, iba isei nu unga.
3.17: Mɔcɛ urhɛm udzeka afã ugɔr ugɛ, <<Uwɛrɛ unga awu Ungwɛ̃mum ukpekũ iki ibema. Nggu unga umum igũibɛn akarhãrhã.>>

4.1: Mɔcɛ Ipfu-Num idarh Uyesu izĩngge ra arhum ru Undenggũ adeya unga.
4.2: Uyesu akpem igha ubin inuma isɔka inaa nu utsuu nu atenum. Unga aka amaa, imerh ifɛr unga.
4.3: Mɔcɛ Undenggũ aba agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ungo uba uwu Ungwɛ̃ Unum, utsu atarh akɛrɛ awu uborodi.>>
4.4: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Itsɛng Arherhu-Num igɔr igɛ, <Asi iwea ubingha ukpekũ itsu unera abɛk, bɔr ubɛn urhɛm arherhe uku udzeka ra angwĩ Unum.> >>
4.5: Mɔcɛ Undenggũ ashupa unga azĩ adɛ̃ɛ̃ afafã nu usarkasar uteu ni itsi uvi Iya-Num.
4.6: Agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ungo uba uwu Ungwɛ̃ Unum, utersha ugba nu abĩ. Ubinkutsu itsɛng Arherhu-Num igɔrngge ugɛ, << <Unga awuri itsu ípfu itsernga ngge ingwɛ̃dzɛn ni ikaa ungo, ngge iwuri ikpɔm ungo ra afafã ra abokngge, utsur ungo ukwɛrɔ undaidakngo nu utarh.> >>
4.7: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Itsɛng Arherhu-Num igɔrngge ikɛi ugɛ, <Ungo niba ivirungo Uteijee Unumngo!> >>
4.8: Undenggũ ashupa unga ikɛi aden ni itsi igũ iyɔɔ iderdetangge, adɛyiwe unga iyɛrhe upfung nu igɔngngge.
4.9: Unga agɔr unga agɛ, <<Kishoo abina akɛrɛ umum iwuri idzaamum ungo, ungo uba utararhu nu udzaango umum igɔng.>>
4.10: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Usɔkɔ ru umum, Ushaitan! Ubinkutsu itsɛng Arherhu-Num igɔrngge ugɛ, <Udzowe igɔng ru Uteijee Unumngo, nu uwu ugãrhãnga ukpekũ.> >>
4.11: Mɔcɛ Undenggũ abɔruka unga, nu ípfu itser-Num iba itɔ̃we unga itser. Uyesu atirhi itsernga ru Ugarhirhi (Umar 1.14-15; Irh 4.14-15)
4.12: Uyesu aka agũ ugɛ umbɔ aka atsuke Uyohana ru ugborzĩ, unga abvui azĩã Ugarhirhi.
4.13: Abɔruka Unazarat, azĩ asesa ru Ukafanahum, ukpurukpi uku uwe nggɔɔ ra angwĩ ukau ukugɔng ra abĩ Uzeburhun nu Unaftarhi.
4.14: Ngge itsuifɛr ubinkpi uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num Uishaya aka arherhe agɛ,
4.15: <<Abĩ Uzeburhun nu abĩ Unaftarhi, aka awu utsĩndĩ ukau ukugɔng, ugar Azɛ̃ Urdun, Ugarhirhi aka awu atsen abi Uyahuda,
4.16: umɔ abika asei ru uzĩ aka anyãmbɔ nggaa irhirhang. Nu abirabɛ aka asei ra abĩ aki uzirhzĩ akpe, irhirhang iki irhangngge ru umbɔ.>>
4.17: Udzur ri ivang hã Uyesu aka atirhi idzowe isarhe, agɔr agɛ, <<Àka adzipa, Iyɛrhe afã iki iyongge!>> Uyesu ayisu inera inaa abika adzui abɛrh (Umar 1.16-20; Irh 5.1-11)
4.18: Uyesu azɛ̃rhã nu ubang Ukau Ugarhirhi nukpi, unga anyã inera ivaa angwɛ̃yi, Usiman uwuruwi umbɔ aki iyisa Ubitru nu Uandarawu ungwɛ̃mbɔ. Anu itang igber ru ukau, ubinkutsu umbɔ awu abika adzui abɛrh.
4.19: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka aba adɔsa umum, nu umum iwuri itsu umbi awu abika adzui anera.>>
4.20: Ivanga unying umbɔ aneke igbermbɔ na adɔsa unga.
4.21: Unga aka abɔre anang hã na azĩ anyã inera ivaa angwɛ̃yi ikɛi, Uyaku ungwɛ̃ Uzabadi nu Uyohana ungwɛ̃mbɔ. Awu ru ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ nggu utɛmbɔ Uzabadi, adɛ̃ɛ̃ igbishi ígbermbɔ. Uyesu ayisa umbɔ.
4.22: Kanying umbɔ anekukumbɔ ukhukhɔɔ ha ru utɛmbɔ na adɔsa unga. Uyesu akerhuwe abi irhãrhã (Irh 6.17-19)
4.23: Uyesu azɛ̃rhã amaa Ugarhirhi, amesuwe ra abã ifɛn-Nummbɔ, adzowe Isarhe Iyiki Ize iyi Iyɛrhe Unum, na akerhuwe ubɛn irhãrhã nu ikpũ ighighong anera.
4.24: Isarhe ri itsinga itɛ̃rhã imaangge abĩ Usuriya, anera akũ abika agũ ighighong akarhãrhã na ahwa ayetnum nggu ikpũ írhãrhã, nu abi ípfu iyiki ibewe, nu abi irhãrhĩ izurh, nu abika afɔr uzɛ̃rhã adambɔ, unga akerhuwe umbɔ.
4.25: Anera arhɛrhɛ aka adzeku Ugarhirhi, nu iteu usɔka umbɔ iki iyisa Udikaforhi, nu Urusharhima, nu Uyahudiya nu ugar Azɛ̃ Urdun adɔsa unga.

5.1: Ivangyɛ Uyesu aka anyã ikikɔng anera arhɛrhɛ, unga afũ asei ni itsi igũa. Angwɛ̃ imesanga aba ru unga.
5.3: <<Idorh iwu iyi abirabɛ aka awe atsũwã ri ipfumbɔ, ubinkutsu Iyɛrhe afã iwu iyimbɔ
5.4: Idorh iwu iyi abi ighongamɛn, ubinkutsu awuri idɔngukumbɔ amɛnmbɔ.
5.5: Idorh iwu iyi abika adɔɔr, ubinkutsu ukam upfung uwuri iwe ukpumbɔ.
5.6: Idorh iwu iyi abirabɛ aka agũ imerh nu ugɔ̃ irhirhika, ubinkutsu umbɔ awuri ishurmbɔ.
5.7: Idorh iwu iyi abika acucorhe, ubinkutsu awuri icorhukumbɔ umbɔ.
5.8: Idorh iwu iyi abi amɛn aka atɛn, ubinkutsu umbɔ awuri inyãmbɔ Unum.
5.9: Idorh iwu iyi abika atsu ididɔɔr, ubinkutsu awuri iyisa umbɔ angwɛ̃ Unum.
5.10: Idorh iwu iyi abika ahwa uver ri irhirhika, ubinkutsu Iyɛrhe afã iwu iyimbɔ.
5.11: <<Idorh iwu iyimbi ivang anera iki irhena umbi, ayɔm umbi, na arherhuwa umbi ikpũ iki ibewe ri itsimum.
5.12: Àka agɔm akarhãrhã, ubinkutsu umbi awuri ikpo itosa irhɛirhɛ ra afã, ubinkutsu rimi hã umbɔ aka ayɔm abika asɔm Arherhu-Num abi inggbaashia. Angwã nu irhirhang (Umar 9.50; Irh 14.34-35)
5.13: <<Umbi awu angwã abĩã. Bɔr angwã aba ashike nu itonga ake, awuri ikorha aguse na atsu ake awe angwã ikɛi? Awuri ishike ru ugarh, awuri ititare ake na anera azɛ̃rhã nu ake.
5.14: <<Umbi awu irhirhang upfung. Uteukpi uku udzin nu igũ asi ídɛ̃ɛ̃ awɔmbɔ ukpɔ.
5.15: Unera asi ítsu irhirhang na awɔka ngge ri ikikĩĩ. Nu ngge iki iwe rimi, awuri idene ngge idɛ̃ɛ̃ ra anang idɛ̃ɛ̃ngge nu ngge irhange ubɛn unera ri iya.
5.16: Rimi hã, àka aneke irhirhangmbi irhang ra anera, ngge ítsu umbɔ anyã itser iyiki izembi na akpoi Utɛmbi uwu afã. Itsuifɛr iyi Ikpem
5.17: <<Niba akaimbi ifɛrhkɔ ugɛ umum ĩba ififɔ̃rhuwe Íkpem Umusa use itsɛng abika asɔm Arherhu-Num. Umum isi ĩbamum ififɔ̃rhuwe ngge, bɔr umum ĩba itsu ngge itsuifɛr.
5.18: Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, utsɛku afã nu abĩ awuri imaa, uko ishia ra arherhe Íkpem Umusa isi ífɔ̃rhũngge utsɛku umbɔ aki itsu abina kishoo atsuafɛr.
5.19: Uwuruwi aka azharhuwe ungwɛ̃rhi ishia unying ri Ikpem na amesuwe anera akorha ngge, awuri iyisa unga uku ucia ri Iyɛrhe afã, bɔr uwuruwi aka adɔsa ngge na amesuwe ngge, awuri iyisa unga nggaa uner ri Iyɛrha afã.
5.20: Umum idɛyiwa umbi ugɛ irhirhikambi iba isi inangngge iyi abika amesuwe Ikpem nu abi Ufarisi, umbi asi ítsĩmbi ri Iyɛrhe afã. Imesa ri itsi avɔm (Irh 12.57-59)
5.21: <<Umbi aka agũmbi umbɔ aka adɛyiwe atokamɛn isha agɛ, <Àka niba afɛrmbi unera, nu uwuruwi aka afɛr uner awuri itsu uvau nu unga.>
5.22: Bɔr umum idɛyiwa umbi uwuruwi aka agũ avɔm nggu undɔkanga awuri itsu uvau nu unga. Ikɛi uwuruwi aka ayisu undɔkanga agɛ, <Ibɛm,> umbɔ awuri ikũna unga azĩ ra anang aka atsu uvau. Bɔr uwuruwi aka agɔr undɔkanga agɛ, <Ugugge!> unga awuri itsĩ ri igbaigba idzũũ urha.
5.23: <<Nggee, ungo uba udɛ̃ɛ̃ngo idzowe izũwã nu uyitta ugɛ uwɔɔ awu ra avɔm nggu ungo,
5.24: uneke izũwã hã ra asu ubeu ha kata. Ugbaashia uzĩ umbi agbisha nggu uner ha. Mɔcɛ nu uba adzowe izũwãngo.
5.25: <<Unera aba atsuka arherhe ri itsingo ru udzepurhe uku uvarha arherhe, àka agbisha nu utsĩndĩ ifetem, iba ishingge rimi unga awuri igbopuwe ungo nggu uwuku atsu uvau, uwuku utsu uvau atsuke ungo ra abok ambow umbɔ agbange ungo ru ugborzĩ.
5.26: Umum indɛyiwa ungo idzidzɛrhe, ungo usi ídzekɔ umɔ utsɛku ungo iki ifai umaa ukobo ha umbɔ aka atsu ungo ififai. Imesa ri itsi arhim itoma-dak
5.27: <<Umbi aka agũmbi umbɔ aka agɔr agɛ, <Niba utomungo-dak.>
5.28: Bɔr umum idɛyiwa umbi ugɛ ubɛn unera aba arhisa ukutsɛrh irhi anyɔna, unga aka atomunga-dak nggu utsɛrh ha ra amɛnnga.
5.29: Usungo ukpu ubok ugha uba uwuri itsuka ungo ra arhim, uhor ukpɔ utare. Ugba ungo ushiɔ ru ugau ukpɔɔ ukpu iyorngo nu umbɔ aka itare iyorngo kishoo ri idzũũ urha.
5.30: Ubok ughango uba itsukakpɔ arhim ru ungo, uzharha ukpɔ utare. Ugba ungo ushiɔ ru ugau ukpɔɔ ri iyorngo nu iyorngo kishoo iki itsĩ ri idzũũ urha. Izharhuwe itsɛrh (Umat 19.9; Umar 10.11-12; Irh 16.18)
5.31: <<Aka agɔrmbɔ ugɛ, <Uwuruwi aka itsũwe utsɛ̃nga, awu ufang unga adzowe ubvur izharhuwe itsɛrh.>
5.32: Bɔr umum idɛyiwa umbi ugɛ ubɛn unera aka atsũwe utsɛ̃nga ri ida iwe ru uvau itoma-dak, atsuke unga ru utsĩndĩ itoma-dak. Nu uwuruwi aka apfunu utsɛrh uwuku uwuwayi ha, uner ha atoma-dak. Uyirh
5.33: <<Ikɛi umbi aka agũmbi umbɔ aka adɛyiwe atokamɛn agɛ, <Àka niba azharhukumbi uyirh, bɔr imɛ̃ɛ̃ngge ungo utsufɛr ubinkpi ungo uku uyirhe Uteijee.>
5.34: Bɔr umum idɛyiwa umbi ugɛ niba ayirhmbi uyirh. Niba ayirhmbi nggu afã, ubinkutsu afã awu anang isei Unum.
5.35: Niba ayirhmbi nggu upfung, ubinkutsu awu ubin uku utsorhe andaidaknga, use nggu Urusharhima, ubinkutsu awu uteu Uyɛrhe Ukugɔng.
5.36: Niba uyirhɔ nggu itsingo, ubinkutsu ungo usi ídɛ̃ɛ̃ utsu igwar unying iwengge iki iterha use iki ifĩrhã.
5.37: Imɛ̃ɛ̃ngge umbi agɔr agɛ <Ĩĩ> use <Ĩ'ĩ>. Ubɛn ubinkpi uku utɔngkpɔ rimi idzeku uwuku ubewe ha. Ififai (Irh 6.29-30)
5.38: <<Umbi aka agũmbi umbɔ aka agɔr agɛ, <Unera aba atsũwũka usungo, umbɔ atsũwe usu ukpunga, nu unera aba atsũwũka unyĩĩngo, umbɔ atsũwe unyĩĩ ukpunga.>
5.39: Bɔr umum idɛyiwa umbi ugɛ niba afaimbi iyiki ibewe nggu iyiki ibewe. Unera aba akwɛra ungo nu utam ubok ugha, udzipuwe utam ukpu uvaa ikɛi.
5.40: Unera aba atsuka arherhango ra anang aka atsu uvau na abeenga ivur atorhango, udzowe nggu atorho akagɔnga ikɛi.
5.41: Unera aba atsu ungo uzɛ̃rhũngo ru ukirhomita unying, uzĩ nggu unga akirhomita avaa.
5.42: Udzowe uwuruwi aka aba ibibee ru ungo, niba udzipukɔ undzing nu uwuruwi aka abee ikɔw ru ungo. Àka abema anggamtsakmbi (Irh 6.27-28,32-36)
5.43: <<Umbi aka agũmbi umbɔ aka agɔr agɛ, <Ubemu undɔkango nu ukpɛ̃ɔ uwuku ukpɛ̃ ungo.>
5.44: Bɔr umum idɛyiwa umbi ugɛ, àka abemu uwuku ukpɛ̃ umbi na afɛne-Num ru abika adzaa umbi uver.
5.45: Rimi hã umbi awuri iwe ru nyaka angwɛ̃ idzidzɛrhe abi Utɛmbi ra afã. Unga atsu unum urhang ra abika aze nu abika abewe, na atsu inai idoi ra abika arhurhika nu abirabɛ aka asi irhikumbɔ.
5.46: Umbi aba abema abirabɛ aka abema umbi ukpekũ, umbi awuri ikpo ikpũ ugbɛtu ukusong? Use abika ayɛi ikirbi abĩ asi ikorhumbɔ rimi?
5.47: Umbi aba akpurha aghwe anermbi, umbi akorhu use anang abɔɔ? Abi uzĩ asi ikorhumbɔ rimi hã?
5.48: Àka awe andzumunga ri irhirhika, ru nyaku Utɛmbi uwu afã aka awu undzumunga ri irhirhika.

6.1: <<Àka angwɛ̃dzɛn utsur itser iyi irhirhikambi iwengge iyi anera aka inyã. Umbi aba akorhe rimi, umbi asi íkpombi itosa ru Utɛmbi uwu afã.
6.2: <<Ngge itsu ivangyɛ ungo uku uwuri idzowe abika abubee, niba urherhungo ake ra awiya, ru nyaka abi ukpukpeta aki ikorhe ra abã ifɛn-Num nu atsĩndĩ ngge itsú anera akpoi umbɔ. Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, umbɔ aka ayɛi itosambɔ niyɔ.
6.3: Bɔr ivangyɛ ungo uku iyike uner uwuku ububee, niba uneke uner uwɔɔ ahwɛnga ubinkpi ungo uku ikorhe.
6.4: Ngge ítsu izũwã ungo ima iwe ri iwɔk. Mɔcɛ Utɛngo, uwuku unyã ri iwɔk, ama adzaa itosango. Ifɛn-Num (Irh 11.2-4)
6.5: <<Ivang ifɛn-Nummbi, àka niba awembi ru nyaka abi ukpukpeta, umbɔ abemi idɛ̃ɛ̃ na afɛn-Num ra abã ifɛn-Num nu atsĩndĩ ru anera anyã umbɔ. Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, umbɔ aka ayɛimbɔ undzumu itosambɔ.
6.6: Bɔr ivangyɛ ungo iki ifɛn-Num, utsĩ ru ubãngo nu ufɔme angwĩ ubãã, ufɛnu Utɛngo uwuku uwe ri iwɔk. Utɛngo uwuku unyã ri iwɔk awuri idzidzaanga itosango.
6.7: Ivangyɛ umbi aka ifɛn-Num, àka niba adarhumbi ider arherhe ru nyaka abirabɛ aka asi ihwɛngmbɔ Unum. Umbɔ akaifɛrhkɔ ugɛ arherhe urhɛrhɛ uwuri itsu umbɔ agũ.
6.8: Niba awembi ru nyaka umbɔ. Utɛmbi ahwɛnga ubinkpi umbi aka abee nu umbi adɔrha afɛna unga.
6.9: <<Àka afɛn-Num riminɛ, << <A Utɛmɛn ra afã, atsam itsokngo isarsatake.
6.10: Iyɛrhango iba, ubinkpi ungo uku ubee umbɔ akorhe ru upfung ru nyaka umbɔ iki ikorhe ra afã.
6.12: Uma utsũwe arhimmɛn, ru nyaka umɛn iki isaki itsũwe abika ashɔng umɛn.
6.13: Niba udarh umɛn uzĩɔ ru undeya, bɔr ufɔrh umɛn ri iyiki ibewe.>
6.14: Umbi aba atsũwũkumbi anera aka ashɔng umbi, Utɛmbi uwu afã awuri itsũwãnga umbi.
6.15: Bɔr umbi aba asi itsũwũkumbi anera aka ashɔng umbi, rimi hã Utɛmbi asi ítsũwũka arhimmbi. Ikpem ighabin
6.16: <<Ivangyɛ umbi aka ikpem ighabin, niba asherhumbi unyɛ̃ɛ̃mbi ru nyaka abi ukpukpeta aki ikorhe, umbɔ aka isaka asherhu unyɛ̃ɛ̃mbɔ ra anera anyã umbɔ aka akpem ighabin. Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, umbɔ aka ayɛimbɔ undzumu itosambɔ.
6.17: Bɔr ivangyɛ ungo uku ukpemɔ̃ ighabin, usorh asungo nu ukpai itsingo nu udzuka atsei,
6.18: utsur anera ahwɛngmbɔ ungo uku ukpem ighabin, bɔr Utɛngo ukpekũ, aka awu ri iwɔk. Nu unga, Utɛngo aka anyã ri iwɔk, awuri idzidzaanga itosango. Iwe ru ubin ra afã (Irh 12.33-34)
6.19: <<Niba akɔng abin angwɛ̃mbi ru upfung, anangkɛ adzurh nu ivivɔ̃ɔ̃ iki idakuwe ake, nu avɛu aki itsĩ avɛu ivɛu.
6.20: Bɔr àka atsu amɛnmbi ri ikpo ugbɛta ra afã, anangkɛ adzurh nggu ivivɔ̃ɔ̃ asi ídakuke ake, anangkɛ avɛu asi ítsĩ avɛumbɔ.
6.21: Ubinkutsu, anangkɛ abinmbi aka awe, umɔ amɛnmbi aka iwe ikɛi. Irhirhang iyor (Irh 11.34-36)
6.22: <<Asu ake awu irhirhang iyor. Asungo aba akerke, iyorngo kishoo iwuri itɔk nggu irhirhang.
6.23: Bɔr asungo aba asi ikerke, iyorngo kishoo iwuri iwe ru uzĩ. Uba irhirhang ru ungo iwu uzĩ, nggaa uzĩ hã uwu uguse!
6.24: <<Unera asi ídɛ̃ɛ̃ atɔ̃wũka itser ra ateiya avaa. Unga awuri ibema unying na akpɛ̃ɛ̃ uwɔrɔ, unga awuri idzowe itsinga ru unying na akpɛ̃ɛ̃ uwɔrɔ. Ungo usi ídɛ̃ɛ̃ udzowukɔ itsingo ru Unum nu uhwɛk. Niba agũmbi ighong (Irh 12.23-31)
6.25: <<Nggee umum idɛyiwa umbi, niba agũmbi ighong ru ibibɛkmbi nu ubinkpi umbi aka igha, use ubinkpi umbi aka ihwa, use atorhakɛ umbi aka itsim nu ayormbi. Urhɛ usi inangmgbɔ ubingha? Iyor isi inangge atorho?
6.26: Àka anyã anunu afã. Asi idoike asi igbɛrke asi ikɔng atsuke ra angban. Bɔr Utɛmbi uwu afã unga adzowe ighigha ake. Umbi asi iwu ru ugarh anangmbi ake?
6.27: Ungamɔ ru umbi igũ ighongnga idɛ̃ɛ̃ itomungge ivanga unying ri inumyɛ unga aka ibɛk?
6.28: <<Awu use utsu umbi agũ ighong atorho? Àka arhi ífur arhum iki iseng. Isi itɔ̃ngge itser use inuw abin.
6.29: Bɔr umum idɛyiwa umbi, uyɛrhe Usorhomon ri igɔngnga kishoo unga anasi igbɛra idzam ru nyaki ifur unying.
6.30: Unum aba agbɛruka idzam nu ubĩĩ arhum rimi, uku uwe irherɛ nu udã umbɔ akpĩĩwe ru urha, asi ígbɛranga umbi idzam, umbi abi imangmang iyiki ici?
6.31: Nggee niba agũmbi ighong agɛ, <Umɛn igha usee?> use <Umɛn ihwa usee?> use <Umɛn itsim usee?>
6.32: Abi uzĩ abee ikpũ abin akɛrɛ ha. Rimi hã Utɛmbi uwu afã ahwɛnga umbi abeembi abin hã.
6.33: Bɔr àka agbaashia abee Iyɛrhe Unum nu irhirhikanga, nu abin hã kishoo awuri idzaambɔ umbi ikɛi.
6.34: Nggee niba agũmbi ighong iyi udã, ubinkutsu udã uwu nggu ayetnumkpɔ. Ubɛn unuma ayetnum amɛ̃ɛ̃ke nggu ukpɔ.

7.1: <<Àka aneke itsu uvau ra anera, utsur umbɔ atsukambɔ umbi uvau.
7.2: Ikpũ uvauwi umbi aki itsuke anera, ikpũ iyi ha umbɔ aka itsuka umbi. Ugbiuwi umbi aka akũ amei, awuri ikũ umgbɔ ha amei adzaa umbi.
7.3: <<Awu use utsu ungo urhi umbumbin ru usu undɔkango nu usi inyãɔ̃ ungbũngkũ uku uwe ru usungo?
7.4: Ungo ukorhu uguse nu ugɔr undɔkango ugɛ, <Uneke umum itsũwã umbumbin ru usungo,> nggayɛ ungbũngkũwi uwu ru usu ukpungo?
7.5: Ungo uner ukpukpeta, utirhu utsũwe ungbũngkũ ru usungo, mɔcɛ nu urhi utai nu utsũwe umbumbin ru usu undɔkango.
7.6: <<Àka niba adzowukumbi íjui abin aka asar. Niba atarkumbi abinarhɔ aki imang ra arhede. Ake awuri ijang adak na adzipa anayiwa umbi. Arhusa, abee, akwɛr angwĩ ubã (Irh 11.9-13)
7.7: <<Àka afɛna awuri idzaambɔ umbi. Àka abee umbi awuri ikpikpombi. Àka akwɛr angwĩ ubã awuri itsuruwambɔ umbi.
7.8: Ubɛn unerwi aka afɛna awuri iyɛisa, unga uwuku ububee awuri ikpoa, nu unga uwuku ukwɛr angwĩ ubã awuri itsurukumbɔ unga.
7.9: <<Awu ungamɔ ru umbi, ungwɛ̃nga aba arhusa uborodi, unga awuri idzowe unga utarh?
7.10: Use unga aba arhusu ubɛrh, unga awuri idzowe unga ibvui?
7.11: Umbi abi amɛn aka abewe aba ahwɛngmbi idzowe angwɛ̃mbi abin aka aze, iwuri iwe iguse Utɛmbi ra afã aka idzowe abin aka aze ra abirabɛ aka ifɛna unga!
7.12: Nggee ubɛn ubinkpi umbi aka abee anera akorhuwa umbi, àka akorhuwe umbɔ rimi hã. Akɛrɛ kishoo ake awu Íkpem Umusa nu abika asɔm Arherhu-Num. Angwĩ akika apare nu akika atɛi (Irh 11.9-13)
7.13: <<Àka atsĩ ra angwĩ ubã aka apare. Ubinkutsu anera arhɛrhɛ abika atsĩ ra angwĩ aka atɛi nu utsĩndĩ uwuku uzĩ itsitsĩm, utɛi.
7.14: Bɔr angwĩ ubã akika apare nu utsĩndĩ uwuku uzĩ ibibɛk ughong uzãrhã. Abika adɔsa umgbɔ asi irhɛmbɔ. Ucucii nu ikpũrhãngge (Irh 6.43-44)
7.15: <<Àka angwɛ̃dzɛn nggu abika asɔm Arherhu-Num igbɛrangwĩ. Umbi awuri inyã umbɔ ru nyaki ídɔi, bɔr idzidzɛrhe umbɔ awu íjui ngbako iyɛ imerh iki ifɛr akarhãrhã.
7.16: Umbi awuri ihwɛng umbɔ ri ikpũ itsermbɔ. Awuri idɛ̃ɛ̃ akɔɔrmbɔ ikpũrhã inebi ru ucucii ididɔk, use awuri ikpombɔ uvorhvo ri ididɔk?
7.17: Rimi hã ubɛn ucucii uwuku uze uku usaku ughwɛr ikpũrhã iyiki ize, bɔr ucucii uku ubewe uku usaku ughwɛr ikpũrhã iyiki ibewe.
7.18: Ucucii uwuku uze usi ídɛ̃ɛ̃ ughwɛrmgbɔ ikpũrhã iyiki ibewe, rimi hã ucucii uwuku ubewe usi ídɛ̃ɛ̃ ughwɛrmgbɔ ikpũrhã iyiki ize.
7.19: Ubɛn ucucii uku usi íghwɛrmgbɔ ikpũrhã iyiki ize, umbɔ awuri igbɛr atsuku urha.
7.20: Nggee, awu ikpũrhãke awuri itsu umbi ahwɛng ake. Umum isi ihwɛng umbi (Irh 13.25-27)
7.21: <<Asi iwea ubɛn unera aka igɔr umum agɛ, <A Uteijee, a Uteijee,> awuri itsĩ ri Iyɛrhe afã, bɔr awu uwuruwi ukpekũ aka akorhu ubinkpi Utɛmum uwuku uwu ra afã aka abee.
7.22: Ru unum hã anera arhɛrhɛ awuri igɔr umum agɛ, <A Uteijee, a Uteijee! Umɛn isi isɔmmɛn Arherhu-Num ri itsokngo, nu ri itsokngo umɛn iki iwayiwe ípfu iyiki ibewe ri ikorha abin idzeu arhɛrhɛ?>
7.23: Mɔcɛ umum iki igɔr umbɔ ugɛ, <Umum isi ihwɛng umbi. Àka asombi ru umum, umbi abika akorhe iki ibewe.> Uner idzin itsoi nu uguge uner idzin (Irh 6.47-49)
7.24: <<Nggee uwuku ugũ arherhamum na atɔ̃ itser nggu ake, unga awu ru nyaku uner itsoi uwuruwi aka adzin iyanga ni ifa.
7.25: Mɔcɛ inai idoi, amɛ̃ adzek, ugba uso ukwɛr iya ha. Ike isi igbake ubinkutsu, adzin ike ni ifa.
7.26: Bɔr uwuku ugũ arherhamum na akpɛ̃ɛ̃ itɔ̃ itser nggu ake, unga awu ru nyaku ugugge uwuruwi aka adzin iyanga nu uzuzeu.
7.27: Inai idoi, amɛ̃ adzek, ugba uso ukwɛr iya ha, igbigba ike ibewungge.>>
7.28: Ivangyɛ Uyesu aka amaa irherhe abin akɛrɛ, ikikɔnga idzedzeu imesanga,
7.29: ubinkutsu unga amesuwe umbɔ ru nyaku unerwi aka awe ru ijee, asi iwea ru nyaka abika amesuwe Ikpemmbɔ.

8.1: Ivangyɛ Uyesu aka acipuwa ri igũ hã, anera arhɛrhɛ aka adɔsa unga.
8.2: Uner ingbim uwɔɔ aba atararhu ra anangnga na agɔr agɛ, <<A uteiya, ungo uba ubemungo, ungo udɛ̃ɛ̃ usarango umum.>>
8.3: Uyesu aberu uboknga abanga unga na agɛ, <<Umum ĩbeemum, usar!>> Kanying ingbimnga ikerhungge.
8.4: Mɔcɛ Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Niba udɛyikɔ unera. Bɔr uzĩ, udɛyiwe itsingo ru uwuku udzowe idɛm-Num, nu udzowe izũwã ru nyaki Íkpem Umusa iki itsu. Ngge iwe ideka ru umbɔ ugɛ ungo uku ukerhungo.>> Imangmang unggbaashi abi iwa Uroma (Irh 7.1-10; Uyoh 4.43-54)
8.5: Ivangyɛ Uyesu aka atsĩ ru Ukafanahum, uteiya abi iwa Uroma uwɔɔ aba ashɔ̃rhũ Uyesu ama ayike unga.
8.6: Agɛ, <<A uteiya, ugãrhãmum ashai iyor awe ri iya, anu igũ ighong akarhãrhã.>>
8.7: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Umum iwuri iba ikerhukũ unga.>>
8.8: Unggbaashi abi iwa Uroma ha agɔr agɛ, <<A uteiya, umum isi imɛ̃ɛ̃mum ungo iki iba ri iyamum. Bɔr urherhu urhɛm ukpekũ, ugãrhãmum hã awuri ikerhunga.
8.9: Umum iwe ru ubok ijee, abi iwa abɔɔ awu ru ubokmum. Igɔr uwɛrɛ inggɛ, <Uzĩ,> unga azĩã, nu uwɔrɔ inggɛ, <Uba,> unga abanga. Umum iba igɔr ugãrhãmum inggɛ, <Ukorhe riminɛ,> unga akorhe.>>
8.10: Ivangyɛ Uyesu aka agũ rimi, unga adzeidzeu na agɔr abika adɔsa unga agɛ, <<Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, ru Uisrairha kishoo umum inasi ikpomum uwuku uwe ru imangmang ikerketangge ru nyaki iyɛrɛ ha.
8.11: Umum igɔr umbi ugɛ anera arhɛrhɛ awuri idzeki igɔ̃kpee nu udiku urhɛɛ, aba asei nggu Uibrahim, Uishaku nu Uyakubu agha irhowa ri Iyɛrhe afã.
8.12: Bɔr awuri itare irhɛ abi Uisrairha ra awiya ru uzĩ, anangkɛ umbɔ aka iciu akpe nggu itãi anyĩ.>>
8.13: Mɔcɛ Uyesu agɔr uteiya abi iwa Uroma hã agɛ, <<Uzĩ! Iwuri ikorhungge ru nyaka ungo uku uwe ru imangmango.>> Kanying ugãrhãnga akerhunga ri ivang hã. Uyesu akerhuwe anera arhɛrhɛ (Umar 1.29-31; Irh 4.38-39)
8.14: Ivangyɛ Uyesu aka atsĩ ri iya Ubitru, unga anyã uya utsɛrha Ubitru anu nu ukoma iyora imani.
8.15: Unga abangu uboknga imani iyor ha inekungge unga. Uya ha asok akorhuwe unga ubingha.
8.16: Urhɛɛ uku uwe, umbɔ akũ anera arhɛrhɛ abika awe ru ípfu iyiki ibewe aba ru unga. Unga akũ irhɛm awayiwe ngge na akerhuwe abi irhãrhã kishoo.
8.17: Akorha akɛrɛ ngge itsuifɛr ubinkpi umbɔ aka arherhe ra angwĩ uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num Uishaya agɛ, <<Unga nyanguwe irhãrhãmɛn, unga akerhuwe ighongamɛn.>> Ayetnum akika adɔsu Uyesu (Irh 9.57-62)
8.18: Ivangyɛ Uyesu aka anyã nggaa ikikɔng anera iki idzipa unga, unga atsu umbɔ agar ukau ha azĩ ugar ukpɔrɔ.
8.19: Mɔcɛ uner uwuku umesuwe Ikpem aba agɔr unga agɛ, <<A umarhem, umum idɔsa ungo izĩ ubɛn anang ungo iki izĩ.>>
8.20: Uyesu adzipa agɔr unga agɛ, <<Íjui ngbako iyiki ici iwengge ri ingwĩngge, anunu ikɛi aweke ra ashiyake, bɔr Ungwɛ̃-Ner ashia ra anangkɛ unga aka itsu itsinga.>>
8.21: Ungwɛ̃ imesa uwɔɔ agɔr unga agɛ, <<A uteiya, uneka umum inggbaashia izĩ ĩdzake utɛmum.>>
8.22: Bɔr Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Udɔsa umum, uneke abika akpe adzake abika akpembɔ.>> Uyesu adɔɔte ugba inai (Umar 4.35-41; Irh 8.22-25)
8.23: Mɔcɛ unga atsĩ ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃, angwɛ̃ imesanga adɔsa unga.
8.24: Kanying ugba ukerketakpɔ usoyi ru ukau amɛ̃ hã, amɛ̃ asoyi atsĩrhã ru ukhukhɔɔ ha. Bɔr Uyesu awu ru urhɔ.
8.25: Angwɛ̃ imesa azĩ azita unga, agɔr agɛ, <<A uteiya, ufɔrha umɛn! Umɛn iki iwuri itsĩmmɛn!>>
8.26: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi abi imangmang iyiki ici, awu use utsu umbi agũ iwei rimi?>> Mɔcɛ unga asok atsɛrhu ugba nu ubvun ukau ha. Ukpɔ kishoo udɔɔr uku utata.
8.27: Anera adzeidzeu na arhusa agɛ, <<Awu ikpũ uner uwukusong nuwi? Ugba nu ubvun ukau ikɛi agũna unga!>> Ikikerhuwe inera ivaa abi ipfu iyiki ibewe
8.28: Ivangyɛ unga aka atsĩ ugar ukpɔrɔ ra abĩ abi Ugadara, inera ivaa abi ipfu iyiki ibewe aka adzek ra anang adzak anera agbopa unga. Umbɔ awu ubin iwei akarhãrhã, ngge itsu anera asi idɛ̃ɛ̃ adɔsumbɔ utsĩndĩ hã.
8.29: Umbɔ atsu ivum agɛ, <<A Ungwɛ̃ Unum, ungo uba itser use ru umɛn? Ungo uba idzaa umɛn uver ri ivanga idɔrhi iwe?>>
8.30: Ukhapa ru umbɔ, ukpui arhede arhɛrhɛ udɛ̃ɛ̃ ughãwã.
8.31: Ípfu iyiki ibewa ha ishɔ̃rhũ Uyesu igɛ, <<Ungo uba uwayikɔ umɛn, utsu umɛn itsĩ ru ukpui arhede ukpɔrɔ.>>
8.32: Mɔcɛ unga agɔr ngge agɛ, <<Àka azĩ!>> Ngge idze izĩ ru ukpui arhede ha, ake asok atĩ acipa nu ughoghor abang ukau ha agba atsĩ ra amɛ̃ akpeke.
8.33: Abi ughãwã arhede ha atĩ atsĩ ru utepa adzowe isarhe ha kishoo, nu ubinkpi uku ukorhe ra abi ipfu iyiki ibewa ha.
8.34: Mɔcɛ kishoo anera ru utepa adzek agbangu Uyesu. Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka anyã unga, umbɔ ashɔ̃rhã unga ama asoka ra abĩmbɔ.

9.1: Uyesu atsĩ ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃, agar azĩ uteunga.
9.2: Aner abɔɔ akũ uner ishayi iyor aba ru unga, anu nu ufar. Ivangyɛ Uyesu aka anyã imangmangmbɔ, unga agɔr ushayi iyor ha agɛ, <<Niba ugũo ighong ungwɛ̃ ha, umbɔ aka atsũwãmbɔ arhimngo.>>
9.3: Mɔcɛ abɔɔ abika amesuwe Ikpem agɔr adɔkambɔ agɛ, <<Utsak uwurɛ arhenu Unum!>>
9.4: Bɔr Uyesu ahwɛnga ubinkpi umbɔ aka akaifɛrhkɔ, unga agɛ, <<Awu use utsu umbi akaifɛrhkɔ iyiki ibewe ra amɛnmbi rimi?
9.5: Akasong asi ighongke irherhe, igɔr ugɛ, <Umbɔ aka atsũwãmbɔ arhimngo,> use igɔr ugɛ, <Usisok uzɛ̃rhã?>
9.6: Bɔr umum ibee umbi ahwɛng ugɛ Ungwɛ̃-Ner awea ri ijee iyiki itsũwe arhim ru upfung.>> Mɔcɛ unga agɔr ushayi iyor ha agɛ, <<Usisok ufetu ufarngo uzĩ ri iya.>>
9.7: Nu utsa ha asok azĩã ri iyanga.
9.8: Ivangyɛ ikikɔng anera iki inyã rimi iwei ifɛr umbɔ. Umbɔ akpoi Unum, aka adzowe anera ikpũ ijee ha. Uyesu ayisu Umatiyu (Umar 2.13-17; Irh 5.27-32)
9.9: Uyesu awu ru azɛ̃rhã na anyã utsawɔɔ agburh Umatiyu asei ra anang aka ayɛi ikirbi abĩ. Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Udɔsa umum.>> Mɔcɛ Umatiyu asok adɔsa unga.
9.10: Uyesu asei ighabin ri iya Umatiyu, abika ayɛi ikirbi abĩ nu abirabɛ umbɔ aka anyanga umbɔ awu abi arhim arhɛrhɛ, aba agha nggu unga nu angwɛ̃ imesanga.
9.11: Ivangyɛ abi Ufarisi aka anyã rimi, umbɔ arhusa angwɛ̃ imesanga agɛ, <<Awu use utsu umarhemmbi asei igha ubingha nggu abika ayɛi ikirbi abĩ nu abi arhim?>>
9.12: Ivangyɛ Uyesu aka agũ rimi, unga agɛ, <<Abika aker asi ibeembɔ uner agɔu, bɔr abi irhãrhã abee.
9.13: Àka azĩ amesa agben itsɛng Arherhu-Num akirakɛ aka agɔr ugɛ, <Umum ibee umbi awe ra atorh, isi ĩbeemum idɛm-Num.> Umum isi ĩbamum iyisa abika akaifɛrhkɔ ugɛ umbɔ arhika, umum ĩba iyisa abirabɛ aka ahwɛng ugɛ umbɔ awu abi arhim.>> Arhusa arherhe ikpem ighabin (Umar 2.18-22; Irh 5.33-39)
9.14: Mɔcɛ angwɛ̃ imesa Uyohana aba arhusa unga, agɛ, <<Umɛn nggu abi Ufarisi ikpemmɛn ighabin, bɔr awu use utsu angwɛ̃ imesango asi ikpemmbɔ?>>
9.15: Mɔcɛ Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Awu use itsu awɛrhu uner utsɛrh uwuku ufa awe ru idamɛn nu uner ha ana awe nggu umbɔ? Ivanga niyɔ ibarɔ awuri inyãnguwe uner utsɛrh uwuku ufa ha na abɔre umbɔ. Ivang hã niyɔ umbɔ aka ikpem ighabin.
9.16: <<Unera asi íkũ atorho aka afa asɔr abipa atorho aka agbe. Ubinkutsu, aka afa ha awuri ishĩrhã avaate aka agbe ha. Ivivaar ha iwuri inangge iyi inggbaashia.
9.17: Ikɛi unera asi ítsuka amɛ̃ inebi aka afa ra ambãĩ aka agbe. Umbɔ aba akorhumbɔ, ambãĩ hã awuri iyar. Amɛ̃ inebi ha awuri igba, ambãĩ hã awuri iwe ibɛm. Ĩ'ĩ, aka isaka atsu amɛ̃ inebi aka afa ra ambãĩ aka afa, nu ake asi íyarke ra amɛ̃ inebi adzek agbake.>> Ukom unakutsɛrh nu ukutsɛrh uwuku ughong (Umar 5.21-43; Irh 8.40-56)
9.18: Uyesu anu isɔme umbɔ akɛrɛ ha, unggbaashi uwɔɔ ru ubã ifɛn-Nummbɔ aba atararhu ra anangnga na agɛ, <<Unapmum anai ikpe. Bɔr uba utsorhu ubokngo nu unga awuri ibɛka.>>
9.19: Uyesu asok azĩã nggu unga, nu angwɛ̃ imesanga adɔsa unga.
9.20: Mɔcɛ utsɛrh uwɔɔ aka atsĩã imɛka usɔkdũmɛn nggu irhãrhã umɛ̃ɛ̃ aba ra andzing aba abangu ifɛn atorho Uyesu.
9.21: Unga agɔr ra amɛnnga agɛ, <<Umum ĩba ĩbangumum ifɛn atorhanga umum iwuri ikerhumum.>>
9.22: Ivangyɛ Uyesu aka adzipa anyã unga. Unga agɛ, <<Niba ugũo ighong unapmum. Imangmangngo ngge ikerhuwa ungo.>> Kanying utsɛrh ha akerhunga.
9.23: Ivangyɛ Uyesu aka aba atsĩ ri iya unggbaashi ha, anyã abika abar aserhwa nu ikikɔng anera iki igwarha arherhe.
9.24: Unga agɛ, <<Àka asombi. Una hã anasi ikpea bɔr awe ru urhɔ.>> Bɔr umbɔ anyĩrhã unga.
9.25: Anera aka adzek amaa, unga atsĩ adzur ubok una hã, una hã asok adɛ̃ɛ̃.
9.26: Isarhe arherhe ha itɛ̃rhã imaangge abĩ hã. Uyesu akerhuwe uner ibvuta nu igbau
9.27: Uyesu aka azɛ̃rhã aneke anang hã, abi ibvuta avaa adɔsa na atsarhi irhakmbɔ agɔr agɛ, <<Ucorhuwa umɛn Ungwɛ̃ Udauda!>>
9.28: Ivangyɛ Uyesu aka atsĩ ri iya, abi ibvuta ha aba ru unga, unga arhusa umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi awembi ri imangmang ugɛ umum idɛ̃ɛ̃ ikorhuwamum akɛrɛ?>> Umbɔ agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ĩĩ, Uteijee.>>
9.29: Unga abanga asumbɔ na agɛ, <<Ri imangmangmbi neke ngge ikorhe ru umbi.>>
9.30: Asumbɔ ayanguke. Uyesu agbiite atombɔ akarhãrhã agɛ, <<Niba adɛyikumbi unera akɛrɛ ha.>>
9.31: Bɔr umbɔ adzek atɛ̃rhã arherhe ha amaa kishoo abĩ hã.
9.32: Umbɔ aka adzek ra awiya, umbɔ akũ uner uwɔɔ aka awe ru ipfu iyiki ibewe iki ikɛnngge unga arherhe aba ru Uyesu.
9.33: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka awayiwe ipfu iyiki ibewe ha idze, uner igbau ha atirhunga arherhe. Ikikɔng anera idzedzeu ni igɔr igɛ, <<Anasi inyãmbɔ ikpũ ifɛrhɛ rimi ru Uisrairha.>>
9.34: Bɔr abi Ufarisi agɛ, <<Nggu ijee uyɛrhe ípfu iyiki ibewe unga iki ikũ atsusuwe ípfu iyiki ibewe.>> Abi itsera awu ukunjiir
9.35: Uyesu adɔsi iteu iyiki igɔng nu iyiki ici kishoo, amesuwe ra abã ifɛn-Nummbɔ. Adzowe Isarhe Iyiki Ize iyi Iyɛrhe afã, na akerhuwe anera ru kishoo ikpũ irhãrhã nu ighighong.
9.36: Ivangyɛ unga aka anyã anera aka akɔng arhɛrhɛ, unga agũ atorh umbɔ, ubinkutsu, umbɔ awe ru uver akarhãrhã na ashimbɔ ru uner uwuku uyike. Umbɔ awe ru nyaki ídɔiyɛ iki ishingge ru uner idzɛu.
9.37: Mɔcɛ unga agɔr angwɛ̃ imesanga agɛ, <<Igbɛra abin iwe irhɛirhɛ, bɔr abi itsera awe ukunjiir.
9.38: Àka ashɔ̃rhũ Uteijee uwu igbɛra abin, unga adene abi itser ri icang igbɛra abinnga.>>

10.1: Unga aka ayisa angwɛ̃ imesa usɔkdũmɛn aba ru unga, unga adzowe umbɔ ijee iyiki itsũwe ípfu iyiki ibewe na akerhuwe ubɛn ikpũ irhãrhã nu ighighong.
10.2: Atsok abi itser Uyesu ha akɛ usɔkdũmɛn hã, uwu inbgaashia, Usiman uwu umbɔ iki iyisa Ubitru, nu Uandarawu ungwɛ̃mbɔ, Uyaku ungwɛ̃ Uzabadi nu Uyohana ungwɛ̃mbɔ,
10.3: Ufirhibu, Ubatorhomi, Utoma nu Umatiyu uner uwuku uyɛisu ikirbi abĩ, Uyaku ungwɛ̃ Uharhfa, Utaddiyu,
10.4: Usiman uner Ukan'ana nu Uyahuda Uiskariyoti, uwuku ugha adaknga. Uyesu adene angwɛ̃ imesanga (Umar 6.7-13; Irh 9.1-6)
10.5: Uyesu adene usɔkdũmɛn hã agɛ, <<Niba azĩmbi ra atsen abi Uyahuda use atsĩ ru ubɛn uteu Usamariya.
10.6: Àka azĩ ri ídɔi iyiki igwir iyi Uisrairha.
10.7: Ri izizĩmbi, àka adzowe isarhe iyɛrɛ agɛ, <Iyɛrhe afã iki iyongge.>
10.8: Àka akerhuwe abi irhãrhã, àka azituwe abika akpe, àka asare abi ingbim, àka atsusuwe ípfu iyiki ibewe. Umbi ayɛi ijee ha izũwã, àka atɔ̃ itser nggu ngge izũwã.
10.9: Niba akpɔmmbi uzinarhi use uazurhfa use ubinkpi uku uwu ru nyaku uhwɛk ri ibvukmbi.
10.10: Niba nyangumbi ukpoka ru uzɛ̃rhã hã, use atorho avaa, use abadak avaa use igbong, ubinkutsu, uner itser amɛ̃ɛ̃ ikpo ubingha.
10.11: <<Ubɛn uteu ukugɔng use uku uci umbi aka itsĩ, àka abee uner uwuku urhurhika umɔ. Àka asei ri iyanga utsɛku isisokmbi.
10.12: Ivangyɛ umbi aka itsĩ ri iya ha, àka aghwe umbɔ.
10.13: Iya ha iba ibemuke umbi, neke ididɔɔrambi iwe umɔ, bɔr ike iba isi ibemuke, ididɔɔrambi ibvui iba ru umbi.
10.14: Unera aba asi iyɛisa umbi use akpea ato ra arherhambi, àka awashuwe uzurhu uwu adakmbi ivangyɛ umbi aka idze ri iya ha use uteu ha.
10.15: Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, uver uteu ha use iya ha uwuri unangkpɔ ukpu aner Usɔdɔm nu Ugomora ru unum ukpuku uvarha arherhe. Ayetnum akɔ abarɔ (Umar 13.9-13; Irh 12.11-12; 21.12-19)
10.16: <<Umum idena umbi adzek ru nyaka ídɔi ra ateu íjui ngbako. Nggee àka awe ru itsoi ru nyaki íbvui na ashimbi ri iki ibewe ru nyaka anurhɛu.
10.17: <<Àka akpɔm amɛnmbi nggu anera, umbɔ awuri iden umbi ra ateu akakũ na akwɛr umbi ra abã ifɛn-Nummbɔ.
10.18: Ri itsimbi aka adɔsa umum, umbɔ awuri ikũna umbi azĩ ra asu agomna nu ayɛrhe ru nyaka abi idekamum ru umbɔ nu atsen abi Uyahuda.
10.19: Bɔr ivangyɛ umbɔ aka idzur umbi, niba agũmbi ighong ubinkpi umbi aka irherhe use umbi irherhe uguse. Ri ivang hã awuri idzaambɔ ubinkpi umbi aka irherhe.
10.20: Asi íwea umbi irherhe, bɔr Ipfu Utɛmbi ngge irherhe ra angwĩmbi.
10.21: <<Ungwɛ̃yi awuri idzowe ungwɛ̃mbɔ umbɔ afɛre, utei ikɛi awuri idzowe ungwɛ̃nga. Awɛkaci ikɛi awuri iwu ri igamtsak nggu ateimbɔ utsɛku umbɔ aka itsu umbɔ afɛre umbɔ.
10.22: Anera kishoo awuri ikpɛ̃na umbi ri itsokmum. Bɔr kishoo uwuku ubima utsɛku imimasha awuri ikpoa ififɔrh.
10.23: Umbɔ aba adzaambɔ umbi uver ra anang akɔɔ, àka atĩ azĩ anang akɔɔ. Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, Ungwɛ̃-Ner awuri ibanga nu umbi anasi imaambi itsĩrhĩ iteu Uisrairha kishoo.
10.24: <<Ungwɛ̃ imesa asi inanga umarhemnga, use ugãrhã ananga uteiyanga.
10.25: Ungwɛ̃ imesa awe ra anggɔm unga aka awe ru nyaku umarhemnga nu ugãrhã ru nyaku uteiyanga. Umbɔ aba ayisa umum iki iwe uteiyambi ugɛ Uba'arhzaburh uyɛrhe ípfu iyiki ibewe, awuri iyisa umbi nggu itsok ha anangmbɔ umum! Unerwi aka amɛ̃ umbɔ agũ iwei unga (Irh 12.8-9)
10.26: <<Nggee niba agũmbi iwei umbɔ. Ubin ushikpɔ umbɔ aka afɔm, ukpɔ uku usi ídzekpɔ, use ri iwɔk umbɔ aka asi íhwɛngmbɔ.
10.27: Abinkɛ umum iki isɔma umbi ru uzĩ, àka asɔme ake ri irhirhang. Abinkɛ aka akhɛwa ra atombi, àka adũwã ake ra atsi uvi.
10.28: Niba agũmbi iwei abika afɛre iyor bɔr asi ídɛ̃ɛ̃ afɛrmbɔ ipfu. Nu ngge iki iwe rimi, aka agũ iwei uwuruwi aka idɛ̃ɛ̃ afɛre iyor nu ipfu kishoo ri idzũ urha.
10.29: Asi iwea ahwirhgɔm avaa umbɔ aki igoshe ukobo unying? Nggee unying usi ígbamgbɔ ra abĩ Utɛmbi aka asi íhwɛnga umgbɔ.
10.30: Nu uko ígwar itsimbi umbɔ aka avuvarha ngge.
10.31: Nggee niba agũmbi iwei, umbi anangmbi ahwirhgɔm ugarh idiki irhɛirhɛ.
10.32: <<Ubɛn unera aka adɛyiwe itsinga ugɛ unga awu uwu umum ra asu anera, umum iwuri idɛyikũ unga awu uwu umum ra asu Utɛmum ra afã.
10.33: Bɔr ubɛn unera aka atsɛyinga ihwɛng umum ra asu anera, umum iwuri itsitsɛyimum ihwɛng unga ra asu Utɛmum ra afã. Asi iwea ididɔɔr bɔr awu ifuw (Irh 12.51-53; 14.26-27)
10.34: <<Niba akaimbi ifɛrhkɔ ugɛ umum ĩba itsu ididɔɔr ru upfung. Umum isi ĩbamum itsu ididɔɔr, bɔr ikũ ifuw.
10.35: Ubinkutsu, umum ĩba itsu ifuw ru, << <ungwɛ̃ nu utɛnga, unai nu uyanga, utsɛn ungwɛ̃ nu ukokanga.
10.36: Anggamtsak unera awuri iwe abi iyanga.>
10.37: <<Uwuruwi aka abemu uyanga use utɛnga ananga umum asi imɛ̃ɛ̃ iwe uwu umum. Uwuruwi aka abemu ungwɛ̃nga use unapunga ananga umum, asi imɛ̃ɛ̃ iwe uwu umum.
10.38: Ubɛn unera aka asi ishupu igãrhãmau ucuciianga adɔsunga umum, asi imɛ̃ɛ̃ iwe uwu umum.
10.39: Uwuruwi aka akpo urhɛnga, unga awuri igwirhe umgbɔ, nu uwuruwi aka agwirhuwe urhɛnga ri itsimum, awuri ikpoa umgbɔ. Itser itosa (Umar 9.41)
10.40: <<Uwuruwi aka ayɛi umbi, ayɛi umum. Uwuruwi aka ayɛi umum ayɛi uwuku udena umum.
10.41: Uwuruwi aka ayɛi uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num ri itsernga, awuri iyɛisa itosa uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num. Nu ubɛn uwuku uyɛi uner uwuku urhika ri irhirhikanga awuri iyɛisa itosa iyi uner uwuku urhika.
10.42: Nu uwuruwi aka adzowe uko ukpɛwa amɛ̃ aka aghɛnga ru ubɛn unera ra abɛrɛ aka awe angwɛ̃ imesamum, umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, awuri ikpoa itosanga.>>

11.1: Uyesu aka amaa imesuwe angwɛ̃ imesanga usɔkdũmɛn hã, unga adzek umɔ azĩ amesuwe na adzowe isarhe ra abĩ Ugarhirhi.
11.2: Ivangyɛ Uyohana ru ugborzĩ aka agũ abinkɛ Ukiristo aka akorhe, unga adene angwɛ̃ imesanga
11.3: azĩ arhusa unga agɛ, <<Awu ungo uwu uwuku ububa ha, use umɛn itsu asumɛn ru uwɔɔ?>>
11.4: Uyesu adzipa agɛ, <<Àka abvui azĩ adɛyiwe Uyohana ubinkpi umbi aka agũ na anyã.
11.5: Abi ibvuta anyãmbɔ, akatarhu azɛ̃rhũmbɔ uzɛ̃rhã, abi ingbim akerhumbɔ, abi igbau agũmbɔ, ikom isongge nggu urhɛ, adzowukumbɔ Isarhe Iyiki Ize ra atsũwã.
11.6: Idorh iwu iyi uwu ha aka asi ikpɛ̃ɛ̃ umum ri itsi abinkɛ umum iki ikorhe.>>
11.7: Ivangyɛ awɛ imesu Uyohana aka azĩmbɔ, Uyesu atirha arherhe nggu ikikɔnga ri itsi Uyohana agɛ, <<Umbi azĩ izɛrhu use ra arhum? Ubĩĩ uku uder ugba iki ifɛu?
11.8: Iba ishingge rimi, ude umbi adzek azĩ izɛrhu use? Utsa uwɔɔ aka atsim atorho aka aze? Ĩ'ĩ, abika atsim atorho aka aze asei ra adzepurhe iyɛrhe.
11.9: Ude umbi adzek azĩ izɛrhu use? Uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num? Ĩĩ, umum idɛyiwa umbi, ananga uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num.
11.10: Unga hã uwi umbɔ aka atsɛng ra Arherhu-Num ri itsinga agɛ, << <Umum iwuri idene ungwɛ̃ itsermum agbaashia ru ungo. Unga awuri igbishuwa atsĩndĩngo.>
11.11: Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, ra abirabɛ akatsɛrh aka amar asi itsĩmbɔ Uyohana Uner Ubɔtisima. Bɔr uwuruwi aka awu uku ucia ri Iyɛrhe afã, ananga unga.
11.12: Udzur ri ivang Uyohana Uner Ubɔtisima uba utsĩ irherɛ, Iyɛrhe afã iwe ru uver, abika adzowe uver ha umbɔ abee ivur ngge ri iker.
11.13: Ubinkutsu kishoo itsɛng abika asɔm Arherhu-Num nu Íkpem Umusa irherhungge arherhe akɛrɛ utsɛku ivang Uyohana.
11.14: Umbi aba ibemumbi ubinkpi umum iki irherhe, Uyohana unga awu Uirhiya ha umbɔ aka arherhe ugɛ unga awuri ibanga.
11.15: Neke uner uwuku uwu ra ato aka agũ, unga agũ.
11.16: <<Umum ikpangu udan ukpirɛ nggu use? Awu ru nyaka awɛkaci iki isei ra anang izɛɛ na ayisa abɔɔ agɛ,
11.17: << <Umɛn ibara umbi aserhuwa, umbi akpɛ̃mbi izer. Umɛn itsũ ubom akpe, umbi akpɛ̃mbi iciu akpe.>
11.18: Uyohana aka aba, asi itsuka amɛnnga ri ighigha nu ihwihwa, umbɔ agɛ, <Unga awe ru ipfu iyiki ibewe.>
11.19: Ungwɛ̃-Ner aka aba agha na ahwa, umbɔ agɛ, <Àka anyã uner uwuku ubvun igha abin nu ihwihwa akarhãrhã, uwɛrhɛ abika ayɛi ikirbi abĩ nu abi arhim!> Bɔr awu itser unera iwuri idɛyiwe ugɛ unga awea ri itsoi.>> Atorh iteuyɛ iki inasi idzipungge (Irh 10.13-15)
11.20: Mɔcɛ Uyesu aka atirhi itsɛyi iteuyɛ unga aka akorhe irhɛ abin idzeu ri ngge, ubinkutsu, anera asi idzipumbɔ.
11.21: <<Atorhngo, Ukorazin! Atorhngo Ubetsaida! Agɛ itser idzeu ha umbɔ aka atɔ̃ ru umbi, umbɔ atɔ̃mbɔ ngge ru Utaya nu Usidon, umbɔ awuri idzipumbɔ iki ifitem, umbɔ awuri itsim ashaka atorho, na asei ra atɔɔ.
11.22: Bɔr umum idɛyiwa umbi, ru unum ukpuku uvarha arherhe, uvermbi uwuri inangkpɔ ukpu Utaya nu Usidon.
11.23: Ungo igango, Ukafanahum, ungo ukaifɛrhkɔ ugɛ awuri ibera ungo afũ afã? Ĩ'ĩ, awuri ikũna ungo acipa ra anang isei abika akpukpe. Itser idzeuyɛ umbɔ aka atɔ̃ ru ungo umbɔ aba atɔ̃ ngge ru Usɔdɔm, ukpɔ uba uwe umɔ utsɛku irherɛ.
11.24: Bɔr umum idɛyiwa umbi ru unum ukpuku uvarha arherhe, uvermbi uwuri inangkpɔ ukpu Usɔdɔm.>> Àka aba ru umum na akpo iwiwosha (10.21-22)
11.25: Ri ivang hã Uyesu awu ra anggɔm ri Ipfu Isarsatangge, agɔr agɛ, <<Umum ikpoi ungo Utɛ, Uteijee uwu afã nggu abĩ, ungo uku uwɔkɔ ifɛrhɛ iyɛrɛ ru abi itsoi nu abi idzursu, nu usɔme ake ra awɛkaci.
11.26: A Utɛ, akɛrɛ ha awu ubinkpi ungo uku ugũibɛn ikorha ukpɔ.
11.27: <<Utɛmum adzaa abina kishoo ru umum. Unera asi ihwɛnga amɛn Ungwɛ̃ɛ̃, Utɛ ikiyikanga ahwɛng. Unera asi ihwɛngnga amɛn Utei, Ungwɛ̃ɛ̃ ukpekũ nu uwuruwi Ungwɛ̃ hã aka isɔme unga.
11.28: <<Àka aba ru umum, kishoo umbi abika agũ azhe na agũ imor, umum iwuri idzaamum umbi iwiwosha.
11.29: Àka adzowe atsimbi na amesa ru umum, ubinkutsu, umum iwu uner inna nu ididɔɔr ra amɛnmum, nu umbi awuri ikpombi iwiwosha ra amɛnmbi.
11.30: Ubinkutsu, idzowe itsimbi ru umum asi iwea ubin uku ughong, abinmum asi imorke.>>

12.1: Ri ivang hã Uyesu azɛ̃rhã atɔng ri ícang uarhkama ru unum ukpuku uwosha. Angwɛ̃ imesanga agũ imerh umbɔ atirhi igbiu isha arhkama hã atãi.
12.2: Ivang abi Ufarisi aka anyã rimi, umbɔ agɔr unga agɛ, <<Unyã! Angwɛ̃ imesango aka azharhuwe Ikpem unum ukpuku uwosha.>>
12.3: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi anasi ivarhumbi ubinkpi Udauda aka akorhe ri ivangyɛ unga nggu awɛrhu uzɛ̃rhãnga aka agũ imerh?
12.4: Unga aka atsĩ ru Iya-Num anyangu usarkasar uborodi atãi nggu awɛrhu uzɛ̃rhãnga, ukpurukpi ri Ikpem awu abika adzowe idɛm-Num ukpekũ iki itãi.
12.5: Use umbi anasi ivarhumbi ri Íkpem Umusa ugɛ abika adzowe idɛm-Num ri itser unum ukpuku uwosha ri Iya-Num aka adakuwe unum ukpuku uwosha na ishimbɔ ru uvau?
12.6: Umum idɛyiwa umbi uwuruwi aka ananga Iya-Num awu nggimi.
12.7: Umbi aba ahwɛngmbi agben itsɛng Arherhu-Num hã iki igɔr igɛ, <Umum ibee umbi awe ra atorh, isi ĩbeemum idɛm-Num,> Umbi aba asi itsumbi uvau ra abika asheru uvau.
12.8: Ubinkutsu Ungwɛ̃-Ner awu Uteijee unum ukpuku uwosha.>> Uner ushayi ubok (Umar 3.1-6; Irh 6.6-11)
12.9: Adzeka anang hã unga atsĩã ru ubã ifɛn-Nummbɔ.
12.10: Uner uwɔɔ uboka uku ushayi awu umɔ. Umbɔ abee udĩkpi umbɔ aka ikpo Uyesu nggu uvau, umbɔ arhusa unga agɛ, <<Ri Ikpem imɛ̃ngge umbɔ akerhuwe ru unum ukpuku uwosha?>>
12.11: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Unera ru umbi aba awuri idɔi ngge igba ru ughwee ru unum ukpuku uwosha, uner idɔi ha asi ídzur akpɔm ngge atsũwũka?
12.12: Unera ananga idɔi akarhãrhã! Nggee asi iwea izharhuwe Ikpem ri ikorhi iyiki ize ru unum ukpuku uwosha.>>
12.13: Mɔcɛ unga agɔr utsak ha agɛ, <<Unamu ubokngo udzek.>> Nggee unga anamu uboknga udzek, ukpɔ ukerhe uwe ru nyaku ukpu uvaa.
12.14: Bɔr abi Ufarisi adzek akɛki itsũwã umbɔ aka ifɛre Uyesu. Itsuifɛr isɔm Arherhu-Num Uishaya
12.15: Ivang Uyesu aka ahwɛng rimi, unga abɔruka anang hã. Arhɛrhɛ aka adɔsa unga, unga akerhuwe irhãrhãmbɔ.
12.16: Unga agbiite atombɔ ugɛ niba adɛyikumbɔ iwiwenga ru unera.
12.17: Akɛrɛ ake atsuafɛr ubinkpi uku urherhe ra angwĩ uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num Uishaya agɛ,
12.18: <<Unyã ugãrhãmum uwi umum iki isɛng, uwu umum iki ĩbema, ru unga umum iki igũibɛn. Umum iwuri itsuke Ipfumum nu unga, nu unga atsu abĩã ahwɛng irhirhika.
12.19: Asi ísoyinga isa use itsuyi ivum, asi ígũmbɔ urhɛmnga nu atsĩndĩ.
12.20: Asi íbvũã ugamwi uku uwuri ibvũ, utɔngviwi uku uwuri irhim, unga asi írhĩwũka. Unga awuri ikorha akɛrɛ utsɛku unga aka itsu irhirhika igha inggbaashi.
12.21: Abĩã awuri ifosa ri itsoknga.>> Uyesu nu Uba'arhzaburh (Umar 3.20-30; Irh 11.14-23)
12.22: Mɔcɛ umbɔ akũ uner ibvuta aka afɔr arherhe adaka awe ru ipfu iyiki ibewe aba. Uyesu akerhuwe unga, ngge itsu unga arherha arherhe na anyã ikɛi.
12.23: Anera kishoo adzeidzeu na agɛ, <<Awu Ungwɛ̃ Udauda nuwi?>>
12.24: Bɔr abi Ufarisi aka agũ akɛrɛ ha, umbɔ agɛ, <<Nggu ijee Uba'arhzaburh uyɛrhe ípfu iyiki ibewe utsak uwurɛ aka isaka akũ atsusuwe ípfu iyiki ibewe ha.>>
12.25: Uyesu ahwɛnga ifɛrhkɔmbɔ unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Ubɛn iyɛrhe iki igau agbɛra avaa iwuri itsĩm, nu ubɛn uteu use iya iki igau nggu adɔkake isi ídɛ̃ɛ̃ke.
12.26: Ushaitan aba atsũwũka Ushaitan, awe ri ifuw nggu itsikamnga. Iyɛrhanga idɛ̃ɛ̃ iguse?
12.27: Umum iba ikũ ijee Uba'arhzaburh itsusuwe ípfu iyiki ibewe, abimbi akũ ijee iyikisong atsusuwe? Angwɛ̃ imesambi awuri itsuka umbi uvau ra arherhe akɛrɛ.
12.28: Umum ĩba ikũ ijee Ipfu-Num itsusuwe ípfu iyiki ibewe, mɔcɛ Iyɛrhe Unum iki ibangge ru umbi.
12.29: <<Use ikɛi, unera awuri ikorha aguse na adɛ̃ɛ̃ atsĩ ri iya uner uwuku uker avur abinnga? Awuri igbaashia abow unga kata na adɛ̃ɛ̃ akarha abin iyanga.
12.30: <<Uwuruwi aka asi iwea nggu umum, akpɛ̃ɛ̃ umum. Uwuruwi aka asi ikɔnga nggu umum, asusituwe.
12.31: Nggee umum ĩdɛyiwa umbi, awuri itsũwũkumbɔ anera ru kishoo ikpũ arhim nu urhena ru Unum, bɔr uwuruwi aka arhenu Ipfu-Num, asi ítsũwũkumbɔ arhimnga.
12.32: Ubɛn unera aba arherhunga urhɛm uku ubewe ri itsi Ungwɛ̃-Ner, awuri itsũwũkumbɔ unga, bɔr uwuruwi aka arheni Ipfu Isarsatangge, asi ítsũwũkumbɔ unga icɛrɛ use ivang iyiki ibiba.
12.33: <<Ucucii uku uze uku isaku ughwɛr ikpũrhã iyiki ize, ucucii uku ubewe uku isaku ughwɛr ikpũrhã iyiki ibewe. Aka isaka ahwɛng ucucii ri ikpũrhãngge.
12.34: Umbi abi amɛn íbvui, umbi awuri ikorha uguse na adɛ̃ɛ̃ arherhe iyiki ize nggu amɛn aka abewambi? Ubinkpi uku uwe ra amɛn, ukpɔ uku idzeyiwa ra angwĩ.
12.35: Uner uwuku uze aka isaka akũ abin aka aze adzeka ra anang aka aze unga aka angwɛ̃ ru unga. Uner uwuku ubewe aka isaka akũ abin aka abewe adzeka ra anang aka abewe unga aka angwɛ̃ ru unga.
12.36: Umum idɛyiwa umbi ugɛ ru unum ukpuku uvarha arherhe, awuri ivarhukumbɔ ubɛn unera ra arherhe akatãrhãkɛ unga aka arherhe.
12.37: Ubinkutsu, irhɛm arherhango ake itsu ungo ushɔɔr, ake itsu ungo utsĩm.>> Utsar ukpu Uyunana (Umar 8.11-12; Irh 11.29-32)
12.38: Mɔcɛ abi Ufarisi abɔɔ nu abika amesuwe Ikpem agɔr unga agɛ, <<A umarhem, umɛn ibee inyã utsar idzeu ru ungo.>>
12.39: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Abika abewe, abika asheru Unum, abi undan ukpirɛ arhusu utsar idzeu! Bɔr asi ídɛyikumbɔ umbɔ utsar, akpurha adɛyiwe utsar ukpu uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num Uyunana.
12.40: Ru nyaku Uyunana aka amaa inuma itaar utsuu nu atenum ra anaa ubɛrh ukugɔng, rimi hã Ungwɛ̃-Ner aka imaa inuma itaar utsuu nu atenum awe ru anɔnɔr abĩ.
12.41: Aner Unineba awuri iso adɛ̃ɛ̃mbɔ ru unum ukpuku uvarha arherhe nggu udan ukpirɛ na awuri itsu uvau ru ukpɔ, ubinkutsu, umbɔ adzipumbɔ ri udũwã Uyunana. Icɛrɛ uwuku unang Uyunana uwi nggimi.
12.42: Ru unum ukpuku uvarha arherhe Usarauniya uwu Unɔr awuri iso adɛ̃ɛ̃ nggu undan ukpirɛ na atsuke uvau ru ukpɔ, ubinkutsu unga adzeka anang akika ader aba igũ itsoi Usorhomon. Nggayɛ uwuruwi aka anangnga Usorhomon awu nggimi. Ibiba ipfu iyiki ibewe (Irh 11.24-26)
12.43: <<Ivangyɛ ipfu iyiki ibewe iba idzek ru unera, iki isaki iyarhe ri inang iyiki ikoi ibee ikpo iwiwosha ni isi ikpongge.
12.44: Ngge igɔr igɛ, <Umum ibvui izĩ ri iyakɛ umum iki idzek.> Ngge iba ikpo unera ashia umɔ ri iya ha, ngge inyã umbɔ aka ayar na agbishumbɔ iya ha.
12.45: Mɔcɛ ngge ibvui izĩ ikarhe ípfu iyiki ibewe iyɔɔ utɔɔva, iyiriyɛ iki ibewe inangngge ngge, ngge kishoo iba isei umɔ. Isisei utsa ha iyi imaataka iwuri ibewe inangge iyi inggbaashia. Iwuri iwe rimi nggu undan ukpuku ubewe ukpirɛ.>> Uya nu angwɛ̃mbɔ Uyesu (Umar 3.31-35; Irh 8.19-21)
12.46: Uyesu aka awe ra arherhe nggu ikikɔng, uyanga nu angwɛ̃mbɔ aba adɛ̃ɛ̃ ra awiya, abee arherha arherhe nggu unga.
12.47: Uwɔɔ agɔr unga agɛ, <<Uyango nu angwɛ̃mbi adɛ̃ɛ̃ ra awiya, abee irherha arherhe nggu ungo.>>
12.48: Unga agɔr unga agɛ, <<Uwukusong awu uyamum, nu abikasong awu angwɛ̃mɛn?>>
12.49: Ayottu uboknga ra angwɛ̃ imesanga agɛ, <<Unyã uyamum uwi nu angwɛ̃mɛn.
12.50: Ubɛn unerwi aka akorhu ubinkpi Utɛmum ra afã aka abema, unga awu ungwɛ̃mɛn nu unapumɛn nu uyamum.>>

13.1: Ru unum hã Uyesu adzeki iya azĩ aseisa ru ubang ukau.
13.2: Ikikɔng anera irhɛirhɛ iki ikɔng idziranga, itsu unga atsĩ ru ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ asei umɔ. Ikikɔnga idɛ̃ɛ̃ ru ubang ukau ha.
13.3: Mɔcɛ unga adɛyiwe umbɔ abina arhɛrhɛ ru unyaka arherhe agɛ, <<Uner irham azĩ inna ikpũnga.
13.4: Unga adɛ̃ɛ̃ inna ikpũ hã, ikpũ iyɔɔ igbei nu utsĩndĩ anunu aba akpɔuke iyi ha kanying.
13.5: Iyɔɔ igbei ru ukpɔrha, abĩ asi iweke akarhãrhã. Ngge imɛr kanying ubinkutsu, abĩ anang hã asi ighorke.
13.6: Bɔr ivangyɛ unum uku umani iyi ha ikoingge, ubinkutsu, ngge iki ishingge ra anũnang.
13.7: Ikpũ iyɔɔ igbei ri ididɔk, ngge isɛng itong ngge iyi ha.
13.8: Ikpũ iyɔɔ igba ra abĩ aka aze, anangkɛ ngge iki ighwɛr ikpũrhã ananaka, iyɔɔ isɔka utɔ̃tɔ̃ĩ use isɔka itaitaar.
13.9: Unga uwuku awe ra ato, neke unga agũ.>>
13.10: Angwɛ̃ imesa ha aba arhusa unga agɛ, <<Awu use utsu ungo urherhuwe anera arherhe ru unyaka arherhe?>>
13.11: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Ihwɛng abinkɛ aka awɔk aki Iyɛrhe afã aka adzaa ru umbi, bɔr asi iwea umbɔ.
13.12: Uwuruwi aka awe ru ihwihwɛng awuri itomuwe unga akpo arhɛrhɛ. Uwuruwi aka ashia, awuri iyɛse ungwɛ̃rhĩ ihwihwɛng ha unga aka awerangge.
13.13: Umum irherhuwe umbɔ arherhe nggu unyaka arherhe ubinkutsu, <<Umbɔ awuri irhimbɔ, bɔr asi ínyãmbɔ, na awuri igũmbɔ, bɔr asi íhwɛngmbɔ.
13.14: Irhɛm uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num Uishaya iki itsuifɛrngge ra atsimbɔ. Iki igɔr igɛ, << <Umbi awuri igũmbi na asi íhwɛngmbi, umbi awuri irhimbi na asi ínyãmbi.
13.15: Ubinkutsu, amɛn anera abɛrɛ awe akerketake, aghong umbɔ agũ nggu atombɔ, aka abvurkumbɔ asumbɔ. Iba isi iwengge rimi, umbɔ awuri anyãmbɔ nggu asumbɔ, umbɔ awuri igũmbɔ nggu atombɔ, na ahwɛngmbɔ nggu amɛnmbɔ, na adzipa aba ru umum ikerhuwe umbɔ.>
13.16: Bɔr idorh iwe iyi asumbi ubinkutsu, ake adɛ̃ɛ̃ anyãke, nu atombi ubinkutsu ake adɛ̃ɛ̃ agũke.
13.17: Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, abika asɔm Arherhu-Num nu abika arhurhika arhɛrhɛ aka abee inyã ubinkpi umbi aka anyã bɔr asi inyãmbɔ, use agũ ubinkpi umbi aka agũ, bɔr asi igũmbɔ.
13.18: <<Àka akpeto na agũ agben unyaka arherhe uner uwuku unna ikpũ abin hã.
13.19: Ivangyɛ ubɛn unera aka agũ arherhe Iyɛrhe afã na asi ihwɛnga ake, Undenggũ unga aka isaka aba avur ubinkpi umbɔ aka adoi ra amɛnnga. Iwu ikpũ iyiki igba ru utsĩndĩ.
13.20: Iyiriyɛ iki igba ra ukpɔrha, iwe ru nyaku uwuku ugũ arherhe ha na ayɛi nggu anggɔm.
13.21: Bɔr unga aka ashia ra anũnang, asi idãrhũnga. Ivang arherhe ha aki ikũ uver nggu ayetnum uba, unga awuri izĩ ra andzing.
13.22: Iyiriyɛ iki igba ra anang ididɔk ngge iwe ru nyaku uwuku ugũ arherhe ha, bɔr iwãrhãna abin upfung ri ibee iwe ru ubin ibɛrh ni ikɛnngge arherhe ha ighwɛr ikpũrhã.
13.23: Bɔr iyiriyɛ iki igba ra abĩ aka aze iwe ru nyaku uwuku ugũ arherha ha na ahwɛnga ake. Unga aghwɛr ikpũrhã, ananaka, isɔka utɔ̃tɔ̃ĩ, use isɔka itaitaar idikunga nggu ubinkpi umbɔ aka adoi.>> Unyaka arherhe ubĩĩ ri itsem
13.24: Uyesu abvui adzowe umbɔ unyaka arherhe akɔɔ agɛ, <<Iyɛrhe afã iwu ru nyaku unerwi aka anna ikpũ iyiki ize ri icangnga.
13.25: Bɔr ivangyɛ anera kishoo aka awu ru urhɔ, unggamtsaknga azĩ adoi ikpũ ubĩĩ ri icang itsem hã na azĩã.
13.26: Ivangyɛ ikpũ abin hã iki imɛr, umɔ ubĩĩ igakpɔ umɛr.
13.27: <<Agãrhũ uner icang hã aba agɔr unga agɛ, <A uteiya, ungo usi idosɔ ikpũ iyiki ize ri icangngo? Ubĩĩ udzekɛ ukpɔ?>
13.28: <<Unga agɛ, <Awu unggamtsakmum unga akorha aki ha.> <<Agãrhã ha agɛ, <Ungo ubeengo umɛn izĩ izɔnge ubĩã hã?>
13.29: <<Unga agɛ, <Ĩ'ĩ, ubinkutsu, umbi aba awuri izɔngmbi ubĩĩ ri itsem hã, umbi adɛ̃ɛ̃ abvurhkumbi itsema nggu ubĩã hã.
13.30: Àka aneke ake aseng urhɔnga utsɛku ivang iyiki ititeng. Ri ivang hã umum iwuri ĩdɛyikũ abi aka ateng hã, umbɔ agbaashia ateng ubĩã hã apfuma, aboyi atsã atsã, umbɔ akpĩĩwe, bɔr akarhi itsema aba atsuku ungbanmum.> >> Unyaka arherhe ishaa ikpũ iyiki ici (Umar 4.30-32; Irh 13.18-19)
13.31: Unga abvui adɛyiwe umbɔ unyaka arherhe akɔɔ agɛ, <<Iyɛrhe afã iwe ru nyaki ishaa ikpũ iyiki ici, utsa uwɔɔ aka anyanga adoi ri icangnga.
13.32: Ngge iwu iyiki icia ri ikpũ abin, bɔr ngge iki imɛr iseng, ngge iwu ucucii uwuku ugɔng, anunu akang ashiyake ra aboka.>> Unyaka arherhe aki uga (Irh 13.20-21)
13.33: Unga abvui adzowe umbɔ unyaka arherhe akɔɔ agɛ, <<Iyɛrhe afã iwu ru nyaku ungwɛ̃rhũ uga ukutsɛrh aka akayi nggu agbiu isɔka ivaa aki akɔ̃ abvurh, umgbɔ ufuyiwe kishoo agbiu ha.>>
13.34: Uyesu adɛyiwe ikikɔng anera kishoo abin akɛrɛ nggu unyaka arherhe. Unga asi irherhunga ubin ukpɔɔ umɔ uku usi iwekpɔ unyaka arherhe.
13.35: Ngge itsuifɛr ubin uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num aka arherhe agɛ, <<Umum irherha arherhe nggu unyaka arherhe, abinkɛ aka awɔk utirhi ri imimunu upfung.>> Agben unyaka arherhe ubĩĩ ru itsem
13.36: Mɔcɛ unga abɔre ikikɔng anera na atsĩã ri iya. Angwɛ̃ imesanga aba agɔr unga agɛ, <<Udɛyiwa umɛn agben unyaka arherhe ubĩĩ ri icang itsem.>>
13.37: Unga agɛ, <<Uwuruwi aka adoi ikpũ iyiki ize awu Ungwɛ̃-Ner.
13.38: Icang hã ngge iwe upfung, ikpũ iyiki ize ha iwe angwɛ̃ Iyɛrhe afã. Ubĩĩ uwe angwɛ̃ Undenggũ.
13.39: Nu unggamtsak uwuku udoi ubĩĩ hã, awu Undenggũ. Ivang iyiki iteng hã, awe imimaa upfung, abika atuteng hã awe ípfu itser-Num.
13.40: <<Ru nyaka umbɔ iki ikarhu ubĩĩ akpĩĩwe ru urha, iwuri iwe rimi ri imimaa upfung.
13.41: Ungwɛ̃-Ner awuri idene ípfu itsernga ngge idze, iwuri ikpotuwe Iyɛrhe afãnga ubɛn ubin uku utsu igba ra arhim nu kishoo abika akorhi iyiki ibewe.
13.42: Umbɔ awuri itare abika abewunga ri ikon urha, ra anangkɛ umbɔ aka iciu akpe na atãi anyĩ.
13.43: Mɔcɛ abika arhika awuri irhang ru nyaki ishaa unum ri Iyɛrhe Utɛmbɔ. Unga uwuku awe ra ato, neke unga agũ. Unyaka arherhe abin ugarh ri iwɔk
13.44: <<Iyɛrhe afã iwu ru nyaka abin ugarh aka awɔk ri icang. Ivangyɛ unera aka akpo ake, unga awɔke ake ikɛi, agɔm na azĩ agoshe kishoo abinnga na agoi icang hã. Unyaka arherhe utarh ukpuku uwe ru ugarh
13.45: <<Iyɛrhe afã iwu ru nyaku uner igoi uwuku ubee atarhkɛ aka awu ru ugarh.
13.46: Ivangyɛ unga aka akpo utarh ugarh ha akarhãrhã, unga azĩ agoshuka kishoo abinkɛ unga aka awe ra ake na agoi utarh ugarh ha. Unyaka arherhe itang igber
13.47: <<Iyɛrhe afã iwe ru nyaki itang igber iyiki idzui abɛrh. Umbɔ iki itang ru ukau ukugɔng ngge idzui kishoo ikpũ abɛrh.
13.48: Ivangyɛ ngge iki itɔk, abi udɛm agbiir azĩ ru ubang ukau ukugɔng hã. Mɔcɛ umbɔ asei na atɛng abɛrh aka azea atsuku uzing na atare akika abewe.
13.49: Iwuri iwe rimi ri imimashu upfung. Ípfu itser-Num iwuri iba igashuwe abika abewe nggu abika arhurhika.
13.50: Umbɔ awuri itare abika abewunga ri ikon urha, ra anangkɛ umbɔ aka iciu akpe na atãi anyĩ.>>
13.51: Uyesu arhusa agɛ, <<Umbi ahwɛngmbi akɛrɛ ha kishoo?>> Umbɔ agɛ, <<Ĩĩ.>>
13.52: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Nggee ubɛn uwuku umesuwe Ikpem umbɔ aka adɛyiwe unga Iyɛrhe afã, awe ru nyaku utei iya aka akũ abin adzeka ru angbannga aka afa nu aka agbe.>> Akpɛ̃mbɔ Uyesu ru Unazarat (Umar 6.1-6; Irh 4.16-30)
13.53: Ivangyɛ Uyesu aka amaa unyaka arherhe akɛrɛ, unga abɔruka anang hã.
13.54: Ivangyɛ unga aka aba utepunga, unga atirhi imesuwe anera ru ubã ifɛn-Nummbɔ. Umbɔ adzeidzeu na arhusa agɛ, <<Utsak uwurɛ akpo itsoi iyɛrɛ rinɛɛ rimi nu ijee iyiki ikorha abin idzeu?
13.55: Asi iwea uwɛrɛ ha awu ungwɛ̃ ukapinta ha? Asi iwea uyanga umbɔ iki iyisa Umaryamu? Asi iwea angwɛ̃mbɔ rabɛ, umbɔ Uyaku nu Uyusuf nu Usiman nu Uyahuda?
13.56: Asi iwea kishoo anapumbɔ rabɛ nggu umɛn? Awu rinɛɛ unga aka akpo kishoo abin akɛrɛ ha?>>
13.57: Mɔcɛ umbɔ agũ avɔm nggu unga. Bɔr Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Awu ru ubɛn unera aka adzowe uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num igɔng, bɔr asi iwea abi utepunga, nu abi iyanga.>>
13.58: Awu ida imangmangmbɔ itsu unga asi ikorhunga abin idzeu arhɛrhɛ nggɔɔ ha.

14.1: Ri ivang hã Uyɛrhe Uhiridu aka agũ arherhe ri itsi Uyesu.
14.2: Unga agɔr abika atɔ̃we unga itser agɛ, <<Awu Uyohana Uner Ubɔtisima unga asok ra akpe! Ngge itsu unga awuri ijee iyiki ikorha abin idzeu akɛrɛ.>>
14.3: Ubinkutsu Uhiridu aka adzur Uyohana agbang ru ugborzĩ ri itsi Uhirudiya utsɛrha ungwɛ̃mbɔ Ufirhibu.
14.4: Ubinkutsu Uyohana adɛyiwe Uhiridu agɛ, <<Isi imɛ̃ngge ungo uku upfunu Uhirudiya!>>
14.5: Uhiridu abee ifɛre Uyohana, bɔr agũ iwei anera, ubinkutsu umbɔ aka anyangu Uyohana awu uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num.
14.6: Unum imar Uhiridu uku uba uwe, unapa Uhirudiya azer azer ri irhowa ha atsu Uhiridu agũibɛn akarhãrhã.
14.7: Nggee unga ayirh na abemuwe idzowe una hã kishoo ubinkpi unga aka ifɛna.
14.8: Uyisa una hã adzowe itsũwã, agɛ, <<Udzaa umum itsi Uyohana Uner Ubɔtisima ri itɛ̃rhãzɔu.>>
14.9: Amɛn uyɛrhe aghong, bɔr ri itsi atsen irhowa ha nu uyirh ha utsu unga atsu umbɔ adzowe ubinkpi una hã aka abee.
14.10: Unga adene umbɔ azĩ azharhukumbɔ itsi Uyohana ru ugborzĩ.
14.11: Akũ itsi ha nu itɛ̃rhãzɔu aba adzowe ru una hã, unga atsã akowuka uyanga.
14.12: Angwɛ̃ imesu Uyohana aba ashupu ukomnga adzake. Mɔcɛ umbɔ azĩ asɔme Uyesu. Uyesu adzowe ubingha inera anakagɔnga atɔ̃ɔ̃ (Umar 6.30-44; Irh 9.10-17; Uyoh 6.1-14)
14.13: Ivang Uyesu aka agũ rimi, unga asok atsĩ ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ agar azĩã anangkɛ anera aka ashimbɔ awe ikiyikanga. Bɔr ikikɔng anera iki igũ rimi, umbɔ adzeka ri íteu adɔsa unga ra adak.
14.14: Ivangyɛ unga aka adzeku ukhukhɔɔ ha anyã anera aka akɔng arhɛrhɛ, unga agũ atorh umbɔ na akerhuwe abi irhãrhãmbɔ.
14.15: Urhɛɛ uku uwe, angwɛ̃ imesanga aba agɔr unga agɛ, <<Anang akɛrɛ ashike ru uner, nggayɛ urhɛɛ uku uwekpɔ. Usoyiwe ikikɔnga umbɔ azĩmbɔ, ngge itsú umbɔ atsĩ ri iteu azĩ agoi ubingha.>>
14.16: Uyesu agɛ, <<Isi imɛ̃ngge umbɔ azĩmbɔ. Àka adzowe umbɔ ubin umbɔ agha.>>
14.17: Umbɔ agɔr agɛ, <<Umɛn ikpurhi iwe ru ípo uborodi itɔ̃ɔ̃ nu abɛrh avaa.>>
14.18: Unga agɛ, <<Àka akũwã ake ru umum nggimi.>>
14.19: Na agɔr anera asei nu ubĩĩ. Unga anyangu ípo uborodi atɔ̃ɔ̃ hã na abɛrh ha ikivarhake. Abera asunga arhi afã, atar uwɛɛ ru Unum. Unga atsɔka adzowe ra angwɛ̃ imesanga, umbɔ agashuwe ra anera.
14.20: Umbɔ kishoo agha ashur, nu angwɛ̃ imesanga arhɔ̃yĩ awushunga. Ake atɔk azĩnga usɔkdũmɛn.
14.21: Irhɛɛ anera aka agha ubingha ha akatsak atsĩmbɔ anaka agɔnga atɔ̃ɔ̃, asi ivarhumbɔ akatsɛrh nu awɛkaci. Uyesu azɛ̃rhũ uzɛ̃rhã nu amɛ̃ (Umar 6.45-52; Uyoh 6.15-21)
14.22: Kanying Uyesu atsu angwɛ̃ imesanga abɔre unga na atsĩ ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ agbaashia azĩmbɔ ugar ukpɔrɔ. Unga asoyiwe ikikɔnga.
14.23: Unga aka asoyiwe umbɔ amaa, unga afũã ni itsi igũa ikiyikanga azĩã ifɛn-Num. Urhɛɛ uwekpɔ, unga awe ru nggɔɔ ha ikiyikanga.
14.24: Ri ivang hã ukhukhɔɔ ha uku uzĩ udermgbɔ ru ukau ukugɔng hã, ugba unyaikpɔ utsu amɛ̃ uni ikwɛr umgbɔ.
14.25: Ivanga iwu akara ataar aki utsuu, umbɔ anyã Uyesu aka azɛ̃rhã nu amɛ̃ ukau ukugɔng azĩã ru umbɔ.
14.26: Ivang angwɛ̃ imesanga aka anyã unga azɛ̃rhã nu afafã amɛ̃, umbɔ agũ iwei. Agɛ, <<Awu imãrhã!>> Atsu ivum iwei iki ifɛrmbɔ.
14.27: Kanying Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka aker amɛnmbi! Awu umum. Niba agũmbi iwei.>>
14.28: Mɔcɛ Ubitru agɔr unga agɛ, <<A Uteijee, aba awu ungo, utsu umum izɛ̃rhã nu afafã amɛ̃ ĩba ru ungo.>>
14.29: Uyesu agɛ, <<Uba.>> Mɔcɛ Ubitru adzeku ukhukhɔɔ ha, atirhu uzɛ̃rhã nu afafã amɛ̃ azĩã ru Uyesu.
14.30: Bɔr unga aka anyã ugba, unga agũ iwei na atirhunga ididɛɛ. Unga atsu ivum, agɛ, <<A Uteijee, ufɔrh umum!>>
14.31: Kanying Uyesu anamu uboknga adzur unga, agɛ, <<Ungo uner imangmang iyiki ici, awu use utsu ungo ucang?>>
14.32: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka atsĩ ukhukhɔɔ ha, ugba ha ukpe unu.
14.33: Mɔcɛ abirabɛ aka awe ru ukhukhɔɔ ha adzowe unga igɔng, agɛ, <<Idzidzɛrhe ungo uwu Ungwɛ̃ Unum.>> Uyesu akerhuwe abi irhãrhã ru Ujanisarat (Umar 6.53-56)
14.34: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka agar ukau ha, umbɔ acipa ru abĩ Ujanisarat.
14.35: Aner ha ahwɛngmbɔ ugɛ Uyesu awu umɔ, umbɔ adene umbɔ adɛyiwe anera aka awu ra abĩ hã. Umbɔ akũ kishoo abi irhãrhã aba ru unga.
14.36: Umbɔ ashɔ̃rhã unga aneke abi irhãrhã amaa abangu ifɛn atorho akagɔnga. Nu kishoo abirabɛ aka abanga ake, akerhumbɔ.

15.1: Mɔcɛ abi Ufarisi abɔɔ nu abika amesuwe Ikpem adzeku Urusharhima aba ru Uyesu arhusa agɛ,
15.2: <<Awu use utsu angwɛ̃ imesango azharhuwe agbeyi atokamɛn? Asi isorhmbɔ abokmbɔ na adɔrha agha ubingha.>>
15.3: Bɔr Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Awu use utsu agbeyambi atsu umbi azharhuwe Ikpem Unum?
15.4: Ubinkutsu Unum agɛ, <Udzowe imor ru utɛngo nu uyango,> nu <Ubɛn unera aka arhenu utɛnga use uyanga awu ufang umbɔ afɛre unga.>
15.5: Bɔr umbi amesuwe ugɛ ubɛn unera aba awea ru ubinkpi unga aka iyike utɛnga use uyanga, na adɛ̃ɛ̃ agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <Ubin hã uwu izũwã iyi Unum.>
15.6: Rimi hã umbi agɛ asi iwea ufang unga idzowe imor utɛnga nggu ukpɔ. Agbeyambi atsu umbi anyanga Arherhu-Num awe ibɛm.
15.7: Umbi abi ukpukpeta! Irhikungge uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num Uishaya aka asɔm arherhe ri itsimbi agɛ,
15.8: << <Aner abɛrɛ adzaa umum igɔng nggu angwĩmbɔ ukpekũ, bɔr amɛnmbɔ aderke nggu umum.
15.9: Umbɔ adzaa umum igɔng ibɛm, anu imesuwe ikpem anera ugɛɛ Unum adzowe umbɔ.> >> Abinkɛ aka awuri itsu ida isisar (Umar 7.14-23)
15.10: Uyesu ayisi ikikɔnga iba ru unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka akpeto na ahwɛng.
15.11: Asi iwea ubinkpi iki itsĩ ra angwĩ unera itsu unga asi isara, bɔr ubinkpi uku idzeka ra angwĩnga, ukpɔɔ utsu unga <asi isara.> >>
15.12: Mɔcɛ angwɛ̃ imesanga aba ru unga arhusa agɛ, <<Ungo uhwɛngngo abi Ufarisi agũ avɔm umbɔ aka agũ arherha akɛrɛ?>>
15.13: Unga agɛ, <<Ubɛn ubinkpi Utɛmum ra afã aka asi idosa, awuri ibvurhuwe.
15.14: Àka aneke umbɔ, umbɔ awu abi ibvuta abika adarh abi ibvuta. Uner ibvuta aba adarha uner ibvuta, umbɔ ikivarhambɔ awuri igba ru ughwee.>>
15.15: Ubitru agɔr unga agɛ, <<Usɔma umɛn agben unyaka arherhe ha.>>
15.17: Umbi asi ihwɛngmbi ubɛn ubinkpi uku utsĩ ra angwĩ unera, utsĩ ra ananga nu udzekpɔ ri iyornga?
15.18: Bɔr ubinkpi uku idzeka ra angwĩ, udzeka ra amɛnnga, ukpɔɔ ha utsu unera asi isara.
15.19: Ubinkutsu, ifɛrhkɔ iyiki ibewe iki isaki idzeyiwa ra amɛn unera, ifɛr uner, itoma-dak, iyiki itãrhã, ivɛu, igbɛrangwĩ, nu idakuwe itsok unera.
15.20: Akɛrɛ atsu unera asi isara, bɔr igha ubin nggu abok aka ada isisorh asi ítsu unera asi isara.>> Imangmang utsɛrh uwɔɔ (Umar 7.24-30)
15.21: Uyesu aka abɔre anang hã na azĩã abĩ Utaya nu Usidon.
15.22: Utsɛrh Ukan'ana aka asei ra abĩ hã aba ru unga, na atsarhi irhaknga agɛ, <<Ucorhuwa umum! Uteijee, Ungwɛ̃ Udauda, ipfu iyiki ibewe inu idzowe unapmum uver.>>
15.23: Uyesu asi iyanuka urhɛm. Nggee angwɛ̃ imesanga aba ashɔ̃rhã unga agɛ, <<Udene unga azĩã, ubinkutsu arharuwe atomɛn nggu ivum adɔsa umɛn.>>
15.24: Mɔcɛ Uyesu agɔr utsɛrh ha agɛ, <<Adena umum ri ídɔi Uisrairha iki igwir ukpekũ.>>
15.25: Bɔr utsɛrh ha aba atararhu ru unga, agɛ, <<A Uteijee, uma uyika umum!>>
15.26: Uyesu agɛ, <<Isi irhikungge umbɔ anyangu ubingha awɛkaci atsuke íjui.>>
15.27: Unga agɛ, <<Ĩĩ, Uteijee, bɔr íjui iki isaki ighangge awushu ubingha aki idzeku utebur iyi uteiya agbei nu abĩ.>>
15.28: Mɔcɛ Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<A atsɛrh ha, imangmango iwe akarhãrhã! Ibibeeango ikpongge.>> Kanying unapunga akerhunga. Uyesu akerhuwe anera arhɛrhɛ
15.29: Uyesu abɔre umɔ na adɔsu udiku ubang Ukau Ugarhirhi. Mɔcɛ unga afũ igũ aseisa.
15.30: Nggaa ikikɔng iba ru unga, akũ akatarhu, nu abi ibvuta, nu abika akaikai, nu abika afɔr arherhe adambɔ, nu abɔɔ arhɛrhɛ, aden umbɔ ra adaknga, nu unga akerhuwe umbɔ.
15.31: Anera adzeidzeu umbɔ aka anyã agbau arherha arherhe, abika akaikai ayormbɔ akerhuke, akatarhu azɛ̃rhũmbɔ uzɛ̃rhã, abi ibvuta anyãmbɔ. Nu umbɔ kishoo akpoi Unum uwu Uisrairha. Uyesu afuka anera anakagɔnga anaa (Umar 8.1-10)
15.32: Uyesu ayisa angwɛ̃ imesanga aba ru unga na agɛ, <<Umum icorhuwe aner abɛrɛ. Awu unum untaar nukpi umbɔ aka awe nggu umum ashimbɔ ru ubingha. Umum isi ĩbeemum isoyiwe umbɔ nggu imerh, utsur umbɔ agbeimbɔ ru udĩ.>>
15.33: Angwɛ̃ imesanga agɛ, <<Umɛn ikpo ubingha ri inɛɛ ra arhum akɛrɛ uku imɛ̃ ifuka arhɛrha anera abɛrɛ?>>
15.34: Uyesu arhusa umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi awe ru ípo uborodi isong?>> Umbɔ agɛ, <<Utɔɔva nu ungwɛ̃rhã abɛrh ukunjiir.>>
15.36: Mɔcɛ unga anyangu ípo uborodi ha utɔɔva nu abɛrh ha, unga aka atar uwɛɛ ru Unum. Mɔcɛ na atsɔka ukpɔ adzowe angwɛ̃ imesanga, umbɔ agashuwe ikikɔng anera.
15.37: Kishoo agha ashur. Angwɛ̃ imesanga arhɔ̃yĩ awushunga ra abĩ ake atɔk azĩnga utɔɔva.
15.38: Abirabɛ aka agha akatsak awu anakagɔnga anaa, asi ivarhumbɔ akatsɛrh nu awɛkaci.
15.39: Uyesu aka asoyiwe ikikɔng anera amaa, unga atsĩ ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ azĩã abĩ Umagadan.

16.1: Abi Ufarisi nu abi Usaduki aba aviru Uyesu, arhusa unga ugɛ unga akorhu ubin idzeu ukpu uwu utsar uku udzeka afã.
16.2: Unga agɛ, <<Urhɛɛ uba uwekpɔ, umbi aka isaka agɔr agɛ, <Ananga awuri izeke udã, afã awe uku uzhããĩ.>
16.3: Nu unkpeeka umbi aba anyã afã awe uku uzhããĩ na atsir nggu ufin inai, umbi aka isaka agɔr agɛ, <Irherɛ inai iwuri idoingge.> Umbi adɛ̃ɛ̃ ahwɛngmbi agben afã, bɔr umbi asi ihwɛngmbi atsarkɛ aka idɛyiwe agben abinkɛ aka anu ikorhe inum iyɛrɛ.
16.4: Abika abewe, abika asheru Unum, abi undan ukpirɛ arhusu utsar idzeu! Bɔr asi ídɛyikumbɔ umbɔ utsar, akpurha adɛyiwe utsar ukpu uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num Uyunana.>> Uyesu abɔre umbɔ na azĩã. Uga abi Ufarisi nu uwu abi Usaduki (Umar 8.14-21)
16.5: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka agar ukau ha, angwɛ̃ imesa ayirukumbɔ ikpɔm uborodi.
16.6: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka angwɛ̃dzɛn, àka akpɔm amɛnmbi nggu uga abi Ufarisi nu abi Usaduki.>>
16.7: Umbɔ arherhe nggu adɔkambɔ agɛ, <<Unga arherhe rimi ubinkutsu, awu umɛn iki isi ikpɔmmɛn uborodi.>>
16.8: Uyesu ahwɛnga ubinkpi umbɔ aka anu irherhe unga arhusa agɛ, <<Umbi abi imangmang iyiki ici, awu use utsu umbi arherhe nggu adɔka ugɛ umbi ashimbi ru uborodi?
16.9: Utsɛku icɛrɛ umbi anasi ihwɛngmbi? Umbi aka ayirukumbi umum iki ikũ ípo uborodi itɔ̃ɔ̃ ifuka anera anakagɔnga atɔ̃ɔ̃? Azĩnga asong umbi aka arhɔ̃yĩ atɔk?
16.10: Ikɛi ípo uborodi utɔɔva uku uwe ubingha anera anakagɔnga anaa. Azĩnga asong umbi aka arhɔ̃yĩ atɔk?
16.11: Awu use utsu umbi asi idɛ̃ɛ̃ ahwɛngmbi ugɛ umum isi irherhumum arherhe uborodi? Umum igɔr ugɛ àka akpɔm amɛnmbi nggu uga abi Ufarisi nu abi Usaduki.>>
16.12: Mɔcɛ umbɔ aka ahwɛng ugɛ asi igɔra umbɔ ikpɔm amɛn ru uga uborodi, bɔr agɔr umbɔ ikpɔm amɛn ri imesa abi Ufarisi nu abi Usaduki. Ubitru adekuwe Uyesu unga awu Ukiristo (Umar 8.27-30; Irh 9.18-21)
16.13: Ivangyɛ Uyesu aka aba ra abĩ abi Ukaisariya Ufirhibi, unga arhusa angwɛ̃ imesanga agɛ, <<Anera ani igɔr ugɛ Ungwɛ̃-Ner awu ungamɔ?>>
16.14: Umbɔ agɛ, <<Abɔɔ agɔr ugɛ Uyohana Uner Ubɔtisima, abɔɔ agɛ Uirhiya, abɔɔ agɛ Uirimiya use uwɔɔ ra abika asɔm Arherhu-Num.>>
16.15: Unga arhusa umbɔ agɛ, <<Bɔr umbi agɔr ugɛ umum iwu ungamɔ?>>
16.16: Ubitru agɛ, <<Ungo uwu Ukiristo Ungwɛ̃ Unum uwu urhɛ.>>
16.17: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ungo uwu uner idorh, Usiman ungwɛ̃ Ujona! Asi iwea unera adɛyiwa ungo akɛrɛ ha, awu Utɛmum uwuku uwe ra afã.
16.18: Umum idɛyiwa ungo ugɛ ungo uwu Ubitru, agbena agɛ ifa. Nu ifa iyɛrɛ umum iki idzin ikikɔng abika adɔsa, iyiriyɛ ijee akpe isi ínangge ingge.
16.19: Umum iwuri ĩdzaamum ungo ijee iki idzeki Iyɛrhe afã. Ubɛn ubinkpi ungo iki ibow ru upfung, awuri ibow ukpɔ ra afã. Ubɛn ubinkpi ungo iki igarhuwe ru upfung, awuri igarhuwe ukpɔ ra afã.>>
16.20: Mɔcɛ unga agbiite ato angwɛ̃ imesanga utsur umbɔ adɛyikumbɔ unera agɛ unga awu Ukiristo. Uyesu asɔm ikpũ akpenga aka ikpe (Umar 8.31—9.1; Irh 9.22-27)
16.21: Udzur ri ivang hã Uyesu atirhi idɛyiwe angwɛ̃ imesanga ugɛ awu ufang unga awuri izĩ Urusharhima na ahwa ayetnum ra abina arhɛrhɛ ru abok akakũ, nu ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num, nu abika amesuwe Ikpem. Awu ufang umbɔ afɛre unga, ru unum untaar unga awuri isok abɛka.
16.22: Ubitru agbiira unga azĩ ri ifɛna atirhi itsɛrha unga agɛ, <<Ishingge Uteijee! Akɛrɛ asi íkorhuke nggu ungo!>>
16.23: Uyesu adzipa agɔr Ubitru agɛ, <<Usɔkɔ ru umum Ushaitan! Ungo uwu utarh ukpuku ukwɛr itok ru umum, ifɛrhkɔngo iwe ru nyaki iyi anera, isi iwengge ru nyaki iyi Unum.>>
16.24: Mɔcɛ Uyesu agɔr angwɛ̃ imesanga agɛ, <<Uba unera abeenga idɔsa umum, awu ufang unga akpɛ̃ɛ̃ itsikamnga, na ashupu igãrhãmau ucuciianga adɔsa umum.
16.25: Ubɛn unerwi aka abee ifɔrh urhɛnga, umgbɔ uwuri igwirmgbɔ. Bɔr uwuku ugwirhuwe urhɛnga ru umum awuri ikpoa umgbɔ.
16.26: Awu use izea unera aki ikpo abin upfung kishoo na ashia ru urhɛ uwu ugbagbaa? Use unera awuri ikũ use afaru urhɛnga uwu ugbagbaa?
16.27: Ungwɛ̃-Ner awuri ibanga nggu ikpikpoi Utɛnga nggu ípfu itsernga, mɔcɛ unga aka ifai ubɛn unera itsernga aka atɔ̃.
16.28: Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, abɔɔ rabɔ adɛ̃ɛ̃ nggimi asi íkpembɔ utsɛku umbɔ aka inyã ibiba Ungwɛ̃-Ner ri Iyɛrhanga.>>

17.1: Inuma utɔ̃ĩ iki imaa Uyesu akũ Ubitru, Uyaku nu Uyohana ungwɛ̃mbɔ Uyaku, umbɔ azĩ ni itsi igũ iyɔɔ iderdetangge, anangkɛ umbɔ aka awe ikiyikambɔ.
17.2: Umɔ unga adzipa awuwea ra asumbɔ. Asunga arhang ru nyaki ishaa unum, atorhanga awe aka aterha uku upɛ̃rhɛng ru nyaki irhirhang.
17.3: Kanying Umusa nu Uirhiya akapɛɛng ru umbɔ, adɛ̃ɛ̃ arherhe nggu Uyesu.
17.4: Ubitru agɔr Uyesu agɛ, <<A Uteijee, izengge umɛn iki iwe nggimi. Ungo uba ubeengo, umum itar atsurha ataar nggimi, unying uwu ungo, unying uwu Umusa nu unying uwu Uirhiya.>>
17.5: Adɛ̃ɛ̃ ra arherhe nukpi nggaa amɛɛ aka arhang atsire umbɔ, nu urhɛm ra amɛɛ ha uku ugɔr ugɛ, <<Uwɛrɛ awu Ungwɛ̃mum, uwuruwi umum iki ibema. Amɛnmum agũibɛn nggu unga akarhãrhã. Àka akpeto ru unga!>>
17.6: Ivang angwɛ̃ imesa ha aka agũ rimi, iwei ifɛr umbɔ, umbɔ akwɛr asumbɔ atsim ra abĩ.
17.7: Bɔr Uyesu aba abanga umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka asisok. Niba agũmbi iwei.>>
17.8: Umbɔ aka abera atsimbɔ asi inyãmbɔ uner uwɔɔ, akpurha anyã Uyesu.
17.9: Umbɔ aka awe ru utsĩndĩ uwuku ucipuwa ni itsi igũ hã, Uyesu atsu umbɔ agɛ, <<Niba adɛyikumbi unera ubinkpi umbi aka anyã utsɛku Ungwɛ̃-Ner aka isok ra akpe.>>
17.10: Angwɛ̃ imesa ha arhusa unga agɛ, <<Awu use utsu abika amesuwe Ikpem agɔr ugɛ awu ufang uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num Uirhiya aka igbaashia aba?>>
17.11: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Awu idzidzɛrhe Uirhiya aka iba, unga igbishu ubɛn ubin.
17.12: Bɔr umum idɛyiwa umbi, Uirhiya aka abanga, bɔr umbɔ asi ihwɛngmbɔ unga, na akorhuwe unga ubinkpi umbɔ aka abee. Rimi hã Ungwɛ̃-Ner aka ihwa ayetnum ru ubokmbɔ.>>
17.13: Mɔcɛ angwɛ̃ imesa ha ahwɛng ugɛ unga arherhe arherha ha ri itsi Uyohana Uner Ubɔtisima. Ikerhuwe uwɛkuci ri ipfu iyiki ibewe (Umar 9.14-29; Irh 9.37-43a)
17.14: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka azĩ atsĩ ra anang ikikɔnga, uner uwɔɔ aba ru Uyesu atararhu ra anangnga.
17.15: Na agɛ, <<A Uteijee, uma ugũ atorh ungwɛ̃mum, awuri irhãrhĩ unggbunggbuwa, aka ahwa uver akarhãrhã. Idikunga irhɛirhɛ unga iki igbei ru urha use ra amɛ̃.
17.16: Umum iki ikũna unga izĩ ra angwɛ̃ imesango, bɔr umbɔ asi idɛ̃ɛ̃ akerhukumbɔ unga.>>
17.17: Uyesu agɛ, <<Umbi abi udan ukpirɛ, abika asheri imangmang, abi amɛn aka abewe. Umum iki isei ĩdãrhũmum nggu umbi, ukang umbi aka awe ru imangmang ru umum? Utsɛku ukang umum iki ibima nggu ida imangmangmbi? Ukũ ungwɛ̃ hã uba nggɛɛ ru umum.>>
17.18: Uyesu atsɛrhi ipfu iyiki ibewa ha idzengge ru ungwɛ̃ hã. Kanying ungwɛ̃ hã akerhunga.
17.19: Mɔcɛ angwɛ̃ imesa ha aba ru Uyesu ri ivangyɛ anera aka ashimbɔ nggu unga, agɔr unga agɛ, <<Awu use utsu umɛn ifɔr itsũwe ipfu iyiki ibewa ha idamɛn?>>
17.20: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Imangmangmbi iwe ukunjiir ngge itsu. Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, umbi aba awembi ri imangmang ukunjiir ru nyaki ishaa umastad, umbi adɛ̃ɛ̃ agɔrmbi igũ iyɛrɛ agɛ, <Usoku nggɛɛ uzĩ ru nggɔɔ,> ngge iwuri iso izĩngge. Ubin usi ínangkpɔ umbi.>> Uyesu arherha arherhe akpenga ikɛi (Umar 9.30-32; Irh 9.43b-45)
17.22: Ivangyɛ angwɛ̃ imesa ha aka akɔng ra abĩ Ugarhirhi, unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Awuri ighambɔ adak Ungwɛ̃-Ner adzowe unga ra abok anera.
17.23: Umbɔ awuri ifɛre unga, ru unum untaar unga awuri isok abɛka.>> Amɛn angwɛ̃ imesa ha aghong. Ifai ikirbi Iya-Num
17.24: Uyesu nu angwɛ̃ imesanga aka atsĩ ru Ukafanahum, abika ayɛi ikirbi Iya-Num akpo Ubitru arhusa unga agɛ, <<Umarhemmbi asi ífaisa ikirbi Iya-Num?>>
17.25: Unga agɛ, <<Afasa.>> Ivangyɛ Ubitru aka aba ri iya, Uyesu atirhi arherha arherhe nggu unga agɛ, <<Ungo unyã uguse Usiman? Ayɛrhe ayɛi ikirbi abĩ ru ungamɔ, ra awɛkacimbɔ use ra abikase?>>
17.26: Ubitru agɛ, <<Ra abikase.>> Mɔcɛ Uyesu agɛ, <<Awɛkacimbɔ asi ífaimbɔ nukpɔ.
17.27: Bɔr utsur umɛn iwemɛn ru uvau ra anera abɛrɛ, uzĩ ru ukau ukugɔng utang igber. Uyanga angwĩ ubɛrh ha ungo uku utirhu udzur. Ungo ikpoɔ ishaa imang uazurhfa. Ukũ ishaa imang uazurhfa ha ufai imang iyi Iya-Numngo nggu iyi umum.>>

18.1: Ri ivang hã angwɛ̃ imesa ha aba arhusu Uyesu agɛ, <<Ungamɔ awu uwuku ugɔnga ri Iyɛrhe afã?>>
18.2: Unga ayisu ungwɛ̃rhũ uwɛkuci atsu unga adɛ̃ɛ̃ ra ateumbɔ,
18.3: na agɛ, <<Umum idɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe umbi aba asi idzipa awembi ru nyaka awɛkaci, umbi asi ítsĩmbi Iyɛrhe afã.
18.4: Nggee, uwuruwi aka arhɛrhi itsinga ru nyaku ungwɛ̃ uwurɛ unga awu uwuku ugɔnga ri Iyɛrhe afã.
18.5: <<Ubɛn unera aka ayɛisa ungwɛ̃rhũ uwɛkuci ru nyaku uwɛrɛ ri itsokmum, ayɛi umum.
18.6: Bɔr uwuruwi aka atsu unying ra awɛkaci abɛrɛ abika awe ru imangmang ru umum atsĩã ra arhim, ugba umbɔ abope nggaa ukɔ igɔ ru urhɔknga na atare unga atsĩ ru ukau ukugɔng.
18.7: <<Atorh upfung ri itsi abinkɛ aka atsu anera atsĩ ra arhim! Awu ufang abin hã aka iba, bɔr atorh uwu ha aka itsu ake aba.
18.8: Uba ubokngo use udakngo uni itsu ungo utsĩ ra arhim, uzharha ukpɔ utare. Ugba ungo utsĩ ru urhɛ ukpu ugbagbaa nggu ubokngo unying use udakngo unying nu umbɔ aka itare ungo utsĩ ru urha ukpu ugbagbaa nggu aboka avaa use adaka avaa.
18.9: Nu usungo uba itsu ungo utsĩ ra arhim, ukhor utare. Ugba ungo utsĩ ru urhɛ ukpu ugbagbaa nggu usua unying nu umbɔ aka itsuke ungo ri idzũ urha nggu asua avaa. Unyaka arherhe aki idɔi iyiki igwir (Irh 15.3-7)
18.10: <<Àka arhi anyã niba akwɛɛrkumbi unying ra angwɛ̃rhã awɛkaci abɛrɛ. Umum idɛyiwa umbi, ípfu itsermbɔ ubɛn unum ini irhi asu Utɛmum uwuku uwe ra afã.
18.12: <<Umbi akaifɛrhkɔ aguse? Unera aba awe ru ídɔi unaka, unying igwirngge, unga asi ínekuka isɔka utɔɔrha nu utɔɔrha ra abang igũa na azĩã abee unying hã iki igwir?
18.13: Unga aba anyã ngge, umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, unga awuri igɔm iyi ha iki iyikangge ananga isɔka utɔɔrha nu utɔɔrha iki isi igwirngge.
18.14: Rimi hã asi iwea ibibemu Utɛmbi ra afã unying ra awɛkaci abɛrɛ agwir. Uba ungwɛ̃mbi agbaa uvau ru ungo (Irh 17.3)
18.15: <<Ungwɛ̃mbi use unapumbi aba agbaa uvau ru ungo, uzĩ usɔme unga uvaunga, ungo nu unga ukpekũ. Unga aba agũã, ungo uku ubvui ukũ unga ubango ri iwɛrhɛ nggu ungo.
18.16: Bɔr unga aba asi igũã, ungo ubee unera unying use ivaa umbi azĩ, ngge itsú ideka iyi inera ivaa use itaar imɛ̃ngge ifɛr arherhe.
18.17: Ungwɛ̃mbi aba akpɛ̃ɛ̃ igũ umbɔ, ungo udɛyiwe ikikɔng abika adɔsa, unga aba akpɛ̃ɛ̃ igũ ikikɔng abika adɔsa ha, unyanga unga ru nyaku unerwi aka asi idɔsunga Unum use uwuku uyɛi ikirbi abĩ.
18.18: <<Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, ubɛn ubinkpi umbi aka abow ru upfung awuri ibow ukpɔ ra afã. Ikɛi ubɛn ubinkpi umbi aka agarhuwe ru upfung awuri igarhuwe ukpɔ ra afã.
18.19: <<Umum ibvui idɛyiwa umbi, inera ivaa ru umbi ru upfung ukpirɛ aba ibema ifɛnu ubin ru Utɛmum uwu afã, awuri ikorhuka umbɔ.
18.20: Ubinkutsu inera ivaa use ataar aba akɔngmbɔ ri itsokmum, umum iwu nggu umbɔ.>> Unyaka arherhe ugãrhã uwuku ushe ra atorh
18.21: Mɔcɛ Ubitru aba agɔr Uyesu agɛ, <<A Uteijee, idikunga isong ungwɛ̃mɛn aka igba uvau ru umum, umum itsũwe unga? Awu idikunga utɔɔva?>>
18.22: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Umum idɛyiwa ungo, asi iwea idiku utɔɔva, bɔr isɔka utɔɔva nu utɔɔva.
18.23: <<Nggee, Iyɛrhe afã iwe ru nyaku uyɛrhe uwɔɔ aka abee ivarha abinnga aka awe ra abok agãrhãnga abee umbɔ afase.
18.24: Uyɛrhe ha aka atirhi avarhe, umbɔ akũ uner uwɔɔ aba ru unga, uwuruwi aka angwɛ̃ uvɛrh nggaa ibɛi uazurhfanga iyi anaka agɔnga usɔka.
18.25: Unga aka afɔr ifai adaka, uyɛrhe ha agɛ agoshe unga nu utsɛ̃nga, nu awɛkacinga, nu kishoo abinkɛ unga aka awurake na akũ afase uvɛrhnga.
18.26: <<Ugãrhã hã atararhu ra asu uyɛrhe ha ashɔ̃rhã agɛ, <Umaa udɔng amɛnngo nggu umum, umum iwuri ifasamum abina kishoo.>
18.27: Uyɛrhe ha agũ atorh unga, afɔ̃rhũwe uvɛrh ha na atsũwe unga azĩã.
18.28: <<Bɔr utsak ha aka adzek, anyã ugãrhũ itsernga aka angwɛ̃ uvɛrh unga íshaa imang unaka unying ukpekũ. Unga adzur urhɔk utsak ha akpɔm na agɛ, <Ufai ubinkpi umum iki idɔsa ungo.>
18.29: <<Udɔki itsernga atararhu na ashɔ̃rhã unga agɛ, <Udɔng amɛnngo nggu umum, umum iwuri ifasamum uvɛrhngo.>
18.30: <<Bɔr unga akpɛ̃ɛ̃. Akũ utsak ha azĩ agbanguka ru ugborzĩ utsɛku unga aka ifai uvɛrh ha.
18.31: Ivangyɛ andɔki itsernga abɔɔ aka anyã ubinkpi unga aka akorhe, umbɔ asi igũmbɔ ibɛn, umbɔ azĩ asɔmukumbɔ uyɛrhe ha kishoo ubinkpi uku ukorhe.
