18.32: <<Mɔcɛ uyɛrhe ayisu ugãrhã hã agɛ, <Ungo uwu ugãrhũ uwu amɛn aka abewe, umum itsũwũkũ kishoo uvɛrhngo ri ishishɔ̃rhãyɛ ungo uku ushɔ̃rhã umum.
18.33: Isi imɛ̃ngge ungo uku igũ atorh udɔki itserngo ru nyaka umum iki igũ atorh ungo?>
18.34: Uyɛrhe agũ avɔm akarhãrhã, atsu umbɔ adzowe unga ayetnum utsɛku unga aka ifai uvɛrh ha.
18.35: <<Rimi hã Utɛmum ra afã aka ikorhe nggu uwuku ukpɛ̃ɛ̃ itsũwe undɔka ra amɛnnga.>>

19.1: Ivangyɛ Uyesu aka amaa irherha akɛrɛ, unga abɔruka abĩ Ugarhirhi na azĩã abĩ Uyahudiya aka awu ugar Azɛ̃ Urdun.
19.2: Nggaa ikikɔng anera idɔsa unga, unga akerhuwe umbɔ.
19.3: Abi Ufarisi abɔɔ aba ru unga avira unga. Arhusa unga agɛ, <<Ri ikpemmɛn imɛ̃ngge unera awayiwe utsɛ̃nga ri ikorhe ubɛn ubin?>>
19.4: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi anasi ivarhumbi itsɛng Arherhu-Num? Atsɛng ri inggbaashia ugɛ, <Unum amuna umbɔ ukutsak nggu ukutsɛrh,>
19.5: na agɛ, <Ngge iki iwe rimi, unera awuri ineke utɛnga nu uyanga na awu nggu utsɛ̃nga, umbɔ ikivarhambɔ awuri iwu iyora unying> ?
19.6: Nggee umbɔ asi iwembɔ ivaa, bɔr umbɔ awe iyora unying. Nggee, ubinkpi Unum aka agbopa, unera niba agashuka.>>
19.7: Umbɔ arhusa agɛ, <<Awu use utsu Umusa atsu ugɛ adzowe ubvur uwuku ufɛr itsɛrh awayiwe utsɛrh ha azĩã?>>
19.8: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umusa abemuwa umbi igau itsɛrh ubinkutsu amɛn aka akermbi atsu. Bɔr isi iwengge rimi ri inggbaashia.
19.9: Umum idɛyiwa umbi ugɛ ubɛn unera aka awayiwe utsɛ̃nga aka asi itomunga-dak, na apfunu utsɛrh uwukuse, atoma-dak.>>
19.10: Angwɛ̃ imesa ha agɔr unga agɛ, <<Iba iwe rimi arherhe ukutsak nggu utsɛ̃nga, ida ipfuna ngge inang.>>
19.11: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Asi iwea ubɛn unera awuri idɛ̃ɛ̃ ayɛi arherhe akɛrɛ, bɔr abirabɛ Unum aka adzowe ngge.
19.12: Ubinkutsu abɔɔ awu akpirh, amar umbɔ rimi. Abɔɔ, anera akorhuwe, asi idɛ̃ɛ̃ apfunumbɔ. Abɔɔ Iyɛrhe afã itsu umbɔ akpɛ̃mbɔ ipfuna. Uwuku udɛ̃ɛ̃ ayɛi arherhe akɛrɛ unga ayɛi.>> Uyesu atsuke idorh ra awɛkaci (Umar 10.13-16; Irh 18.15-17)
19.13: Mɔcɛ umbɔ akũ angwɛ̃rhã awɛkaci aba ru Uyesu atsorhuwe aboknga nu umbɔ na afɛne-Num ru umbɔ. Bɔr angwɛ̃ imesanga atsɛrha abika akũ awɛkaci ha aba.
19.14: Uyesu agɛ, <<Àka aneke angwɛ̃rhã awɛkaci aba ru umum. Àka niba akɛnmbi umbɔ, Iyɛrhe afã iwu iyi ikpũmbɔ.>>
19.15: Unga atsorhuwe umbɔ aboknga, mɔcɛ unga azĩã. Uwɛdzɛm uner ubin (Umar 10.17-31; Irh 18.18-30)
19.16: Mɔcɛ uner uwɔɔ aba ru Uyesu arhusa agɛ, <<A umarhem, ubin uku uze ukusong umum iki ikorhe ni ikpo urhɛ uwu ugbagbaa?>>
19.17: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ungo urhusa umum ubin uwuku uze? Ubin uwuku uze uwu unying. Ungo uba ubeengo ikpo urhɛ uwu ugbagbaa, ungo udɔsi íkpem.>>
19.18: Unga arhusu Uyesu agɛ, <<íkpem iyikisong?>> Uyesu agɛ, << <Niba ufɛrɔ unera, niba utomungo-dak, niba uvɛpɔ ivɛu, niba ugbɛrɔ angwĩ utsukukɔ unera,
19.19: udzowe imor ru utɛngo nu uyango,> nu <ubemu udɔkango ru nyaki itsikamngo.> >>
19.20: Uwɛdzɛm hã agɛ, <<Umum iki idɔsumum akɛrɛ kishoo. Umum ĩbɔr use?>>
19.21: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ungo uba ubeengo iwe undzumunga, ungo uzĩ, ugoshe abinngo, udzowe uhwɛka ra atsũwã, nu uba udɔsa umum. Mɔcɛ ungo iweɔ ru ugbɛta urhɛrhɛ ra afã.>>
19.22: Ivangyɛ uwɛdzɛm ha aka agũ rimi, unga azĩ nggu ighongamɛn, ubinkutsu awe ru ubin akarhãrhã.
19.23: Mɔcɛ Uyesu agɔr angwɛ̃ imesanga agɛ, <<Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, aghong uner ubin aka itsĩ ri Iyɛrhe afã.
19.24: Ikɛi umum idɛyiwa umbi, ugba urhakumi utsĩ ra angwĩ inepurha nu uner ubin aka itsĩ ri Iyɛrhe-Num.>>
19.25: Ivang angwɛ̃ imesa ha aka agũ rimi, umbɔ adzeidzeu akarhãrhã, na arhusa agɛ, <<Ungamɔ awuri idɛ̃ɛ̃ akpo ififɔrh?>>
19.26: Bɔr Uyesu arhi umbɔ na agɛ, <<Anera asi ídɛ̃ɛ̃ akorhumbɔ akɛrɛ, bɔr Unum adɛ̃ɛ̃ akorhunga abina kishoo.>>
19.27: Ubitru agɔr unga agɛ, <<Nggayɛ umɛn ineke abina kishoo ni idɔsa ungo! Umɛn iwuri ikpo usemɛn?>>
19.28: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, ru unumkpi umbɔ aka itsu abina kishoo awe aka afa, ivang Ungwɛ̃-Ner aka isei ru anang isei aki ijee iyi ikpikpoi, umbi abika adɔsa umum, awu umbi awuri isei nu anang isei ijee usɔkdũmɛn, umbi awuri itsu uvau anui usɔkdũmɛn aki Uisrairha.
19.29: Nu ubɛn unerwi aka aneke iyanga, use angwɛ̃mbɔ, use anapumbɔ, utei use uyi, use awɛkaci, use ícang ri itsimum awuri ikpo ananga rimi hã idikunga unaka, ikɛi unga awuri ikpoa urhɛ uwu ugbagbaa.
19.30: Bɔr anera arhɛrhɛ aka awu anggbaashi, awuri iwe amaata, amaata ikɛi awuri iwe anggbaashi.

20.1: <<Iyɛrhe afã iwe ru nyaku uteiya icang aka adzek ru unkpeeka atsu abi itser imang ri icangnga.
20.2: Unga abemuwe ifai ishaa imang iki iwe imang itser unuma unying, na adene umbɔ azĩmbɔ ri icangnga.
20.3: <<Ra akara utɔɔrha aki ukpee ikɛi unga adzek anyã abɔɔ aka asei ibɛm ra angwĩ izɛɛ,
20.4: unga adɛyiwe umbɔ agɛ, <Umbi ikɛi àka azĩ atɔ̃ itser ri icangmum, umum ifasũ umbi ubinkpi uku umɛ̃ɛ̃.>
20.5: Nggee umbɔ azĩmbɔ. <<Unga adzek ra atenuma ra akara usɔkdũmɛn, ikɛi ra akara ataar akorhe rimi hã.
20.6: Ra akara atɔ̃ɔ̃ unga abvui adzek anyã abɔɔ aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ ibɛm. Unga arhusa umbɔ agɛ, <Awu use utsu umbi adɛ̃ɛ̃ asi itɔ̃mbi itser?>
20.7: <<Umbɔ agɔr unga agɛ, <Unera asi idzaanga umɛn itser iyiki itɔ̃.> <<Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <Umbi ikɛi àka azĩ atɔ̃ itser ri icangmum.>
20.8: <<Urhɛɛ uku uwe, uteiya icang hã ayisu uwuku uyike unga agɛ, <Uyisa abi itser icang hã, ufase umbɔ imang itsermbɔ. Utirhi ra amaataka uzĩ ra anggbaashia.>
20.9: <<Abi itserbɛ aka azĩ ra akara atɔ̃ɔ̃ aba, umbɔ afai umbɔ ishaa imang.
20.10: Abirabɛ aka agbaashia azĩ, afosi iyɛi anangmbɔ rimi. Bɔr ubɛn unera ayɛi ishaa imang.
20.11: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka ayɛi ngge, umbɔ abvun arherhe ru uteiya icang hã.
20.12: Agɛ, <Abirabɛ aka aba ri imaata, atɔ̃ itser iyi ukara unying ukpekũ, nu ungo ufai umbɔ uku kpengkpeng nggu umɛn iki ihwa uver itɔ̃ itser ru imani unuma.>
20.13: <<Bɔr unga agɔr unyinga umbɔ agɛ, <A uwee, umum isi ighamum urha ungo. Umɛn isi ikpangmɛm umum ifai ungo ishaa imang?
20.14: Uyɛi imangngo uzĩɔ. Umum ibee ifai abika aba imaata uku kpengkpeng nggu ungo.
20.15: Use ishimum ri ijee iyiki ikorhu ubinkpi umum iki ibee nggu imangmum? Use ungo ugũ unyɛ̃ɛ̃ umum iki idzise izũwã akarhãrhã?>
20.16: <<Rimi hã amaataka aka awe anggbaashia, nu anggbaashia awe amaataka.>> Ikɛi Uyesu arherha arherhe ra akpenga (Umar 10.32-34; Irh 18.31-34)
20.17: Uyesu nu angwɛ̃ imesanga aka azɛ̃rhã azĩ ufã Urusharhima. Unga agbiira umbɔ azĩ ri ifɛna ikiyikambɔ, agɔr umbɔ agɛ,
20.18: <<Umɛn izĩ ifũrhũwe Urusharhima. Awuri ighadak Ungwɛ̃-Ner adzowe unga ru ubok ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu abika amesuwe Ikpem. Umbɔ awuri itsu unga ufai akpe.
20.19: Mɔcɛ umbɔ aka idzowe unga ra atsen abi Uyahuda. Umbɔ ayɛia unga, akũ asharhe akwɛr unga, anyapuwe unga. Ru unum untaar unga awuri isoka ra akpe.>> Ifɛn iyi uyambɔ Uyaku nu Uyohana (Umar 10.35-45)
20.20: Mɔcɛ uya angwɛ̃ Uzabadi aba ru Uyesu nggu angwɛ̃nga, atararhu ra anangnga na afɛnu ubin ukpɔɔ.
20.21: Unga arhusa unga agɛ, <<Ungo ubee use?>> Unga agɛ, <<Utsu awɛkaci abɛrɛ ikivarhambɔ asei, unying ru ubok ughango, uwu uvaa nu ubok uferango ri Iyɛrhango.>>
20.22: Bɔr Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi asi ihwɛngmbi ubinkpi umbi aka afɛna. Umbi adɛ̃ɛ̃ ahwambi ru ukpɛwa ha uwu ayetnumkɛ umum iki ihwa?>> Umbɔ agɔr unga agɛ, <<Umɛn imɛ̃mɛn.>>
20.23: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Idzidzɛrhe umbi awuri ahwambi ru ukpɛwamum, bɔr isei ru ubok ugha nu ubok uferamum asi iwea umum itsũ idzowe. Anang hã awe aki abi Utɛmum ra afã aka agbishuwe.>>
20.24: Ivang angwɛ̃ imesa abɔrɔ usɔka aka agũ, umbɔ agũ avɔm abɔrɔ ha ikivarhambɔ.
20.25: Bɔr Uyesu ayisa umbɔ ananga unying na agɛ, <<Umbi ahwɛngmbi ayɛrha atsen abi Uyahuda aki isaka adɛyiwe iyɛrhe ri itsi anermbɔ, anggbaashimbɔ adɛyiwe umbɔ ijee.
20.26: Bɔr isi íwengge rimi ru umbi. Ubɛn uwuku ubee igɔng ru umbi awu ufang unga awu ugãrhãmbi.
20.27: Nu uwuruwi aka abee iwu unggbaashi ru umbi, awu ufang unga awu ugãrhãmbi.
20.28: Ru nyaku Ungwɛ̃-Ner asi ibanga umbɔ atɔ̃we unga itser, bɔr unga awuri iwu ugãrhã, na adzowe urhɛnga afɔrh anera arhɛrhɛ.>> Abi ibvuta avaa akpombɔ inyã anang (Umar 10.46-52; Irh 18.35-43)
20.29: Uyesu nu angwɛ̃ imesanga aka abɔre Ujeriko, nggaa ikikɔng anera adɔsa unga.
20.30: Abi ibvuta avaa aka asei nu ubang utsĩndĩã. Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka agũ ugɛ Uyesu unga atɔng, umbɔ atsarhi irhakmbɔ agɛ, <<A Uteijee, Ungwɛ̃ Udauda! Ugũ atorh umɛn!>>
20.31: Ikikɔnga itsɛrha umbɔ ugɛ umbɔ anukutata, bɔr umbɔ atoma atsarhi irhakmbɔ agɛ, <<A Uteijee, Ungwɛ̃ Udauda! Ugũ atorh umɛn!>>
20.32: Uyesu adɛ̃ɛ̃ na ayisa umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi abee umum ikorhuwa umbi use?>>
20.33: Umbɔ agɔr unga agɛ, <<A Uteijee, umɛn ibee inyã anang.>>
20.34: Uyesu agũ atorh umbɔ na abanga asumbɔ. Kanying umbɔ anyã ananga na adɔsa unga.

21.1: Umbɔ aka akhapa ru Urusharhima aba atsĩ Ubetafaji nú Igũ Acucii Uzaitun. Uyesu adene angwɛ̃ imesanga avaa,
21.2: agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka atsĩ ru uteu uku uci ha ra asumbi, utɛm itsitsĩmbi, umbi awuri inyãmbi uzhika umbɔ aka abow nggu ungwɛ̃mgbɔ. Àka agarha ake akũwã ru umum.
21.3: Unera aba arhusunga umbi, àka adɛyiwe unga agɛ, <Uteijee unga abee ake,> awuri idzaanga ake kanying.>>
21.4: Akɛrɛ akorhe rimi ngge itsuifɛr ubinkpi uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num aka arherhe agɛ,
21.5: <<Àka asɔme aner Urusharhima, <Àka anyã, uyɛrhambi uwi aba ru umbi! Unga adɔɔr, awu idzui uzhika, nú undzing ungwɛ̃ uzhika.> >>
21.6: Angwɛ̃ imesa ha azĩ akorhe ru nyaka Uyesu aka agɔr umbɔ.
21.7: Umbɔ akũ uzhika ha nggu ungwɛ̃mgbɔ aba, abɛtuwe atorhambɔ nú ungwɛ̃ɛ̃, Uyesu afũ asei.
21.8: Anera arhɛrhɛ aka abɛtuwe atorhambɔ nú utsĩndĩã, abɔɔ agbɛyi abok acucii abɛtuwe nú utsĩndĩã.
21.9: Anera abika awu ra asunga nu abirabɛ aka adɔsa unga ra andzing atsarhi irhakmbɔ agɛ, <<Ikpikpoi iwe nggu Ungwɛ̃ Udauda! Idorh iwe nggu uwuku uba ri itsok Uteijee! Ikpikpoi iwe afafã ra afã!>>
21.10: Ivangyɛ Uyesu aka atsĩ Urusharhima, utepa kishoo udzunukpɔ nu urhusa ugɛ, <<Awu ungamɔ nuwi?>>
21.11: Anera agɛ, <<Uwɛrɛ awu Uyesu uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num aka adzeku Unazarat ukpu Ugarhirhi.>> Uyesu asare Iya-Num (Umar 11.15-19; Irh 19.45-48; Uyoh 2.13-22)
21.12: Uyesu atsĩ ri Iya-Num awayiwe kishoo abika agoyiwe nu abika agugoyi umɔ. Ayii atebur iyi abika afaru uhwɛk akwɛr atsĩme, nu atebur abika agoyiwe anurhɛu iya.
21.13: Agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Itsɛng Arherhu-Num igɔr igɛ, <Awuri iyisi iyamum iwu iya ifɛn-Num,> bɔr umbi adzipa ake iwe anang awoi avɛu. >>
21.14: Abi ibvuta nu akatarhu aba ru unga ri Iya-Num, unga akerhuwe umbɔ.
21.15: Bɔr ivang ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu abika amesuwe Ikpem anyã abin idzeukɛ unga aka akorhe, na anyã awɛkaci atsui ivum ri Iya-Num agɛ, <<Ikpikpoi iwe nggu Ungwɛ̃ Udauda,>> umɔ umbɔ agũ avɔm.
21.16: Agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ungo ugũo ubin awɛkaci abɛrɛ aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ arherhe?>> Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Ĩĩ, umbi anasi ivarhumbi ri itsɛng Arherhu-Num iki igɔr ugɛ, << <Awu ungo umesuwe angwɛ̃rhã awɛkaci nu írheng awɛkaci umbɔ akpoi ungo?> >>
21.17: Mɔcɛ unga abvui azĩã Ubetani, anangkɛ unga aka arha nu untsuua ha. Ikponum ucucii uvorhvo (Umar 11.12-14,20-24)
21.18: Ri igɔ̃kpeeka, unga awu ru utsĩndĩ uwuku ubvui uba utepa, imerh ifɛr unga.
21.19: Unga aka anyã ucucii uvorhvo nu ibang utsĩndĩã, unga azĩ ru ucucii ha asi ikpoa ubin akpurha anyã ayerhe. Mɔcɛ unga agɔr ucucii ha agɛ, <<Ungo usi íbvui ughwɛrɔ ikpũrhã!>> Kanying ucuciia ha ukoyimgbɔ.
21.20: Ivang angwɛ̃ imesanga aka anyã rimi, umbɔ adzeidzeu akarhãrhã. Agɛ, <<Awu use utsu ucuciia ha udiki ikoyi iki ifefetem?>>
21.21: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, umbi aba awembi ri imangmang na asi icangmbi, umbi adɛ̃ɛ̃ akorha anangmbi ubinkpi umum iki ikorhuwe ucucii uvorhvo uwurɛ. Uko umbi adɛ̃ɛ̃ agɔrmbi uko igũ iyɛrɛ agɛ, <Ugɔ̃rhũ itsingo utsĩ ru ukau ukugɔng,> ngge iwuri ikorhungge.
21.22: Umbi aba awembi ri imangmang, ubɛn ubina umbi aka ifɛna ri ifɛn-Num, umbi awuri ikpombi.>> Arhusu ijee Uyesu (Umar 11.27-33; Irh 20.1-8)
21.23: Uyesu aka atsĩ ru ufɔm Iya-Num na adɛ̃ɛ̃ imesuwe, mɔcɛ ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu akakũ anera aba ru unga. Arhusa unga agɛ, <<Ungo ukũ ijee iyikisong ukorha abin akɛrɛ? Ungaa adzaa ungo ijee ha?>>
21.24: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umum irhusa umbi ubina unying. Umbi aba adɛyiwambi umum, umum idɛyiwamum umbi ijee iyikisong umum iki ikũ ikorha abin hã.
21.25: Ubɔtisima Uyohana udzek ri inɛ̃ɛ̃ umgbɔ? Udzek ra afã, use udzek ra anera?>> Umbɔ arherhe nggu adɔka agɛ, <<Umɛn iba igɔr ugɛ, <Udzek ra afã,> unga awuri irhusa umɛn agɛ, <Awu use utsu umbi ashimbi ri imangmang ru unga?>
21.26: Bɔr umɛn iba igɔr ugɛ, <Udzek ra anera,> umɛn igũ iwei anera abɛrɛ, ubinkutsu, umbɔ anyangu Uyohana awu uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num.>>
21.27: Nggee umbɔ agɔr Uyesu agɛ, <<Umɛn isi ihwɛngmɛn.>> Mɔcɛ unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umum igamum isi ídɛyiwamum umbi umum ikũ ijee iyikisong ikorha abin hã. Unyaka arherhe aki uner awɛkatsa avaa
21.28: <<Umbi anyã aguse? Unera nuwɔ awu ra awɛkaci avaa akatsa. Unga azĩ ru uwu inggbaashia agɛ, <A ungwɛ̃mum, irherɛ uzĩ utɔ̃itser ri icang inebi.>
21.29: <<Ungwɛ̃ hã agɛ, <Umum isi ízĩmum,> bɔr unga abvui akaifɛrhkɔ ra amɛnnga na asok azĩã.
21.30: <<Mɔcɛ utɛmbɔ azĩã ru uwu uvaa, arherhe rimi hã. Ungwɛ̃ hã agɛ, <Ĩĩ, umum izĩmum,> bɔr asi izĩã.
21.31: <<Uwukusong akorhu ubinkpi utɛmbɔ aka abee?>> Umbɔ agɛ, <<Uwu inggbaashia.>> Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, abika iyɛi ikirbi abĩ nu anggoyi awuri igbaashia atsĩmbɔ ri Iyɛrhe afã ru umbi.
21.32: Ubinkutsu, Uyohana aba adɛyiwa umbi utsĩndĩ uwuku urhurhika, umbi ashimbi ri imangmang ru unga, bɔr abika ayɛi ikirbi abĩ nu anggoyi awembɔ ri imangmang ru unga. Umbi uko umbi aka anyã akɛrɛ, asi idzipumbi na iwembi ri imangmang ru unga. Unyaka arherhe abi irham imang (Umar 12.1-12; Irh 20.9-19)
21.33: <<Àka akpeto ru unyaka arherhe akɔɔ. Unera nuwɔ akau icang inebi. Adzin ufɔm adzipu icanga, asim ughwee ri ifa ukpuku upayi amɛ̃ inebi ha ri ngge, na atar akang utsurha udedetamgbɔ uwu idzɛu. Adzowe icanga ra abi irham imang, na azĩã uzɛ̃rhã.
21.34: Ivang iyiki igbigbɛr iki iwe, unga adene agãrhãnga umbɔ azĩmbɔ ra abi irham imang hã ayɛise ikpũrhã icangnga.
21.35: <<Abi irham imang hã adzur agãrhũ utsak ha akwɛr unying, na afɛre unying, na atang atarh ru uwu untaar.
21.36: Mɔcɛ unga abvui adene agãrhã abɔɔ ru umbɔ aka anangmbɔ abi inggbaashia. Bɔr abi irham imang hã akorhe ru nyaka umbɔ aka akorhe nggu abi inggbaashia.
21.37: Ri imimasha kishoo, unga adene ungwɛ̃nga, agɛ, <Awuri idzowukumbɔ imor ru ungwɛ̃mum.>
21.38: <<Bɔr abi irham imang hã aka anyã ungwɛ̃ hã, umbɔ agɔr adɔkambɔ agɛ, <Uwɛrɛ unga awu ru ukam icang hã. Umɛn ifɛre unga ni icanga iwu iyimɛn!>
21.39: Nggee umbɔ adzur unga, atare unga ru undzing ufɔm icang hã, afɛre unga.
21.40: <<Nggee, ivang uner icang hã aba abanga, unga awuri ikorha aguse nggu abi irham imang hã?>>
21.41: Umbɔ agɔr unga agɛ, <<Awuri ifɛruka abika abewa ha, na adzowe icanga ra abi irham imang abɔɔ, abirabɛ aka awuri idzowe ugau ikpũrhã icangnga ri ivangngge.>>
21.42: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi anasi ivarhumbi ri itsɛng Arherhu-Num? Igɔr ugɛ, << <Utarhkpi abi idzin aka akpɛ̃, ukpɔ uwu utarh ãgboki idzina. Akɛrɛ awu ubinkpi Uteijee aka akorhe, na awu ubin idzeu ra asumɛn.>
21.43: <<Nggee umum idɛyiwa umbi, awuri ivurmbɔ Iyɛrhe Unum ru umbi na adzowe abika aghwɛr ikpũrhã iyi Iyɛrhe Unum.
21.44: Uner ha aka igba ni itsi utarh iyɛrɛ, akpurha ashaka. Nu uwuruwi utarh ha uku igba nú unga, ukpurhu ugɔke unga.>>
21.45: Ivang ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu abi Ufarisi aka agũ unyaka arherhe Uyesu aka adzowe, umbɔ ahwɛngmbɔ ugɛ arherhe ri itsimbɔ.
21.46: Umbɔ abee udĩ ukpuku udzur unga, bɔr umbɔ agũ iwei, ubinkutsu, ikikɔng anera anyanga unga awu uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num.

22.1: Uyesu abvui arherhuwe umbɔ unyaka arherhe agɛ,
22.2: <<Iyɛrhe afã iwu ru nyaku uyɛrhe uwɔɔ aka akorhuwe irhowa ipfuna ru ungwɛ̃nga.
22.3: Adene agãrhãnga azĩ ayisuwe abirabɛ umbɔ aka aghwi umbɔ ipfuna hã aba, bɔr umbɔ akpɛ̃mbɔ ibibanga.
22.4: <<Mɔcɛ unga abvui adene agãrhã abika arhɛɛ agɛ, <Àka adɛyiwe abirabɛ umbɔ aka aghwi ugɛ umum iki ikorhumum ubinghaa. Iki ingwã ínak iyiki itsak nggu angwɛ̃ inak aka agɔnga, abina kishoo iki igbisha imaamum. Àka aba irhowa ha!>
22.5: <<Bɔr umbɔ asi inyãmbɔ ngge iwengge ifɛrhɛ, na azĩmbɔ. Uwɔɔ azĩã usinga, uwɔɔ azĩã igoyi igoi ri izɛɛ.
22.6: Abɔɔ adzur agãrhãnga, ayɔm na afɛre umbɔ.
22.7: Uyɛrhe ha agũ avɔm. Unga adene abi iwanga, umbɔ afɛrkumbɔ umbɔ abika afɛyi aner ha na akpĩĩwe uteumbɔ kishoo.
22.8: <<Mɔcɛ unga agɔr agãrhãnga agɛ, <Aka amaambɔ izek irhowa ha, bɔr abirabɛ umum iki ighwi isi imɛ̃ngge umbɔ aba.
22.9: Àka adzek adɔsa atsĩndĩ aka agbopa ayisa kishoo abirabɛ umbi aka akpo, umbɔ aba irhowa ha.>
22.10: Nggee agãrhã hã adzek adɔsa atsĩndĩã ayisa kishoo abirabɛ umbɔ aka akpo, abika aze nu abika abewe, anang irhowa ha atɔk nggu atsen.
22.11: <<Bɔr ivangyɛ uyɛrhe aka atsĩ abee inyã abi irhowa ha, umɔ unga anyã uner uwɔɔ aka asi itsima atorho irhowa.
22.12: Uyɛrhe arhusu uner ha agɛ, <A uwee, ungo ukorhu uguse nu utsĩwã nggimi ushiɔ ra atorho irhowa?> Bɔr uner ha asi idzipunga urhɛm.
22.13: <<Mɔcɛ uyɛrhe agɔr abi itsernga agɛ, <Àka abow aboknga nu adaknga, na atare unga adzek atsĩ ru uzĩ, anangkɛ anera aka iciu akpe na atãi anyĩ.>
22.14: <<Ubinkutsu awuri ighwi anera arhɛrhɛ, bɔr ukunjiir umbɔ aka isɛng.>> Irhusu ifai ikirbi abĩ ru Ukaisar (Umar 12.13-17; Irh 20.20-26)
22.15: Mɔcɛ abi Ufarisi adzek akɛki itsũwãyɛ umbɔ aka ideya unga ru irhɛmnga.
22.16: Umbɔ adene angwɛ̃ imesambɔ nggu aner Uhiridu agɛ, <<A umarhem, umɛn ihwɛngmɛn ungo uwu uner idzidzɛrhe, ikɛi ungo uni imesuwe ubinkpi Unum aka abee nggu idzidzɛrhe. Ubinkutsu ungo usi itsukɔ amɛnngo ri ifɛrhkɔ anera use ubinkpi umbɔ aka awe.
22.17: Udɛyiwa umɛn, imɛ̃ngge umɛn ifai ikirbi abĩ ru Ukaisar, use isi imɛ̃ngge?>>
22.18: Bɔr Uyesu ahwɛnga ifɛrhkɔ iyiki ibewambɔ, unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi abi ukpukpeta, awu use utsu umbi adeya umum?
22.19: Àka adɛyiwa umum ishaa imangyɛ umbi iki ikũ afai ikirbi abĩ.>> Umbɔ akowe unga ishaa imang hã,
22.20: unga arhusa umbɔ agɛ, <<Uzirhzĩ ukpi nu itsok ikɛrɛ iwu iki ungaa?>>
22.21: Umbɔ agɛ, <<Iki Ukaisar.>> Mɔcɛ unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka adzowe Ukaisar abinkɛ aka awe aki Ukaisar, ikɛi àka adzowe Unum abinkɛ aka awe aki Unum.>>
22.22: Umbɔ aka agũ rimi, umbɔ adzeidzeu. Nggee umbɔ abɔre unga na azĩmbɔ. Irhusa isisok ra akpe (Umar 12.18-27; Irh 20.27-40)
22.23: Ru unum hã abi Usaduki, abika agɔr ugɛ isok ra akpe ishingge, aba ru unga arhusa agɛ,
22.24: <<A umarhem, Umusa agɔr agɛ, <Unera aba akpe na ashia ra awɛkaci, awu ufang ungwɛ̃mbɔ apfunu utsɛrh ha amare awɛkaci ru unga.>
22.25: Umɔ abɔɔ rabɔ awu angwɛ̃yi utɔɔva ru umɛn. Uwu inggbaashia apfuna na akpea, asi imara awɛkaci, abɔruka utsɛrh ha ru ungwɛ̃mbɔ.
22.26: Rimi hã iki iwe nggu ungwɛ̃mbɔ uwu uvaa nu uwu untaar, uzĩ itsĩ ru uwu utɔɔva.
22.28: Ru unumkpi abika akpe aka isok ra akpe, utsɛrh ha awuri iwu uwu ungaa ru umbɔ utɔɔva ha? Ubinkutsu, kishookambɔ utɔɔva aka apfuna unga.>>
22.29: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi agba irhak, ubinkutsu, umbi asi ihwɛngmbi itsɛng Arherhu-Num use ijee Unum.
22.30: Ri isok ra akpe anera asi ípfunumbɔ, asi ídzowukumbɔ ipfuna. Anera awuri iwe ru nyaka ípfu itser-Num ra afã.
22.31: Bɔr arherhi isisok abika akpukpe, umbi anasi ivarhumbi ubinkpi Unum aka adɛyiwa umbi?
22.32: Unga agɔr agɛ, <Umum iwu Unum uwu Uibrahim, Unum uwu Uishaku, nu Unum uwu Uyakubu.> Unga asi iwea Unum uwu abika akpukpe bɔr awu Unum uwu abi urhɛ.>>
22.33: Ivangyɛ ikikɔnga iki igũ rimi, umbɔ adzeidzeu imesanga. Ikpem iyiki igɔnga (Umar 12.28-34; Irh 10.25-28)
22.34: Abi Ufarisi aka agũ ugɛ Uyesu aka atsu abi Usaduki awu uku uvep, umbɔ akɔng.
22.35: Unying ru umbɔ uwuku uhwɛng Ikpem akarhãrhã, avira arhusa unga agɛ,
22.36: <<A umarhem, ikpem iyikisong iwu iyiki igɔnga ri Íkpem Umusa?>>
22.37: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, << <Ubemu Uteijee Unumngo nggu amɛnngo kishoo nu ipfungo kishoo nu adzɛnngo kishoo.>
22.38: Ikpem iyɛrɛ ngge iwu iyi inggbaashia nu iyiki igɔnga.
22.39: Nu iyi uvaa iwu ru nyaki iyi unggbaashi ha igɛ, <Ubemu undɔkango ru nyaki itsikamngo.>
22.40: Kishoo Íkpem Umusa nu imesa abika asɔm Arherhu-Num iyurhi nú atsi íkpem iyɛrɛ ikivarhangge.>> Ukiristo awu ungwɛ̃ ungaa? (Umar 12.35-37; Irh 20.41-44)
22.41: Ivangyɛ abi Ufarisi aka akɔng ananga unying, Uyesu arhusa umbɔ agɛ,
22.42: <<Ifɛrhkɔ umbi iwu use ri itsi Ukiristo? Unga awu ungwɛ̃ ungamɔ?>> Umbɔ agɛ, <<Ungwɛ̃ Udauda.>>
22.43: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Awu use utsu Udauda ri ijee Ipfu-Num ayisa unga agɛ, <Uteijee>? Ubinkutsu, unga agɛ,
22.44: << <Uteijee agɔr Uteijeemum agɛ, <<Usei ru ubok ughamum, utsɛku umum iki itsu anggamtsakngo ru andaidakngo.>> >
22.45: Udauda aba ayisu Ukiristo agɛ, <Uteijee,> awu use utsu Ukiristo awu ungwɛ̃nga?>>
22.46: Unera asi idɛ̃ɛ̃ adzipuka unga urhɛm. Udzur ru unum hã, asi ikpombɔ unera aka abvui arhusa unga arherhe.

23.1: Mɔcɛ Uyesu agɔr ikikɔnga nu angwɛ̃ imesanga agɛ,
23.2: <<Abika imesuwe Ikpem nggu abi Ufarisi asei nú anang isei Umusa.
23.3: Nggee awu ufang umbi adɔsa umbɔ na akorhe ubɛn ubinkpi umbɔ aka amesuwa umbi. Bɔr àka aneke ikorhe abinkɛ umbɔ iki ikorhe. Umbɔ asi ikorhumbɔ abinkɛ umbɔ iki imesuwe.
23.4: Umbɔ aka isaka abow abin aka amor atsake nú acɛi anera, bɔr umbɔ nibikambɔ asi ikũ itokmbɔ ayikukumbɔ umbɔ.
23.5: <<Ubɛn ubinkpi umbɔ aka ikorhe abee anera anyã. Abinkɛ umbɔ aka aboyi nú ashimbɔ nu abokmbɔ awe aki Arherhu-Num, unyã umbɔ aka akorha ake agɔgɔng. Nu arhurhukɛ umbɔ aka asɔr ri ifɛn atorhambɔ, atsu ake adeder.
23.6: Umbɔ abee anang isei akagɔng ri irhowa nu ra abã ifɛn-Num.
23.7: Na agɔm anera aghwe umbɔ ri inang izɛɛ, na agɔm umbɔ ayisa umbɔ agɛ, <Amarhem.>
23.8: <<Bɔr umbi, awu ufang umbɔ asi íyisumbɔ umbi <Amarhem,> ubinkutsu, umbi awu ru uwuku umesuwe unying, umbi awu angwɛ̃yi.
23.9: Àka niba ayisumbi unera ra abĩ agɛ, <Utɛ,> ubinkutsu, umbi awu ru Utɛ unying, unga awu ra afã.
23.10: Use ayisa umbi agɛ, <Uwuku umesuwe,> ubinkutsu, umbi awu ru uwuku umesuwa umbi unying, Ukiristo ha.
23.11: Uwuruwi aka uwu ukugɔnga ru umbi, awu ufang unga awu ugãrhãmbi.
23.12: Ubɛn unerwi aka aberi itsinga, awuri irhɛrhuwe ike. Bɔr uwuruwi aka arhɛrhuwe itsinga, awuri ibiberuwe ike.
23.13: <<Atorhmbi, abika amesuwe Ikpem nu abi Ufarisi, abi ukpukpeta! Umbi afɔmukumbi angwĩ aka atsĩ ru Iyɛrhe afã ra asu anera. Umbi nibikambi asi itsĩmbi, na akɛnmbi abika abee itsitsĩ.
23.15: <<Atorhmbi, abika amesuwe Ikpem nu abi Ufarisi, abi ukpukpeta! Umbi aka isaka azɛ̃rhã ra akau akagɔng nú abĩ azĩmbi ibee uner uwuku udzipa unying. Ivangyɛ umbi aka ikpo unying, umbi atsu unga ada idiki ivaa ananga umbi aka awe abi idzũũ urha.
23.16: <<Atorhmbi, abi ibvuta abika adarh anera! Umbi iki igɔr agɛ, <Ubɛn uwuku uyirh Iya-Num, asi iwea ifɛrhɛ. Bɔr ubɛn uwuku uyirh nggu uzinarhi ukpu Iya-Num, awu ufang unga iki ikorhu ubinkpi unga aka ayirh.>
23.17: Umbi agugge abi ibvuta! Ukpuku usong unang, uzinarhi use Iya-Num iki isare uzinarhi hã?
23.18: Ikɛi umbi aki igɔr agɛ, <Ubɛn uwuku uyirh nggu ubeu Iya-Num, asi iwea ifɛrhɛ. Bɔr ubɛn uwuku uyirh nggu izũwãyɛ umbɔ aka angwɛ̃ nú ubeu ha, awu ufang unga akorhu ubinkpi unga aka ayirh.>
23.19: Umbi abi ibvuta! Uwukusong anang, izũwã, use ubeu uwuku utsu izũwã isar?
23.20: Nggee, uwuku uyirh nggu ubeu ayirh nggu umgbɔ nu ubɛn ubin uku unu umɔ.
23.21: Nu unga uwuku uyirh nggu Iya-Num, ayirh nggu ike nu unga uwuruwi aka asei umɔ.
23.22: Nu ubɛn uwuku uyirh afã, ayirh anang isei Unum nu uwuku usei nú ake.
23.23: <<Atorhmbi, abika amesuwe Ikpem Umusa nu abi Ufarisi, abi ukpukpeta! Umbi aka isaka adzowe izũwã abin akaci, ru nyaka ayerhu udzau akaci. Na akwɛɛrkumbi abin aka amora ri Íkpem Umusa, ru nyaki izharha arherhe idzidzɛrhe, atorh, nu imangmang. Imɛ̃ɛ̃ngge umbi akorha abina akɛrɛ na asi ikwɛɛrkumbi akɔɔ.
23.24: Umbi abika adarh anera ri ibvuta, umbi aki isaka asɛkmbi amurhu, bɔr angurhũmbi arhakumi!
23.25: <<Atorhmbi, abika amesuwe Ikpem nu abi Ufarisi, abi ukpukpeta! Umbi aka isaka asorhe andzing akpɛwa nu atɛ̃rhãzɔu. Bɔr ru unɔrkang atɔk nggu abinkɛ umbi aka akpo ri inggang nu ibemitsi.
23.26: Ungo uner ibvuta, Ufarisi! Ugbaashia usorh unɔrkang ukpɛwa nu itɛ̃rhãzɔu. Ungo uba ukorhungo rimi, awiya awuri iwu atɛtɛn.
23.27: <<Atorhmbi, abika amesuwe Ikpem nu abi Ufarisi, abi ukpukpeta! Umbi awe ru nyaka adzakɛ umbɔ iki itsu abĩ aka aterha, aka aze izɛrhe ra awiya, bɔr ru unɔrkang atɔk nggu apfupfu ikom anera nu ubɛn ikpũ arhim.
23.28: Rimi hã, anera aka isaka anyã umbi awu abika arhurhika ra awiya, bɔr ru unɔrkang umbi awu abi ukpukpeta nu iki ibewe.
23.29: <<Atorhmbi, abika amesuwe Ikpem nu abi Ufarisi, abi ukpukpeta! Umbi aka isaka adzin adzak aki abika asɔm Arherhu-Num na agberhe idzam adzak abika arhurhika.
23.30: Nu umbi aka isaka agɔr agɛ, <Agɛ umɛn iwe ri ivang atokamɛn, umɛn ĩba isi itsĩmɛn ubok ri ifɛr abika asɔm Arherhu-Num.>
23.31: Rimi hã umbi adekuwe atsimbi ugɛ umbi awu angwɛ̃ abika afɛr abika asɔm Arherhu-Num.
23.32: Àka amasha amɛn aka atãrhã aki atokambi aka atirhi!
23.33: <<Umbi íbvui! Umbi angwɛ̃ ighwɛr! Umbi awuri ikorha aguse na adzek ru uvau idzũ urha?
23.34: Nggee umum idene abika asɔm Arherhu-Num nu abi itsoi nu abi imesa aba ru umbi. Abɔɔ umbi awuri ifɛr na anyapuwe, abɔɔ umbi awuri ikwɛr ra abã ifɛn-Nummbi na akɛn umbɔ atsĩrhĩ íteu.
23.35: Nggee awuri itsuke adzirh abika arhurhika kishoo umbɔ aka afɛr ru upfung abvui aba ra atsimbi, udzur ra adzirh Uhabirha uner uwuku urhika uba utsĩ Uzakariya ungwɛ̃ Uberikiya, uwuruwi umbi aka afɛr ra ateu Iya-Num nu ubeu idɛm-Num.
23.36: Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, kishoo akɛrɛ awuri ikorhe nggu aner ivang iyɛrɛ. Amɛn Uyesu aghong ru Urusharhima (Irh 13.34-35)
23.37: <<Oka Urusharhima, Urusharhima! Ungo ufɛr abika asɔm Arherhu-Num nu utang atarh ra abirabɛ umbɔ aka adene umbɔ aba ru umbi. Idiki isong umum iki ibee ikɔng angwɛ̃mbi ananga unying, ru nyaki inũ iki isaki ikɔng angwɛ̃ngge ra afɛkngge, bɔr umbi akpɛ̃mbi.
23.39: Umum idɛyiwa umbi, umbi asi íbvui anyãmbi umum utsɛku umbi aka igɔr agɛ, <Idorh iwe nggu uwuku uba ri itsok Uteijee.> >>

24.1: Uyesu aka adzek ri Iya-Num azɛ̃rhã azĩã, ri ivang hã angwɛ̃ imesanga aba ru unga, adɛyiwe unga ídzin Iya-Num.
24.2: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi anyãmbi abin akɛrɛ kishoo? Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, utarh unying asi íneke ukpɔ utsorhukpɔ nú udɔka. Ubɛn unying awuri isisipuwe.>>
24.3: Uyesu aka asei ni Igũ Acucii Uzaitun, angwɛ̃ imesanga ikiyikambɔ aba agɔr unga agɛ, <<Usɔma umɛn, ifɛrhɛ ha iwu ri ivang iyiki isong? Awu use uwu utsar ibibango nu imimaa upfunga?>>
24.4: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka arhi, utsur unera arhɛma umbi.
24.5: Anera arhɛrhɛ awuri iba ri itsokmum, awuri igɔr agɛ, <Umum iwu Ukiristo,> awuri irhɛm anera arhɛrhɛ.
24.6: Umbi awuri igũmbi isarhe iwa nu ugbugbewangge, bɔr niba agũmbi iwei. Awu ufang ikpũ abin hã akorhe, bɔr imimaa ina ishingge.
24.7: Abĩ akɔɔ asok adɛ̃ɛ̃ ifuw nggu abĩ akɔɔ, iyɛrhe iso idɛ̃ɛ̃ ifuw nggu iyɛrhe iyɔɔ. Ukoi uwuri itsu imerh ri inanga irhɛrhɛ. Nu upfunga uwuri izizusa ri inanga irhɛrhɛ.
24.8: Kishoo akɛrɛ ha awu ititirhi uver imar.
24.9: <<Mɔcɛ umbɔ aka idzowe umbi umbɔ adzaa umbi uver na afɛre umbi. Abĩã kishoo awuri ikpɛ̃ke umbi ri itsimum.
24.10: Ri ivang hã anera arhɛrhɛ imangmangmbɔ iwuri iwe uku ughɛɛng, umbɔ awuri ighadak na akpɛ̃na adɔka.
24.11: Abika asɔm Arherhu-Num igbɛrangwĩ awuri idzeka na arhɛm anera arhɛrhɛ.
24.12: Ititoma iyiki ibewe iwuri itsu ibibema anera arhɛrhɛ iwe uku ughɛɛng.
24.13: Bɔr uwuku ubima utsɛku imimasha awuri ikpoa ififɔrh.
24.14: Isarhe Iyiki Ize iyɛrɛ iyi Iyɛrhe, awuri idũwã ngge ru upfunga kishoo, ngge iwe ideka ra abĩã kishoo, mɔcɛ imimasha iba.
24.15: <<Umbi aba anyãmbi ubin uku utãrhã uku udakuwe anang, ukpurukpi uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num Udaniyɛrh aka arherhe, udɛ̃ɛ̃kpɔ ri Iya-Num, neke uner uwuku uvarhe ahwɛng.
24.16: Mɔcɛ abirabɛ aka awe ru Uyahudiya atĩ azĩ ri igũ.
24.17: Uwuruwi aka awu afafã ni itsi uvi niba acipuwanga inyãngu ubin uku uwe ri iya.
24.18: Uwuruwi aka awe ra arhum niba abvui abanga inyãngu untamanga.
24.19: Atorhmbi akatsɛrh abika awu ra ana nu abika akpɔm awɛkaci ri ivang hã!
24.20: Àka afɛn-Num utsur utser ha uwekpɔ ri ivang ighɛnga use unum ukpuku uwosha abi Uyahuda.
24.21: Ubinkutsu, umbɔ awuri inyãmbɔ ayetnum akarhãrhã akirakɛ umbɔ aka anasi inyãmbɔ ake udzur ri imimunu upfunga uba utsĩ icɛrɛ. Asi íbvui anyãmbɔ akɔɔ aka anangke aki ha.
24.22: Agɛ umbɔ asi izharhukũmbɔ inum hã uku ugbim, unera asi íbɛka, bɔr ri itsi abirabɛ umbɔ aka asɛng umbɔ awuri izharhukũmbɔ inum hã.
24.23: <<Ri ivang hã unera aba agɔra umbi agɛ, <Àka anyã, Ukiristo uwi!> use <Nggawɔ nggɔɔ!> niba awembi ri imangmang.
24.24: Ubinkutsu akiristo igbɛrangwĩ nu abika asɔm Arherhu-Num igbɛrangwĩ awuri idzekambɔ, umbɔ awuri ikorhumbɔ atsar akagɔng nu abin idzeu arhɛm anera nu abirabɛ Unum aka asɛng, ngge iba idɛ̃ɛ̃ iwengge.
24.25: Àka anyã, umum iki idɛyiwamum umbi ngge idɔrhi iwe.
24.26: <<Nggee unera aba agɔra umbi agɛ, <Unggawɔ ra arhum,> niba adzembi, use agɔr umbi agɛ, <Nggawi ru ubã,> niba awembi ri imangmang.
24.27: Ubinkutsu, ibiba Ungwɛ̃-Ner iwuri iwe ru nyaki irhirhang iki irhange afã kishoo udiki igɔ̃kpee izĩ itsĩ udiku urhɛɛ.
24.28: Anangkɛ ukom uku uwe, anang hã amgbɛpɛ iki ikɔng.
24.29: <<Kanying inum ayetnum hã aki imaa, << <ishaa unum iwuri iwu uzĩ, nu ufɛ̃ usi írhangmgbɔ, nu ídzɛr idzek afafã igba, nu umbɔ awuri izusa abin aka amor aka awu ra afã.>
24.30: <<Mɔcɛ utsar ukpu Ungwɛ̃-Ner uku idzeka afafã, nu idũa ru upfunga kishoo awuri ididɔng. Umbɔ awuri inyãmbɔ Ungwɛ̃-Ner aka iba ra amɛɛ nggu ijee nu ikpikpoi akarhãrhã.
24.31: Nu unga awuri idene ípfu itsernga nggu atsom aki irhak ayisa, na awuri ikɔng abirabɛ umbɔ aka asɛng ra anggbokunga anaa, udiku igɔ̃kpee nu udiku urhɛɛ nu unɔr nu ufã, udzur ru ubandzin upfunga udiku ukpɛrɛ uzĩ udiku ukpɔrɔ.
24.32: <<Àka amesu ubin ru ucucii uvorhvo, ivangyɛ aboka aka ipfum adzeka na aghwɛr ayerhe aka afa, umbi ahwɛng ugɛ idoi iki iyongge.
24.33: Iwu rimi ikɛi, ivangyɛ umbi aka anyãmbi kishoo abin hã, umbi ahwɛng ugɛ ivanga iki iyongge, idɛ̃ɛ̃ ra angwĩã.
24.34: Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, udan ukpirɛ usi ítɔngkpɔ utsɛku ifɛrhɛ ha kishoo iki ikorhe.
24.35: Afã nggu abĩ awuri itɔngke, bɔr arherhamum asi ítɔngke.
24.36: <<Unera asi ihwɛnga unum hã use ivang hã, ípfu itser-Num ra afã isi ihwɛngngge, Ungwɛ̃-Ner asi ihwɛnga, Utɛ ukpekũ unga ahwɛng.
24.37: Ru nyaku inum Unuhu iki iwe, ngge iwuri iwe rimi ri ibiba Ungwɛ̃-Ner.
24.38: Ri inumyɛ amɛ̃ isok upfung aka awe, anera agha na ahwa, apfuna na adzise ipfuna, utsɛku unumkpi Unuhu aka atsĩ ru ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃.
24.39: Umbɔ asi ihwɛngmbɔ utsɛku amɛ̃ aka aba akarha umbɔ. Ngge iwuri iwe rimi hã ru unum ibiba Ungwɛ̃-Ner.
24.40: Inera ivaa iwe ru usi, awuri inyãnguwe unying na aneke unying.
24.41: Akatsɛrh ivaa awuri idɛ̃ɛ̃ igɔ nu ukɔ igɔ urhɔnga, awuri inyãnguwe unying na aneke unying.
24.42: <<Nggee, àka adɛ̃ɛ̃ adzɛu, umbi asi ihwɛngmbi awu unum ukusong Uteijee aka iba.
24.43: Bɔr àka ahwɛng ugɛ uner iya aba ahwɛnga ivangyɛ uvɛu aka iba ru untsuuka, unga awuri isei uku urhi asi íneke umbɔ atsĩ ayarmbɔ iyanga.
24.44: Nggee umbi igambi awu ufang umbi adzɛu, ubinkutsu, Ungwɛ̃-Ner awuri iba ri ivangyɛ umbi aka asi ikaimbi ifɛrhkɔ. Ugãrhã uwuku urhika nu uwuku uda irhirhika (Irh 12.41-48)
24.45: <<Ungamɔ ucɛ, awu ugãrhã uwuku urhurhika nu uwu itsoi, uwuruwi uteiyanga aka atsu unga idzɛu agãrhã iyanga, unga adzise ubinghambɔ uku kpengkpeng ri ivangngge?
24.46: Anggɔm awe aki ugãrhã hã uteiyanga aka iba anyã unga adɛ̃ɛ̃ itsernga rimi hã.
24.47: Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, awuri itsuke ugãrhã hã arhise abinnga kishoo.
24.48: Bɔr ugãrhã hã aba awu uku ubewe, unga awuri igɔr itsinga agɛ, <Uteiya asi íbanga ifetem.>
24.49: Mɔcɛ unga atirhi ikwɛr agãrhã abɔrɔ, unga agha na ahwa nggu abi afĩrhã.
24.50: Uteiya ugãrhã hã aba ru unumkpi unga aka asi itsara. Ri ivangyɛ unga aka asi ihwɛngnga.
24.51: Uteiya awuri ikwɛr unga iyiki ibewe na agbange unga nggu abi ukpukpeta, umɔ umbɔ aka iciu na atãi anyĩmbɔ.

25.1: <<Mɔcɛ Iyɛrhe afã iwuri iwe ru nyaka anakagbĩrhĩ usɔka aka anasi ihwɛngmbɔ ukutsak anyangu írhirhangmbɔ azĩ igbangu utsak uku ufa.
25.2: Atɔ̃ɔ̃ ru umbɔ awu agugge nu atɔ̃ɔ̃ awu abi itsoi.
25.3: Agugge ha anyangu írhirhangmbɔ bɔr asi inyangumbɔ atsei.
25.4: Abi itsoi ha igambɔ anyangu írhirhangmbɔ nggu atsei ra andzoma.
25.5: Utsak uku ufa ha asi ibanga ifitem, kishoo agbɛu na arhambɔ urhɔ.
25.6: <<Ri ikɔtsuuka umbɔ agũ urhɛm ukerketakpɔ uku ugɔr ugɛ, <Utsak uku ufa ha uwi aka abanga! Àka aba agbanga unga!>
25.7: <<Mɔcɛ anakagbĩrhĩ usɔka ha asok agbishi írhirhangmbɔ.
25.8: Agugge ha agɔr abi itsoi ha agɛ, <Àka ama adzaa atseimbi ukunjiir, írhirhangmɛn iki iwuri irhim.>
25.9: <<Abi itsoi ha agɛ, <Ĩ'ĩ, asi ímɛ̃ke umɛn nggu umbi. Ugba umbi azĩ ru abika agoyiwe atsei agoi akimbi.>
25.10: <<Bɔr ivangyɛ umbɔ aka adzek azĩ igoi atsei ha, utsak uku ufa ha atsĩwãnga. Anakagbĩrhĩ aka agbisha abinmbɔ atsĩmbɔ irhowa nggu unga na afɔmukumbɔ angwĩ ubãã.
25.11: <<Kata abɔrɔ adɔrha aba agɛ, <A uteiya! A uteiya! Uma utsuruwa angwĩ ubãã!>
25.12: <<Bɔr unga agɛ, <Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, umum isi ihwɛng umbi.>
25.13: <<Nggee, àka adɛ̃ɛ̃ adzɛu, umbi asi ihwɛngmbi unuma use ivanga. Unyaka arherhe agãrhã ataar (Irh 19.11-27)
25.14: <<Ikɛi, Iyɛrha afã iwuri iwe ru nyaku unera aka izĩ uzãrhã, na ayisa agãrhãnga agashuwe umbɔ uhwɛk.
25.15: Utsa ha ahwɛnga ubinkpi agãrhãnga aki idɛ̃ɛ̃ akorhe, nggee unga adzowe unying ibɛi uazurhfa itɔ̃ɔ̃, uwu uvaa ikɛi ibɛi uazurhfa ivaa, uwu untaar ibɛi uazurhfa unying. Mɔcɛ unga azĩã uzɛ̃rhãnga.
25.16: Utsa ha aka ayɛi ibɛi uazurhfa itɔ̃ɔ̃ hã kanying kanying unga akũ azĩ agoyi igoi adzipa nggu uhwɛk ha, akpo ighigha ibɛi uazurhfa itɔ̃ɔ̃.
25.17: Nggee ikɛi, uwu ibɛi uazurhfa ivaa ha, akpo ighigha ibɛi uazurhfa ivaa.
25.18: Bɔr uwu ha aka ayɛi ibɛi uazurhfa unying hã azĩ asim abĩ awɔkuka uhwɛk uteiyanga.
25.19: <<Ivanga iki iderngge, uteiya agãrhã hã aba ayisa agãrhãnga umbɔ avarhuwe ubinkpi umbɔ aka akorhe.
25.20: Uner uwuku uyɛi ibɛi uazurhfa itɔ̃ɔ̃ akũ ibɛi uazurhfa itɔ̃ɔ̃ aba agɛ, <A Uteiya, ungo udzaa umum ibɛi uazurhfa itɔ̃ɔ̃. Unyã, umum ikpo ighigha ibɛi uazurhfa itɔ̃ɔ̃ itoma.>
25.21: <<Uteiyanga agɛ, <Ungo udɛ̃ɛ̃, ugãrhã uwuku uze uwu idzidzɛrhe! Ungo uweɔ ri idzidzɛrhe ru ubin uku uci. Umum indzaamum ijee iyiki ikpɔm abina arhɛrhɛ. Uba ugɔmanggɔm nggu uteiyango.>
25.22: <<Uner uwuku uyɛi ibɛi uazurhfa ivaa ha ikɛi aba agɛ, <A Uteiya, Ungo udzaa umum ibɛi uazurhfa ivaa. Unyã nggayɛ umum ikpo ighigha ibɛi uazurhfa ivaa itoma.>
25.23: <<Uteiyanga agɛ, <Ungo udɛ̃ɛ̃ ugãrhã uwuku uze uwu idzidzɛrhe! Ungo uweɔ ri idzidzɛrhe nggu ubin uku uci. Umum indzaamum ijee iyiki ikpɔm abina arhɛrhɛ. Uba ugɔmanggɔm nggu uteiyango!>
25.24: <<Mɔcɛ uner uwuku uyɛi ibɛi uazurhfa unying hã aba agɛ, <A Uteiya, umum ihwɛng amɛnngo aghong ifɛrhɛ. Ungo udɛ̃ɛ̃ ugbugbɛrɔ ra anangkɛ ungo uku usi idosɔ. Ungo udɛ̃ɛ̃ urhɔ̃ĩngo ra anangkɛ ungo uku usi inãngo ikpũ.
25.25: Nggee umum igũ iwei izĩ iwɔke ibɛi uazurhfango ra abĩ. Unyã ibɛi uazurhfango iyɛ.>
25.26: <<Uteiyanga agɛ, <Ungo ugãrhũ uwuku ubewe, ughɛrha! Ungo uhwɛngo umum iki isaki ĩgbɛtũ ra anangkɛ umum iki isi idoimum ni irhɔ̃ĩmum ra anangkɛ umum iki isi inãmum ikpũ.
25.27: Azea mɔcɛ, ugɛ ungo uba utsuke uhwɛka ru ubanki. Ivangyɛ umum iki ibvui iba, umum itsũ ngge nggu ighigha!
25.28: << <Àka ayɛise ibɛi uazurhfa unying hã ru unga, aka atomuwe ru uwɔrɔ uwu ibɛi uazurhfa usɔka.
25.29: Uwuruwi aka awe ru ihwihwɛng awuri itomuwe unga akpo arhɛrhɛ. Uwuruwi aka ashia, awuri iyɛse ungwɛ̃rhĩ ihwihwɛng ha unga aka awerangge.
25.30: Na atare ugãrhã ibɛm hã ra awiya ru uzĩ uku ugburhuk. Umɔ umbɔ aki iciu akpe nggu itãi anyĩ.> Ídɔi nggu íbũ
25.31: <<Ivangyɛ Ungwɛ̃-Ner aka iba ri ikpikpoinga nggu ípfu itsernga kishoo, unga awuri isei nú anang isei iyɛrhe aki ikpikpoi.
25.32: Awuri ikɔng abi upfung ukpirɛ kishoo ra anangnga, unga awuri igasha umbɔ awuwembɔ ru nyaku uner ughãwã aka igashi ídɔi nggu íbũ.
25.33: Unga awuri itsu ídɔi ru ubok ugha na atsu íbũ ru ubok uferanga.
25.34: <<Mɔcɛ Uyɛrhe awuri igɔr abika awe ru ubok ughanga agɛ, <Àka aba, umbi abi Utɛmum aka atsuka umbi idorh. Àka ayɛi ukamkpi Unum aka igbishuwa umbi udzur ri imimunu upfung.
25.35: Umum iki igũ imerh, umbi adzaa umum ubingha, umum iki igũ ugɔ̃ amɛ̃, umbi adzaa umum ubin umum ihwa, iwu utsen, umbi ayɛi umum ra ayambi.
25.36: Umum ishimum ra atorho, umbi adzaa umum atorho, aghonga umum, umbi anɛta umum, iwe ru ugborzĩ, umbi aba ayepa umum.>
25.37: <<Mɔcɛ abika arhurhika awuri igɔr agɛ, <A Uteijee, ukang umɛn iki inyã ungo ugũ imerh ni ĩdzaa ungo ubingha, use ungo ugũ ugɔ̃ amɛ̃, umɛn ĩdzaa ungo ubin ungo uhwa?
25.38: Ukang umɛn iki inyã ungo uku uwu utsen ni iyɛi ungo, use ungo ushiɔ ra atorho, umɛn indzaa ungo atorho?
25.39: Ukang ungo uku ughong iyor use ungo uwe ru ugborzĩ umɛn izĩ iyepa ungo?>
25.40: <<Mɔcɛ Uyɛrhe awuri igɔr umbɔ agɛ, <Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, ubɛn ubinkpi umbi aka akorhuwe unying ra angwɛ̃mɛn use anapumɛn abika asheru ugarh ru umbi, umbi akorhuwa umum.>
25.41: <<Mɔcɛ unga awuri igɔr abɔrɔ ru ubok uferanga agɛ, <Àka asombi ru umum umbi abi ikponum. Àka azĩ atsĩ ru urha ukpu ugbagbaa umbɔ aka ataiwe Undenggũ nggu ípfu itsernga.
25.42: Umum iki igũ imerh, umbi asi idzaambi umum ubingha, umum iki igũ ugɔ̃ amɛ̃, umbi asi idzaambi umum ubin umum ihwa.
25.43: Iwu utsen, umbi asi iyɛi umum atsĩmbi ri iya, ishimum ra atorho umbi asi idzaambi atorho ru umum, aghonga umum, ikɛi umum iwe ru ugborzĩ, umbi asi iba ayepumbi umum.>
25.44: <<Umbɔ ikɛi awuri igɔr agɛ, <A Uteijee, ukang umɛn iki inyã ungo ugũ imerh use ugɔ̃ amɛ̃ use ungo uwu utsen use ungo ushiɔ ra atorho use aghonga ungo use ungo uwe ru ugborzĩ, umɛn isi iyikamɛn ungo?>
25.45: <<Unga awuri igɔr agɛ, <Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, ubɛn ubinkpi umbi aka asi ikorhukumbi unying ra abɛrɛ aka asheru ugarh, umbi asi ikorhuwambi umum nukpɔ.>
25.46: <<Mɔcɛ umbɔ awuri ikpo ayetnum aki ugbagbaa, bɔr abika arhurhika awuri ikpo urhɛ uwu ugbagbaa.>>

26.1: Ivangyɛ Uyesu aka amaa irherha abina akɛrɛ ha kishoo, unga agɔr angwɛ̃ imesanga agɛ,
26.2: <<Umbi ahwɛngmbi, Irhowa Iyiki Igar Utɔng ibɔr inuma ivaa, umɔ awuri idzowe Ungwɛ̃-Ner umbɔ anyapuwe unga.>>
26.3: Mɔcɛ ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu akakũ anera akɔng ri iya Ukugɔng Uwuku Udzowe Idɛm-Num, itsoka igburh Ukayafa.
26.4: Umbɔ avarhe idzur Uyesu ri iwɔk afɛre unga.
26.5: Bɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Asi íwea ri ivang irhowa, utsur anera asoyimbɔ amɛn.>> Adzukuwe Uyesu atsei ru Ubetani (Umar 14.3-9; Irh 7.37-38; Uyoh 12.1-8)
26.6: Ivangyɛ Uyesu aka awe ru Ubetani ri iya Usiman uwuruwi ingbimnga iki ikerhe,
26.7: utsɛrh uwɔɔ aba ru Uyesu nggu undzoma utarh uku utɔk nggu atsei isung aki imang akarhãrhã. Unga awupuwe atsei ha ri itsinga ri ivangyɛ unga aka asei nu anang ubingha.
26.8: Ivang angwɛ̃ imesanga aka anyã rimi, umbɔ agũ avɔm na arhusa adɔkambɔ agɛ, <<Akɛrɛ awu inyar!
26.9: Imɛ̃ɛ̃ngge umbɔ agoshe atsei isung hã ru uhwɛk urhɛrhɛ na adzowe atsũwã.>>
26.10: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Awu use utsu umbi ayɔm utsɛrh ha? Unga akorhuwa umum ubin uku uze.
26.11: Atsũwã awu nggu umbi ubɛn ivang, bɔr umum isi íwemum nggu umbi ubɛn ivang.
26.12: Atseikɛ unga awupuwa umum, unga agbishuwa iyormum umbɔ aka idzake.
26.13: Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, kishoo anangkɛ umbɔ aka idzowe Isarhe Iyiki Ize iyɛrɛ ru upfunga, umbɔ awuri isɔmmbɔ ubinkpi utsɛrh uwurɛ aka akorhe ri ayita unga.>> Uyahuda abemuka ighadak Uyesu (Umar 14.10-11; Irh 22.3-6)
26.14: Mɔcɛ unying ru umbɔ usɔkdũmɛn hã itsoknga igburh Uyahuda Uiskariyoti, azĩ ra ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num,
26.15: arhusa agɛ, <<Umbi awuri idzaa umum use umum ĩba ĩdzaamum unga ru umbi?>> Nggee umbɔ avarhuwe unga íshaa imang uazurhfa isɔka itaar.
26.16: Udzur ri ivang hã Uyahuda abee udĩkpi unga aka ighadak Uyesu. Ubingha Uteijee (Umar 14.12-26; Irh 22.7-23; Uyoh 13.21-30; 1Uko 11.23-26)
26.17: Ru unum inggbaashia ukpu Irhowu Uborodi ukpuku Usheru Uguga, angwɛ̃ imesa aba ru Uyesu arhusa unga agɛ, <<Ra anang akasong ungo uku ubee umɛn igbishuwa ungo ugha Irhowa Iyiki Igar Utɔng?>>
26.18: Unga agɛ, <<Àka atsĩ ru utepa, àka azĩ ru utsa uwɔɔ, àka agɔr unga agɛ, <Umarhem agɛ, ivangmum iki iyongge. Umum igha Irhowa Iyiki Igar Utɔng ri iyango nggu angwɛ̃ imesamum.> >>
26.19: Nggee angwɛ̃ imesanga akorhu ubinkpi Uyesu aka agɔr umbɔ na akorhuwe ubingha Irhowa Iyiki Igar Utɔng.
26.20: Urhɛɛ uku uwe, Uyesu asei igha ubingha nggu angwɛ̃ imesanga usɔkdũmɛn.
26.21: Asei ighigha ha nukpi, unga agɛ, <<Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, unying ru umbi awuri ighaa adakmum.>>
26.22: Amɛnmbɔ aghong akarhãrhã na atirhi irhusa unga anyinganying agɛ, <<A Uteijee, awu umum?>>
26.23: Uyesu agɛ, <<Uwuruwi aka atsĩ ubok ri itɛ̃rhĩ nggu umum, unga awuri ighaa adakmum.
26.24: Ungwɛ̃-Ner awuri ikpe ru nyaka umbɔ aka atsɛng ri itsinga. Bɔr atorh uner ha aka ighadak Ungwɛ̃-Ner! Ugba umbɔ asi imarmbɔ unga.>>
26.25: Mɔcɛ Uyahuda, uwuruwi aka igha adaknga agɛ, <<A umarhem, awu umum?>> Uyesu agɛ, <<Awu ungo urherhe.>>
26.26: Umbɔ ana asei ighigha ha, Uyesu anyangu uborodi, atar uwɛɛ na atsɔka ukpɔ. Adzowe angwɛ̃ imesanga agɛ, <<Àka ayɛi, atãi. Uwɛrɛ awu iyormum.>>
26.27: Mɔcɛ unga anyangu ukpɛwa, atar uwɛɛ, na adzowe ru umbɔ, agɛ, <<Àka ahwa ru umgbɔ kishookambi.
26.28: Akɛrɛ awu adzirhmum aki ibibemuwe-Num, akirakɛ aka adzek awupa ra anera arhɛrhɛ, atsũwe arhimmbɔ.
26.29: Umum indɛyiwa umbi, umum isi íbvui ihwamum amɛ̃ ikpũrhã inebi akɛrɛ utsɛku unumkpi umum iki ihwa aka afa nggu umbi ri Iyɛrhe Utɛmum.>>
26.30: Umbɔ aka amaa itsũwe ubom ru Unum, umbɔ adzek azĩmbɔ Igũ Acucii Uzaitun. Uyesu agɛ Ubitru awuri itsɛyinga ihwɛng unga (Umar 14.27-31; Irh 22.31-34; Uyoh 13.36-38)
26.31: Mɔcɛ Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Ru untsuu akpirɛ umbi kishoo awuri itĩ ri itsi ubinkpi uku ikorhe nggu umum. Itsɛng Arherhu-Num igɔr igɛ, << <Umum iwuri ikwɛr uner ughãwãã, nu ukpui ídɔi ha iwuri isita.>
26.32: Bɔr ivangyɛ umum iki isok ra akpe, umum inggbaashia izĩ Ugarhirhi ru umbi adɔrha atsĩ umɔ.>>
26.33: Ubitru agɛ, <<Kishoo aba atĩmbɔ ri itsi ubinkpi uku ikorhe nggu ungo, umum isi ítĩmum.>>
26.34: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Umum indɛyiwa ungo idzidzɛrhe, ru untsuu akpirɛ, ungo uwuri itsɛyingo ihwɛng umum idiki itaar ri ikɔ idɔrhi igbɛr ukpee.>>
26.35: Ubitru agɔr unga agɛ, <<Uko umbɔ awuri ifɛre umum nggu ungo, umum isi ítsɛyimum ihwɛng ungo.>> Rimi hã angwɛ̃ imesa abɔɔ kishoo aka arherhe. Ru Ugetsemani (Umar 14.32-42; Irh 22.39-46)
26.36: Mɔcɛ Uyesu nu angwɛ̃ imesanga azĩmbɔ anang akɔɔ umbɔ iki iyisa Ugetsemani. Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka asei nggimi, umum izĩ ifɛn-Num nggɔɔ.>>
26.37: Unga akũ nggu Ubitru nu angwɛ̃ Uzabadi avaa, unga atirhunga igũ idamɛn nu ighongamɛn.
26.38: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Igũ ighongyɛ iki iwe ra amɛnmum idɛ̃ɛ̃ ifɛrngge umum. Àka asei nggimi na adzɛu nggu umum.>>
26.39: Unga aka agɔpa azĩ ukunjiir unga agba akwɛr anaanga atsim nú abĩ afɛn-Num agɛ, <<A Utɛmum, ngge iba imɛ̃ngge, ungo unyanguwe ukpɛwa ayetnum akɛrɛ ru umum. Bɔr ukorhu ubinkpi ungo uku ubee, asi iwea ubinkpi umum iki ibee.>>
26.40: Mɔcɛ unga abvui aba ra angwɛ̃ imesanga, akpo umbɔ aka arhambɔ urhɔ. Unga agɔr Ubitru agɛ, <<A Ubitru, umbi asi idɛ̃ɛ̃ adzɛumbi nggu umum ukara unying?
26.41: Àka adzɛu na afɛn-Num utsur umbi agbambi ru undeya. Idzidzɛrhe ipfu ibemungge, bɔr iyor isi ikerngge.>>
26.42: Unga abvui azĩã ifɛn-Num idevaa agɛ, <<A Utɛmum, uba ayetnum akɛrɛ asi ítɔngke utsɛku umum iki ihwa ake, umum ikorhumum ubinkpi ungo uku ubee.>>
26.43: Unga abvui aba akpo umbɔ ikɛi awe ru urhɔ, umbɔ asi idɛ̃ɛ̃ ayangumbɔ asumbɔ.
26.44: Nggee unga abɔre umbɔ na azĩã ifɛn-Num ide untaar, abvui arherhe ubinkpi unga aka arherhe ri inggbaashia.
26.45: Mɔcɛ unga abvui aba ra angwɛ̃ imesa ha agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Utsɛku icɛrɛ umbi ana awu ru urhɔ na adɛ̃ɛ̃ iwosha? Àka anyã, ivanga iki iyongge umbɔ aka idzowe Ungwɛ̃-Ner ru abok abi arhim.
26.46: Àka asisok umɛn izĩmɛn! Uwuku ugha adakmum uwi aka abanga!>> Adzur Uyesu (Umar 14.43-50; Irh 22.47-53; Uyoh 18.3-12)
26.47: Unga ana awu ra arherhe, Uyahuda, unying ru umbɔ usɔkdũmɛn hã, aba atsĩ. Unga aba nggu anera arhɛrhɛ aka akpɔm nggu akon aka ader nu ígbong. Ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu akakũ anera aka adene umbɔ.
26.48: Umɔ uwuku ughadaknga hã aka asɔmuka umbɔ utsara agɛ, <<Uwuruwi umum iki ishor atamnga, awu uner ha nuwɔ umbi aka idzur.>>
26.49: Uyahuda aka aba, unga akpurha azĩ ru Uyesu agɛ, <<A umarhem, umum ighwe ungo!>> Na ashor atamnga.
26.50: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<A uwee, ukorhu ubinkpi uku ukũna ungo uba.>> Mɔcɛ anera aba, adzur Uyesu akpɔm unga.
26.51: Unying ra angwɛ̃ imesa Uyesu agbiir ikon iki idernga, agbɛr uto ugãrhũ Ukugɔng Uwuku Udzowe Idɛm-Num, azharhuwe.
26.52: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Utsuke ikon iki iderngo ru udapa. Ubɛn uwuku ugbiir ikon iki ider, awu ikon iki ider ifɛr unga.
26.53: Umbi akaifɛrhkɔ ugɛ umum ishimum ri ijeea umum iki iyisu Utɛmum kanying unga adene ípfu itser-Num anakagɔnga?
26.54: Bɔr itsɛng Arherhu-Num iki igɔr ugɛ awu ufang akɛrɛ ha akorhe, iwuri ikorhe igusengge ni itsuifɛr?>>
26.55: Mɔcɛ Uyesu agɔr ikikɔng anera agɛ, <<Umum iwu uner uwuku uvui abin anera ri iker, umbi aka idzeka nggu akon aka ader nu ígbong adzur umum? Ubɛn unum umum isei ru ufɔm Iya-Num imesuwe imesa, umbi asi idzurmbi umum.
26.56: Bɔr kishoo akɛrɛ akorhe ngge itsuifɛr abinkɛ aka atsɛng ra abvur abika asɔm Arherhu-Num.>> Mɔcɛ angwɛ̃ imesanga kishoo atĩ abɔrukumbɔ unga. Uyesu ra anang abi udzepurhe (Umar 14.53-65; Irh 22.54-55,63-71; Uyoh 18.13-14,19-24)
26.57: Abika adzur Uyesu akũna unga azĩ ru Ukayafa, Ukugɔng Uwuku Udzowe Idɛm-Num, anangkɛ abika amesuwe Ikpem nu akakũ anera aka akɔng.
26.58: Bɔr Ubitru adɔsa unga ukuka, utsɛku umbɔ aka azĩ atsĩ ru ufɔm iya Ukugɔng Uwuku Udzowe Idɛm-Num. Unga atsĩ asei nggu abi idzɛu ha abee inyã imimasha ubinkpi umbɔ aka ikorhe.
26.59: Ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu abi udzepurhe kishoo abee igbɛrangwĩyɛ umbɔ aka itsuke Uyesu na akpo udĩ ukpuku ufɛre unga.
26.60: Anera arhɛrhɛ aka adzeka, agbɛyangwĩ atsuke unga, bɔr umbɔ asi ikpombɔ udĩ ukpuku ufɛr unga. Ri imimaa, anera avaa adzeka,
26.61: agɛ, <<Utsak uwurɛ agɔr agɛ, <Umum idɛ̃ɛ̃ ibupukũ Iya-Num, ni ibvui idzine ri inuma itaar.> >>
26.62: Mɔcɛ, Ukugɔng Uwuku Udzowe Idɛm-Num asok agɔr Uyesu agɛ, <<Ungo usi ídzipungo arherhe? Awu use aner abɛrɛ aka arherha atsuka ungo?>>
26.63: Bɔr Uyesu awu uku uvep. Ukugɔng Uwuku Udzowe Idɛm-Num agɔr unga agɛ, <<Umum itsu ungo nggu uyirh ri itsok Unum uwu urhɛ, usɔma umɛn, awu ungo uwu Ukiristo Ungwɛ̃ Unum?>>
26.64: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Awu ungo urherhe. Bɔr umum isɔma umbi kishoo, utirhi ucɛrɛ umbi awuri inyãmbi Ungwɛ̃-Ner aka isei ru ubok ugha Nggaa Unum na awuri iba ra amɛɛ afafã.>>
26.65: Mɔcɛ Ukugɔng Uwuku Udzowe Idɛm-Num hã avapuwe atorhanga na agɛ, <<Unga aka arhenu Unum! Awu use umɛn iki ibee ikɛi? Àka anyã, icɛrɛ umbi aka agũmbi unga aka arhenu Unum.
26.66: Umbi anyã aguse?>> Umbɔ agɛ, <<Imɛ̃ngge umbɔ afɛre unga.>>
26.67: Mɔcɛ umbɔ atang aci atsuyiwe ru asunga na akũ ikpoi akwɛr unga. Abɔɔ akwɛre unga inkpai,
26.68: na agɛ, <<A Ukiristo! Udɛyiwa umɛn, uwukusong akwɛr ungo ikpoi?>> Ubitru atsɛyi ihwɛng Uyesu (Umar 14.66-72; Irh 22.56-62; Uyoh 18.15-18,25-27)
26.69: Ri ivang hã Ubitru asei ru ufɔm iya ha, nu una igãrhã aba ru unga agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ungo uwu nggu Uyesu uner Ugarhirhi uwurɛ!>>
26.70: Bɔr Ubitru atsɛyinga ra anangmbɔ kishoo agɛ, <<Umum isi ihwɛng ubinkpi ungo uku urherhe!>>
26.71: Mɔcɛ unga adzek azĩã ru angwĩ ufɔma, umɔ una uwɔɔ aka anyã unga, agɔr abika adɛ̃ɛ̃ umɔ agɛ, <<Utsak uwurɛ awu nggu Uyesu uner Unazarat!>>
26.72: Ubitru atsɛyi ikɛi nggu uyirh agɛ, <<Umum isi ihwɛng utsa ha.>>
26.73: Adãrhã ukunjiir, abirabɛ aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ umɔ aba agɔr Ubitru agɛ, <<Idzidzɛrhe ungo uwu unying ru umbɔ, ikpũ arherhango ake akũ ungo adzeka.>>
26.74: Mɔcɛ unga ayirh agɛ, <<Ikponum ru umum, umum inba ihwɛng utsak uwurɛ!>> Kanying ikɔ igbɛrkpee.
26.75: Mɔcɛ Ubitru aka ayita arherhe Uyesu aka arherhe nggu unga agɛ, <<Ungo uwuri itsɛyingo ihwɛng umum idikunga itaar, nu ikɔ idɔrhi igbɛrkpee.>> Ubitru adzek aciu akpe akarhãrhã.

27.1: Ri igɔ̃ ukpeeka, kishoo ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu akakũ anera akɛki itsũwã iyiki ifɛr Uyesu.
27.2: Umbɔ abow unga, akũna unga azĩ adzowe unga ru Ubirhatu, ugomna.
27.3: Ivangyɛ Uyahuda, uwuku ughadaknga, aka anyã umbɔ aka atsu Uyesu ufai akpe, unga agɔr ra amɛnnga agɛ, <<Uhwɛngrimi.>> Unga abvui aba ra ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu akakũ aner ha. Abvui adzowuka íshaa imang uazurhfa isɔka itaar ha.
27.4: Agɛ, <<Umum iwu ra arhim, ubinkutsu, umum iki ighadak adzirh uwuku usheru uvau.>> Bɔr umbɔ agɔr unga agɛ, <<Akɛrɛ awu use ru umɛn? Umei imesungo.>>
27.5: Nggee Uyahuda atare uhwɛk uazurhfa ha ru Iya-Num na adzek azĩã. Mɔcɛ unga azĩ ayapuwe itsikamnga.
27.6: Bɔr ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num akarhu uhwɛka na agɛ, <<Ri ikpem isi imɛ̃ngge umbɔ atsuke uhwɛk ha ru uhwɛk Iya-Num, uwu ukpu adzirh.>>
27.7: Nggee umbɔ akɛka na akũ uhwɛka agoi idɛɛ iyɔɔ, ayisi idɛɛ ha agɛ idɛɛ uner uwuku udzin anui. Anang akika adzake ikom atsen.
27.8: Ngge itsu umbɔ ayisi idɛɛ ha ugɛ Idɛɛ Adzirh utsɛku irherɛ.
27.9: Mɔcɛ ubinkpi uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num Uirimiya aka arherhe utsu ufɛrkpɔ ugɛ, <<Umbɔ anyangu íshaa imang uazurhfa isɔka itaar, uhwɛk ha aner Uisrairha aka abema umbɔ afai ri itsinga nukpɔ,
27.10: umbɔ akũ ngge agoi idɛɛ uner uwuku udzin anui ru nyaku Uteijee aka atsuka umum.>> Uyesu adɛ̃ɛ̃ ra anang Ubirhatu (Umar 15.2-15; Irh 23.3-24; Uyoh 18.33—19.16)
27.11: Uyesu adɛ̃ɛ̃ ra asu ugomna nukpi, ugomna arhusa unga agɛ, <<Ungo uwu uyɛrhe abi Uyahuda?>> Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Awu ungo urherhe.>>
27.12: Bɔr ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu akakũ anera atsuke unga uvau, unga asi idzipunga urhɛm.
27.13: Mɔcɛ Ubirhatu arhusa unga agɛ, <<Ungo usi igũo abin avaukɛ umbɔ aka atsuka ungo?>>
27.14: Bɔr Uyesu asi idzipuka urhɛm ru arherhanga, utsɛku ugomna aka adzeidzeu akarhãrhã.
27.15: Umɔ awu ugau ugomna ri Irhowa Iyiki Igar Utɔng, unga atsũwe uner uvau unying uwuruwi umbɔ aka asɛng.
27.16: Ri ivang hã umbɔ awu ru ugbau unera, anera kishoo ahwɛngmbɔ unga, itsoka igburh Ubaraba ru ugborzĩ.
27.17: Nggee ivangyɛ anera aka akɔng, Ubirhatu arhusa umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi abee umum itsũwã umbi ungamɔ, Ubaraba use Uyesu umbɔ iki iyisa Ukiristo?>>
27.18: Unga ahwɛnga awu unyɛ̃ɛ̃ utsu umbɔ adzowe Uyesu ru unga.
27.19: Ubirhatu aka asei ra anang isei aka avarha arherhanga, utsɛ̃nga adene umbɔ adɛyiwe unga agɛ, <<Utsũ ubokngo ra arherhe utsak ha ashia ru uvau, ngge itsu umum igũ uver akarhãrhã irherɛ ru urhɔmum iki irhei ri itsinga.>>
27.20: Bɔr ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu akakũ atsu anera agɔr agɛ atsũwe Ubaraba na afɛre Uyesu.
27.21: Ugomna iganga abvui arhusa umbɔ agɛ, <<Uwuku usong ru umbɔ ikivarhambɔ umbi aka abee umum itsũwã?>> Umbɔ agɛ, <<Ubaraba.>>
27.22: Ubirhatu arhusa umbɔ agɛ, <<Umum ikorhi iguse nggu Uyesu umbɔ iki iyisa Ukiristo?>> Kishookambɔ agɛ, <<Unyapuwe unga!>>
27.23: Ubirhatu arhusa umbɔ agɛ, <<Awu use utsu? Unga akorhu use iyiki ibewe?>> Bɔr anera abvui atsarhi irhakmbɔ agɛ, <<Unyapuwe unga!>>
27.24: Ivangyɛ Ubirhatu aka anyã unga asi idɛ̃ɛ̃ akorhunga ubin, ikɛi anera agbisha abee isoyi amɛn, unga anyangu amɛ̃ asorh aboknga ra asu anera. Agɛ, <<Umum amɛ̃mum ashike ra adzirh utsak uwurɛ, akɛrɛ awu ra abokmbi!>>
27.25: Anera kishoo agɛ, <<Adzirhnga awe ru urhɔkmɛn nggu angwɛ̃mɛn!>>
27.26: Mɔcɛ unga atsũwũka Ubaraba ru umbɔ. Unga atsu abi iwa akwɛre ugwɛɛ ru Uyesu, na adzowuka umbɔ anyapuwe unga. Abi iwa ayɛɛi Uyesu (Umar 15.16-20; Uyoh 19.2-3)
27.27: Mɔcɛ abi iwa ugomna akũ Uyesu azĩmbɔ ru udzepurhe ugomna, akɔng kishoo abi iwa adziira unga.
27.28: Atsimuwe atorhanga na atsĩme atorho aka abãrhã akagɔng.
27.29: Atsɛrhi ifur iyɛrhe iyi ídidɔk atsime ni itsinga. Atsu unga akpɔm igbong ru ubok ughanga na atangarhu ra anangnga. Ayɛɛia unga agɛ, <<Urhɛngo uder Uyɛrhe abi Uyahuda!>>
27.30: Ashau aci atsuyiwe unga, ayɛi ugam akwɛr ni itsinga ikɛi.
27.31: Umbɔ aka ayɛɛi unga amaa, umbɔ atsimuwe atorho aka abãrhã hã na atsĩme atorhanga. Mɔcɛ umbɔ akũna unga azĩmbɔ inyapuwe unga. Anyapuwe Uyesu (Umar 15.21-32; Irh 23.26-43; Uyoh 19.17-27)
27.32: Umbɔ aka adzek, umbɔ agbopu utsak Usayirin uwɔɔ, itsoka igburh Usiman. Umbɔ atsu unga atsã igãrhãmau ucucii ha.
27.33: Umbɔ azĩ atsĩ anangkɛ umbɔ aki iyisa Ugorhgota, agbena agburh <<Anang Apfupfu Aghow Itsi.>>
27.34: Umɔ umbɔ adzowe Uyesu amɛ̃ inebi uku ukpere ugɛ unga ahwa, bɔr unga aka abanga agũ, unga akpɛ̃ɛ̃ ihwihwaa.
27.35: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka anyapuwe unga, umbɔ atang isɛng agasha atorhanga.
27.36: Mɔcɛ umbɔ asei umɔ adzɛu unga.
27.37: Ra afafã igãrhãmau ucucii ha ukhapa ri itsinga, umbɔ atsɛng isarhe uvaunga agɛ, <<UWƐRƐ AWU UYESU, UYƐRHE ABI UYAHUDA.>>
27.38: Anyapuwe avɛu avaa nggu unga, unying ru ubok ughanga uwu uvaa ru ubok uferanga.
27.39: Anera aka atɔng, arhena unga azung atsimbɔ,
27.40: agɛ, <<Ĩhĩĩ! Ungo iki isipuwe Iya-Num, nu udzine ike ikɛi ri inuma itaar, ucipuwa nu igãrhãmau ucuciia ha ufɔrh itsingo, ungo uba uwu Ungwɛ̃ Unum!>>
27.41: Rimi hã ikɛi ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu abika amesuwe Ikpem nu akakũ anera ayɛɛia unga.
27.42: Agɛ, <<Unga afɔrhe abɔɔ, bɔr asi idɛ̃ɛ̃ afɔrha itsinga! Unga aba awu Uyɛrhe Uisrairha, unga acipuwa icɛrɛ ru igãrhãmau ucucii ha, nu umɛn iwe ru imangmang ru unga.
27.43: Unga awe ru imangmang ru Unum. Uneke Unum afɔrhe unga icɛrɛ, unga aba abeenga. Unga agɛ, <Umum iwu Ungwɛ̃ Unum.> >>
27.44: Rimi hã avɛu ha umbɔ aka anyapuwe nggu unga arherhuwe unga arherhe aka atãrhã. Akpe Uyesu (Umar 15.33-41; Irh 23.44-49; Uyoh 19.28-30)
27.45: Utirhi ri idzingga atenuma, uzĩ utsirkpɔ abĩã kishoo utsɛku akara ataar aki urhɛɛ.
27.46: Ru akara ataar ikɛi Uyesu atsarhi irhaknga ikerketangge agɛ, <<Erhoi, Erhoi, urhama sabaktani?>> agbena agburh, <<A Unummum, a Unummum, awu use utsu ungo uneka umum?>>
27.47: Abika adɛ̃ɛ̃ umɔ aka agũ rimi, umbɔ agɛ, <<Unga adɛ̃ɛ̃ iyisu uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num Uirhiya.>>
27.48: Kanying uwɔɔ atĩ azĩ anyangu usoso. Abii ra amɛ̃ inebi akika agbata, avaki igbong, adzowe Uyesu ugɛ unga ayam.
27.49: Bɔr abɔɔ agɛ, <<Àka aneke unga, umɛn inyãni use Uirhiya awuri afɔrhuka unga.>>
27.50: Mɔcɛ Uyesu aka abvui atsarhi irhaknga ikerketangge atsu ivum, na atsũwũka ipfunga.
27.51: Ru ivang hã urhaburhe ukpu Iya-Num uvaar akpɛrha avaa udzur ri itsia uba utsĩ abĩã. Abĩ azusa, ífa iyata.
27.52: Adzak ayar atsuri, ayor asarkasar anera arhɛrhɛ abika akpe asok nggu urhɛ,
27.53: umbɔ adzeka ra adzakmbɔ. Ivangyɛ Uyesu aka asok ra akpe, abika akpe ha atsĩmbɔ asarkasar uteu Urusharhima, anera arhɛrhɛ aka anyã umbɔ.
27.54: Ri ivang hã uteiya abi iwa Uroma nu abɔɔ abika adɛ̃ɛ̃ adzɛu Uyesu anyã izizusa abĩ nu ikɛi abinkɛ aka akorhe, umbɔ agũ iwei akarhãrhã, na agɛ, <<Idzidzɛrhe uwɛrɛ ha awu Ungwɛ̃ Unum!>>
27.55: Akatsɛrh arhɛrhɛ aka awe umɔ, adɛ̃ɛ̃ ukuka na azɛrhe ubinkpi uku ukorhe. Umbɔ adzeku Ugarhirhi adɔsu Uyesu akorhuwe unga ubinkpi unga aka abee.
27.56: Ru umbɔ awu umbɔ Umaryamu Umagadarha, nu Umaryamu uyisa Uyaku nu Uyusuf, angwɛ̃ Uzabadi. Igwirhuwe iyor Uyesu (Umar 15.42-47; Irh 23.50-56; Uyoh 19.38-42)
27.57: Urhɛɛ uku uyo, uner ubin uwɔɔ, utsa Uarimatiya aba umɔ, itsoknga igburh Uyusuf. Unga awu ungwɛ̃ imesu Uyesu.
27.58: Azĩ ru Ubirhatu, ashɔ̃rhã unga adzowe ukom Uyesu. Ubirhatu atsu umbɔ adzowe ukoma ru unga.
27.59: Uyusuf ashupu ukom hã, akũ atorho aka afa abɛrh,
27.60: atsuke ukpɔ ru udzak uku ufa ukpurukpi unga aka atsɛ̃ ri ifɛn utarh. Unga agɔ̃rhũ nggaa utarh afɔme angwĩ udzaka na azĩã.
27.61: Umaryamu Umagadarha nu Umaryamu uwɔɔ asei akhapa umɔ ra angwĩ udzak ha. Abika adzɛu udzak ha
27.62: Ukpe unum uvaa, unum ukpuku ugbisha abin uku utɔng, ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu abi Ufarisi akɔng ra anang Ubirhatu,
27.63: agɛ, <<A Uteiya! Umɛn iyitumɛn ubinkpi uner uwuku urhɛm aner ha aka arherhe, unga aka ana awe nggu urhɛ, unga agɛ, <Inuma itaar iba iwengge umum iwuri isokũ ra akpe.>
27.64: Ngge itsu umbɔ adzɛu udzak ha utsɛku inuma itaar, utsur angwɛ̃ imesanga azĩ avɛu ukomnga na agɔr anera ugɛ unga aka asoka ra akpe. Irhirhɛm iyi imaataka iwuri ibewe inangngge iyi inggbaashia.>>
27.65: Ubirhatu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka akarha abi iwa azĩ adzɛu kishoo ri ikermbi.>>
27.66: Nggee umbɔ azĩ avinu udzak ha, akwɛr utsar iyɛrhe nú utarh udzak ha, atsu abi iwa adzɛu anang hã.

28.1: Unum ukpuku Uwosha uku utɔng, ru unkpeka unum ukpu inggbaashia ru inuma utɔɔva, Umaryamu Umagadarha nu Umaryamu uwɔrɔ azĩmbɔ iyepu udzak ha.
28.2: Umɔ nggaa izizusa abĩ iki izusa, ipfu itser Uteijee idzeka afã, izĩngge ru udzak ha, igɔ̃rhuwe utarh ha umbɔ aka atsĩme udzak ha, isei nú ukpɔ.
28.3: Idzidzeka ngge irhang ru nyaki inai iki inyaka, atorha ake awu uku upɛ̃rhɛng ugɛɛ aghwitu urhurhu.
28.4: Abi idzɛu aka anyã ngge, iwei ifɛr umbɔ, azang ayormbɔ agbei ra abĩ ugɛɛ ikom.
28.5: Bɔr ipfu itser-Num hã igɔr akatsɛrh ha igɛ, <<Àka niba agũmbi iwei, umum ihwɛng umbi abee Uyesu uwuruwi umbɔ aka anyapuwe.
28.6: Unga ashia nggimi, unga aka asoka, ru nyaka unga aka arherhe. Àka aba anyã anangkɛ unga aka anu.
28.7: Mɔcɛ àka azĩ ifetem azĩ asɔme angwɛ̃ imesanga ugɛ, <Unga aka asoka ra akpe, nggawɔ agbaashia azĩ Ugarhirhi ru umbi. Nggɔɔ ha umbi awuri inyãmbi unga.> Àka agũ, umum iki idɛyiwamum umbi.>>
28.8: Nggee akatsɛrh ha iki ifefetem asokmbɔ ru udzaka, agũ iwei nggu anggɔm, atĩ azĩ idɛyiwe angwɛ̃ imesanga.
28.9: Kanying Uyesu agbopa umbɔ. Agɔr umbɔ agɛ. <<Ighwe umbi!>> Umbɔ agɔpa aba awuma adaknga, adzowe unga igɔng.
28.10: Mɔcɛ Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka niba agũmbi iwei. Àka azĩ asɔme angwɛ̃mɛn umbɔ azĩ Ugarhirhi. Nggɔɔ ha umbɔ aka inyã umum.>> Ubinkpi abi idzɛu aka arherhe
28.11: Akatsɛrh ha awe ru uzɛ̃rhã, abɔɔ abi idzɛu udzak ha atsĩmbɔ utepa, asɔme ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num kishoo ubinkpi uku ukorhe.
28.12: Ivangyɛ ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu akakũ anera akɔng akɛki itsũwã, umbɔ adzowe abi iwa ha uhwɛk urhɛrhɛ.
28.13: Agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka agɔr agɛ, <Angwɛ̃ imesanga aba avɛu ukomnga ru untsuuka, ri ivangyɛ umbi aka awe ru urhɔ.>
28.14: Arherha akɛrɛ aba atsĩke ra ato ugomna, umɛn iwuri irherhumɛn arherhe nggu unga, umbi asi íhwambi uver.>>
28.15: Nggee abi iwa ha ayɛi uhwɛka na akorhe ru nyaka umbɔ aka agɔr umbɔ akorhe. Nu arherhe akɛrɛ atɛ̃rhã amaake abi Uyahuda aba atsĩ irherɛ. Itseryɛ Uyesu aka adzowe angwɛ̃ imesanga (Umar 16.14-18; Irh 24.36-49; Uyoh 20.19-23; Aiy 1.6-8)
28.16: Mɔcɛ angwɛ̃ imesa ha usɔka nu unying hã azĩmbɔ Ugarhirhi, azĩmbɔ ri igũ hã Uyesu aka agɔr umbɔ izĩ.
28.17: Umbɔ aka anyã unga, umbɔ adzowe unga igɔng, bɔr abɔɔ acucang.
28.18: Mɔcɛ Uyesu aba ru umbɔ agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Aka adzaambɔ umum ijeea kishoo iyi afã nggu abĩ.
28.19: Nggee àka azĩ akũ anera kishoo ru upfunga aba adɔsa umum. Àka asorhuwe umbɔ ubɔtisima ri itsok Utɛ nu iki Ungwɛ̃ nu iki Ipfu Isarsatangge.
28.20: Àka amesuwe umbɔ adɔsa kishoo abinkɛ umum iki itsuka umbi. Idzidzɛrhe umum iwe nggu umbi, utsɛku imimashu upfung.>>

1.1: Itirhi Isarhe Iyiki Ize iyi Uyesu Ukiristo, Ungwɛ̃ Unum.
1.2: Umbɔ aka atsɛng ru ubvur uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num Uishaya ri itsinga agɛ, <<Umum iwuri idene ungwɛ̃ itsermum agbaashia ru ungo. Unga awuri igbishuwa atsĩndĩngo.
1.3: Urhɛm uwɔɔ uyisa ra arhum ugɛ, <Agbishuwe utsĩndĩ Uteijee, aka agbisha avii atsĩndĩnga arhika.> >>
1.4: Nggee Uyohana aba, asorhuwe ubɔtisima ra arhum na adzowe isarhe iyi idzidzipa iyiki itsũwe arhim.
1.5: Anera arhɛrhɛ abi abĩ Uyahudiya, nu aner Urusharhima adzek azĩ ru unga. Asɔm arhimmbɔ, unga asorhuwe umbɔ ubɔtisima ra Azɛ̃ Urdun.
1.6: Uyohana atsim atorho igwar urhakumi, abow ikpɔm ubvur nú upfurhsĩnga, ubinghanga uwu asusu nggu utoo arhum.
1.7: Isarhanga hã iyɛ ugɛ, <<Uwɔɔ ruwɔ aka iba ru undzingmum agɔnga umum, uwuruwi umum isi ídɛ̃ɛ̃ inggarhukũ arhi abadaknga.
1.8: Umum isorhuwa umbi ubɔtisima nggu amɛ̃, bɔr unga awuri ikũ Ipfu Isarsatangge asorhuwa.>> Ubɔtisima nu undeya Uyesu (Umat 3.13-17; 4.1-11; Irh 3.21-22; 4.1-13)
1.9: Ri ivang hã Uyesu adzeka ru Unazarat ra abĩ Ugarhirhi, Uyohana asorhuwe unga ubɔtisima ra Azɛ̃ Urdun.
1.10: Uyesu aka awuri idzeka ra amɛ̃, unga anyã afã aka ayanga, Ipfu Isarsatangge ru nyaku unurhɛu icipuwa nu unga.
1.11: Urhɛm udzeka afã ugɔr ugɛ, <<Ungo uwu Ungwɛ̃mum iki ĩbema. Nggu ungo umum igũibɛn akarhãrhã.>>
1.12: Kanying Ipfu-Num ikũna unga idzek izĩngge ra arhum.
1.13: Unga awu umɔ utsɛku inuma isɔka inaa, Ushaitan aka adeya unga. Unga awu nggu íjuɛ arhum, bɔr ípfu itser-Num itɔ̃we unga itser. Uyisa angwɛ̃ imesa abi inggbaashia (Umat 4.12-22; Irh 4.14-15; 5.11)
1.14: Umbɔ aka agbange Uyohana ru ugborzĩ amaa, Uyesu azĩ atsĩã Ugarhirhi, anu idzowe Isarhe Iyiki Ize iyi Unum.
1.15: Agɛ, <<Ivanga iki ibangge! Nggayɛ Iyɛrhu Unum iki iyongge. Àka adzipa, na awe ru imangmang ri Isarhe Iyiki Ize!>>
1.16: Uyesu aka azɛ̃rhã atɔng ru ubang Ukau Ugarhirhi, unga anyã Usiman nu ungwɛ̃mbɔ Uandarawu anu itang igber ru ukau ha, umbɔ awu abika adɛm abɛrh.
1.17: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka aba adɔsa umum, umum itsu umbi awu abika adzui anera.>>
1.18: Kanying umbɔ aneke itang igbermbɔ na adɔsa unga.
1.19: Unga aka agɔpa azĩ ukunjiir, unga anyã Uyaku ungwɛ̃ Uzabadi nu ungwɛ̃mbɔ Uyohana ru ukhukhɔɔ, adɛ̃ɛ̃ igbishu igbermbɔ.
1.20: Asi idãrhũmbɔ unga ayisa umbɔ. Umbɔ aneke utɛmbɔ Uzabadi nggu abi itser imang ru ukhukhɔɔ ha na adɔsa unga. Uyesu awayiwe ipfu iyiki ibewe (Irh 4.31-37)
1.21: Uyesu nggu angwɛ̃ imesanga atsĩmbɔ Ukafanahum, unum ukpuku uwosha uku uwe, Uyesu atsĩ ru ubã ifɛn-Num atirhi imesuwe.
1.22: Anera adzeidzeu ri imesanga, ubinkutsu amesuwe umbɔ ru nyaku uner ijee. Asi iwea ru nyaku uwuku umesuwe Ikpem.
1.23: Umɔ hã uner uwɔɔ ru ubã ifɛn-Nummbɔ awuri ipfu iyiki ibewe itsu ivum igɛ,
1.24: <<Iyee! Ungo ubee use nggu umɛn Uyesu uner Unazarat? Ungo uba itsĩme umɛn? Umum ihwɛng ungo uwu usarkasar uwu Unum!>>
1.25: Uyesu atsɛrhi ipfu iyiki ibewe ha agɛ, <<Unukutata! Upfudzeka ru utsak ha!>>
1.26: Ipfu iyiki ibewe ha iyung utsak ha nggu uvɔm ni itsu ivum idzengge ru utsak ha.
1.27: Anera kishoo adzeidzeu na arhusa adɔka agɛ, <<Awu use nuwi ikɛi? Imesa iyiki ifa nu ijee! Atsu ípfu iyiki ibewe idɔsa arherhanga!>>
1.28: Kanying isarhanga itɛ̃rhã imaangge ananga ra abĩ Ugarhirhi. Uyesu akerhuwe uzɔma Ubitru (Umat 8.14-15; Irh 4.38-39)
1.29: Umbɔ aka adzeka ru ubã ifɛn-Num hã, umbɔ azĩ nggu Uyaku nu Uyohana atsĩmbɔ ri iyambɔ Ubitru nu Uandarawu.
1.30: Uya utsɛ̃ Ubitru iyora imani unga anu inũ, umbɔ asɔme unga kanying.
1.31: Nggee unga azĩ adzur uboknga abera unga. Imani iyor ha ikerhungge, unga asok atɔ̃we umbɔ itser. Uyesu akerhuwe anera arhɛrhɛ (Umat 8.16-17; Irh 4.40-41)
1.32: Nu urhɛɛ ha, unuma uku utsĩ anera akũ arhɛrha abi írhãrhã aba ru Uyesu, nu abi ípfu iyiki ibewe.
1.33: Arhɛrha anera ru utepa akɔng nu angwĩ iyaa.
1.34: Uyesu akerhuwe abi ikpũ írhãrhã. Ikɛi atsusuwe ípfu iyiki ibewe ra anera arhɛrhɛ, asi ibeenga ípfu iyiki ibewe irherha arherhe ubinkutsu ngge ihwɛngngge unga. Uyesu azĩ afɛn-Num ra anangkɛ anera aka ashimbɔ (Irh 4.42-44)
1.35: Ri igɔ̃kpeka, uzĩ na ubɔrkpɔ, Uyesu asok, aneke iya ha na azĩã ra anangkɛ anera aka ashimbɔ, umɔ unga aka afɛn-Num.
1.36: Usiman nu abirabɛ aka awu nggu unga azĩmbɔ ibea unga.
1.37: Umbɔ aka anyã unga, umbɔ agɛ, <<Kishoo adɛ̃ɛ̃ ibea ungo.>>
1.38: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umɛn izĩmɛn iteuyɛ iki ikhapa nggimi, umum idzowe isarhe umɔ ikɛi. Ubin hã ru ukpɔ uku ukũ umum uba.>>
1.39: Nggee unga azɛ̃rhã amaa Ugarhirhi adzowe isarhe ra abã ifɛn-Nummbɔ na atsusuwe ípfu iyiki ibewe ra anera. Uyesu akerhuwe uner ingbim (Umat 8.1-4; Irh 5.12-16)
1.40: Uner ingbim uwɔɔ aba ru Uyesu, atararhu ashɔ̃rhã unga agɛ, <<Ungo uba ubeengo, ungo udɛ̃ɛ̃ ukerhuwango umum nu usara umum.>>
1.41: Umɔ Uyesu agũ atorh, aberu uboknga abangu utsa ha. Agɛ, <<Umum ĩbeemum, ukerhe!>>
1.43: Uyesu asoyiwe unga na avange atonga akarhãrhã agɛ,
1.44: <<Niba usɔmukɔ unera. Bɔr uzĩ, udɛyiwe itsingo ru uwuku udzowe idɛm-Num nu udzowe idɛm-Num iyi Umusa aka amesuwa umbi ri ikikerhe, ra anera ahwɛng ugɛ ungo uku ukerhungo.>>
1.45: Unga aka ikorhe rimi, utsak ha akpurha adzek adɛ̃ɛ̃ isisɔme anera, amaa ananga kishoo. Akɛrɛ ha atsu Uyesu asi idɛ̃ɛ̃ atsĩã uteu ukpɔɔ ri inyĩnyã anera, akpurha aseiyi ru awiya anangkɛ anera aka ashimbɔ umɔ. Rimi hã anera anang adzeyi ri inang aba ru unga.

2.1: Inuma ukunjiir iki itɔng, Uyesu abvui atsĩã Ukafanahum ikɛi, anera aka agũ ugɛ unga aka aba ri iya.
2.2: Anera arhɛrhɛ akɔng atɔke ubãã, atsu ananga asi ibɔrke ru angwĩ ubãã, Uyesu adzowe umbɔ isarhe.
2.3: Inera inaa iki itsã uner irhãrhĩ ishai iyor akũ aba.
2.4: Umbɔ aka asi ikpombɔ udĩ ukpuku utsutsĩ ru Uyesu, anera aka arhɛmbɔ, umbɔ afũ ati akang uvi iya ha ra anankɛ Uyesu aka adɛ̃ɛ̃, na acipuwe uner ishai iyor ha nu ufarnga aka anu.
2.5: Uyesu aka anyã imangmangmbɔ, unga agɔr uner ishai iyor ha agɛ, <<Ungwɛ̃mum, aka atsũwãmbɔ arhimngo.>>
2.6: Abika amesuwe Ikpem asei umɔ ra anang hã akaifɛrhkɔ ra amɛnmbɔ agɛ,
2.7: <<Awu use utsu utsak uwurɛ arherhe rimi? Unga aka arhenu Unum! Ungamɔ awe ru ijee iyiki itsũwe arhim? Asi iwea Unum ikiyikanga?>>
2.8: Kanying Uyesu ahwɛnga ubinkpi umbɔ aka akaifɛrhkɔ ra amɛnmbɔ, unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Awu use utsu umbi awe ru ikpũ ifɛrhkɔ ha?
2.9: Akasong aka ayoa, umbɔ aka idɛyiwe uner ishai iyor ha, <Aka atsũwãmbɔ arhimngo,> use igɔr ugɛ, <Usisok unyangu ufarngo uzɛ̃rhã?>
2.10: Bɔr umum ibee umbi ahwɛng ugɛ Ungwɛ̃-Ner awea ri ijee iyiki itsũwe arhim ru upfung.>> Umɔ unga agɔr uner ishai iyor ha agɛ,
2.11: <<Umum ĩgɔr ungo, usisok, unyangu ufarngo uzĩ ri iya.>>
2.12: Unga asok, anyangu ufarnga azɛ̃rhã adzeka ri inyĩnyã anera kishoo. Akɛrɛ ha atsu umbɔ adzeidzeu na akpoi Unum agɛ, <<Umɛn inasi inyãmɛn ifɛrhɛ rimi.>> Uyisa ukpu Urhawi (Umat 9.9-13; Irh 5.27-32)
2.13: Uyesu abvui adzek azĩã ru ubang Ukau Ugarhirhi. Anera arhɛrhɛ aka azĩ akɔng adziira unga, unga amesuwe umbɔ.
2.14: Unga aka azɛ̃rhã atɔng, unga anyã Urhawi ungwɛ̃ Uharhfa aka asei ra anang akika ayɛi ikirbi abĩ. Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Udɔsa umum,>> unga asok adɔsa unga.
2.15: Uyesu nu angwɛ̃ imesanga asei igha urhɛɛ ri iya Urhawi nggu abika ayɛi ikirbi abĩ nu abirabɛ aka anyanga umbɔ awu abi arhim arhɛrhɛ. Anera arhɛrhɛ aka adɔsa unga.
2.16: Ivangyɛ abika amesuwe Ikpem aka awu abi Ufarisi, aka anyã unga aka asei igha ubingha nggu abi arhim hã nu abika ayɛi ikirbi abĩ, umbɔ arhusa angwɛ̃ imesanga agɛ, <<Awu use utsu unga asei igha ubingha nggu abika ayɛi ikirbi abĩ nu abi arhim?>>
2.17: Uyesu aka agũ rimi, unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Abika aker asi ibeembɔ uner agɔu, abi irhãrhã ukpekũ abee uner agɔu. Umum isi ĩbamum iyisa abika arhurhika, bɔr umum ĩba iyisa abi arhim.>> Arhusu Uyesu ikpem ighabin (Umat 9.14-17; Irh 5.33-39)
2.18: Angwɛ̃ imesu Uyohana Uner Ubɔtisima nu abi Ufarisi adɛ̃ɛ̃ ikpem ighabin. Anera abɔɔ aba arhusu Uyesu agɛ, <<Awu use utsu Angwɛ̃ imesu Uyohana nu abi Ufarisi akpemmbɔ ighabin, bɔr abingo asi ikpemmbɔ?>>
2.19: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Awu use utsu awɛrhu utsak uwuku ufa akpem ighabin unga aba ana awu nggu umbɔ? Asi íkpemmbɔ ri ivangyɛ unga aka awu nggu umbɔ.
2.20: Ivanga niyɔ ibarɔ umbɔ awuri isoyiwe utsak uwuku ufa ha ru umbɔ, unum hã nukpɔ umbɔ aka ikpem ighabin.
2.21: <<Unera asi íkũ utatorho uku ufa abipunga atorho aka agbe. Unga aba akorhunga, utatorho uwuku ufa ha uwuri ishĩrhã avaate atorho aka agbe ha, ivivaar ha iwuri inangge iyi inggbaashia.
2.22: Ikɛi unera asi ítsuka amɛ̃ inebi aka afa ra ambãĩ aka agbe. Unga aba akorhunga rimi, amɛ̃ inebi aka afa ha awuri iyare ambãĩ aka agbe ha, ambãĩ ha nu amɛ̃ inebi ha awuri iwe ibɛm. Amɛ̃ inebi aka afa, awuri itsu ake ra ambãĩ aka afa.>> Uteijee uwu unum ukpuku uwosha (Umat 12.1-8; Irh 6.1-5)
2.23: Ru unum ukpuku uwosha ukpɔɔ, Uyesu nu angwɛ̃ imesanga azɛ̃rhã atɔng ri icang arhkama. Angwɛ̃ imesanga aka azɛ̃rhã nggu unga, atirhi igbiu atsi arhkama.
2.24: Abi Ufarisi agɔr unga agɛ, <<Unyã, awu use utsu umbɔ azharhuwe Ikpem unum ukpuku uwosha?>>
2.25: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi anasi ivarhumbi ubin Udauda aka akorhe ri ivangyɛ umbɔ aka agũ imerh nggu awɛrhu uzɛ̃rhãnga?
2.26: Ri inum Uabiata aka awu Ukugɔng Uwuku Udzowe Idɛm-Num, Udauda atsĩ ri Iya-Num, atãiwe usarkasar uborodi, ikɛi na abɔr adzowe awɛrhu uzɛ̃rhãnga, ukpurukpi uku usi imɛ̃kpɔ unera atãinga ukpɔ, uner uwuku udzowe idɛm-Num ukpekũ awuri itãi.>>
2.27: Mɔcɛ unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Angwɛ̃we unum ukpuku uwosha ra anera, asi ingwɛ̃mbɔ anera awembɔ abi unum ukpuku uwosha.
2.28: Nggee Ungwɛ̃-Ner unga awu Uteijee uwu unum ukpuku uwosha.>>

3.1: Ivang iyɔɔ unga aka atsĩ ru abã ifɛn-Num, uner uwɔɔ umɔ nggu uboknga ushushai.
3.2: Abɔɔ abee ubinkpi umbɔ aka ikũ akpo uvau ru Uyesu. Umbɔ atsu asumbɔ nu unga use unga awuri ikikerhuka utsak ha ru unum ukpuku uwosha.
3.3: Uyesu agɔr uner uwuku ushai ubok ha agɛ, <<Udzek udɛ̃ɛ̃ ra asumbɔ kishoo.>>
3.4: Uyesu arhusa umbɔ agɛ, <<Imɛ̃ɛ̃ umbɔ akorhu use ru unum ukpuku uwosha, akorhi iyiki ize use akorhi iyiki ibewe, afɔrhe urhɛ use afɛre umgbɔ?>> Bɔr umbɔ asei ukutata.
3.5: Unga arhi adziira umbɔ ra avɔm, amɛnnga adake ra amɛn aka akermbɔ, unga agɔr uner ushai ubok ha agɛ, <<Unamu ubokngo.>> Unga anamu uboknga udzek, Kanying ukpɔ ukerhukpɔ.
3.6: Mɔcɛ abi Ufarisi adzek akɛki itsũwã nggu aner Uhiridu, abee udĩ ukpuku ufɛr Uyesu. Ikikɔng idɔsu Uyesu
3.7: Uyesu adzek nggu angwɛ̃ imesanga azĩmbɔ ubang ukau, arhɛrha anera adzeku Ugarhirhi adɔsa unga.
3.8: Umbɔ aka agũ abinkɛ unga aka akorhe kishoo, anera arhɛrhɛ aka adzeku Uyahudiya aba ru unga, nu Urusharhima, nu Uidumiya, nu abi ugar Azɛ̃ Urdun, nu aner Utaya nu Usidon.
3.9: Anera aka arhɛmbɔ, unga agɔr angwɛ̃ imesanga akpowe ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ uwuku uci adzowe unga, utsur anera afĩĩmbɔ unga.
3.10: Unga akerhuka anera arhɛrhɛ, nggee abi irhãrhã abee izĩ ra asu abanga unga.
3.11: Ivangyɛ ípfu iyiki ibewe iki inyã unga, ngge igba nú abĩ ra anangnga ni itsui ivum igɛ, <<Ungo uwu Ungwɛ̃ Unum!>>
3.12: Bɔr unga avange ngge niba idɛyikungge unera unerwi unga aka awe. Isɛng abi itser Uyesu usɔkdũmɛn (Umat 10.1-4; Irh 6.12-16)
3.13: Uyesu afũã igũ na ayisa abirabɛ unga aka abee, umbɔ aba ru unga.
3.14: Unga asɛng usɔkdũmɛn umbɔ aka iwe abi itser Uyesu ugɛ umbɔ awe nggu unga, nú unga adene umbɔ adzek adzise isarhe.
3.15: Umbɔ awuri iyiyɛimbɔ ijee iyiki itsusuwe ípfu iyiki ibewe.
3.16: Umbɔ hã abɛ, usɔkdũmɛn hã unga aka asɛng, Usiman, uwu ha Uyesu aki iyisa Ubitru,
3.17: nu Uyaku ungwɛ̃ Uzabadi nu ungwɛ̃mbɔ Uyohana, abirabɛ Uyesu iki iyisa ugɛ Ubuwarnaji, agbena agburh <<Angwɛ̃ Igbigbashu Inai,>>
3.18: nu Uandarawu, nu Ufirhibu, nu Ubatorhomi, nu Umatiyu, nu Utoma, nu Uyaku ungwɛ̃ Uharhfa, nu Utaddiyu, nu Usiman uner Ukan'ana,
3.19: nu Uyahuda Uiskariyoti uwuku ugha adaknga. Uyesu nu Uba'arhzaburh (Umat 12.22-32; Irh 11.14-23; 12.10)
3.20: Mɔcɛ Uyesu abvui atsĩ ri iya. Anera abvui akɔng ikɛi, utsɛku unga nu angwɛ̃ imesanga asi idɛ̃ɛ̃ aghambɔ ubingha.
3.21: Abi iyambɔ aka agũ rimi, asok azĩmbɔ idzur unga. Anera anu igɔr agɛ, <<Unga aka azhɔmu ukpong!>>
3.22: Abika amesuwe Ikpem igambɔ adzeku Urusharhima aba agɔr agɛ, <<Awu Uba'arhzaburh uyɛrhe ípfu iyiki ibewe unga atsĩ ru unga! Akũ ijeenga ikɛi atsusuwe ipfu iyiki ibewe idzek.>>
3.23: Nggee Uyesu ayisa umbɔ na arherhuwe umbɔ unyaka arherhe agɛ, <<Ushaitan awuri ikorha aguse na awayiwe Ushaitan?
3.24: Iyɛrhe iba igaungge itsingge, iyɛrha ha isi ídɛ̃ɛ̃ngge.
3.25: Iya iba igauke itsike, iya ha isi ídɛ̃ɛ̃ke.
3.26: Rimi Ushaitan aba ugapa itsinga, unga asi ídɛ̃ɛ̃nga, imimashanga iki ibangge.
3.27: Idzidzɛrhe, unera asi ídɛ̃ɛ̃ atsĩã ri iya uner uwuku uker akarhuka abinnga, awuri itirhi abow uner uwuku uker ha. Mɔcɛ unga awuri idɛ̃ɛ̃ avura abin iya ha.
3.28: Umum idɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, kishoo arhim nu irhenu Unum anera aki ikorhe, awuri itsitsũwũkumbɔ ake.
3.29: Bɔr ubɛn uwuku urhenu Ipfu Isarsatangge asi ítsũwũkumbɔ unga, awu ra arhim aki ugbagbaa.>>
3.30: Unga arherhe rimi, ubinkutsu umbɔ aka agɔr agɛ, <<Unga awe ru ipfu iyiki ibewe.>> Uya Uyesu nu angwɛ̃mbɔ (Umat 12.46-50; Irh 8.19-21)
3.31: Mɔcɛ uya Uyesu nggu angwɛ̃mbɔ aba atsĩ. Adɛ̃ɛ̃ nú awiya, na adene uwɔɔ unga ayisuwe Uyesu.
3.32: Ikikɔnga isei adziira unga, umbɔ adɛyiwe unga agɛ, <<Uyango nu anapumbi abeea ungo ra awiya.>>
3.33: Unga arhusa umbɔ agɛ, <<Awu umbɔ ungamɔ awu uyamum nu angwɛ̃mɛn?>>
3.34: Unga arhi abirabɛ aka asei adziira unga na agɛ, <<uyamum uwi nggu angwɛ̃mɛn!
3.35: Ubɛn unera aka ikorhu ubinkpi Unum aka abema, unga awu ungwɛ̃mɛn nu unapumɛn nu uyamum.>>

4.1: Ikɛi Uyesu atirhi imesuwe nú ubang ukau. Ikikɔnga iki ikɔng idziir unga irhɛngge, unga asok atsĩ ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ asei ru ukau, ikikɔng anera idɛ̃ɛ̃ umɔ nú ubang ukau ha.
4.2: Unga akũ unyaka arherhe amesuwe umbɔ abina arhɛrhɛ, agɔr umbɔ agɛ,
4.3: <<Àka akpeto! Uner irham adzek azĩ idoi ikpũnga.
4.4: Unga aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ inna ikpũ hã, ikpũ iyɔɔ igba nú utsĩndĩ, anunu aba akpɔuke iyi ha.
4.5: Iyɔɔ igbei ru ukpɔrha, abĩ asi iweke akarhãrhã. Ngge imɛr kanying ubinkutsu, abĩ anang hã asi ighorke.
4.6: Unum uku urhang, imani ikoikungge ikpũ iyi ha, ubinkutsu ngge ishingge ra anũnang.
4.7: Ikpũ iyɔɔ igba ri ididɔk, ididɔk iseng itong iyi ha, ngge isi ighwɛrngge ikpũrhã.
4.8: Iyɔɔ ikɛi igba ra abĩ aka aze. Imɛr idzeka, iseng ni ighwɛr ikpũrhã, iyɔɔ isɔka itaitaar, iyɔɔ isɔka utɔ̃tɔ̃ĩ, iyɔɔ ananaka.>>
4.9: Mɔcɛ Uyesu agɛ, <<Ubɛn unera aka awu ra ato akika agũ, neke unga agũ.>>
4.10: Ivangyɛ Uyesu aka asei ikiyikanga, angwɛ̃ imesanga usɔkdũmɛn nu abɔɔ aka adɔsa unga arhusa agben unyaka arherhe ha.
4.11: Unga adɛyiwe umbɔ agɛ, <<Aka adzaambɔ umbi ihwɛng iwiwɔk Iyɛrhe-Num. Bɔr abirabɛ aka awu ra awiya, abina kishoo awuri irherhuwe umbɔ ru unyaka arherhe.
4.12: Ngge itsu, << <Umbɔ awuri irhirhimbɔ, bɔr asi ínyãmbɔ, awuri igũmbɔ ikɛi na asi íhwɛngmbɔ, utsur umbɔ adzipa na atsũwũkumbɔ arhimmbɔ!> >>
4.13: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi asi ihwɛngmbi agben unyaka arherhe ha? Ude umbi awuri ikorhu uguse na ahwɛng agben unyaka arherhe akɔɔ?
4.15: Abɔɔ awu ru nyaki ikpũyɛ iki igba nú utsĩndĩ, anangkɛ umbɔ aka adoi arherha ha, kanying Ushaitan aba atsũwũka arherhe ha aka adoi ru umbɔ.
4.16: Abirabɛ aka awu ru nyaki ikpũ iyiriyɛ umbɔ aka adoi nú abĩ ifa, agũ arherha ha, kanying umbɔ ayɛi ake nggu itɛnamɛn.
4.17: Bɔr umbɔ aka ashimbɔ ra anũnang, umbɔ adãrhĩ ivanga ukunjiir. Ivang ayetnum use uver iki iba ri itsi arherha ha, kanying umbɔ abvui azĩmbɔ ra andzing.
4.18: Ikɛi abɔɔ, awu ru nyaki ikpũyɛ iki idoi ri ididɔk, agũ arherhe ha,
4.19: bɔr igũ ighong abin upfung, nu irhirhɛm ibee iwu ru ubin nu ikpona abina akɔɔ itsĩ ikɛnke arherha ha ighwighwɛr.
4.20: Abɔɔ, awu ru nyaki ikpũyɛ iki idoi na abĩ aka aze, agũ arherha ha, na ayɛi ake akũ atɔ̃ itser nggu ake, aghwɛr ikpũrhã iyɔɔ isɔka itaitaar, iyɔɔ isɔka utɔ̃tɔ̃ĩ, iyɔɔ ananaka.>> Irhirhang afafã (Irh 8.16-18)
4.21: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi aka isaka agaar irhirhang awɔkmbi ru ikikĩĩ? Use atsuke ngge ra ada ukoma? Ishingge rimi, ugɛse umbi aka isaka aden ngge ru anang idɛ̃ɛ̃ke afafã?
4.22: Abinkɛ aka awu ri iwɔk, umbɔ awuri inyãmbɔ ake, abinkɛ aka awoyi ikɛi, awuri inyinyãmbɔ ake nu awiya.
4.23: Ubɛn unerwi aka awu ra ato akika agũ, neke unga agũ.>>
4.24: Na agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka akpeto na agũ. Ugbiu ha ungo uku ukũ umei, awuri ikũ umgbɔ amei adzaa ungo, awuri itomuwambɔ ungo.
4.25: Uwuruwi aka awe ru ihwihwɛng awuri itomuwe unga akpo arhɛrhɛ. Uwuruwi aka ashia, awuri iyɛse ungwɛ̃rhĩ ihwihwɛng ha unga aka awerangge.>> Unyaka arherhe ikpũ iyiki isiseng
4.26: Na agɔr agɛ, <<Iyɛrhe Unum iwuri iminɛ. Unera adoi ikpũ nu icangnga.
4.27: Utsuu nu atenum, unga arha na asok, utsɛki ikpũ hã iki imɛr iseng, uner ha asi ihwɛnga ubinkpi uku ukorhe.
4.28: Abĩ nibikake atsu ikpũ imɛr, atirhi akũ agam adzeka, na akũ azang adzeka, nu azanga akũ ishaanga idzeka.
4.29: Ivang ishaanga iki ikɔ̃, unga aka ikũ ikon agbɛr, ivang iyiki igbɛr iki iwe.>> Unyaka arherhe ishaa umustad (Umat 13.31-32,34; Irh 13.18-19)
4.30: Uyesu ikɛi agɛ, <<Umum ikpangu Iyɛrhe Unum nggu use, umum ikũ unyaka arherhe akasong idɛyiwe ngge iki iwe?
4.31: Iwu ru nyaki ishaa ikpũ umastad, iyiriyɛ ngge iki iwe iyiki icia ri ikpũ abin iyiki idoi nu abĩ.
4.32: Umbɔ aka idoi ngge, ngge iki isaki iseng igɔngngge abinkɛ umbɔ aka adoi ra abĩ, nggu abokngge akagɔng anunu aka isaka acipuwa akang ashiake nu ake.>>
4.33: Nggu urhɛrhɛ unyaka arherhe Uyesu aka akũ asɔme anera Arherhu-Num, ri ihwihwɛngmbɔ.
4.34: Asi isɔmuka umbɔ ubin rimi ru umbɔ uku ushikpɔ ru unyaka arherhe. Bɔr ivangyɛ unga aka awu nggu angwɛ̃ imesanga ikiyikambɔ, unga aka isaka asɔmuka umbɔ agbena. Uyesu adɔɔte ugba inai (Umat 8.23-27; Irh 8.22-25)
4.35: Ru unum hã urhɛɛ uku uwe, unga agɔr angwɛ̃ imesanga agɛ, <<Umɛn inggar udiku ukpɔrɔ.>>
4.36: Umbɔ abɔre ikikɔng anera, umbɔ ashupa unga nggu umbɔ, ru ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ unga aka asei ru umgbɔ. Akhukhɔɔ akɔɔ ikɛi awu umɔ.
4.37: Nggaa ugba ukom ukerketakpɔ usoyi, amɛ̃ ukau ha ukwɛr ukhukhɔɔmbɔ, utsɛku umgbɔ ubɔr ukunjiir ri ididɛɛ ra amɛ̃.
4.38: Uyesu awu ru urhɔ ra akpok ukhukhɔɔ nu ubin ukpuku utsorhi itsi. Angwɛ̃ imesanga azita unga agɔr agɛ, <<A umarhem, ungo usi igũo ighong umɛn iki iwuri itsĩmɛn?>>
4.39: Unga asok, atsɛrhu ugba ukukom hã agɔr amɛ̃ ukau ukugɔng hã agɛ, <<Unukutata! Udɔɔr!>> Mɔcɛ ugbaa ukpekpɔ, ananga kishoo anukutata uku ughwɔɔw.
4.40: Unga agɔr angwɛ̃ imesanga agɛ, <<Awu use utsu umbi agũ iwei rimi? Umbi ana ashimbi ri imangmang?>>
4.41: Umbɔ agũ iwei akarhãrhã agɔr adɔkambɔ agɛ, <<Awu ungaa nuwi? Ugba ukom nu ubvun amɛ̃ agũna unga!>>

5.1: Umbɔ azĩ atsĩ ugar ukau abĩ Ugarasa.
5.2: Ivang Uyesu aka adzeku ukhukhɔɔ, unga agbang nggu uner ipfu iyiki ibewe aka adzeka ra anang aka adzak aner.
5.3: Uner ha asei ra anang akika adzak aner, unera asi idɛ̃ɛ̃ abowpa unga uko nggu inyãwã.
5.4: Umbɔ aka isaka abow aboknga nu adaknga nggu inyãwã, bɔr unga aka isaka apupuwe ngge na abvũĩwe azɔu aki adaknga. Unera ashia ri iker iyiki ikpɔm unga.
5.5: Nu utsuu na atenum unga aghɛta ra anang akika adzak aner nu ígũ anu itsuyi ívum na akũ atarh angwãi iyornga.
5.6: Unga aka anyã Uyesu ukukaa, unga atĩtser aba atararhu ra anangnga.
5.7: Atsarhi irhaknga atsu ívum agɛ, <<Awu use utoma ungo nggu umum, Uyesu, Ungwɛ̃ Unum uwuku Ugɔng? Uyirh itsok Unum ugɛ ungo usi ídzaango umum uver!>>
5.8: Ubinkutsu Uyesu aka agɔra unga agɛ, <<Upfudzeka ru utsak uwurɛ, ungo ipfu iyiki ibewe!>>
5.9: Uyesu arhusa unga agɛ, <<Itsokngo igburh ungamɔ?>> Unga agɛ, <<Itsokmum igburh Ukpusha, ubinkutsu umɛn iwu irhɛɛmɛn.>>
5.10: Unga ashɔ̃rhũ Uyesu akarhãrhã utsur unga awayika umbɔ adzembɔ ra anang hã.
5.11: Arhede arhɛrhɛ aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ ughãwã akhapa ri igũa.
5.12: Ípfu iyiki ibewe ha ishɔ̃rhũ Uyesu igɛ, <<Uma udena umɛn izĩ ru arhede akɔrɔ, itsĩ ra ake.>>
5.13: Nggee unga abemuka ípfu iyiki ibewe ha idzek izĩngge ru ikpui arhede ha. Ikpui arhede ha itsĩngge anaka agɔnga avaa, ake asok atĩtser, ahwarha acipa atsĩke ru ukau atsĩmke ra amɛ̃.
5.14: Abi idzɛu arhede ha atĩ azĩ asɔme uteumbɔ nu ukpuku ukhapa umɔ adzise isarhe, anera adzeyi aba inyã ubinkpi uku ukorhe.
5.15: Umbɔ aka aba atsĩ ru Uyesu umbɔ anyã utsak ha ukpui ípfu iyiki ibewe ha iki iwe ru unga, asei umɔ atsim atorho ri iyornga amɛnnga awu uku urhirhiki, iwei ifɛr umbɔ.
5.16: Abirabɛ aka anyã ifɛrha ha iki ikorhe adzowe isarhe abinkɛ aka akorhe nggu uner ukpui ípfu iyiki ibewe nu ikpui arhede ha.
5.17: Mɔcɛ anera atirhi ishɔ̃rhũ Uyesu unga abɔre abĩmbɔ.
5.18: Uyesu awuri itsĩ ru ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ nukpi, utsak ha ípfu iyiki ibewe ha iki idzeku unga ashɔ̃rhũ Uyesu ama aneke unga adɔsa unga.
5.19: Bɔr Uyesu asi inekuka unga. Agɔr unga agɛ, <<Uzĩ ri iya ra angwɛ̃mbi, usɔme umbɔ abin aka agɔngkɛ Uteijee aka akorhuwa ungo, nu atorhkɛ unga aka agũ ru ungo.>>
5.20: Nggee utsak ha, azĩ atsĩrhã ri iteu usɔka umbɔ iki iyisa Udikaforhi adzise isarhe, abinkɛ Uyesu aka akorhuwe unga. Anera kishoo adzeidzeu. Unapa Uyayiru nu utsɛrh uwuku urhong adzirh (Umat 9.18-26; Irh 8.40-56)
5.21: Ikɛi ivang Uyesu aka agar ugar ukpɔrɔ ru ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃, anera arhɛrhɛ akɔng adziir unga nu ubang ukau ha.
5.22: Mɔcɛ unying ra anggbaashi ubã ifɛn-Num itsoka igburh Uyayiru, aba umɔ. Unga aka anyã Uyesu, unga agba ra adaknga,
5.23: ashɔ̃rhã unga agɛ, <<Ungwɛ̃rhũ unapmum akpurha abɔr akpe. Umum ishɔ̃rhã ungo uba utsorhu ubokngo nu unga akerhe na abɛk.>>
5.24: Nggee Uyesu azĩã nggu unga. Anera arhɛrhɛ aka afĩĩ adɔsa unga.
5.25: Utsɛrh uwɔɔ umɔ aghong irhãrhã umɛ̃ɛ̃ imɛka usɔkdũmɛn.
5.26: Irhãrhãnga ighong unga akarhãrhã ri ivangyɛ abi agɔu arhɛrhɛ aka anɛta unga. Afɛre ubinkpi unga aka awerakpɔ kishoo, bɔr asi igũa ugarh, irhãrhã ikpurhi idɛ̃ɛ̃ ititoma.
5.27: Ivangyɛ unga aka agũ isarhe Uyesu, unga adɔsa unga ra andzing ri ikikɔnga, aba abanga atorho Uyesu,
5.28: ubinkutsu unga akaifɛrhkɔ ra amɛnnga agɛ, <<Umum ĩba ĩbangumum atorhanga ukpekũ, umum iwuri ikerhumum.>>
5.29: Kanying umɛ̃ɛ̃nga udɛ̃ɛ̃kpɔ, nu unga agũã ri iyornga aka akerhunga ru ayetnumnga.
5.30: Kanying Uyesu agũ ijee iki idze ru unga. Unga adzipa ri ikikɔnga arhusa agɛ, <<Ungamɔ abanga atorhamum?>>
5.31: Angwɛ̃ imesanga agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ungo unyã anera arhɛrhɛ afĩĩa ungo riminɛ ungo ugɔr ugɛ, <Ungaa abanga umum?> >>
5.32: Bɔr Uyesu arhi adziir abee inyã uwuku ukorhu ubin hã.
5.33: Mɔcɛ utsɛrh ha, aka ahwɛng ubinkpi uku ukorhuwe unga, aba nggu iwei nu izang iyor, agba ra anangnga adɛyiwe unga kishoo idzidzɛrhe.
