5.34: Unga agɔr unga agɛ, <<A unapmum, imangmango ngge ikerhuwa ungo. Uzĩ uku utɔɔ, ayetnumngo aka amaake.>>
5.35: Uyesu ana awu ra arherhe nukpi, nu anera adzeki iya Uyayiru unggbaashi ubã ifɛn-Num hã, aba agɔr agɛ, <<Unapungo aka akpea. Awu use utsu ungo unu idzowe umarhem ayetnum?>>
5.36: Bɔr Uyesu akwɛɛte arherhambɔ, agɔr unggbaashi ubã ifɛn-Num hã agɛ, <<Niba ugũa iwei, uwe ru imangmang ukpekũ.>>
5.37: Asi ineke unera azĩã nggu unga, akpurha akũ Ubitru, nu Uyaku, nu Uyohana ungwɛ̃mbɔ Uyaku.
5.38: Ivang umbɔ aka azĩ atsĩ ri iya unggbaashi ubã ifɛn-Num hã, Uyesu anyã idzidzunambɔ, nu anera aka aciu akpe atsui ivum.
5.39: Unga atsĩ agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Awu use utsu umbi aciu akpe na atsui ívum rimi? Una hã anasi ikpea awu ru urhɔ!>>
5.40: Bɔr umbɔ anyĩrhã unga. Nggee unga atsu umbɔ adzek ra awiya, unga akũ utesa nu uyisa una hã nu angwɛ̃ imesanga hã abika awu nggu unga, atsĩ ra anangkɛ una hã aka awe.
5.41: Adzur ubok una hã agɔr agɛ, <<Tarhita kumi!>> agbena agburh <<Unakuci, umum igɔr ungo, usisok!>>
5.42: Kanying una hã asok azɛ̃rhã adziir. Imɛknga iwu usɔkdũmɛn. Akɛrɛ ha atsu umbɔ adzeidzeu akarhãrhã.
5.43: Uyesu agbiite atombɔ akarhãrhã ugɛ umbɔ niba adɛyikumbɔ unera. Ikɛi unga agɔr umbɔ adzowe ubingha ru una hã.

6.1: Uyesu asoka umɔ abvui azĩã Unazarat utepunga, angwɛ̃ imesanga azĩ nggu unga.
6.2: Unum ukpuku uwosha uku uwe, unga atirha amesuwe ru ubã ifɛn-Num, anera arhɛrhɛ aka agũ unga, adzeidzeu na arhusa agɛ, <<Utsak uwurɛ akpo abin akɛrɛ ri inɛ̃ɛ̃? Adzowe unga itsoi iyɛrɛ ri inɛ̃ɛ̃ unga aka anu ikorha abin idzeu?
6.3: Uwɛrɛ ha asi iwea ukapinta ha, ungwɛ̃ Umaryamu, ungwɛ̃mbɔ Uyaku, nu Uyusuf, nu Uyahuda nu ikɛi Usiman? Asi iwea anapumbɔ abɛ nggu umɛn?>> Umbɔ akpɛ̃mbɔ unga.
6.4: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num aka isaka akpoa igɔng ru ubɛn ananga, akpurha asheru utepunga nu anernga nu abi iyanga.>>
6.5: Unga asi idɛ̃ɛ̃ akorhunga abin idzeu nggɔɔ ha, unga akpurha atsorhuwe abok nu abi irhãrhã ukunjiir akerhuwe umbɔ. Uyesu adene angwɛ̃ imesanga (Umat 10.5-15; Irh 9.1-6)
6.6: Unga adzeidzeu umbɔ aka ashimbɔ ri imangmang. Mɔcɛ Uyesu atsĩrhã adziir íteu iyiki ici umɔ hã amesuwe anera.
6.7: Unga ayisa angwɛ̃ imesanga usɔkdũmɛn hã azĩ ru unga, unga adene umbɔ ivaivaa na adzowe umbɔ ijee ri itsi ípfu iyiki ibewe.
6.8: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Niba anyangumbi ubin ru uzɛ̃rhã hã, umbi akpurha akpɔm igbong, niba akpɔmmbi ubingha, use ijara, use uhwɛk ri íbvuk atorhambi.
6.9: Àka atsu abadak bɔr niba akpɔmmbi atorho akɔɔ.
6.10: Ubɛn iya umbi aka itsĩ, àka asei umɔ utsɛku unumkpi umbi aka isok ru uteu ha.
6.11: Ubɛn anangkɛ umbɔ aka asi iyɛimbɔ umbi use aba asi ikpembɔ ato ru umbi, àka awashuwe uzurhu adakmbi ivangyɛ umbi aka isok, umgbɔ uwu ideka iyiki ibewe ra atsimbɔ.>>
6.12: Umbɔ adzek adzowe isarhe ugɛ anera adzipa.
6.13: Umbɔ atsusuwe ípfu iyiki ibewe írhɛirhɛ, na adzukuwe atsei ra abi írhãrhã arhɛrhɛ akerhuwe umbɔ. Akpe Uyohana Uner Ubɔtisima (Umat 14.1-12; Irh 9.7-9)
6.14: Uyɛrhe Uhiridu aka agũ abin akɛrɛ kishoo, ubinkutsu umbɔ ahwɛng itsok Uyesu imaa ananga. Abɔɔ agɛ, <<Uyohana Uner Ubɔtisima unga asok ra akpe. Ngge itsu unga awe ru ijee iyiki ikorha abin idzeu ha.>>
6.15: Abɔɔ agɛ, <<Awu uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num Uirhiya.>> Abɔɔ igambɔ agɛ, <<Awu uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num uwɔɔ, uwu abi isha.>>
6.16: Ivangyɛ Uhiridu aka agũ akɛrɛ, unga agɛ, <<Uyohana, unerwi umum iki izharhuwe itsinga, unga asoka akpe!>>
6.17: Ubinkutsu Uhiridu nibikanga atsumbɔ adzur Uyohana, abow unga na atsuke ru ugborzĩ, ri itsi Uhirudiya. Utsɛrha ungwɛ̃mbɔ Ufirhibu unga aka apfuna.
6.18: Uyohana aka isaka arherhu Uhiridu agɛ, <<Asi izea ungo uku upfunu utsɛrha ungwɛ̃mbi.>>
6.19: Nggee Uhirudiya agũ avɔm Uyohana na abee ifɛre unga. Bɔr Uhiridu asi ibemuka.
6.20: Ubinkutsu Uhiridu agũ iwei Uyohana na agana unga, ahwɛnga Uyohana arhika na awu usarkasar uner. Ubɛn ivangyɛ Uhiridu aka igũ arherhu Uyohana, unga aka isaka adzununga, rimi hã unga anang agũibɛn ikpeto ru unga.
6.21: Ri imimasha ivanga ibangge ru Uhirudiya. Ru unum imar Uhiridu ivangyɛ unga aka azek irhowa, ayisa ayɛrhe abĩnga kishoo nu akagɔng abi iwa, nu akakũ abi Ugarhirhi.
6.22: Ivangyɛ unapa Uhirudiya aka atsĩ azer azer, ake atsĩ ra amɛn Uhiridu nu atsennga. Nggee uyɛrhe agɔr una hã agɛ, <<Urhusa umum ubinkpi ungo uku ubee, umum iwuri ĩdzaamum ungo.>>
6.23: Unga ayirh nggu uyirh abemuwe una hã agɛ, <<Ubɛn ubinkpi ungo uku urhusa umum iwuri ĩdzaamum ungo, utsɛku uteng iyɛrhamum.>>
6.24: Una hã adzek azĩ arhusu uyanga agɛ, <<Umum iwuri irhusu use?>> Uyanga agɔr unga agɛ, <<Itsi Uyohana Uner Ubɔtisima.>>
6.25: Kanying una hã abvui atĩ azĩã ru uyɛrhe agɔr agɛ, <<Umum ibee icɛrɛ ungo udzaa itsi Uyohana Uner Ubɔtisima ri itɛ̃rhĩ.>>
6.26: Amɛn Uyɛrhe aghong akarhãrhã, bɔr uyirhnga aka ayirh ra asu atsennga, itsu unga asi idɛ̃ɛ̃ akɛna unga.
6.27: Nggee kanying unga adene undɔsu uyɛrhe akũ itsi Uyohana akũ aba. Utsa ha azĩ azharhe itsi Uyohana ru ugborzĩ.
6.28: Akũ itsi ha ri itɛ̃rhĩ akũ aba. Adzowe ru una hã, unga ayɛi adzowe ru uyanga.
6.29: Angwɛ̃ imesu Uyohana aka agũ isarhe ha, umbɔ aba ashupu ukom Uyohana adzake. Uyesu afuka anera anakagɔnga atɔ̃ɔ̃ (Umat 14.13-21; Irh 9.10-17; Uyoh 6.1-14)
6.30: Uner itser Uyesu akɔng adziir Uyesu na adɛyiwe unga kishoo abinkɛ umbɔ aka akorhe na amesuwe.
6.31: Mɔcɛ, anera arhɛrhɛ aka anu iba na adzek utsɛku umbɔ asi ikpombɔ ivang igha ubin, unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka aba nggu umum umɛn izĩ ra anangkɛ anera aka ashimbɔ umɔ, umɛn iwosha ukunjiir.>>
6.32: Nggee umbɔ atsĩ ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ azĩmbɔ anangkɛ anera aka ashimbɔ umɔ.
6.33: Bɔr umbɔ aka isoka anang hã, anera arhɛrhɛ aka anyã umbɔ ahwɛngmbɔ umbɔ. Atĩ ra adak adzeyi ri íteu kishoo, anggbaashia azĩ atsĩmbɔ ru umbɔ.
6.34: Uyesu aka acipa ru ukhukhɔɔ anyã arhɛrha anera aka akɔng. Unga agũ atorh umbɔ, ubinkutsu umbɔ awu ru nyaki ídɔi iki ishingge ru uner idzɛu. Nggee unga atirha amesuwe umbɔ abina arhɛrhɛ.
6.35: Unum uku uyo itsitsĩ, nggee angwɛ̃ imesanga aba agɔr unga agɛ, <<Anera ashimbɔ ra anang akɛrɛ, nggayɛ unum uku uwuri itsĩkpɔ.
6.36: Udene anera umbɔ atsĩ íteu nu ícang iyiki ikhapa nggimi agoi ubin umbɔ aka igha.>>
6.37: Bɔr unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi àka adzowe umbɔ ubin umbɔ agha.>> Umɔ umbɔ agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ugɛ umɛn izĩ igoi ubingha ukpu imang uner itser afɛ̃ɛ̃ utɔrɔk! Umɛn izĩ ifɛre imang iyɛrɛ ru ubingha ni idzowe umbɔ agha?>>
6.38: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi awu ra aborodi asong nggu umbi? Àka azĩ arhi.>> Umbɔ aka azĩ arhi, umbɔ agɛ, <<Aborodi atɔ̃ɔ̃, nu abɛrh avaa.>>
6.39: Uyesu atsu umbɔ agɔr anera asei ukpukpusha nu ubĩĩ uku usum.
6.40: Nggee umbɔ asei ukpukpusha abɔɔ ananaka abɔɔ isɔka itɔ̃itɔ̃ɔ̃.
6.41: Unga aka anyangu aborodi ha ikitɔ̃nake nu abɛrh ha ikivarhake, aberi itsinga arhi afã, atar uwɛɛ na atsɔku uborodi ha. Mɔcɛ unga adzise angwɛ̃ imesanga umbɔ akũ azĩ adene anera. Ikɛi unga agashuwe abɛrh ha ikivarhake ru umbɔ kishoo.
6.43: Angwɛ̃ imesa arhɔ̃yĩ awushu uborodi ha nu abɛrh ha atɔk azĩnga usɔkdũmɛn.
6.44: Irhɛ anera aka agha ubingha ha, akatsak awu anakagɔnga atɔ̃ɔ̃. Uyesu azɛ̃rhũ uzɛ̃rhã afafã nu amɛ̃ (Umat 14.22-36; Uyoh 6.15-21)
6.45: Kanying Uyesu atsu angwɛ̃ imesanga atsĩ ru ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ agbaashia azĩ ugar Ubetsaida, na asoyiwe ikikɔnga.
6.46: Unga aka asoyiwe umbɔ amaa, unga afũã igũ azĩã ifɛn-Num.
6.47: Urhɛɛ uku uwe, ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ hã uwe ra ateu ukau, unga awu ikiyikanga nu abĩ.
6.48: Unga anyã angwɛ̃ imesanga atɛ̃wã ikpikpayi, ugba ukɛnkpɔ umbɔ izĩ ra asu. Utsar ukpu akara ataar aki utsuu unga azĩã ru umbɔ, azɛ̃rhã afafã nu amɛ̃ ukau ha. Unga abee ifara umbɔ atɔng,
6.49: bɔr umbɔ aka anyã unga azɛ̃rhã afafã nu ukau amɛ̃ hã, umbɔ atsar ugɛ awu imãrhã. Umbɔ atsu ivum,
6.50: Umbɔ aka anyã unga, umbɔ agbipa kishookambɔ. Kanying unga arherhe arherhe nggu umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka aker amɛnmbi! Awu umum. Niba agũmbi iwei!>>
6.51: Unga atsĩã ru ukhukhɔɔ nggu umbɔ, mɔcɛ ugbaka ukpekpɔ. Umbɔ adzeidzeu akarhãrhã,
6.52: umbɔ asi ihwɛngmbɔ agben aki ubingha ukpu inera anakagɔnga atɔ̃ɔ̃ hã, ubinkutsu, amɛnmbɔ asi iyɛike.
6.53: Umbɔ aka agar ukau ha, umbɔ acipa ra abĩ Ujanisarat, abope ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ hã nu angwĩ ukau ukugɔng hã.
6.54: Ubɛn umbɔ aka adzek ru ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ hã, kanying anera ahwɛngmbɔ ugɛ awu Uyesu.
6.55: Umbɔ atĩna adzeyiwa ra abĩmbɔ kishoo akũna abi irhãrhã ra afarmbɔ akũ azĩ kishoo ra anangkɛ Uyesu aka awe.
6.56: Kishoo anangkɛ unga aka izĩ, iteu iki igɔng, use iteu iki ici, umbɔ angwɛ̃we abi irhãrhã ra angwĩ anang izɛɛ. Na ashɔ̃rhã unga ru abi irhãrhã hã abangu utɛm ibang atorhanga. Kishoo abirabɛ aka akpo ibibanga akerhumbɔ.

7.1: Abi Ufarisi nu abɔɔ abika amesuwe Ikpem aka adzeku Urusharhima aba akɔng adziir Uyesu.
7.2: Na anyã angwɛ̃ imesanga agha ubingha nggu abok arhim, asi isorhmbɔ abokmbɔ aka awu agbeyambɔ.
7.3: Abi Ufarisi nggu abi Uyahuda kishoo aka isaka asorh abokmbɔ akata na adɔrha agha ubingha, ubinkutsu awu ugau agbeyi akakũmbɔ.
7.4: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka idzeki izɛɛ abvui aba ri iya, asi íghambɔ ubin, umbɔ awuri igbaashia adɔsa agbeyambɔ asorh ayormbɔ kata. Na asorh akpɛwa nu ídzum amɛ̃ nu atɛ̃rhĩ nu andzoma nu atseu.
7.5: Nggee abi Ufarisi nu abika amesuwe Ikpem arhusu Uyesu agɛ, <<Awu use utsu angwɛ̃ imesango asi idɔsumbɔ ugau akakũ na anu igha abin nggu abok arhim?>>
7.6: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Irhikungge Uishaya aka asɔm Arherhu-Num ra atsimbi abi ukpukpeta agɛ, << <Aner abɛrɛ adzaa umum igɔng ra angwĩ, bɔr amɛnmbɔ aderke nggu umum.
7.7: Umbɔ adzaa umum igɔng ibɛm, anu imesuwe ikpem anera ugɛɛ Unum adzowe umbɔ.>
7.8: <<Umbi aka atarkumbi ikpem Unum, umbi adɔsa agau anera.>>
7.9: Na agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi aka akpombi anang umbi aka angwɛ̃we Ikpem Unum ngge itsú umbi idɔsa agaumbi!
7.10: Umusa agɔr agɛ, <Udzowe imor ru utɛngo nu uyango,> nu <Ikɛi, uwuruwi aka arhenu utɛnga use uyanga, awu ufang umbɔ afɛre unga.>
7.11: Bɔr umbi aka isaka agɔr agɛ unera aba agɔr utɛnga use uyanga agɛ, <Ubin hã uwu izũwã iyi Unum.>
7.12: Rimi hã, umbi akɛnmbi unga ikorhu ubɛn ubin ayike utɛnga use uyanga.
7.13: Rimi hã umbi afɔ̃rhũwe Arherhu-Num na adɔsa agbeyi ha umbi aki imesuwe angwɛ̃mbi. Ikɛi umbi aki ikorhe abin arhɛrhɛ ru nyaka ha.>> Abinkɛ aki itsu unera asi isara (Umat 15.10-20)
7.14: Ikɛi Uyesu ayisu ikikɔng hã iba ru unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Ubɛn unera akpeto ru umum, aka ahwɛng akɛrɛ.
7.15: Asi iwea abin awiya aki itsĩ ru unera atsu unga asi isara, abinkɛ aka idzeyiwa ra amɛn unera atsu unga asi isara ra asu Unum.>>
7.17: Unga aka asok ri ikikɔng hã na atsĩã ri iya, angwɛ̃ imesanga arhusa unga agben unyaka arherhe ha.
7.18: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi adzuna? Umbi asi ihwɛngmbi ugɛ abinkɛ aka adzeka awiya atsĩ ru unera asi ítsu unga asi isara ra asu Unum?
7.19: Abin hã asi itsĩke ra amɛnnga bɔr atsĩ ra anaanga, na adzek ri iyornga.>> Ra arherhe akɛrɛ Uyesu adɛyiwe ugɛ abingha kishoo awu asarsatake.
7.20: Agɛ, <<Ubinkpi iki idzeyiwa ra amɛn unera awu ukpɔ utsu unga asi isara ra asu Unum.
7.21: Ubinkutsu iwu ru unɔrkang amɛn unera, ifɛrhkɔ iyiki ibewe iki idzeyiwa, arhim irha ukutsɛrh use ukutsak, nu ivɛu, nu ifɛr uner nu itoma-dak,
7.22: nu ikpona, nu iyiki ibewe, nu irhirhɛm, nu anyɔna, nu unyɛ̃ɛ̃ nu idakuwe itsok, nu iberi itsi nu ibemitsi, nu ikɛi ishera amɛn.
7.23: Kishoo abin aka abewe akɛrɛ adzeyiwa ra amɛn unera, ake atsu unera asi isara ra asu Unum.>> Imangmang utsɛrh uwɔɔ (Umat 15.21-28)
7.24: Uyesu abɔruka anang hã na asok azĩã abĩ Utaya nu Usidon. Atsĩ ri iya ikɔɔ asi ibeenga unera ahwɛng, rimi hã unga afɔr iwiwoi adaka.
7.25: Idzidzɛrhe, kanying utsɛrh uwɔɔ, uwuruwi ungwɛ̃rhũ unapunga aka awe ru ipfu iyiki ibewe aka agũ isarhe ri itsinga, aba agba ra adaknga.
7.26: Awu utsɛrh abĩ Uherhini, amar unga udiku ugbɛr uwu Ufinikiya. Unga ashɔ̃rhũ Uyesu ama atsũwe ipfu iyiki ibewe ru unapunga.
7.27: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Uneke awɛkaci agbaashia agha kishoo ubinkpi umbɔ aka abee, ubinkutsu isi irhikungge umbɔ anyangu ubingha awɛkaci atsuke íjui.>>
7.28: Bɔr utsɛrh ha agɛ, <<Ĩĩ, Uteijee, bɔr ru adak utebur íjui iki isaki ighangge awushu ubingha aka idze ra abok awɛkaci agbei.>>
7.29: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Iwu idzidzɛrhe, uzĩ ri iya, ipfu iyiki ibewe iki idzengge ru unapungo.>>
7.30: Unga abvui azĩ ri iya anyã unapa anu nu ukoma, ipfu iyiki ibewe iki idzengge ru unga. Uyesu akerhuwe ugbau uwuku ufɔr arherhe adaka
7.31: Mɔcɛ Uyesu adzek udiku ugbɛr Utaya adɔsu udiku Usidon, azĩã Ukau Ugarhirhi nu utsĩndĩ uku uzĩ iteu usɔka umbɔ iki iyisa Udikaforhi.
7.32: Nggɔɔ ha umbɔ aka akowe unga uner igbau uwuku ufɔr arherhe adaka, umbɔ ashɔ̃rhã unga atsorhu ubok nu uner ha.
7.33: Nggee Uyesu adarhu uner igbau ha akũ azĩã, adzeka ri ikikɔng hã, atsu itoknga ra ato utsak ha. Unga atar aci akũ abanguwe arhɛm utsak ha.
7.34: Na abere arhi afafã agbiir uwoi ughorghotakpɔ, agɔr unga agɛ, <<Iffata!>> Agbena agɛ, <<Uyanga!>>
7.35: Kanying unga aka arherhe rimi, ato utsak ha ayanga, urhɛmnga ugarhe unga atirhunga arherhe azezee.
7.36: Uyesu atsu umbɔ niba adɛyikumbɔ unera. Bɔr ubɛn unga aka ikɛn umbɔ, umbɔ anang adɛ̃ɛ̃ isɔme anera.
7.37: Anera agũ na adzeidzeu kishoo agɛ, <<Heee! Akorhe ubɛn abina azezerake. Atsu ugbau agũã arherhe, uwuku ufɔr arherhe, arherhe azezee.>>

8.1: Ri inum hã anera abɔɔ arhɛrhɛ akɔng. Umbɔ aka ashimbɔ ru ubinkpi umbɔ aka igha, Uyesu ayisa angwɛ̃ imesanga umbɔ azĩ ru unga na agɔr umbɔ agɛ,
8.2: <<Umum igũ atorh anera abɛrɛ. Unum untaar nukpi umbɔ awu nggu umum na ashimbɔ ru ubingha.
8.3: Umum ĩba isoyikũ umbɔ azĩ ri iya nggu imerh, umbɔ awuri igbambɔ nu utsĩndĩ, ubinkutsu abɔɔ adzeki inang iyiki ider.>>
8.4: Angwɛ̃ imesanga agɔr unga agɛ, <<Umɛn ínyã ubingha ri inɛɛ ukpu umɛ̃ɛ̃ ighigha anera abɛrɛ ra arhum akɛrɛ?>>
8.5: Uyesu arhusa umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi awe ru ípo uborodi isong?>> Umbɔ agɛ, <<Utɔɔva.>>
8.6: Unga agɔr ikikɔng hã iseisa abĩ. Ivangyɛ unga aka anyangu aborodi ha utɔɔva, atar uwɛɛ ru Unum, na atsɔka ake agasha adzise angwɛ̃ imesa umbɔ adene ru anera, umbɔ akorhe rimi hã.
8.7: Umbɔ awembɔ ru angwɛ̃rhã abɛrh ukunjiir, unga atar uwɛɛ ra ake ikɛi, unga agɔr umbɔ agashuwe ikikɔnga.
8.8: Anera agha ashur, angwɛ̃ imesa arhɔ̃ĩ akika abubɔr ake atɔk azĩnga utɔɔva.
8.9: Irhɛ anera aka agha, atsĩmbɔ anaka agɔnga anaa. Mɔcɛ Uyesu asoyika anera umbɔ azĩmbɔ.
8.10: Kanying unga atsĩ ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ nu angwɛ̃ imesanga, azĩã abĩ Udarhmanuta. Ibee atsar (Umat 16.1-4; Irh 12.54-56)
8.11: Abi Ufarisi abɔɔ aba atirhi uning nggu Uyesu. Avira unga, umbɔ abee unga akorhuwe abin idzeu ake awu utsar ugɛ unga adzeka afã.
8.12: Unga agbɛr usepa ughoghor na agɛ, <<Awu use utsu umbi aner undan ukpirɛ abee inyã atsar? Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, utsar ushikpɔ umbɔ aka idɛyiwe ukpɔ.>>
8.13: Mɔcɛ unga abɔruka umbɔ, atsĩ ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃, agar azĩã ugar ukpɔrɔ. Uguga abi Ufarisi nu Uhiridu (Umat 16.5-12)
8.14: Angwɛ̃ imesu Uyesu ayirukumbɔ asi ikũmbɔ uborodi. Akpurha awe ru ipoa unying ukpekũ ru ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ hã.
8.15: Uyesu agbiite atombɔ agɛ, <<Àka akpɔm amɛnmbi nggu uga abi Ufarisi nu uwu Uhiridu.>>
8.16: Angwɛ̃ imesa ha atirhi irherhe nggu adɔka agɛ, <<Arherhe rimi ubinkutsu umɛn iki isi ikũmɛn uborodi.>>
8.17: Unga ahwɛng arherhakɛ umbɔ aka arherhe, unga arhusa umbɔ agɛ, <<Awu use utsu umbi anu igɔr ugɛ umbi ashimbi ru uborodi? Utsɛku icɛrɛ umbi asi inyã ahwɛngmbi? Amɛnmbi awe ru igbau?
8.18: Umbi awu ra asu na asi inyãmbi, na awembi ra ato na asi igũmbi? Umbi asi iyitumbi,
8.19: ivangyɛ umum iki igashuwe anera anaka agɔnga atɔ̃ɔ̃ nggu aborodi atɔ̃ɔ̃? Azĩnga asong umbi aka akarha akika abɔr?>> Umbɔ agɛ, <<Usɔkdũmɛn.>>
8.20: <<Ivangyɛ umum iki itsɔku ipo aborodi utɔɔva ha, umum iki igashuwe anera anaka agɔnga anaa, azĩng akagɔng asong umbi aka akarha atɔk?>> Umbɔ agɔr unga agɛ, <<Utɔɔva.>>
8.21: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Utsɛku icɛrɛ umbi asi ihwɛngmbi?>> Akerhuwe uner ibvuta ru Ubetsaida
8.22: Umbɔ aka aba Ubetsaida, abɔɔ akũ uner ibvuta ashɔ̃rhũ Uyesu abangu uner ibvuta ha.
8.23: Unga adzur ubok uner ibvuta ha akũna unga adzek azĩã undzing utepa. Ivangyɛ unga aka ashapa aci ra asu utsak ha na atsorhu ubok nu unga, Uyesu arhusa agɛ, <<Ungo udɛ̃ɛ̃ unyãɔ ubin ukpɔɔ?>>
8.24: Unga abera asunga na agɛ, <<Inyãmum anera, umbɔ awu ru nyaka acucii iki izɛ̃rhã.>>
8.25: Uyesu abvui abanga asu utsak ha. Mɔcɛ utsak ha ayangi ikpor asunga ugeii, asunga akerhuke, unga anyã abina uku ushashaki.
8.26: Uyesu adene unga azĩã ri iya, agɛ, <<Niba ubvui uzĩɔ udiku utepa.>> Ubitru adeku Uyesu unga awu Ukiristo (Umat 16.13-20; Irh 9.18-21)
8.27: Uyesu nggu angwɛ̃ imesanga azĩmbɔ, atsĩrhĩ iteu iki ici iyi Ukaisariya Ufirhibi. Nu utsĩndĩ unga arhusa angwɛ̃ imesanga agɛ, <<Anera anu igɔr agɛ umum iwu ungamɔ?>>
8.28: Umbɔ agɔr unga agɛ, <<Abɔɔ agɛ ungo uwu Uyohana Uner Ubɔtisima, abɔɔ agɛ, ungo uwu uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num Uirhiya, abɔɔ agɛ ungo uwu unying ra abika asɔm Arherhu-Num.>>
8.29: Unga arhusa umbɔ agɛ, <<Bɔr umbi agɔr ugɛ umum iwu ungamɔ?>> Ubitru agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ungo uwu Ukiristo.>>
8.30: Uyesu agbiite atombɔ utsur umbɔ adɛyikumbɔ unera ubinkpi unga aka awe. Uyesu asɔm ikpũ akpekɛ unga aka ikpe (Umat 16.21-28; Irh 9.22-27)
8.31: Unga atirha amesuwe umbɔ agɛ, <<Ungwɛ̃-Ner awuri ihwa uver ra abina arhɛrhɛ nu akakũ nu ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num, nu abika amesuwe Ikpem, awuri ikpɛ̃mbɔ unga. Awuri ifɛre unga, ru unum untaar unga awuri isoka nggu urhɛ.>>
8.32: Arherhe akɛrɛ ha ra awiya. Nggee Ubitru adarha unga azĩ ri ifɛna atirhi itsɛrha unga.
8.33: Bɔr Uyesu adzipa arhi angwɛ̃ imesa ha, atsɛrhu Ubitru agɛ, <<Usɔkɔ ru umum Ushaitan! Ungo uwu utarh ukpuku ukwɛr itok ru umum, ifɛrhkɔngo iwe ru nyaki iyi anera, isi iwengge ru nyaki iyi Unum.>>
8.34: Mɔcɛ unga ayisa anera nu angwɛ̃ imesanga aba ru unga, unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Unera aba abeenga idɔsa umum, awu ufang unga akpɛ̃ɛ̃ itsinga na ashipu igãrhãmau ucuciianga adɔsa umum.
8.35: Ubɛn unerwi aka abee ifɔrh urhɛnga, umgbɔ uwuri igwir, bɔr uwuku ugwirhuwe urhɛnga ru ubokmum nu Isarhe Iyiki Ize afufɔrh umgbɔ.
8.36: Izea iwu use unera akpo abin upfung kishoo na asi ikpoa urhɛnga?
8.37: Use unera awuri ikũ use ukpɔ uwe ifare urhɛnga?
8.38: Unera aba agũã atsakmum nu arherhamum ru udan ukpuku ushe irhirhika ukpirɛ ukpu itoma-dak nu arhim, Ungwɛ̃-Ner awuri igigũa atsak uner ha ri ivangyɛ unga aka iba ri ikpikpoi Utɛnga nggu ípfu itser-Num isarsatangge.>>

9.1: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, abɔɔ rabɔ adɛ̃ɛ̃ nggimi awuri inyãmbɔ ijee Iyɛrhe afã kata na adɔrha akpe.>> Idzidzipu iyor Uyesu (Umat 17.1-13; Irh 9.28-36)
9.2: Inuma utɔ̃ĩ iki imaa Uyesu akũ Ubitru, nu Uyaku, nu Uyohana, afũ igũ iyiki ider ikiyikambɔ. Umɔ iyor Uyesu idzipa iwiwengge ra asumbɔ.
9.3: Atorhanga ikɛi awu akaterha uku upɛ̃rhɛ̃ng uku unyar-nyar, anangke isisorh unera ru upfung ukpirɛ.
9.4: Mɔcɛ abika asɔm Arherhu-Num Uirhiya nu Umusa akapɛng ra asumbɔ, adɛ̃ɛ̃ arherhe nggu Uyesu.
9.5: Ubitru agɔr Uyesu agɛ, <<A umarhem, azea umɛn iki iwe ri nggimi, uneke umɛn itar atsurha ataar, unying uwu ungo, unying uwu Umusa, unying uwu Uirhiya.>>
9.6: Unga asi ihwɛngnga ubinkpi unga aka arherhe, ubinkutsu umbɔ agũ iwei akarhãrhã.
9.7: Mɔcɛ amɛɛ adzek aba atsire umbɔ, urhɛm udzek ra amɛɛ ha, ugɔr ugɛ, <<Uwɛrɛ awu Ungwɛ̃mum, uwu umum iki ibema. Àka akpe ato ru unga!>>
9.8: Kanying, umbɔ aka arhi adzipa, asi inyãmbɔ unera akpurha anyã Uyesu ikiyikanga nggu umbɔ.
9.9: Umbɔ aka azɛ̃rhã acipuwa ru igũ hã, Uyesu agbiite atombɔ ugɛ niba adɛyikumbɔ unera ubinkpi umbɔ aka anyã utsɛku Ungwɛ̃-Ner aka isoka akpe.
9.10: Ngge itsu umbɔ angwɛ̃ arherhe ha ra amɛnmbɔ, na arhusa adɔkambɔ agɛ, <<Awu use uwu agben isoka akpe?>>
9.11: Umbɔ arhusa unga agɛ, <<Awu use utsu abika amesuwe Ikpem anu igɔr ugɛ awu ufang uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num Uirhiya agbaashia aba?>>
9.12: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Awu idzidzɛrhe Uirhiya agbaashia aba agbishi ifɛrhɛ kishoo. Awu use utsu itsɛng igɔr igɛ awu ufang Ungwɛ̃-Ner ahwa uver urhɛrhɛ umbɔ akpɛ̃mbɔ unga?
9.13: Bɔr umum indɛyiwa umbi Uirhiya aka abanga, anera akorhuwe unga ubinkpi umbɔ aka abee, ru nyaka ngge iki itsɛng ri itsinga.>> Ikikerhe uwɛkuci uwu ipfu iyiki ibewe (Umat 17.14-23; Irh 9.37-45)
9.14: Uyesu nggu angwɛ̃ imesanga hã ikitatambɔ abvui aba ra angwɛ̃ imesanga, umbɔ anyã nggaa ikikɔng iki idzipa umbɔ nu abika amesuwe Ikpem adɛ̃ɛ̃ uning nggu umbɔ.
9.15: Kanying umbɔ aka anyã Uyesu, kishoo ikikɔng hã idzedzeu akarhãrhã, asok atĩtser azĩ aghwe unga.
9.16: Uyesu arhusa angwɛ̃ imesanga agɛ, <<Umbi adɛ̃ɛ̃ uning use nggu umbɔ?>>
9.17: Uner uwɔɔ ri ikikɔng hã adzipuwe agɛ, <<A umarhem, nggawi umum ikũwã ungo ungwɛ̃mum, uwuruwi aka awe ru ipfu iyiki ibewe iki ikɛnngge unga arherhe.
9.18: Ivangyɛ ngge iki isok ru unga, iki isaki itare unga ra abĩ. Itsu unga adzeyi ufuu ra angwĩnga, anu ishang anyĩ, iyornga idɛ̃ɛ̃ ikerketangge. Umum ĩgɔr angwɛ̃ imesango ama atsũwe, bɔr umbɔ afɔr adambɔ.>>
9.19: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi abi udan ukpirɛ, abika asheri imangmang, abi amɛn aka abewe. Umum iki isei ĩdãrhũmum nggu umbi, ukang umbi aka awe ru imangmang ru umum? Utsɛku ukang umum iki ibima nggu ida imangmangmbi? Ukũ ungwɛ̃ hã uba nggɛɛ ru umum.>>
9.20: Nggee umbɔ akũ unga aba. Ivangyɛ ipfu iyiki ibewe iki inyã Uyesu, kanying ngge ikwɛr ungwɛ̃ hã iyornga izang. Unga agba agɔ̃rhã, ufuu ikɛi udzeyi ra angwĩnga.
9.21: Uyesu arhusu utɛ ungwɛ̃ hã agɛ, <<Ukang ifɛrhɛ ha iki itirhi ru unga?>> Utɛ ungwɛ̃ hã agɛ, <<Itirhi unga ana awu uwɛkuci ukunjiir.
9.22: Iki isaki itare unga ru urha, nu amɛ̃, ibee ifɛre unga. Bɔr ungo uba udɛ̃ɛ̃ ukorhukɔ ubin, uma ugũ atorh umɛn uma uyika umɛn.>>
9.23: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Awu use utsu ungo urhusa ugɛ umum ĩba idɛ̃ɛ̃ imɛ̃mum? Ubɛn ifɛrhɛ iwengge ru uwuruwi aka awe ru imangmang.>>
9.24: Kanying utɛ ungwɛ̃ hã atsarhi irhaknga agɛ, <<Umum iwemum ri imangmang, uma uyika umum ingbiki iwerangge!>>
9.25: Uyesu aka anyã ikikɔng hã iki itĩ iba, unga atsɛrhi ipfu iyiki ibewe ha agɛ, <<Ungo ipfu iyiki ibewe iyiki itsu igbau ni ikɛn arherhe, umum itsu ungo upfudzek ru unga, niba ubvui utsĩɔ̃ ru unga ikɛi!>>
9.26: Ipfu iyiki ibewe ha itsu ivum, izung ungwɛ̃ hã mɔcɛ ngge idzekngge. Ungwɛ̃ hã anu ru nyaku ukom, nggee irhɛ anera igɔr ugɛ, <<Aka akpea.>>
9.27: Bɔr Uyesu adzur uboknga aberuwe unga nu adaknga, unga asok adɛ̃ɛ̃.
9.28: Uyesu aka atsĩ ri iya, angwɛ̃ imesanga arhusa unga ikiyikambɔ agɛ, <<Awu use utsu umɛn isi idɛ̃ɛ̃ itsũwũkumɛn ipfu iyiki ibewe ha?>>
9.29: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Ikpũ idzidzek iyɛrɛ iwuri iwe ri ifɛn-Num ukpekũ.>>
9.30: Umbɔ asokmbɔ ra anang hã, azɛ̃rhã atɔng ru Ugarhirhi. Uyesu asi ibeenga anera ahwɛng anangkɛ umbɔ aka awe,
9.31: ubinkutsu anu imesuwe angwɛ̃ imesanga. Agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Awuri ighambɔ adak Ungwɛ̃-Ner adzowe unga ra abok anera. Umbɔ awuri ifɛre unga, inuma itaar iki itɔng unga awuri isoka.>>
9.32: Bɔr umbɔ asi ihwɛngmbɔ agben arherhanga, na agũ iwei irhusa unga. Ungaa awu uwuku ugɔnga? (Umat 18.1-5; Irh 9.46-48)
9.33: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka azĩ atsĩ Ukafanahum, ivangyɛ unga aka awe ri iya, unga arhusa umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi adɛ̃ɛ̃ uning use ru utsĩndĩ?>>
9.34: Bɔr umbɔ anukutata, ubinkutsu nu utsĩndĩ umbɔ adɛ̃ɛ̃ uning ugɛ ungaa awu uwuku ugɔnga ru umbɔ.
9.35: Uyesu asei, na ayisa umbɔ usɔkdũmɛn hã, agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Ubɛn unera aka abee iwu ukugɔngmbi, awu ufang unga awu uwuku ucia, ikɛi na awu ugãrhãmbi kishoo.>>
9.36: Unga ashupu ungwɛ̃rhũ uwɛkuci atsu unga adɛ̃ɛ̃ ra ateumbɔ. Unga ashupa unga awuma ra aboknga, agɔr umbɔ agɛ,
9.37: <<Uwuku uyɛi ungwɛ̃rhũ uwɛkuci ru nyaku uwɛrɛ ri itsokmum, ayɛi umum nukpɔ, uwuruwi aka ayɛi umum ayɛi uwuku udena umum ĩba.>> Uwuruwi aka asi ikpɛ̃ɛ̃ umɛn awu uwu umɛn (Irh 9.49-50)
9.38: Uyohana agɔr unga agɛ, <<A umarhem, umɛn inyã uner uwɔɔ anu itsusuwe ipfu iyiki ibewe ri itsokngo, umɛn ikɛnmɛn unga, ubinkutsu asi iwea nggu umɛn.>>
9.39: Bɔr Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Àka niba akɛnmbi unga. Unera asi íkorhunga ubin idzeu ri itsokmum amaa na arherhunga iki ibewe ri itsimum.
9.40: Ubɛn unerwi aka asi ikpɛ̃ɛ̃ umɛn awu uwu umɛn.
9.41: Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, kishoo uwuku udzaa umbi ukpɛwa amɛ̃ aka ahwa ri itsokmum ugɛ umbi awu abi Ukiristo, umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe awuri ikpoa ugbɛtanga. Abin aka itsu igbigba ra arhim (Umat 18.6-9; Irh 17.1-2)
9.42: <<Ubɛn uwuruwi aka itsu unying ra awɛkaci abika awe ru imangmang ru umum agba ra arhim, ugba umbɔ abope ukɔ igɔ ru urhɔk uner ha na atsuke unga ru ukau ukugɔng.
9.43: Ubokngo uba utsu ungo ugbaɔ ra arhim, uzharhuwe ukpɔ. Azea ungo utsĩ urhɛ uwu ugbagbaa nggu uboka unying nu ungo uku ineke abokngo ikivarhake atsĩ idzũ urhakpi uku usi írhimkpɔ.
9.45: Udakngo uba utsu ungo igba ra arhim, uzharhuwe ukpɔ. Azea ungo utsĩ urhɛ uwu ugbagbaa nggu igbeta nu ungo iki itsĩ idzũ urhakpi uku usi írhimkpɔ nggu adakngo avaa.
9.47: Ishaa usungo iba itsu ungo ugba ra arhim, uhoote ukpɔ. Azea ungo utsĩ Iyɛrhe Unum nggu usua unying nu ungo uku itsĩ ri idzũ urha nggu asu avaa.
9.48: Umɔ, << <Adzudzimbɔ asi íkpeke, nu urha ikɛi usi írhimkpɔ.>
9.49: <<Asare anera kishoo nggu urha ru nyaka umbɔ aka ikũ angwã asare idɛm.
9.50: <<Angwã aze, bɔr ake aba ashike ri itonga angwã, ungo ukorhu uguse nu utsu ake atonga ikɛi? Àka awe ra angwã ra atsimbi, na asei uku ughwɔɔw nggu adɔka.>>

10.1: Mɔcɛ Uyesu asoka ra anang hã na azĩã ugbɛr uwu Uyahudiya agar Azɛ̃ Urdun. Ikɛi anera arhɛrhɛ abvui akɔng ru unga, unga amesuwe umbɔ ru nyaka unga aka abayi.
10.2: Abi Ufarisi abɔɔ aba avira unga, arhusa agɛ, <<Ri Ikpem imɛ̃ngge unera agau nggu utsɛ̃nga?>>
10.3: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umusa atsu umbi akorhu use?>>
10.4: Umbɔ agɛ, <<Umusa agɔr umɛn agɛ unera awuri idɛ̃ɛ̃ atsɛng ubvur igau itsɛrh awayika utsɛ̃nga.>>
10.5: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Itsã itsimbi itsu Umusa atsɛnga umbi akɛrɛ ha.
10.6: Bɔr ri inggbaashia <Unum amuna umbɔ ukutsak nggu ukutsɛrh.>
10.7: <Nggee, unera awuri ineke utɛnga nu uyanga, na anyapa nggu utsɛ̃nga.
10.8: Umbɔ ikivarhambɔ awuri iwu iyora unying.> Nggee umbɔ asi iwembɔ ivaa bɔr awu iyora unying.
10.9: Nggee, ubinkpi Unum aka agbopa, unera niba agashuka.>>
10.10: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka awu ri iya, ikɛi, angwɛ̃ imesa arhusu Uyesu arherhe ha.
10.11: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Ubɛn uwuku ugau itsɛrh nggu utsɛ̃nga na apfunu utsɛrh uwukuse, unga awu ra arhim itoma-dak ru unga.
10.12: Iwe rimi hã ukutsɛrh aba agau itsɛrh nggu utsaka, na azĩ itsɛrh uner uwukuse, unga atoma-dak.>> Angwɛ̃rhã awɛkaci nu Uyesu (Umat 19.13-15; Irh 18.15-17)
10.13: Anera aka akũ angwɛ̃rhã awɛkaci aba ru Uyesu abanga umbɔ, bɔr angwɛ̃ imesanga atsɛrha umbɔ.
10.14: Uyesu aka anyã rimi, avɔm afɛr unga. Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka aneke angwɛ̃rhã awɛkaci aba ru umum, niba akɛnmbi umbɔ, Iyɛrhe-Num iwu iyi ikpũmbɔ.
10.15: Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, ubɛn unera aka asi iyɛisa Iyɛrhe-Num ru nyaku uwɛkuci, asi ídɛ̃ɛ̃ atsĩã ri ngge.>>
10.16: Mɔcɛ unga ashupa awɛkaci ha ra aboknga awuma na atsorhe abok nu atsimbɔ na atsuke umbɔ idorh. Uwɛdzɛm uner ubin (Umat 19.16-30; Irh 18.18-30)
10.17: Uyesu atirhi isisok ra anang hã nukpi, utsak uwɔɔ atĩ aba, atararhu ra anangnga, arhusa unga agɛ. <<A umarhem uwuku uze, umum ikorhu use ni ikpo urhɛ uwu ugbagbaa?>>
10.18: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Awu use utsu ungo uyisa umum uwuku uze? Uwuku uze ashia, Unum ukpekũ awu uwuku uze.
10.19: Ungo uhwɛngo íkpem iyɛrɛ, <Niba ufɛrɔ unera, niba utomungo-dak, niba uvɛpɔ ivɛu, niba ugbɛrɔ angwĩ utsukukɔ unera, niba ughaɔ urha, udzowe igɔng ru utɛngo nu uyango.> >>
10.20: Uwɛdzɛm hã agɔr unga agɛ, <<A umarhem, umum iki idɔsumum akɛrɛ ha kishoo rimɔ̃ɔ̃ utirhi ri iwɛ̃nci.>>
10.21: Uyesu arhi unga na abema unga, agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ungo usheru ubina unying ukpekũ. Uzĩ, ugoshe abinngo kishoo, udzowe uhwɛka ra atsũwã, ungo uwuri iweɔ ru ugbɛta urhɛrhɛ ra afã, mɔcɛ uba udɔsa umum.>>
10.22: Igũ rimi itsu ungwɛ̃dzɛm hã ashepa asunga, azĩ nggu ida amɛn, ubinkutsu unga awu uner ubin akarhãrhã.
10.23: Uyesu arhi adziir angwɛ̃ imesanga, agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Aghong abika awu ru ubin aki ikpo itsĩ Iyɛrhe Unum!>>
10.24: Angwɛ̃ imesanga adzeidzeu ra arherha ha. Uyesu ikɛi agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi awɛkaci, aghong akarhãrhã unera atsĩ ri Iyɛrhe Unum!
10.25: Ighɔrhungge urhakumi utsĩ atɔng ra angwĩ inepurha, nu uner ubin aka itsĩ ri Iyɛrhe Unum.>>
10.26: Angwɛ̃ imesa ha adzeidzeu akarhãrhã arhusa adɔka agɛ, <<Ungamɔ awuri idɛ̃ɛ̃ akpo ififɔrh?>>
10.27: Uyesu arhi umbɔ na agɛ, <<Ra anera ngge isi ímɛ̃ngge, bɔr ru Unum imɛ̃ngge. Ubɛn ubina umɛ̃ɛ̃kpɔ ra anang Unum.>>
10.28: Ubitru agɔr unga agɛ, <<Nggayɛ umɛn ineke abina kishoo ni adɔsa ungo!>>
10.29: Uyesu agɛ, <<Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, unera ashia uwuruwi aka neke iyanga, use angwɛ̃mbɔ use anapumbɔ use uyanga use utɛnga use awɛkacinga use icang irhamnga ri itsimum nu Isarhe Iyiki Ize,
10.30: na asi ikpoa iya, angwɛ̃mbɔ, anapumbɔ, uya, awɛkaci nu icang irham idikunga unaka ru udan ukpirɛ, unga ikpoa uver ikɛi, ru upfung ukpuku uba unga ikpoa urhɛ uwu ugbagbaa.
10.31: Bɔr anera arhɛrhɛ aka awu abi inggbaashi, awuri iwu ãmaata. Ãmaata ikɛi, awuri iwu anggbaashi.>> Uyesu abvui arherha arherhe ra akpekɛ unga aka ikpe (Umat 20.17-19; Irh 18.31-34)
10.32: Umbɔ awu ru utsĩndĩ uwuku afũrhã azĩ Urusharhima. Uyesu agbaashia nu udĩ hã. Angwɛ̃ imesa adzeidzeu, nu abika adɔsa unga agũ iwei. Ikɛi unga ayisa angwɛ̃ imesanga usɔkdũmɛn hã ri ibanga adɛyiwe umbɔ ubinkpi iki ikorhe nggu unga.
10.33: <<Nggayɛ umɛn izĩ ufã Urusharhima. Umɔ awuri ighambɔ adak Ungwɛ̃-Ner adzowe unga ra abok ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num, na abika amesuwe Ikpem. Awuri itsu unga ufai akpe na adzowe unga ra atsen abi Uyahuda.
10.34: Umbɔ awuri iyɛia unga na ashau aci atsuke ra asunga, awuri ikwɛre unga ugwɛɛ na afɛre unga. Inuma itaar iki itɔng unga awuri isoka nggu urhɛ.>> Ubinkpi Uyaku nu Uyohana aka afɛna (Umat 20.20-28)
10.35: Mɔcɛ angwɛ̃ Uzabadi, Uyaku nu Uyohana, aba ru unga. Agɔr unga agɛ, <<A umarhem, umɛn ibee ungo ukorhuwa ubɛn ubina umɛn iki ifɛna ungo.>>
10.36: Unga arhusa umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi abee umum ikorhuwa umbi use?>>
10.37: Umbɔ agɛ, <<Umɛn ishɔ̃rhã ungo neke unying ru umɛn asei nú ubok ughango, uwu uvaa asei nú ubok uferango ri ikpikpoingo.>>
10.38: Bɔr Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi asi ihwɛngmbi ubinkpi umbi aka arhusa. Umbi awuri idɛ̃ɛ̃ ahwambi ru ukpɛwa uverkpi umum iki ihwa, use umbi awuri idɛ̃ɛ̃ akorhumbi ikpũ ubɔtisima uverkpi umbɔ aka ikorhuwa umum?>>
10.39: Umbɔ agɛ, <<Ĩĩ, umɛn idɛ̃ɛ̃ ikorhumɛn.>> Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Ĩĩ, umbi awuri ihwambi ru ukpɛwa umum iki ihwa na awuri akorhumbi ubɔtisima hã umbɔ aka ikorhuwa umum,
10.40: bɔr isei nu ubok ughamum use ubok uferamum asi iwea umum ĩbemuwa. Inang iyɛrɛ iwu iyi abirabɛ umbɔ aka asɛng agbishuwe rimɔ̃ɔ̃.>>
10.41: Ivangyɛ angwɛ̃ imesa ha usɔka aka agũ rimi, umbɔ agũ avɔm nggu Uyaku nu Uyohana.
10.42: Uyesu ayisa umbɔ ananga unying agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi ahwɛngmbi ugɛ abirabɛ umbɔ aka anyanga umbɔ awu ayɛrhe atsen abi Uyahuda, anu idɛyiwe anera iyɛrhe, anggbaashimbɔ ikɛi anu ikũ ijee adarh umbɔ.
10.43: Bɔr isi íwengge rimi ru umbi. Ubɛn uwuku ubee igɔng ru umbi awu ufang unga awu ugãrhãmbi.
10.44: Ikɛi ubɛn unera aka abee iwu unggbaashi, awu ufang unga awuri iwu ugãrhã ra anera kishoo.
10.45: Ungwɛ̃-Ner asi ibanga umbɔ atɔ̃we unga itser, bɔr unga awuri iwu ugãrhã, na adzowe urhɛnga afɔrh anera arhɛrhɛ.>> Uner itapa akpoa inyã anang (Umat 20.29-34; Irh 18.35-43)
10.46: Uyesu nu angwɛ̃ imesanga aka azĩ atsĩ Ujeriko. Umbɔ nu anera arhɛrhɛ, awuri idze utepa, uner itapa agburh Ubartimawu agbena agburh <<ungwɛ̃ Utimawu,>> asei nu ubang utsĩndĩã anu ifɛn.
10.47: Ivangyɛ unga aka agũ ugɛ Uyesu uner Unazarat unga atɔng, unga atsarhi irhaknga ayisa agɛ, <<Uyesu Ungwɛ̃ Udauda ugũ atorh umum!>>
10.48: Anera abɔɔ arhɛrhɛ atsɛrha unga agɛ, <<Unu ukutata!>> Bɔr unga agbisha atsarhi irhaknga akarhãrhã ayisa agɛ, <<A Ungwɛ̃ Udauda, uma ugũ atorh umum!>>
10.49: Uyesu atsurha adɛ̃ɛ̃ na agɛ, <<Àka ayisuwa unga.>> Umbɔ ayisu uner itapa ha, agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ugɔm! Usisok, ayisa ungo.>>
10.50: Unga atare untamanga, na akatasok ater isha, azĩã ru Uyesu.
10.51: Uyesu arhusa unga agɛ, <<Ungo ubee umum ikorhuwa ungo use?>> Uner itapa ha agɛ, <<A Uteiya, umum ibee inyã anang.>>
10.52: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Uzĩɔ. Imangmangngo ngge ikerhuwa ungo.>> Kanying unga ayɛisa inyĩnyãnga na adɔsu Uyesu umbɔ uzĩmbɔ nu utsĩndĩ.

11.1: Umbɔ aka aba akhapa ru Urusharhima ru Ubetafaji ru Ubetani Igũ Acucii Uzaitun, Uyesu adene angwɛ̃ imesanga avaa.
11.2: Agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka azĩ ru ungwɛ̃rhũ uteu ukpɔɔ ra asumbi, ubɛn itsitsĩmbi, umbi awuri inyãmbi ungwɛ̃ uzhika umbɔ aka abow, unera aka anasi ifũã umgbɔ. Àka agarha umgbɔ akũ aba.
11.3: Unera aba arhusunga umbi agɛ, <Awu use umbi akorhe rimi?> Àka agɔr unga agɛ, <Uteijee unga abeea umgbɔ unga awuri ibvui adene umgbɔ uba kanying.> >>
11.4: Umbɔ azĩ anyã ungwɛ̃ uzhika uku udɛ̃ɛ̃ ru ubang utsĩndĩã, ubow ra angwĩ iya. Umbɔ atirhi igarha umgbɔ.
11.5: Abirabɛ aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ umɔ arhusa umbɔ agɛ, <<Awu use utsu umbi agarhu ungwɛ̃ uzhika ha?>>
11.6: Umbɔ adzipa arherhe ubinkpi Uyesu aka adɛyiwe umbɔ. Aner ha neke umbɔ akũ ungwɛ̃ uzhika ha azĩmbɔ.
11.7: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka akũ ungwɛ̃ uzhika ha aba ru Uyesu na abɛtuwe antamambɔ nu undzingmgbɔ, Uyesu afũ asei nu umgbɔ.
11.8: Anera arhɛrhɛ abɛtuwe antamambɔ nu utsĩndĩã, abɔɔ agbɛyi ayerhe ri icang abɛtuwe nu utsĩndĩã.
11.9: Abika awu ra asunga na abika aba ra andzingnga atsui ivum agɛ, <<Ikpikpoi iwe ru Unum! Idorh iwe nggu unga aka aba ri itsok Uteijee!
11.10: Idorh iwe ri ibiba iyɛrhe utɛmɛn Udauda! Ikpikpoi iwe afafã ra afã.>>
11.11: Uyesu aka atsĩ Urusharhima, azĩã ri Iya-Num atsĩ arhisa abina kishoo. Nggayɛ unum uku utsĩkpɔ, nggee unga abvui adzek azĩã Ubetani nggu angwɛ̃ imesanga usɔkdũmɛn. Uyesu atsuke ikponum ru uvorhvo (Umat 21.18-19)
11.12: Ukpe unum uvaa umbɔ aka asoku Ubetani, imerh ifɛr Uyesu.
11.13: Unga aka anyã ucucii uvorhvo ukukaa uku ukpusha ayerhe udɛ̃ɛ̃, unga azĩa ibee ikpũrhã ru umgbɔ. Ivangyɛ unga aka azĩ atsĩ ru umgbɔ, unga asi ikpoa ubin, ayerhe ukpekũ ake akpusha adɛ̃ɛ̃, ubinkutsu, asi iwea ivang ikpũrhũ uvorhvo.
11.14: Mɔcɛ unga agɔr uvorhvo ha agɛ, <<Unera niba abvui aghaa ikpũrhãngo ugbagbaa!>> Angwɛ̃ imesa igambɔ agũmbɔ ubinkpi unga aka arherhe. Uyesu asare Iya-Num (Umat 21.12-17; Irh 19.45-48; Uyoh 2.13-22)
11.15: Umbɔ aka atsĩ Urusharhima, Uyesu atsĩ ri Iya-Num atirha awayiwe abika agoi igoi nu abika agugoyiwe umɔ. Akwɛr atsime atebur abika afaruwe uhwɛk nu anang isei abika agoyiwe anurhɛu.
11.16: Akɛna anera ikũ ubin ukpuku ugoiwe atɔng ra angwĩ Iya-Num.
11.17: Unga amesuwe anera agɛ, <<Itsɛng Arherhu-Num isi igɔrngge ugɛ, << <Awuri iyisi iyamum iya ifɛn-Num ri idũa kishoo? > Nggayɛ umbi atsu ike iwu utai uwoyi avɛu. >>
11.18: Ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu abika amesuwe Ikpem aka agũ arherhe akɛrɛ umbɔ abee utsĩndĩ uwuku ufɛre unga, na agũ iwei unga ubinkutsu anera kishoo adzeidzeu imesanga.
11.19: Urhɛɛ uku uwe, Uyesu nu angwɛ̃ imesanga adzembɔ ru uteu ha. Ucucii uvorhvo uwuku usherhe (Umat 21.20-22)
11.20: Ru ukpeeka, umbɔ aka atɔng, umbɔ anyã ucucii uvorhvo ha uku ukoyi kishoo nggu anunanga.
11.21: Ubitru ayita na agɔr Uyesu agɛ, <<A umarhem, urhi unyã! Ucucii uvorhvo ha ungo uku utsuke ikponum hã uku usherhumgbɔ!>>
11.22: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka awe ru imangmang ru Unum!
11.23: Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, unera aba agɔr igũ iyɛrɛ agɛ, <Utang itsingo ugba ru ukau ukugɔng,> unga aba asi icicanga ra amɛnnga nu ubinkpi unga aka arherhe, na awea ri imangmang awuri ikorhukumbɔ unga.
11.24: Nggee umum idɛyiwa umbi, ubɛn ubinkpi umbi aka ifɛna ru ifɛn-Num, aka awe ru imangmang ugɛ umbi aka akpombi ukpɔ, ukpɔ iwuri iwu ukpumbi.
11.25: Ikɛi ubɛn ivangyɛ umbi aka idɛ̃ɛ̃ na afɛn-Num, umbi aba awembi ra avɔm nggu unera, àka atsũwe uner ha, nu Utɛmbi uwu afã atsũwã umbi ra arhimmbi.>> Acucang ijee Uyesu (Umat 21.23-27; Irh 20.1-8)
11.27: Umbɔ aka abvui atsĩ Urusharhima, Uyesu atsĩ azɛ̃rhã ri irhɛrh Iya-Num nukpi, umɔ ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num, nu abika amesuwe Ikpem nu anggbaashi anera aba ru unga.
11.28: Agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ungo ukũ ijee iyikisong unu ikorhe ifɛrhɛ iyɛrɛ ha? Ikɛi ungaa adzaa ungo ijee iyiki ikorhi ifɛrha ha?>>
11.29: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umum irhusa umbi ubina unying. Àka adzipuwa umum, umum idɛyiwa umbi umum ikũ ijee ungaa ikũ ikorha abin hã.
11.30: Ubɔtisima Uyohana udzeka afã use udzeka anera? Àka adɛyiwa umum!>>
11.31: Umbɔ akɛki itsũwã nggu adɔkambɔ, agɛ, <<Umɛn iba igɔr ugɛ, <Udzek ra afã,> unga awuri irhusa umɛn agɛ, <Awu use utsu umbi ashimbi ri imangmang ru unga?>
11.32: Bɔr umɛn iba igɔr ugɛ, <Udzek ra anera,> umɛn igũ iwei anera abɛrɛ, ubinkutsu, umbɔ anyangu Uyohana awu uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num.>>
11.33: Nggee umbɔ agɔr Uyesu agɛ, <<Umɛn isi ihwɛngmɛn.>> Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umum igamum isi ídɛyiwamum umbi umum ikũ ijee iyikisong ikorha abin hã.>>

12.1: Uyesu arherhe unyaka arherhe adzise umbɔ, agɛ, <<Utsa uwɔɔ akau icang inebi, adzin ufɔm adzipuwe icang hã, asim ughwee ri ifa ukpuku upayi amɛ̃ ikpũrhũ inebi ha, ikɛi atar akang utsurha udedetamgbɔ uwu idzɛu. Mɔcɛ unga atsu abɔɔ abi irham imang ri icang hã, na azĩã abĩ akase.
12.2: Ivang iyiki ikɔng inebi ha iki iwe, unga adene ugãrhãnga azĩ ra abi irham imang ri icang hã, ayɛise ikpũrhũ inebi ri icang hã.
12.3: Bɔr abi irham imang hã adzur ugãrhã hã, akwɛr unga, na awayiwe unga nggu abok aka atãrhã.
12.4: Mɔcɛ unga adene ugãrhũ uwɔɔ, umbɔ akwɛr uwu ha ni itsia, na ayɛia unga.
12.5: Unga anang adene uwɔɔ, uwu ha umbɔ afɛrkumbɔ unga. Unga adene abɔɔ arhɛrhɛ, abi irham imang hã akwɛr abɔɔ, na afɛre abɔɔ.
12.6: <<Unga abɔra unera unying unga aka idene, ungwɛ̃nga aka abema. Unga adene unga uwu imaataka, na agɛ, <Awuri idzowukumbɔ igɔng ru ungwɛ̃mum.>
12.7: <<Bɔr abi irham imang hã agɔr adɔkambɔ agɛ, <Uwuku ugha ukam icang hã nuwi. Àka aba umɛn ifɛre unga, nu icanga iwu iyimɛn.>
12.8: Nggee umbɔ adzur unga afɛre unga, na atare ukoma ru undzing ufɔm icang hã.>>
12.9: Uyesu arhusa umbɔ agɛ, <<Uner icang hã awuri ikorha aguse? Awuri iba atsĩme abi irham imang hã na adzowe icang hã ra abɔɔ.
12.10: Umbi aka avarhumbi ri itsɛng Arherhu-Num akirakɛ aka agɔr ugɛ, << <Utarhkpi abi idzin aka akpɛ̃, ukpɔ uwu utarh ãgboki idzin.
12.11: Uteijee ha unga akorha akɛrɛ, awu ubin igbigba ra asumɛn.> >>
12.12: Mɔcɛ umbɔ abee udĩ ukpuku udzur unga, ubinkutsu umbɔ ahwɛngmbɔ ugɛ arherhe unyaka arherhe ha iwu ra atsimbɔ. Bɔr umbɔ agũ iwei anera, ngge itsu umbɔ neke unga na azĩmbɔ. Arhusu ifai ikirbi abĩ ru Ukaisar (Umat 22.15-22; Irh 20.20-26)
12.13: Akɛrɛ aka amaa umbɔ adene abi Ufarisi abɔɔ nu aner Uhiridu umbɔ azĩ adeyi Uyesu ri irhɛm arherhanga.
12.14: Umbɔ aba agɔr unga agɛ, <<A umarhem, umɛn ihwɛngmɛn ungo urhiku uner. Anera kishoo awu ubina unying ru ungo, ubinkutsu amɛ̃ngo ashike nggu iwiwe uner, bɔr ungo umesuwe utsĩndĩ Unum ri idzidzɛrhe. Ungo unyã imɛ̃ngge umɛn ifase ikirbi abĩ ru Ukaisar use isi imɛ̃ngge?
12.15: Umɛn ifai use umɛn neke ififai?>> Bɔr Uyesu ahwɛnga ukpukpetambɔ. Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Awu use utsu umbi andeya umum? Àka akũwã ishaa imang hã umbɔ iki ikũ afai ikirbi abĩ ru umum inya.>>
12.16: Umbɔ aka akowe ishaa imang hã, unga arhusa umbɔ agɛ, <<Uzirhzĩ ukpirɛ nu itsok ikɛrɛ iwu iki ungamɔ?>> Umbɔ agɛ, <<Iki Ukaisar.>>
12.17: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka adzowe Ukaisar ubin ukpunga na adzowe Unum ubin ukpu Unum.>> Umbɔ adzeidzeu akarhãrhã ru unga. Arhusa arherhe isoka akpe (Umat 22.23-33; Irh 20.27-40)
12.18: Abi Usaduki abɔɔ, abika agɔr agɛ isok ra akpe ishingge, aba ru Uyesu nggu irhirhusa.
12.19: Agɔr unga agɛ, <<A umarhem, Umusa atsɛnga umɛn ugɛ unera aba akpea na abɔre utsɛ̃nga ashia ra awɛkaci, awu ufang ungwɛ̃mbɔ anyangu utsɛ̃rhãpfu ha amare awɛkaci ru ungwɛ̃mbɔ.
12.20: Abɔɔ rabɔ utɔɔva awu angwɛ̃ uyi akatsak. Uwu inggbaashia apfuna, na akpe ashia ru ungwɛ̃.
12.21: Uwu uvaa ikɛi apfunu utsɛ̃rhãpfu ha, iganga akpea, ashia ru ungwɛ̃. Uwu untaar rimi hã.
12.22: Rimi hã kishookambɔ utɔɔva ha, asi ibɔrukumbɔ ungwɛ̃. Ri imimasha utsɛ̃rhãpfu ha ikɛi akpea.
12.23: Ri isok ra akpe awuri iwu utsɛrha ungamɔ ru umbɔ? Ubinkutsu kishookambɔ utɔɔva apfunumbɔ unga.>>
12.24: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi asi igbambi irhak umbi aka asi ihwɛngmbi itsɛng Arherhu-Num use ijeenga?
12.25: Ivangyɛ abika akpukpe aka isok, asi ípfunumbɔ use adzowukumbɔ ipfuna, umbɔ awuri iwe ru nyaki ípfu itser-Num ra afã.
12.26: Ra arherhi isok ra akpe, umbi anasi ivarhumbi akɛrɛ ha ru ubvur Umusa, ri isarhe ufum uku ugar urha? Unum aka agɔr Umusa agɛ, <Umum iwu Unum uwu Uibrahim, nu uwu Uishaku, nu ikɛi uwu Uyakubu.>
12.27: Unga asi iwea Unum uwu abika akpe, bɔr unga awu uwu abi urhɛ. Umbi agba irhak iki ibewe!>> Ikpem iki igɔng (Umat 22.34-40; Irh 10.25-28)
12.28: Utsa uwɔɔ uwuku umesuwe Ikpem aba agũ umbɔ adɛ̃ɛ̃ uning nggu adɔka. Unga aka agũ ugɛ Uyesu adzowe umbɔ irhɛm iyiki ize, unga arhusa unga agɛ, <<Kishoo ikpem, iyikisong iwu iki igɔnga?>>
12.29: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Iki igɔnga iwu nggɛɛ agɛ, <Àka agũ umum umbi abi Uisrairha, Uteijee Unummɛn, awu Uteijee unying.
12.30: Ubemu Uteijee Unumngo nggu amɛnngo kishoo, nggu urhɛngo kishoo, nu ihwihwɛngngo kishoo, nu nggu ikerngo kishoo.>
12.31: Iyi ivaa ha igɛ, <Ubemu undɔkango ru nyaka ungo uku ubemi itsingo.> Íkpem iyɔɔ isi inangngge iyɛrɛ ha.>>
12.32: Uwuku umesuwe ikpem ha agɔr Uyesu agɛ, <<Ungo urhika ra arherhango uku urherhe ugɛ Unum awu unying uwɔɔ ashia bɔr unga.
12.33: Ubema unga nggu amɛnngo kishoo, nu ihwihwɛngngo kishoo nu ikerngo, nu ubemu udɔkango ru nyaki itsingo, ananga izũwã iyiki ikpikpĩĩ nu idɛm-Num.>>
12.34: Uyesu aka agũ unga arherha arherhe itsoi, unga agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ungo uku ukhapungo nggu Iyɛrhe Unum.>> Mɔcɛ unera asi irhusunga ubin ukpɔɔ. Arhusa arherhe ri itsi Ukiristo (Umat 22.41-46; 23.1-36; Irh 20.41-47)
12.35: Uyesu aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ amesuwe ru ufɔm Iya-Num unga arhusa agɛ, <<Awu use utsu abika amesuwe Ikpem anu igɔr agɛ Ukiristo awu ungwɛ̃ Udauda?
12.36: Udauda nibikanga, ri ijee Ipfu Isarsatangge unga agɔr agɛ, << <Uteijee agɔr Uteijeemum agɛ, usei ru ubok ughamum, <<Utsɛku umum iki itsu anggamtsakngo ru andaidakngo.>> >
12.37: Udauda nibikanga ayisu Ukiristo agɛ, <Uteijee.> Awuri ikorha aguse ru Uteijee awu ungwɛ̃ ru Udauda?>> Nggaa ikikɔng anera ikpeto ru unga nggu itɛnamɛn. Uyesu ayare igoi abika amesuwe Ikpem (Umat 23.1-36; Irh 11.37-54; 20.45-47)
12.38: Ri imesanga, Uyesu agɔr agɛ, <<Àka akpɔm amɛnmbi nggu abika amesuwe Ikpem, umbɔ abee itsĩm atorho akagɔng azɛ̃rhã, abee anera aghwe umbɔ ri inang izɛɛ,
12.39: ikɛi umbɔ abee anera adzise umbɔ anang isei aka aze ra abã ifɛn-Num, nu anang isei aka aze ra anang irhowa.
12.40: Umbɔ awu abika aghawe abin atsɛ̃rhãpfu na avur ayambɔ, na adarhi ider ifɛn-Num iyi igbana. Ikpũ umbɔ awuri itsu umbɔ ufai akarhãrhã.>> Izũwũ utsɛ̃rhãpfu (Irh 21.1-4)
12.41: Uyesu asei ri ifɛna ra anangkɛ umbɔ iki itsu izũwã ri Iya-Num, azɛrhe anera iki itsuyiwe uhwɛk ri ijara izũwã. Abɔɔ abi ubin arhɛrhɛ atsu uhwɛk urhɛrhɛ.
12.42: Mɔcɛ utsũwũ utsɛ̃rhãpfu uwɔɔ, aba atsuke ungwɛ̃rhĩ íshaa imang ivaa iki isi iwengge ubin.
12.43: Uyesu ayisa angwɛ̃ imesanga aba ru unga, agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, ubinkpi utsũwã utsɛ̃rhãpfu uwurɛ aka atsu ri ijara izũwã hã, inangngge iyimbɔ aka adzowe kishoo.
12.44: Kishoo adzowe ra arhɛrha abinmbɔ aka awe, bɔr unga ri itsũwãnga, unga adzowe kishoo ubinkpi unga aka awe ra ukpɔ.>>

13.1: Uyesu adzeka ri Iya-Num nukpi, unying ra angwɛ̃ imesanga agɔr unga agɛ, <<A umarhem, urhi unyã nggaa atarh akɛrɛ, nu ídzin iyɛrɛ!>>
13.2: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ungo unyãɔ nggaa ídzin iyɛrɛ? Awuri isipuwe ngge kishoo. Asi ínekukumbɔ utarh unying nu undɔkakpɔ.>>
13.3: Uyesu asei ni itsi Igũ Acucii Uzaitun iki idɛ̃ɛ̃ ra asu Iya-Num. Ubitru, Uyaku, Uyohana nu Uandarawu arhusa unga ri iwɔk agɛ,
13.4: <<Usɔma umɛn, ifɛrha ha ikorhu ukang? Utsara uwu uguse umbɔ aka inyã ri ivangyɛ ngge iki itirhi ikorhe?>>
13.5: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka arhi anyã, utsur unera arhɛma umbi.
13.6: Anera arhɛrhɛ aka idzeka ri itsokmum, anu igɔr agɛ, <Umum iwu unga,> umbɔ awuri irhɛm anera arhɛrhɛ.
13.7: Ivangyɛ umbi aka igũ isarhe iwa nu ugbugbewangge, niba asoyimbi amɛnmbi. Awu ufang akɛrɛ ha akorhe, bɔr imimasha ina ishingge kata.
13.8: Abi abĩ akɔɔ asok adɛ̃ɛ̃ igamtsak nggu abi abĩ akɔɔ, iyɛrhe iso idɛ̃ɛ̃ igamtsak nggu iyɛrhe. Abĩ awuri izizusa ri inanga irhɛirhɛ, nu ikpo imerh iwuri itsĩwãngge. Awu ititirhi uver imar.
13.9: <<Awu ufang umbi adzɛu. Awuri ikũna umbi azĩ ra abi ijee iyɛrhe na akwɛr umbi ra abã ifɛn-Num. Awuri ikũna umbi azĩ ra asu anggbaashi nu ayɛrhe ri itsimum, ubinkutsu umbi awuri iwu idekamum ra asumbɔ.
13.10: Awu ufang umbɔ aka igbaashia adzowe Isarhe Iyiki Ize ri idũa kishoo kata, ri imimasha idɔrhi iba.
13.11: Ubɛn ivangyɛ umbɔ aka idzur umbi akũ azĩ ra aya ayɛrhe, àka niba agũmbi ighong ru ubinkpi umbi aka irherhe. Àka arherhu ubɛn ubinkpi umbɔ aka idzaa umbi ri ivang hã, ubinkutsu, asi íwea umbi irherhe ri ivang hã, awu Ipfu Isarsatangge.
13.12: <<Ungwɛ̃yi awuri idzowe ungwɛ̃mbɔ umbɔ afɛre, utei ikɛi awuri idzowe ungwɛ̃nga. Awɛkaci ikɛi awuri iwu ri igamtsak nggu ateimbɔ utsɛku umbɔ aka itsu umbɔ afɛre umbɔ.
13.13: Anera kishoo awuri ikpɛ̃na umbi ri itsokmum. Bɔr uwuku ubima utsɛku imimasha awuri ikpoa ififɔrh.
13.14: <<Ivangyɛ umbi aka inyã ubin ishĩ ukpuku ukũ itsitsĩme udɛ̃ɛ̃kpɔ ra anangkɛ aka asi imɛ̃ke, abika awu ru Uyahudiya atĩrhã azĩ ri ígũ, neke uner uwuku uvarhe ahwɛng.
13.15: Uwuruwi aka awe ri itsi uvi niba acipuwanga inyãngu ubin ri iya.
13.16: Uwuruwi aka awe ra arhum ikɛi niba abvui abanga inyãngu untamanga.
13.17: Atorhmbi akatsɛrh abika awu ra ana nu abika akpɔm awɛkaci ri ivang hã!
13.18: Àka afɛn-Num utsur ifɛrhɛ ha ikorhungge ri idoyi.
13.19: Ri ivang hã awuri ihwambɔ ayetnum akarhãrhã akirakɛ aka anasi ikorhuke udzur ri ivangyɛ Unum aka amunu upfunga, utsɛku icɛrɛ. Asi íbvui akorhumbɔ ikpũ hã ugbagbaa.
13.20: Uteijee aba asi ishɔyika inum hã, unera unying asi íbɛka. Bɔr ru ubok abirabɛ unga aka asɛng, unga ashɔyika inum hã.
13.21: Ri ivang hã unera aba agɔra umbi agɛ, <Àka anyã, Ukiristo uwi!> use <Àka anyã, nggawɔ!> niba awembi ri imangmang ra ake.
13.22: Ukiristo igbɛrangwĩ nu abika asɔm Arherhu-Num igbɛrangwĩ awuri idzidzeka, awuri idɛyiwe atsar nu abin idzeu akũ arhɛm anera nggu abirabɛ Unum aka asɛng, umbɔ aba adɛ̃ɛ̃ amɛ̃ɛ̃mbɔ.
13.23: Nggee, àka arhi! Umum iki idɛyiwamum abina kishoo ake adɔrha aba.
13.24: <<Bɔr ri ivang hã, ayetnum akika aba ha aka imaa, << <awuri itsu ishaa unum iwu uzĩ. Ufɛ̃ ikɛi usi írhangmgbɔ.
13.25: Ídzɛɛr idzeka afã igbei. Ikɛi awuri izizusa nggaa abinkɛ aka awu afafã ra afã.>
13.26: <<Mɔcɛ Ungwɛ̃-Ner aka icipuwa ra amɛɛ nggu nggaa ijee nu imor.
13.27: Mɔcɛ unga awuri idene ípfu itsernga nggu atsom aki irhak ayisa, na awuri ikɔng abirabɛ umbɔ aka asɛng ra anggbokunga anaa, udiku igɔ̃kpee nu udiku urhɛɛ nu unɔr nu ufã, udzur ru ubandzin upfunga udiku ukpɛrɛ uzĩ udiku ukpɔrɔ.
13.28: <<Àka amesu ubin ukpɔɔ ru ucucii uvorhvo. Umbi aba anyã aboke apfum adzeka nggu ayerhe aka afa, umbi ihwɛng ugɛ isung amɛka iki iyongge.
13.29: Rimi hã ikɛi umbi aba anyãmbi ifɛrhɛ iyɛrɛ itirhungge, umbi ahwɛng ugɛ ivanga iki iyongge, iki ibangge ra angwĩã.
13.30: Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, udan ukpirɛ usi ítɔngkpɔ utsɛku ifɛrhɛ ha kishoo iki ikorhe.
13.31: Afã nggu abĩ awuri itɔngke, bɔr arherhamum asi ítɔngke. Unera asi ihwɛnga unum ibiba Ukiristo (Umat 24.36-44; Irh 17.26-30,34-35)
13.32: <<Unera asi ihwɛnga unum hã use ivang hã, ípfu itser-Num ra afã isi ihwɛngngge, Ungwɛ̃-Ner asi ihwɛnga, Utɛ ukpekũ unga ahwɛng.
13.33: Àka arhi, àka agbisha adzɛu, ubinkutsu umbi asi ihwɛngmbi ivanga ngge iki ikorhe.
13.34: Awuri iwe ru nyaku uner uzɛ̃rhã. Ivangyɛ unga aka isok, unga idzowe iya ra agãrhãnga, ubɛn unera awea ri itsernga aka itɔ̃. Mɔcɛ unga aka itsu uner idzɛu, unga agbisha adzɛu.
13.35: <<Nggee àka adɛ̃ɛ̃ adzɛu, ubinkutsu umbi asi ihwɛngmbi ivangyɛ uner iya ha aka ibvui aba, use ru urhɛɛka, use ri ikɔtsuuka, use ri ivang ikɔ iki igbɛr ukpee, use ru unkpeeka.
13.36: Utsur unga aba umbi asi ihwɛngmbi, unga akpo umbi awu ru urhɔ.
13.37: Ubinkpi umum iki idɛyiwa umbi, umum indɛyiwe ubɛn unera, aka agbisha asei adzɛu!>>

14.1: Abɔr inuma ivaa umbɔ azek Irhowa Iyiki Igar Utɔng nu iyi Uborodi Ukpuku Usheru Uguga, ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu abika amesuwe Ikpem abee utsĩndĩwi umbɔ aka idzur Uyesu ri iwɔk afɛre unga.
14.2: Umbɔ anu igɔr agɛ, <<Bɔr asi íwea ri ivang irhowa, utsur anera awuri isoyi amɛnmbɔ.>> Adzukuwe Uyesu atsei isung ru Ubetani (Umat 26.6-13; Uyoh 12.1-8)
14.3: Uyesu awe ru Ubetani ri iya utsa uwɔɔ umbɔ iki iyisa Usiman uner ingbim, awuri igha ubingha nukpi, utsɛrh uwɔɔ aba nggu ungwɛ̃rhũ udzoma utɔk nggu atsei isung aki imang akarhãrhã aki ikũ unardi ayang. Unga ayar udzoma hã atsuke atsei ha ri itsi Uyesu.
14.4: Abɔɔ aka awe umɔ agũ avɔm agɔr adɔkambɔ agɛ, <<Awu use utsu umbɔ atare atsei isung ha ibɛm rimi?
14.5: Uda umbɔ agoshe atsei ha atsĩke imang itser unera iyi amɛka, umbɔ aka idzowe atsũwã.>> Umbɔ atsɛrhu utsɛrh ha ri ifuw.
14.6: Bɔr Uyesu agɛ, <<Àka aneke unga. Awu use utsu umbi arherha unga? Awu ubin uku uze unga aka akorhuwa umum.
14.7: Atsũwã awu nggu umbi ubɛn unum, umbi adɛ̃ɛ̃ ayikukumbi umbɔ ri ivangyɛ umbi aka abee. Bɔr umum iwuri iwe nggu umbi ivanga ukunjiir.
14.8: Akorhu ubinkpi ikernga iki imɛ̃. Adzukuwa atsei agbishi iyormum iyiki idzidzake.
14.9: Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, kishoo anangkɛ umbɔ aka idzowe Isarhe Iyiki Ize iyɛrɛ ru upfunga, awuri isɔmmbɔ ubinkpi utsɛrh uwurɛ aka akorhe umbɔ ayita unga.>> Uyahuda Uiskariyoti Agha-dak Uyesu (Umat 26.14-16; Irh 22.3-6)
14.10: Mɔcɛ Uyahuda Uiskariyoti, unying ra angwɛ̃ imesa usɔkdũmɛn hã, azĩ ru ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu unga agha-dak Uyesu na adzowe ru umbɔ.
14.11: Umbɔ aka agũ rimi umbɔ agɔm anggɔm na abemuwe unga uhwɛk. Nggee Uyahuda abee utsĩndĩã unga aka idzowe unga ru ubok. Irhowa Iyiki Igar Utɔng iyi imaatak (Umat 26.17-25; Irh 22.7-14,21-23; Uyoh 13.21-30)
14.12: Ru unum ukpu inggbaashia ukpu Irhowu Uborodi Ukpuku Usheru Uguga, unum ukpuku ungwãni ungwɛ̃ itsurhi iyi Irhowa Iyiki Igar Utɔng, angwɛ̃ imesu Uyesu arhusa unga agɛ, <<Ri inɛ̃ɛ̃ ungo uku ubee umɛn izĩ ĩgbishuwa ungo igha Irhowa Iyiki Igar Utɔng?>>
14.13: Nggee unga adene angwɛ̃ imesanga avaa, agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka atsĩ ru utepa, nggɔɔ umbi awuri igbopumbi utsak uwɔɔ aka atsã idzuma amɛ̃. Àka adɔsa unga.
14.14: Iya ikɛ unga aka itsĩ, àka agɔr uteiya ha agɛ, <Umarhem arhusa ugɛ ubã atsen ungwɛ̃kpɔ, umum iki igha Irhowa Iyiki Igar Utɔng nggu angwɛ̃ imesamum?>
14.15: Unga awuri idɛyiwanga nggaa ubã afã ukpɔɔ umbɔ aka atsu abin iya amaambɔ. Àka igbishuwa ubinghamɛn umɔ.>>
14.16: Angwɛ̃ imesa ha aka asok atsĩmbɔ ru utepa, anyã abina awe ru nyaku Uyesu aka asɔme umbɔ. Nggee umbɔ agbishu ubingha Irhowa Iyiki Igar Utɔng.
14.17: Urhɛɛ uku uwe, Uyesu nggu angwɛ̃ imesanga usɔkdũmɛn hã aba ri iya ha.
14.18: Awuri igha ubingha nukpi, Uyesu agɔr agɛ, <<Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, unying ru umbi aka agha nggu umum awuri ighadak umum.>>
14.19: Amɛnmbɔ atirhuke igũ ighong, anu igɔr unga anyinganying agɛ, <<Asi iwea umum, use awu umum?>>
14.20: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Unying ru umbi usɔkdũmɛn hã, uwuruwi aka agha ri itɛ̃rhĩ unying nggu umum.
14.21: Ungwɛ̃-Ner awuri ikpe ru nyaka umbɔ aka atsɛng ri itsinga. Bɔr atorh uner ha aka ighadak Ungwɛ̃-Ner! Ugba umbɔ asi imarmbɔ unga.>> Ubingha urhɛɛ Uteijee (Umat 26.26-30; Irh 22.14-23; 1Uko 11.23-25)
14.22: Umbɔ aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ igha ubingha, Uyesu anyangu uborodi, atar uwɛɛ ru Unum, abvũ adzowe ra angwɛ̃ imesanga agɛ, <<Àka ayɛi uwɛrɛ atãi. Awu iyormum.>>
14.23: Na anyangu ukpɛwa amɛ̃ inebi, atar uwɛɛ ru Unum na adzowe ru umbɔ, kishoo ahwa ru umgbɔ.
14.24: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Akɛrɛ awu adzirhmum aki ibibemuwe-Num nggu anernga, aka idze ru ubok anera arhɛrhɛ.
14.25: Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, umum isi íbvui ihwamum amɛ̃ inebi akɛrɛ utsɛku unumkpi umum iki ihwa akika afa akɔɔ ri Iyɛrhe Unum.>>
14.26: Umbɔ aka amaa itsũwe ubom ru Unum, umbɔ adzek azĩmbɔ Igũ Acucii Uzaitun. Ubitru awuri itsɛyi Uyesu (Umat 26.31-35; Irh 22.31-34; Uyoh 13.36-38)
14.27: Uyesu agɔr angwɛ̃ imesanga agɛ, <<Kishookambi awuri itĩ na abɔra umum ikiyikami, ru nyaki itsɛng Arherhu-Num iki igɔr igɛ, << <Umum ikwɛr uner uwuku udzɛu idɔi, idɔsa ikɛi iwuri isitungge.>
14.28: Bɔr ivangyɛ umum iki isok ra akpe, umum inggbaashia izĩ Ugarhirhi ru umbi adɔrha atsĩ umɔ.>>
14.29: Ubitru agɔr unga agɛ, <<Kishoo aba atĩna na abɔrambɔ ungo, umum isi ínekamum ungo.>>
14.30: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Umum indɛyiwa ungo idzidzɛrhe, irherɛ, ru untsua ukpirɛ, ungo uwuri itsɛyingo ihwɛng umum idiki itaar ni ikɔ idɔrhi igbɛr ukpee idiki ivaa.>>
14.31: Bɔr Ubitru abvui arherhe akarhãrhã agɛ, <<Umbɔ aba awuri ifɛre umum nggu ungo, umum isi ítsɛyimum ihwɛng ungo.>> Kishoo angwɛ̃ imesanga arherhe rimi hã. Uyesu ru Ugetsemani (Umat 26.36-46; Irh 22.39-46)
14.32: Azĩmbɔ anangkɛ umbɔ iki iyisa Ugetsemani, Uyesu agɔr angwɛ̃ imesanga agɛ, <<Àka asei nggimi umum izĩ ifɛn-Num.>>
14.33: Unga akũ Ubitru, nggu Uyaku nu Uyohana. Awu umɔ nukpi unga atirhunga igũ ighong akarhãrhã.
14.34: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Igũ ighongyɛ iki iwe ra amɛnmum idɛ̃ɛ̃ ifɛrngge umum. Àka asei nggimi na adzɛu.>>
14.35: Unga aka azĩ ra asu ukunjiir, na agba nu abĩ, afɛn-Num ugɛ ngge iba imɛ̃ngge, umbɔ anyanguwe ivang ayetnum akɛrɛ ru unga.
14.36: Unga agɛ, <<Abba, Utɛ, ubɛn ubina imɛ̃ngge ru ungo. Unyanguwa ukpɛwa ayetnum akɛrɛ ru umum. Bɔr asi iwea ubinkpi umum iki ibee, bɔr awu ubinkpi ungo uku ubee.>>
14.37: Mɔcɛ unga abvui aba anyã angwɛ̃ imesa ha ikitatambɔ awu ru urhɔ. Unga agɔr Ubitru agɛ, <<Ungo uwu ru urhɔ? Ungo usi idɛ̃ɛ̃ idzɛupɔ ukara unying?
14.38: Àka adzɛu na afɛn-Num utsur umbi agbambi ru undeya. Idzidzɛrhe ipfu ibemungge bɔr iyor isi ikerngge.>>
14.39: Abvui azĩa ifɛn-Num, arherhe irhɛm iyi inggbaashia.
14.40: Mɔcɛ unga abvui aba ikɛi, akpo umbɔ awu ru urhɔ asumbɔ awu nggu urhɔ akarhãrhã. Umbɔ ashimbɔ nu ubinkpi umbɔ aka isɔme unga.
14.41: Ivangyɛ unga aka abvui aba ide untaar, unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi ana awu ru urhɔ nu iwiwosha? Iki imɛ̃ mɔnɔ! Ivanga iki ibangge. Unyã, umbɔ aka agha-dak Ungwɛ̃-Ner na atsuke unga ra abok abi arhim.
14.42: Àka asisok umɛn izĩmɛn! Uwuku ugha adakmum uwi aka abanga!>> Adzur Uyesu (Umat 26.47-56; Irh 22.47-53; Uyoh 18.3-12)
14.43: Uyesu awu ra arherhe nukpi, umbɔ anyã Uyahuda, unying ra angwɛ̃ imesanga usɔkdũmɛn hã. Unga aba nggu anera arhɛrhɛ aka akpɔm igbong nu akon akika ader. Ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num, abika amesuwe Ikpem nu akakũmbɔ aka adene umbɔ.
14.44: Uyahuda, uwuku ugha adak Uyesu, aka asɔmuka umbɔ agɛ, <<Uwuruwi umum iki ishor atamnga, awu unga nuwɔ. Aka adzur akũ azĩ. Aka angwɛ̃dzɛn na adzɛu unga.>>
14.45: Uyahuda aka aba, unga adarha azĩã ru Uyesu, agɔr unga agɛ, <<A umarhem!>> na ashor atamnga.
14.46: Anera adzur Uyesu akpɔm unga uku ungbongbong.
14.47: Bɔr unying ra awɛ imesu Uyesu uwuku ukhapa ru unga, awɔɔr ikon iki idernga, azharhuwe uto ugãrhũ Ukugɔng Uwuku Udzowe Idɛm-Num.
14.48: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi adzeka nggu igbong nu akon aka ader adzur umum ugɛ umum iwu uvɛu?
14.49: Ubɛn unuma umum iwu nggu umbi ri Iya-Num imesuwa umbi, umbi asi idzurmbi umum. Bɔr awu ufang itsɛng Arherhu-Num itsuifɛr.>>
14.50: Mɔcɛ kishoo angwɛ̃ imesa ha atĩ abɔre unga.
14.51: Uwɛdzɛm nuwɔ, atamu untama ukpekũ na adɔsu Uyesu. Ri ivangyɛ umbɔ aka adzur unga,
14.52: unga aneke untamanga ra abokmbɔ na atĩ igbĩrhĩ. Uyesu nggu abi udzepurhe (Umat 26.57-68; Irh 22.54-55,63-71; Uyoh 18.13-14,19-24)
14.53: Akũ Uyesu azĩ ru Ukugɔng Uwuku Udzowe Idɛm-Num, nu ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num, nu ikɛi abika amesuwe Ikpem nu akakũ akɔng.
14.54: Ubitru adɔsa unga, bɔr ukukaa-ukukaa. Atsĩ ru ufɔm iya Ukugɔng Uwuku Udzowe Idɛm-Num. Umɔ unga aka asei iwɛr urha nggu adogerhi ha.
14.55: Ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu kishoo abi udzepurhe abee ubinkpi uku iwe ideka ri itsi Uyesu, umbɔ afɛre unga, bɔr umbɔ asi ikpombɔ.
14.56: Anera arhɛrhɛ aka adzowe ideka igbɛrangwĩ, bɔr angwĩmbɔ asi iweke unying.
14.57: Mɔcɛ abɔɔ asok adɛ̃ɛ̃, adzowe ideka igbɛrangwĩ ru unga agɛ,
14.58: <<Umɛn igũ unga agɔr agɛ, <Umum iwuri isipuwe Iya-Num ikɛrɛ anera aka adzin, ni idzin ikɔɔ ri inuma itaar, ikirikɛ iki isi iwengge idzin unera.> >>
14.59: Kishoo rimi hã idekambɔ isi iwengge unying.
14.60: Mɔcɛ Ukugɔng Uwuku Udzowe Idɛm-Num asok adɛ̃ɛ̃ ra ateumbɔ, arhusu Uyesu agɛ, <<Ungo usi ídzipungo arherhe? Awu use uwe ri idekayɛ umbɔ aka adzowe ri itsingo?>>
14.61: Bɔr Uyesu anukutata asi idzipuka, Ukugɔng Uwuku Udzowe Idɛm-Num hã abvui arhusa unga agɛ, <<Awu ungo uwu Ukiristo Ungwɛ̃ Uwu Idorh?>>
14.62: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Awu umum. Ikɛi umbi awuri inyãmbi Ungwɛ̃-Ner aka isei nu ubok ugha Uwu Ijee, ikɛi awuri iba nu amɛɛ afafã ra afã.>>
14.63: Ukugɔng Uwuku Udzowe Idɛm-Num hã avapuwe atorhanga, na agɛ, <<Umɛn ibee ideka iyikisong ikɛi?
14.64: Umbi agũmbi unga aka arhenu Unum! Awu use uwu itsũwãmbi?>> Anera kishoo arherhe agɛ, <<Agbaa! Afɛre unga!>>
14.65: Mɔcɛ abɔɔ atirha ashau aci atsuyiwe unga, abope asunga, ikɛi akwɛre unga ugwɛɛ, anu igɔr unga agɛ, <<Udɛyiwa umɛn, ungaa akwɛr ungo!>> Mɔcɛ adogerhi abi udzepurhe ha akũ unga azĩmbɔ na akwɛr unga. Ubitru agɛ Uyesu asi iwea uwu unga (Umat 26.69-75; Irh 22.56-62; Uyoh 18.15-18,25-27)
14.66: Ubitru iganga awu unɔr ufɔm iya ha, unaa uwɔɔ ra anang itser Ukugɔng Uwuku Udzowe Idɛm-Num aba.
14.67: Unga aka anyã Ubitru aka asei iwɛr urha, unga angwɛ̃dzɛn na arhi unga, na agɛ, <<Ungo uwu nggu Uyesu uner Unazarat ha!>>
14.68: Bɔr Ubitru atsɛyinga agɛ, <<Umum isi ihwɛng ubinkpi ungo uku urherhe.>> Unga aka arherhe rimi amaa, unga asok atsĩ ru udzepurhe iya ha. Kanying ikɔ igbɛr ukpee.
14.69: Unna hã aka abvui anyã unga umɔ, unga adɛyiwe abirabɛ aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ umɔ agɛ, <<Uwɛrɛ awu nggu umbɔ.>>
14.70: Ikɛi Ubitru abvui atsɛyinga. Ivanga ukunjiir iki itɔng, abirabɛ aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ akhapa ru Ubitru agɔr unga agɛ, <<Asi iwea ubin itsɛyi, ungo uwu nggu umbɔ, ungo usi iwea uner Ugarhirhi?>>
14.71: Mɔcɛ Ubitru atirhunga ifuw atsukuka ikponum nu itsinga, ayirh uyirh ra asumbɔ agɛ, <<Umum isi ihwɛng utsakwi umbi aka anu irherhe ri itsinga.>>
14.72: Kanying ikɔ ibvui igbɛr ukpee ide uvaa. Mɔcɛ Ubitru ayita arherhe Uyesu aka adɛyiwe unga agɛ, <<Ungo itsɛyingo ihwɛng umum idiki itaar ri ikɔ idɔrhi igbɛr ukpee idiki ivaa.>> Ngge unga atsĩã iciu akpe.

15.1: Ri igɔ̃kpeeka ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu akakũ, nu abika amesuwe Ikpem, nu kishoo abi itser udzepurhe akɛki itsũwã. Umbɔ abow Uyesu akũna unga azĩmbɔ ra asu Ubirhatu.
15.2: Ubirhatu arhusa unga agɛ, <<Awu ungo uwu uyɛrhe abi Uyahuda?>> Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ungo uku urherhungo.>>
15.3: Ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num hã, agbɛyi urherhe atsuke unga ra abina arhɛrhɛ.
15.4: Ngge ikɛi Ubirhatu arhusa unga agɛ, <<Unyã arhɛrha abinmbɔ aka agbɛyi atsuka ungo. Ungo usi ídzipungo arherhe?>>
15.5: Bɔr Uyesu asi idzipunga arherhe. Ubirhatu adzeidzeu. Atsu ufai akpe ru Uyesu (Umat 27.15-26; Irh 23.13-25; Uyoh 18.39—19.16)
15.6: Icɛ awu ugau ugomna aka isaka atsũwe unerwi umbɔ aka abow ru ugborzĩ, uwuruwi anera aki ibee ru unum Irhowa Iyiki Igar Utɔng.
15.7: Uwɔɔ ruwɔ itsoka igburh Ubaraba, uvau isoyamɛn nu ifɛr uner itsu umbɔ agbange unga ru ugborzĩ hã nggu abɔɔ.
15.8: Ikikɔnga iba ifɛn Ubirhatu unga akorhuwe ubin unga aka abayi ikikorhe.
15.9: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi abee umum itsũwã Uyɛrha abi Uyahuda ru umbi?>>
15.10: Unga ahwɛnga agɛ awu unyɛ̃ɛ̃ utsu ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num atsuke Uyesu ru uboknga.
15.11: Bɔr ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num atsu anera agɔr agɛ aneke Uyesu ru ugborzĩ, na atsũwe Ubaraba ru umbɔ.
15.12: Ubirhatu arhusa umbɔ agɛ, <<Umum iwuri ikorhe uguse nggu uwuruwi umbi iki iyisa Uyɛrhe abi Uyahuda?>>
15.14: Ubirhatu arhusa umbɔ agɛ, <<Awu use utsu? Ashɔyi use arherhunga?>> Umbɔ agbisha atsarhi irhakmbɔ agɛ, <<Anyapuwe unga!>>
15.15: Ubirhatu aka abee itsu umbɔ agɔm unga, atsũwũka Ubaraba. Unga aka atsu umbɔ akwɛre ugwɛɛ ru Uyesu amaa, unga adzowuka unga umbɔ anyapuwe. Abi iwa ayɛɛi Uyesu (Umat 27.27-31; Uyoh 19.2-3)
15.16: Abi iwa akũ Uyesu azĩ ru udzepurhe ugomna, umbɔ iki iyisa agɛ, <<Upiretoriyum.>> Na akɔng kishoo ukpui abi iwa ha.
15.17: Atsime atorho aka abãrhã akagɔng aki iyɛrhe nú Uyesu, ikɛi akare ifur iyɛrhe iyi ídidɔk, atsime ni itsinga.
15.18: Umbɔ atirhi ighwe unga agɛ, <<Urhɛngo uder, Uyɛrha abi Uyahuda!>>
15.19: Ikɛi anu ikũ igbong akwɛr unga ni itsia, atang aci atsuyiwe ru unga. Na atangarhu agɛ umbɔ anu idzowe unga igɔng.
15.20: Umbɔ aka ayɛɛia unga rimi amaa, umbɔ atsimuwe atorho aka abãrhã akagɔng hã, na atsime atorhanga. Mɔcɛ umbɔ akũna unga adzek azĩmbɔ inyinyapuwe. Anyapuwe Uyesu (Umat 27.32-44; Irh 23.26-43; Uyoh 19.17-27)
15.21: Utsa uwɔɔ adzeku Usayirin, itsoknga igburh Usiman utɛmbɔ Uarhekzanda nu Urhufɔ, adzek ri ibang abĩ hã na atɔng ru uteu ha. Umbɔ atsu unga inggang unga atsã igãrhãmau ucucii Uyesu.
15.22: Akũ Uyesu azĩ ra anangkɛ umbɔ iki iyisa Ugorhgota, agbena agburh, <<Anang Apfupfu Aghow Itsi.>>
15.23: Mɔcɛ umbɔ adzowe unga amɛ̃ inebi aka asarhe nggu isung, bɔr unga akpɛ̃ɛ̃ ihwihwaa.
15.24: Mɔcɛ umbɔ anyapuwe unga. Umbɔ agasha atorhanga ra adɔkambɔ, atang isɛng ra atsimbɔ anyã ubinkpi ubɛn unera aka ikpo.
15.25: Awu ra akara utɔɔrha aki ukpee umbɔ aka inyapuwe unga.
15.26: Umbɔ atsɛng isarhe iyiki irhena unga agɛ, <<UYƐRHA ABI UYAHUDA.>>
15.27: Anyapuwe avɛu avaa nggu unga, unying nu ubok ughanga, uwu uvaa ikɛi nu ubok uferanga.
15.29: Anera aka atɔng, arhena unga, azung atsimbɔ agɛ, <<Ĩhĩĩ! Ungo iki isipuwe Iya-Num, nu udzine ike ikɛi ri inuma itaar,
15.30: ucipuwa ru igãrhãmau ucuciia ha ufɔrh itsingo!>>
15.31: Rimi hã ikɛi ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu abika amesuwe Ikpem ani iyɛɛia unga ra adɔkambɔ agɛ, <<Afɔrhuka abɔɔ, bɔr asi idɛ̃ɛ̃ afɔrha itsinga!
15.32: Uneke Ukiristo uwurɛ, uyɛrhe abi Uisrairha, acipuwa icɛrɛ ru igãrhãmau ucuciia uwurɛ, ru umɛn inyã ni iwe ru imangmang!>> Avɛu ha umbɔ aka anyapuwe nggu unga arherhu nggaa urhena atsuke unga. Akpe Uyesu (Umat 27.45-56; Irh 23.44-49; Uyoh 19.28-30)
15.33: Ri idzingga atenuma, uzĩ itsirkpɔ abĩã kishoo, utsɛku akara ataar aki urhɛɛ.
15.34: Ra akara ataar, Uyesu atsarhi irhaknga ikerketangge agɛ, <<Erhoi, Erhoi, urhama sabaktani?>> Agbena agburh, <<A Unummum, a Unummum, awu use utsu ungo uneka umum?>>
15.35: Abika adɛ̃ɛ̃ ukhapa umɔ aka agũ rimi, umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka agũ, unga adɛ̃ɛ̃ iyisu uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num Uirhiya.>>
15.36: Unying ru umbɔ atĩ, azĩ abii usoso ra amɛ̃ inebi akika agbata, avaki igbong, abera adzowe ru Uyesu ahwa. Unga agɛ, <<Àka adidɛ̃ɛ̃! Umɛn inyãni use Uirhiya awuri iba acipuka unga.>>
15.37: Uyesu atsarhi irhaknga ikerketangge, atsu ivum na akpea.
15.38: Urhaburhe ha ukpuku uwe ru Iya-Num uvaar agbɛra avaa udzur afafã uba utsĩ ra abĩ.
15.39: Ivang unggbaashi abi iwa uwuku udɛ̃ɛ̃ ra asu Uyesu aka anyã ikpũ akpea, umɔ unga agɔr agɛ, <<Icicang ishingge, utsak uwurɛ awu Ungwɛ̃ Unum!>>
15.40: Akatsɛrh abɔɔ adɛ̃ɛ̃ ukukaa na azɛrhe. Ru umbɔ ha awu umbɔ Umaryamu Umagadarha, nu Umaryamu uyisa Uyaku ungwɛ̃mbɔ Uyesu uku ucia nu Uyusuf, nu Usarhomi.
15.41: Umbɔ atirhi idɔsa unga ru Ugarhirhi anu itɔ̃ itser iyike unga. Akatsɛrh abɔɔ ikɛi arhɛrhɛ abika aba nggu unga azĩ Urusharhima awu umɔ. Igwirhuwe Uyesu (Umat 27.57-61; Irh 23.50-56; Uyoh 19.38-42)
15.42: Urhɛɛ uku uwe, umbɔ adɛ̃ɛ̃mbɔ igbisha abin udãã awu unum ukpuku uwosha.
15.43: Utsa uwɔɔ agburh Uyusuf uner Uarimatiya, unga awu ra abi itser ru udzepurhe, awea ri itsu amɛn ibiba Iyɛrhe Unum. Aker amɛn azĩ ru Ubirhatu ashɔ̃rhã unga adzowe iyor Uyesu.
15.44: Ubirhatu adzeidzeu unga aka agũ ugɛ Uyesu aka akpea. Unga ayisu unggbaashi abi iwa ha arhusa use awu idzidzɛrhe Uyesu aka akpe.
15.45: Unga aka agũ ra angwĩ unggbaashi abi iwa ha, mɔcɛ unga adzowuka ukom iyora ru Uyusuf.
15.46: Nggee Uyusuf azĩ agoi atorho, acipu iyor Uyesu, akũ atorha ha abow iyor ha, atsuke ngge ru udzakkpi umbɔ aka atsɛ̃ɛ̃ ru utarh. Unga agɔ̃rhũ utarh ukpɔɔ afɔme angwĩ udzak ha.
15.47: Umaryamu uwuku udzeku Umagadarha nu Umaryamu uyisa Uyusuf adɛ̃ɛ̃ azɛrhe anangkɛ umbɔ aka angwɛ̃we iyor Uyesu.

16.1: Unum ukpuku Uwosha uku utɔng, Umaryamu Umagadarha nu Umaryamu uyisa Uyaku, nu ikɛi Usarhomi, agoi abin isung akirakɛ umbɔ aka izĩ adzukuwe ri iyor Uyesu.
16.2: Ru unum ukpu inggbaashia ri inuma utɔɔva, ru ukpeeka ri ivangyɛ ishaa unum iki idzek, umbɔ atirhumbɔ izĩ ru udzaka.
16.3: Umbɔ aka awu ru utsĩndĩ, umbɔ agɔr adɔkambɔ agɛ, <<Ungamɔ awuri igɔ̃rhuwe utarha ra angwĩ udzaka?>>
16.4: Bɔr umbɔ aka azĩ atsĩ umɔ, umbɔ abera asumbɔ anyã nggaa utarh ha uku ugɔ̃rhũkpɔ.
16.5: Umbɔ aka atsĩ ru udzaka, umbɔ anyã uwɛdzɛm aka atsim atorho aka aterha asei udiku ubok ugha, umbɔ agũ iwei.
16.6: Ungwɛdzɛm hã agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka niba agũmbi iwei. Umbi abee Uyesu uner Unazarat uwuruwi umbɔ aka anyapuwe. Aka asoka! Ashia nggimi. Àka anyã anangkɛ umbɔ aka angwɛ̃we unga.
16.7: Àka azĩ adɛyiwe angwɛ̃ imesanga nu Ubitru, unga agbaashia azĩ Ugarhirhi ru umbi. Nggɔɔ ha umbi aka inyã unga, ru nyaka unga aka asɔma umbi.>>
16.8: Akatsɛrh ha atĩ adzek ru adzak ha, adzunumbɔ na azang ayormbɔ, asi irherhumbɔ arherhe nggu unera, ubinkutsu umbɔ agũ iwei. [Abvur itsɛng abok akɔɔ aki isha ashike ru ubvur Umar 16.9-20] Uyesu adzeka ru Umaryamu (Umat 28.9-10; Uyoh 20.11-18)
16.9: Ivangyɛ Uyesu aka asoka akpe ru unkpeka ru unum ukpu inggbaashia ri inuma utɔɔva, agbaashia adzeka ru Umaryamu Umagadarha, utsɛrh ha Uyesu aka atsũwe ípfu iyiki ibewe utɔɔva.
16.10: Unga azĩ asɔme abirabɛ aka awu nggu Uyesu, umbɔ agũ ighong na aciu akpe.
16.11: Umbɔ aka agũ ugɛ Uyesu aka asoka nggu urhɛ, ikɛi unga nibikanga anyã Uyesu, umbɔ asi ibemumbɔ. Uyesu adzeka ra angwɛ̃ imesa avaa (Irh 24.13-35)
16.12: Akɛrɛ aka amaa Uyesu adzipa adzeka ru nyaku uner uwɔɔ ra angwɛ̃ imesa abɔɔ avaa ri ivangyɛ umbɔ aka azɛ̃rhã adzek ru uteu ha adɔsu utsĩndĩã azĩmbɔ.
16.13: Ikivarhambɔ abvui aba asɔme abimbɔ, bɔr utsɛku icɛrɛ umbɔ ashimbɔ ri imangmang ri isarhe ha. Uyesu adzowe angwɛ̃ imesanga itser (Umat 28.16-20; Irh 24.36-49; Uyoh 20.19-23; Aiy 1.6-8)
16.14: Ri imaatak Uyesu aka adzeka ru umbɔ usɔka nu unying hã ri ivangyɛ umbɔ aka asei igha ubingha. Unga atsɛrha umbɔ ri ida imangmangmbɔ, nu iker itsimbɔ, umbɔ aka asi ibemumbɔ arherhe abirabɛ aka agbaashia anyã unga ri isisoknga.
16.15: Ikɛi unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka atsĩ ru upfunga kishoo adzowe Isarhe Iyiki Ize ra anera kishoo.
16.16: Ubɛn unera aka awea ri imangmang, umbɔ asorhukumbɔ unga ubɔtisima, awuri ikpikpoa ififɔrh, bɔr ubɛn unera aka akpɛ̃ɛ̃ iwe ru imangmang awuri itsitsĩm.
16.17: Atsar akɛ aka idɔsa abika awuri imangmang, ri itsokmum, umbɔ awuri itsũwũkumbɔ ípfu iyiki ibewe, awuri irherhumbɔ idũ iyiki ifa.
16.18: Awuri inyãngumbɔ íbvui ra abokmbɔ, ikɛi umbɔ aba ahwambɔ umau, ake asi íkorhuke ubin ru umbɔ. Umbɔ aba atsorha abokmbɔ ra abi irhãrhã, umbɔ awuri ikerhumbɔ.>> Uyesu afũã ra afã (Irh 24.50-53; Aiy 1.9-11)
16.19: Uteijee Uyesu aka amaa irherhuwe umbɔ arherhe ha, ashupa unga akũ afũmbɔ ra afã, unga aseisa nu ubok ugha Unum.
16.20: Mɔcɛ angwɛ̃ imesanga adzek adzise isarhe ubɛn ananga, Uteijee atɔ̃ itser nggu umbɔ, akorha abin idzeu atsu arherhambɔ awu idzidzɛrhe.

1.1: Anera arhɛrhɛ aka atsu amɛnmbɔ atsɛng isarhe abinkɛ aka atsuafɛr ru umɛn.
1.2: Atsɛng abinkɛ umɛn iki igũ ra angwĩ abika anyã abin hã ra asumbɔ ri inggbaashia na awe agãrhã isarhe Arherhu-Num.
1.3: Nggee, a uteiya Utiyofirhu, umum iki ingwɛ̃dzɛn ni irhisa abina kishoo aka atirhi ri inggbaashia, umum inyã azea ikɛi umum itsɛnga ungo agbɛgbɛra.
1.4: Ngge itsú ungo uma uhwɛng idzidzɛrhe abinkɛ umbɔ aka amesuwa ungo. Asɔm imar Uyohana Uner Ubɔtisima
1.5: Ri ivang Uhiridu aka awu uyɛrhe Uyahudiya, uwuku udzowe idɛm-Num nuwɔ agburh Uzakariya, awe ru ukpui Uabija. Utsɛ̃nga Uarhisabatu ikɛi awu unang Uharuna.
1.6: Uzakariya nggu Uarhisabatu arhika ra asu Unum, adɔsi Ikpem Uteijee kishoo asi igbambɔ.
1.7: Bɔr umbɔ ashimbɔ nu ungwɛ̃, ubinkutsu Uarhisabatu awu ukpirh, umbɔ ikivarhambɔ aka akɔ̃mbɔ.
1.8: Ivanga niyɔ ukpui ukpumbɔ Uzakariya awe ri itser, nu Uzakariya atɔ̃ itser iyi uner uwuku udzowe idɛm-Num ra asu Unum.
1.9: Ru nyaka umbɔ aki itang avii asɛng abika adzowe idɛm-Num, umbɔ asɛng Uzakariya azĩ akpĩĩ abin isung ri Iya Uteijee.
1.10: Ivang iyiki ikpĩĩ abin isung hã iki iwe, anera abika adzowe igɔng ru Unum akɔng ru awiya anu ifɛn-Num.
1.11: Mɔcɛ ipfu itser Uteijee ha akapɛɛng ra asunga, idɛ̃ɛ̃ udiku ubok ugha ubeu isung hã.
1.12: Ivang Uzakariya aka anyã unga, unga agbipa, iwei ifɛr unga.
1.13: Bɔr ipfu itser-Num hã igɔr unga igɛ, <<A Uzakariya, niba ugũo iwei, aka agũmbɔ ifɛn-Numngo. Utsɛ̃ngo Uarhisabatu awuri imara ungo uwɛkutsa, ungo utar itsoknga igburh Uyohana.
1.14: Unga awuri iwu ubin anggɔm nu itɛnamɛn ru ungo, imarnga iwuri itsu anera arhɛrhɛ agɔm anggɔm.
1.15: Unga awuri iwu uner ukugɔng ra asu Uteijee. Awu ufang unga asi íhwaa adɛ nu abin aka atsu afĩrhã, awuri itsuke unga Ipfu Isarsatangge ri imarnga.
1.16: Anera arhɛrhɛ ru Uisrairha unga awuri idzipa umbɔ azĩ ru Uteijee Unummbɔ.
1.17: Unga awuri inggbaashia azĩ ru Uteijee ha, ri ijee ipfu ru nyaki iyi Uirhiya, awuri itsu amɛn atei adzipa awe nggu angwɛ̃mbɔ na adzipa abi iker itsi umbɔ adɔsi itsoi abika arhurhika na atsu anera agbishi isiseimbɔ nggu Uteijee.>>
1.18: Uzakariya arhusu ipfu itser-Num hã agɛ, <<Umum ikorhu uguse ni ihwɛng rimi hã? Umumwi iki ikɔ̃mum, nu imɛk utsɛ̃mum iyɛ iki irhɛirhɛ.>>
1.19: Ipfu itser-Num hã igɔr unga igɛ, <<Awu umum Ujibrairhu. Umum idɛ̃ɛ̃ ra asu Unum, awu unga adena umum ĩba irherha arherhe nggu ungo ni idɛyiwa ungo isarhe iyiki ize iyɛrɛ.
1.20: Ungo ucɛrɛ, unu ukutata usi ídɛ̃ɛ̃ urherhungo arherhe utsɛku unumkpi akɛrɛ ha aka ikorhe, ubinkutsu ungo ushiɔ ru imangmang ru irhɛm arherhamum, arherha ha awuri iweke ri ivangyɛ ngge iki imɛ̃ ngge iwe.>>
1.21: Ri ivang hã, anera aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ adzɛu Uzakariya adzeidzeu ri ididãrhãnga ri Iya-Num.
1.22: Unga aka adzeka, unga afɔr irherha arherhe adaka nggu umbɔ. Umbɔ adiki ihwihwɛng agɛ anyãã irhi ri Iya-Num, ubinkutsu unga akpurha akũ aboka akorhu utsara na afɔr irhirherhe adaka.
1.23: Ivang itsernga iki imaa, unga abvui azĩã ri iya.
1.24: Inum hã iki imaa, utsɛ̃nga Uarhisabatu adzur anaa, afɛ̃ɛ̃ atɔ̃ɔ̃ asei ri iya, anera asi ihwɛngmbɔ.
1.25: Uarhisabatu agɛ, <<Uteijee akorhuwa umum rimi. Ri inumyɛ unga aka amutuwa umum na atsũwã atsak ru umum ra asu anera!>> Asɔm imar Uyesu
1.26: Anaa Uarhisabatu awu ru ufɛ̃ uwu utɔ̃ĩ, Unum adene ipfu itser-Num Ujibrairhu izĩ uteu Unazarat ra abĩ Ugarhirhi.
1.27: Azĩ ru unakugbĩrhĩ anasi ihwɛngnga ukutsa aka awu ukarh unerwi aka agburh Uyusuf, unang Udauda. Itsok unakugbĩrhĩ hã igburh Umaryamu.
1.28: Ipfu itser-Num hã izĩ igɔr unga igɛ, <<Umum ighwe ungo unamata ukugɔng, Uteijee awu nggu ungo.>>
1.29: Amɛn Umaryamu agũ ighong akarhãrhã ru urhɛm ighwe ha, na akaifɛrhkɔ ugɛ awu use ighwea iwe rimi.
1.30: Bɔr ipfu itser-Num hã igɔr unga igɛ, <<A Umaryamu, niba ugũa iwei. Unum unga amutuwa ungo.
1.31: Ungo uwuri ikɔ̃ anaa umar ungwɛ̃, nu utar itsoknga igburh Uyesu.
1.32: Unga awuri iwu ukugɔng na awuri iyisa unga Ungwɛ̃ Nggaa Uwuku Ugɔng. Unum Uteijee awuri idzowuka unga anang isei iyɛrhe utɛnga Udauda,
1.33: nu unga awuri iwu uyɛrhe iya Uyakubu ugbagbaa, iyɛrhanga isi ímaangge.>>
1.34: Umaryamu arhusu ipfu itser-Num hã agɛ, <<Ifɛrha ha ikorhi iguse ni iwe? Umum uwi inasi ihwɛng ukutsa.>>
1.35: Ipfu itser-Num hã igɔr igɛ, <<Ipfu Isarsatangge iwuri icipuwa ru ungo, nu ijee iyi Nggaa Uwuku Ugɔng itsira uzirhzĩnga nu ungo. Ngge itsú usarkasar ungwɛ̃ hã ungo uku imar awuri iyisa unga Ungwɛ̃ Unum.
1.36: Nggayɛ unapumbi Uarhisabatu awu ra anaa uwɛkutsa afɛ̃ɛ̃ utɔ̃ĩ nggu ikɔ̃nernga, umbɔ iki iyisa unga ukpirh.
1.38: Umaryamu agɛ, <<Umum iwu ugãrhũ Uteijee. Uneke ifɛrha ha iwe ru umum ru nyaka ungo uku ugɔr.>> Mɔcɛ ipfu itser-Num hã ibɔrukungge unga. Umaryamu azĩ iyepu Uarhisabatu
1.39: Ivang hã Umaryamu asok iki ifefetem azĩã ri igũ abĩ Uyahudiya.
1.40: Unga atsĩ ri iya Uzakariya na aghwe Uarhisabatu.
1.41: Uarhisabatu aka agũ ighwe Umaryamu, irheng ungwɛ̃ iso iniir ra ananga. Uarhisabatu awu nggu Ipfu Isarsatangge.
1.42: Unga atsu ivum agɛ, <<Ungo uwe ru idorh ru akatsɛrh, nu idorh iwe nggu ungwɛ̃wi ungo iki imar!
1.43: Awu use utsu umum ikpo umata rimi, uyisa Uteijeemum asok aba ru umum?
1.44: Ivangyɛ umum iki igũ irhak ighwengo ra atomum, irheng ungwɛ̃ ra anaamum iso idɛ̃ɛ̃ anggɔm.
1.45: Idorh iwe nggu unga, aka awe ru imangmang agɛ arherhu Uteijee aka arherhe nggu unga awuri itsuafɛrke.>> Ubom Umaryamu
1.47: nu ipfumum igɔmanggɔm Unum aka awu uwuku ufɔrh umum,
1.48: unga aka ayita umum utsũwũ ugãrhãnga! Utirhi icɛrɛ undana kishoo awuri iyisa umum uner idorh,
1.49: ubinkutsu Uner Igɔng hã aka akorhe abin akagɔng ru umum. Itsoknga isarsatake.
1.50: Atorhnga atɛ̃rhã ru undana kishoo, ra abika agũ iwei unga.
1.51: Unga aka akũ aboknga akorhi ifɛrhɛ iyiki igɔng. Unga aka asituwe abi aberi itsi ri ifɛrhkɔmbɔ.
1.52: Unga aka acipuwe ayɛrhe ra anang iseimbɔ, na aberuwe abika arhɛrhi itsi afafã.
1.53: Unga aka atsu abi imerh ashuurmbɔ nggu abin aka aze, na adene abi ubin nggu abok akatãrhã.
1.54: Unga aka ayikuwe ugãrhãnga Uisrairha, na acorhuwe
1.55: Uibrahim nu anangnga ugbagbaa, ru nyaka unga aka arherhe nggu atokamɛn.>>
1.56: Umaryamu asei nggu Uarhisabatu ayoka afɛ̃ɛ̃ ataar na adɔrha abvui azĩ ri iya. Imar Uyohana Uner Ubɔtisima
1.57: Ivang Uarhisabatu aka imar, unga amar uwɛkutsa.
1.58: Andɔkanga nu abi iyambɔ agũ ugɛ Uteijee acorhuwe unga akarhãrhã, umbɔ agɔm anggɔm nggu unga.
1.59: Ru unum ukpu utɔrɔk umbɔ aka aba isorhuwe ungwɛ̃ɛ̃, na abee itare itsok utɛnga ru unga ugɛ Uzakariya,
1.60: bɔr uyisa agɛ, <<Ĩ'ĩ! Awuri iyisi itsoknga Uyohana.>>
1.61: Umbɔ agɔr unga agɛ, <<Umbi ashimbi nu unera ru ikarmbi aka awe ru itsok ikɛrɛ ha.>>
1.62: Mɔcɛ umbɔ akũ abok akorhu utsara nu utesa abee ihwɛng utesa awuri itar itsok ungwɛ̃ɛ̃ igburh ungaa.
1.63: Unga arhusa umbɔ adzowe ubin itsɛng, nu anera kishoo adzeidzeu unga aka atsɛng, <<Itsoka igburh Uyohana.>>
1.64: Kanying angwĩnga ayanga urhɛmnga ugarhe nu unga atirhunga arherhe na akpoi Unum.
1.65: Iwei ifɛr umbɔ, ikɛi umbɔ atsĩmbɔ irherha arherhe ha amaa inanga kishoo ra abĩ ampfũwã Uyahudiya.
1.66: Ubɛn unera aka igũ arherhe ha, unga akaifɛrhkɔ na arhusa agɛ, <<Ungwɛ̃wi awuri iwe agusenga?>> Ubinkutsu ubok Uteijee uwe nggu unga. Ubom Uzakariya
1.67: Utɛ ungwɛ̃ hã Uzakariya awu nggu Ipfu Isarsatangge na asɔm Arherhu-Num agɛ,
1.68: <<Umɛn ikpoi Uteijee, Unum uwu Uisrairha! Ubinkutsu unga aka iba ibvure anernga.
1.69: Unga aka aberunga utsom ififɔrh ru umɛn ri iya ugãrhãnga Udauda,
1.70: ru nyaka unga aka arherhe ra angwĩ asarkasar abika asɔm Arherhu-Numnga ishaisha.
1.71: Afɔrh umɛn ru ubok anggamtsakmɛn, nu kishoo abika akpɛ̃na umɛn.
1.72: Adɛyiwe atorhnga ra atokamɛn na ayitu usarkasar ibibemuwenga.
1.73: Uyirhkpi unga aka ayirhe utɛmɛn Uibrahim,
1.74: unga aka ifɔrh umɛn ru ubok anggamtsakmɛn, na atsu umɛn isi ígũmɛn iwei itɔ̃ itsernga,
1.75: ri isisar nu irhirhika ra asunga ri inummɛn kishoo.
1.76: <<Ungo ungwɛ̃mum, awuri iyisa ungo uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num uwu Nggaa Uwuku Ugɔng. Ubinkutsu ungo uwuri igbaashia uzĩ ugbishuwe utsĩndĩ Uteijee, unga adɔrha aba.
1.77: Ungo uwuri idzowe anernga ihwihwɛng ififɔrh ri itsũwe arhimmbɔ.
1.78: Ubinkutsu atorh Unum aka adzaa umɛn, unga atsu irhirhang ishaa unum iwuri idzeka afã iba ru umɛn,
1.79: izĩ irhange abika awe ru uzĩ nu abika awe ru uzirhzĩ akpe, na adarh umɛn izãrhã nu utsĩndĩ uwuku udɔɔr.>>
1.80: Uyohana aseng aba awu akerketawɔ ri ipfu, na aseisa arhum utsɛku unumkpi unga aka adzek ra asu abi Uisrairha.

2.1: Ri inum hã Ukaisar Uaugustu atsu umbɔ avarhi irhɛ anera ra abĩ Uroma ru upfunga.
2.2: Uvarhe ukpu inggbaashia nukpɔ ri ivang Ukiriniyu aka awu ugomna ra abĩ Usuriya.
2.3: Anera kishoo asok azĩmbɔ iteumbɔ nu umbɔ atsɛng umbɔ.
2.4: Nggee Uyusuf iganga adzeku uteu Unazarat ru Ugarhirhi azĩ Uyahudiya, azĩã Ubaitarhami uteu Udauda, ubinkutsu unga awu unang Udauda.
2.5: Unga azĩ umɔ umbɔ atsɛng unga nggu Umaryamu, ukarhnga aka awu ra anaa.
2.6: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka awu umɔ, ivang iyiki imar ungwɛ̃ iwengge.
2.7: Unga amar ukã ungwɛ̃nga, uwɛkutsa. Unga abɛrh unga ra atorho na angwɛ̃we unga ru ukhukhɔɔ, ubinkutsu umbɔ asi ikpombɔ ubã anang inũ. Abi idzɛu nu ípfu itser-Num
2.8: Ra abĩ hã abi idzɛu rabɔ ri idɛɛ iyɔɔ, anu idzɛu ídɔimbɔ ru untsuuka.
2.9: Ipfu itser Uteijee akapɛɛng ru umbɔ, ikpikpoi Uteijee irhange umbɔ, iwei ifɛr umbɔ.
2.10: Bɔr ipfu itser-Num hã igɔr umbɔ igɛ, <<Niba agũmbi iwei. Umum ikũwã umbi isarhe iyiki izeyɛ iki ikowe anera kishoo anggɔm akarhãrhã.
2.11: Irherɛ ru uteu Udauda aka amarambɔ uwuku ufɔrh umbi, unga awu Ukiristo Uteijee.
2.12: Utsar ukpirɛ, umbi awuri inyãmbi irheng ungwɛ̃ iki ibɛrh ra atorho na angwɛ̃we unga ru ukhukhɔɔ.>>
2.13: Kanying ikpui ípfu itser-Num irhɛirhɛ, ngge aka apɛng nggu ipfu itser-Num hã akpoi Unum na agɔr agɛ,
2.14: <<Akpoi Unum afafã ra afã, nu ididɔɔr ru upfung iwe nggu abirabɛ Unum aka amutuwe umbɔ.>>
2.15: Ivang ikpui ípfu itser-Num hã iki ibɔre umbɔ ni ifũngge ra afã, abi idzɛu ha agɔr adɔkambɔ agɛ, <<Umɛn izĩmɛn Ubaitarhami izĩ inyãni ubinkpi uku ukorhe Uteijee aka adɛyiwa ukpɔ ru umɛn.>>
2.16: Nggee umbɔ asok ififitem azĩmbɔ azĩ anyã Umaryamu nggu Uyusuf, nu irheng ungwɛ̃ iki inũ ru ukhukhɔɔ.
2.17: Umbɔ aka anyã unga, umbɔ asɔme anera ubinkpi umbɔ aka adɛyiwe umbɔ ri itsi ungwɛ̃ hã,
2.18: nu kishoo abika agũ adzeidzeu ru ubinkpi abika idzɛu idɔi ha aka arherhe nggu umbɔ.
2.19: Bɔr Umaryamu angwɛ̃ ifɛrha ha kishoo na akaifɛrhkɔ ake ra amɛnnga.
2.20: Abi idzɛu ha abvui azĩ na akpoi Unum ra abina kishoo umbɔ aka agũ na anyã, awu ru nyaka umbɔ aka adɛyiwe umbɔ. Adzowe Uyesu ri Iya-Num
2.21: Unum ukpu utɔrɔk uku uba uwe, ivang umbɔ iki isorhuwe unga usorhe, umbɔ atar itsoka igburh Uyesu, itsok iki ipfu itser-Num hã iki irherhe umbɔ adɔrha akɔ̃ ananga.
2.22: Ivang iyiki isorhuwe inyãwã iki iba itsuifɛr, ru nyaka ngge iki iwe ru Íkpem Umusa, Uyusuf nggu Umaryamu akũna unga azĩmbɔ Urusharhima umbɔ adzowe irheng ungwɛ̃ɛ̃ ru Uteijee,
2.23: ru nyaka umbɔ aka atsɛng ri Íkpem Uteijee ugɛ, <<Ubɛn ukã ungwɛ̃ uwuku utsa, awuri itsũ unga awu uwu Uteijee.>>
2.24: Ikɛi na adzowe idɛm-Num, ru nyaka ngge iki iwe ri Íkpem Uteijee, <<Anurhɛu iya avaa, use angwɛ̃ anurhɛu avaa.>>
2.25: Ri ivang hã unera nuwɔ ru Urusharhima itsoka igburh Usimiyon. Awu uner uwuku urhika, agũ iwei Unum na adzɛu abee inyã ififɔrh Uisrairha, awu nggu Ipfu Isarsatangge ri itsinga.
2.26: Ipfu Isarsatangge iki isɔmukũngge unga igɛ, unga asi íkpea utsɛku unga aka inyã Ukiristo uwu Uteijee.
2.27: Ipfu-Num ikũna unga izĩngge ru ufɔm Iya-Num. Ivang utesa nggu uyisa Uyesu aka akũna unga aba nu umbɔ akorhuwe ubinkpi agbeyambɔ aka agɔr ri Íkpem Umusa,
2.28: Usimiyon ayɛi unga ra aboka na akpoi Unum agɛ,
2.29: <<A Uteijee uner ijee kishoo, ru nyaka ungo uku urherhe, uneke ugãrhãngo azĩ uku utɔɔ icɛ, ru nyaka ungo uku ubemuwe.
2.31: iyiriyɛ ungo uku ugbisha ra asu anera kishoo,
2.32: irhirhang irhang idɛyiwe atsen abi Uyahuda, nu ikpikpoi ra anerngo abi Uisrairha.>>
2.33: Uyisa nu utesa adzeidzeu ubinkpi Usimiyon aka arherhe ri itsinga.
2.34: Mɔcɛ Usimiyon atsuke idorh ru umbɔ na agɔr Umaryamu, uyisunga agɛ, <<Ungwɛ̃ uwurɛ, unga awuri ikũ igbigba nu isisok anera arhɛrhɛ ri Uisrairha, na awuri iwu utsar ukpuku ukpukpɛ̃.
2.35: Ngge itsú ifɛrhkɔ amɛn anera arhɛrhɛ iwuri idzekangge ra awiya. Ikɛi ungo uwuri igũo ighong ru nyaki ikon iki itar ikpuingo.>>
2.36: Umɔ̃ ikɛi utsɛrh uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num Uhanatu, unapa Ufanuyirha unang Uasher. Aka akɔ̃ɔ̃ akarhãrhã, apfuna asei nggu utsaka imɛka utɔɔva nu utsaka ashia.
2.37: Mɔcɛ unga awu utsɛ̃rhãpfu ri imɛka isɔka utɔrɔk nu imɛka inaa. Unga asi isoka ri Iya-Num, nu utsuu na atenum akpurha adɛ̃ɛ̃ ikpem igha ubin na adzowe igɔng nu ifɛn-Num.
2.38: Asok abanga ru umbɔ ri ivang hã, unga atar uwɛɛ ru Unum, na arherha arherhe ri itsi ungwɛ̃ hã nggu kishoo abika adzɛu unum ukpuku ufɔrh Urusharhima.
2.39: Umbɔ aka amaa abina kishoo aki Íkpem Uteijee, umbɔ apfuri azĩmbɔ utepumbɔ Unazarat ru Ugarhirhi.
2.40: Ungwɛ̃ɛ̃ aseng na aker, na awu nggu itsoi, nu imimutu Unum iwe nggu unga. Ungwɛ̃ hã Uyesu ri Iya-Num
2.41: Ubɛn amɛka utesa nggu uyisa aka isaka azĩ Irhowa Iyiki Igar Utɔng ru Urusharhima.
2.42: Unga aka awu imɛka usɔkdũmɛn umbɔ akũna unga azĩmbɔ irhowa ha ru nyaka agbeyambɔ.
2.43: Irhowa ha iki imaa, umbɔ apfuri azĩmbɔ usoi, ungwɛ̃ hã Uyesu adɛ̃ɛ̃ unga ra andzing ru Urusharhima, utesa nu uyisa amɔrmbɔ.
2.44: Akaifɛrhkɔ agɛ awu nggu umbɔ, na azɛ̃rhã amaambɔ unuma unying. Na atirhi irhisa unga ra abimbɔ nu awɛrhambɔ.
2.45: Umbɔ aka asi inyãmbɔ unga, umbɔ abvui azĩmbɔ Urusharhima anumbɔ irhisa unga.
2.46: Amaambɔ inuma itaar na adɔrha anyã unga ru ufɔm Iya-Num, asei nggu abika amesuwe, anu igosha umbɔ na anu irhusa umbɔ arherhe.
2.47: Ubɛn unera aka igũ unga akpurha adzeidzeu ri ihwihwɛngnga nu idzipa arherhanga.
2.48: Ivang utesa nggu uyisa aka anyã unga, umbɔ agũ idzeu akarhãrhã. Uyisa agɔr unga agɛ, <<A ungwɛ̃mum, awu use utsu ungo ukorhuwa umɛn rimi? Unyã utɛngo nggu umum iki isham asumɛn ibeea ungo, ikɛi amɛnmɛn aghong akarhãrhã umɛn iki isi inyãmɛn ungo.>>
2.49: Unga arhusa umbɔ agɛ, <<Awu use utsu umbi abeea umum? Umbi asi ihwɛngmbi agɛ awu ufang umum iki iwe ri iya Utɛmum?>>
2.50: Bɔr umbɔ asi ihwɛngmbɔ ubinkpi unga aka arherhe nggu umbɔ.
