15.21: <<Ungwɛ̃nga agɔr unga agɛ, <A utɛ, umum ikorhu ubin arhim ru Unum ni iki ishɔiwamum ungo. Umum isi imɛ̃mum umbɔ abvui ayisa umum ungwɛ̃ngo. >
15.22: <<Bɔr utesa agɔr agãrhãnga agɛ, <Àka akũ atorho aka aze aba atsĩme unga ifetem. Àka atsuke imangto ri itoknga na abadak ra adaknga.
15.23: Àka atsĩ adzur ungwɛ̃ inak iyiki isenga, aba angwãna. Umɛn izɛk irhowa igɔmanggɔm.
15.24: Ubinkutsu ungwɛ̃mum uwɛrɛ ha aka akpea na azir ikɛi, aka agwira bɔr icɛrɛ umɛn iki ikpomɛn.> Mɔcɛ umbɔ atsĩmbɔ irhowa.
15.25: <<Umbɔ ana awe ru irhowa ha, ungwɛ̃nga uwuku ukũa awu ra arhum. Unga aka adzeka arhum aba ayo ri iya, unga agũ anggang nu azer atɔkuke iya.
15.26: Nggee unga ayisu ugãrhã unying na arhusa unga agɛ, <Awu use uni izãrhã?>
15.27: Unga agɔr unga agɛ, <Ungwɛ̃mbi aka abanga, utɛngo atsu umbɔ angwã inak iyiki isenga, akorhi irhowa, unga aka aba atsĩ ukuker.>
15.28: <<Ungwɛ̃mbɔ uwuku ukũa amɛnnga adake, unga akpɛ̃ɛ̃ itsĩ ri iya, nggee utɛnga adzek ashɔ̃rhã unga.
15.29: Bɔr unga agɔr utɛnga agɛ, <Unyã! Imɛk iyɛrɛ kishoo umum ikapa ungo, inasi ikpɛ̃mum igũna ungo idiki unying. Rimi hã ungo unasi idzaango umum ibũ iyiki ici umum ikorhumum irhowa nggu awɛrhamum.
15.30: Bɔr ungwɛ̃ngo uwuruwi aka azĩ afɛre abinngo nggu akatsɛrh aba ri iya, ungo ungwãnuwe ungwɛ̃ inak iyiki isenga ru unga!>
15.31: <<Utɛnga agɛ, <Oka ungwɛ̃mum, ungo uwu nggu umum ubɛn ivang, ubɛn ubinmum, uwu ukpungo.
15.32: Bɔr imɛ̃ngge umɛn ikorhi irhowa ni igɔmanggɔm, ubinkutsu ungwɛ̃mbi uwuruwi aka akpe, aka azira, uwuruwi aka agwir, umbɔ aka akpombɔ unga.> >>

16.1: Uyesu adɛyiwe angwɛ̃ imesanga agɛ, <<Unera nuwɔ awu uner ubin, umbɔ adɛyiwe unga agɛ, <Uner uwuku udzɛu itserngo anu ikorhe ataba nggu abinngo.>
16.2: Nggee unga ayisu uner itsernga hã arhusa agɛ, <Umum ini igũshu use ri itsingo? Ukũ ubvur itserngo uba uvarhe umum inyãni kishoo, ubinkutsu ungo usi íweɔ uner itsermum.>
16.3: <<Uner itser ataba ha akaifɛrhkɔ ra amɛnnga agɛ, <Umum ikorhi iguse icɛrɛ? Uteiyamum uwi awuri iwayiwe umum ri itser. Umum uwi ishimum ri iker iyiki ikau irham, ni iwu ra atsa akika afɛn ifɛn.
16.4: Umum ihwɛng ubinkpi umum iki ikorhe, umbɔ aba awayikumbɔ umum ri itser nggimi, anera awuri iyaimbɔ umum ra ayambɔ.>
16.5: <<Nggee unga ayisa abika agha uvɛrh ru uteiyanga unying anying, unga arhusu inggbaashia agɛ, <Uteiyamum adɔsa ungo itikisong?>
16.6: <<Unga agɔr unga agɛ, <Ídzum atsei anaka utɔrɔk.> <<Mɔcɛ uner itser ataba ha agɔr unga agɛ, <Unyangu ubvur uvɛrhngo ifitem, utsɛng anaka ana.>
16.7: <<Mɔcɛ unga arhusu uwu uvaa ikɛi agɛ, <Adɔsa ungo itikisong?> <<Unga agɔr agɛ, <Ambãĩ itsem, unaka unying.> Unga adɛyiwe unga agɛ, <Unyangu ubvur uvɛrhngo, utsɛng isɔka utɔrɔk.>
16.8: <<Uteiya ha akpoi uner itser uwuku uda irhirhika ha, ubinkutsu akorhi ifɛrhɛ ha nggu isarasu. Anera ru upfung ukpirɛ akorhi ifɛrhɛmbɔ nggu itsoi anangmbɔ abika adɔsu Unum.
16.9: Umum idɛyiwa umbi, àka akũ abin upfung akũ akpowe itsikammbi awɛrhɛ, abinmbi aba amaake, umbɔ ayɛi umbi ra aya aki ugbagbaa.
16.10: <<Uwuruwi aka awe ru imangmang nggu ubin uku uci, awuri iwea ri imangmang ru ubin ukpuku urhɛ. Uwuruwi aka ashia ri imangmang ru ubin ukpuku uci, asi íwea ri imangmang ru ubin ukpuku urhɛ.
16.11: Nggee umbi aba ashimbi ri imangmang ra abin upfung ukpirɛ, ungaa idzaa umbi abin aki idzidzɛrhe?
16.12: Umbi aba isaka ashimbi ri imangmang ra abin anera, ungaa idzaa umbi abin aki ukammbi?
16.13: <<Ugãrhã asi ídɛ̃ɛ̃ atɔ̃wũka itser ra ateiya avaa. Unga awuri ibema unying na akpɛ̃ɛ̃ uwɔrɔ, unga awuri idzowe itsinga ru unying na akpɛ̃ɛ̃ uwɔrɔ. Ungo usi ídɛ̃ɛ̃ udzowukɔ itsingo ru Unum nu uhwɛk.>>
16.14: Abi Ufarisi abika abemu uhwɛk, aka agũ akɛrɛ ha kishoo, umbɔ acatu Uyesu.
16.15: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi azharhe arherhe aka aze ra asu anera, bɔr Unum ahwɛnga amɛnmbi. Ubin uku uze ra asu anera, uwu ubin ishĩ ra asu Unum. Itomi imesi iyɔɔ
16.16: <<Imesi Íkpem Umusa nu abvur abika asɔm Arherhu-Num, umbɔ aka adũwã utsɛki ivang Uyohana. Udzur ri ivang hã, umbɔ aka anu idzowe Isarhe Iyiki Ize iyi Iyɛrhe Unum, nu ubɛn unera abee itsĩ ri ngge ri inggang.
16.17: Asi ighonga afã nggu abĩ aki imaa, bɔr ishia unying ri Íkpem Umusa isi ífɔ̃rhũngge.
16.18: <<Ubɛn unera aka iwayiwe utsɛ̃nga na apfuna utsɛrh uwukuse, unga awu ra arhim itoma-dak, nu unera aka ipfunu utsɛrh uwuku uwuwayi, awu ra arhim itoma-dak. Uner ubin nggu Urhiazaru
16.19: <<Uner ubin nuwɔ aka isaka atsim atorhi imang azezerake, unga awe ri igũibɛn ubɛn unuma.
16.20: Ra angwĩ iyanga, utsũwã nuwɔ agburh Urhiazaru anu umɔ, awu nggu isɔɔ iki imaa iyornga.
16.21: Unga abee igha awushu ubingha aki igbei, ra adak utebur uner ubin hã. Ijui iki isaki iba irhɛn isɔɔnga hã.
16.22: <<Ivanga iki imɛ̃ uner ifɛn hã akpea. Ípfu itser-Num ishupa unga ikũ izĩngge ri igbɔm Uibrahim. Ikɛi, uner ubin hã akpea, umbɔ adzake unga.
16.23: Ra anang isei abika akpukpe, ra anangkɛ unga aka agũ uver, unga abera asunga anyã Uibrahim ukuka nu Urhiazaru ri igbɔmnga.
16.24: Nggee unga ayisa unga agɛ, <A Utɛtɛ Uibrahim, umaa ugũ atorh umum nu udene Urhiazaru unga ashɔmu itoknga ra amɛ̃ na arhor adɔnga arhɛmmum, ubinkutsu umum iwe ru uver ri idzũũ urha ukpirɛ.>
16.25: <<Bɔr Uibrahim agɔr unga agɛ, <A ungwɛ̃mum, uyita ri ivangyɛ ungo uku uwe ru urhɛ. Ungo uyɛisa abin aka aze nu Urhiazaru ayɛisa abin aka abewe, bɔr icɛrɛ umbɔ afituwe unga nggimi ungo uwe ru uver.
16.26: Asi iwea akɛrɛ ha ukpekũ, bɔr ra ateumɛn nggu umbi, aka atsu ughorkaghor umbumbang uteitasamgbɔ utsur anera asoki nggimi abambɔ ugarmbi, use unera adzek ugarmbi abanga ru umɛn.>
16.27: <<Unga agɛ, <A utɛ, umum ishɔ̃rhã ungo, uma udene Urhiazaru unga azĩ ri iya utɛmum,
16.28: ubinkutsu umum iwe ra angwɛ̃mɛn atɔ̃ɔ̃. Umum ibee unga arherha umbɔ, utsur umbɔ abambɔ ra anang akɛrɛ ha aki uver ha.>
16.29: <<Uibrahim agɛ, <Awembɔ ru Umusa nu abika asɔm Arherhu-Num, uneke umbɔ akpeto ra abi ha.>
16.30: <<Unga agɛ, <A utɛ Uibrahim, ĩ'ĩ, unera aba adzek ra abika akpe azĩ ru umbɔ, umbɔ awuri idzipumbɔ.>
16.31: <<Unga agɔr unga agɛ, <Umbɔ aba asi ikpembɔ ato ru Umusa nggu abika asɔm Arherhu-Num, umbɔ asi ígũmbɔ unerwi aka idzeka akpe.> >>

17.1: Uyesu agɔr angwɛ̃ imesanga agɛ, <<Ubinkpi uku itsu anera agba ra arhim, awu ufang ukpɔ uba, bɔr atorh uner ha aka itsu ukpɔ uba.
17.2: Nu unerwi aka itsu unying ra awɛkaci abɛrɛ agba ra arhim, ugba umbɔ abope ukɔ igɔ ru urhɔknga na atare unga atsĩ ru ughorkaghor ukau ukugɔng.
17.3: Nggee àka akpɔm atsimbi. <<Undɔkango aba agbaa ra arhim, utsɛrha unga. Unga aba nekuka, utsũwe unga.
17.4: Unga aba agbaa uvau ru ungo idikunga utɔɔva ru unuma unying, na aba idiku utɔɔva agɛ, <Iki inekukũ,> utsũwe unga.>>
17.5: Abi itser Uyesu agɔr agɛ, <<Uteijee, utomuwa imangmangmɛn.>>
17.6: Uteijee agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi aba awembi ri imangmang ukunjiir ru nyaki ishaa umastad, umbi adɛ̃ɛ̃ agɔrmbi ucucii ipfum uwurɛ agɛ, <Ubvurhi nu udɔnna ru ukau,> umgbɔ uwuri igũmgbɔ umbi.
17.7: <<Awu ungamɔ ru umbi aka iwe ru ugãrhã uwu irham use uwuku udzɛu ídɔinga, aka idzeku usi aba, unga agɔr unga agɛ, <Uba ifitem, uba usei nu ugha ubingha>?
17.8: Asi ígɔra rimi, bɔr unga awuri igɔr ugãrhãnga hã ugɛ, <Utɔng ukorhu ubingha ukũwã umum igha ni ihwa imaa, nu ungo udɔrhu ugha nu uhwa>
17.9: Awuri itara uwɛɛ ru ugãrhã hã aka adɔsa arherhanga?
17.10: Nggee umbi awe rimi hã, umbi aba adɔsumbi abina kishoo umbɔ aka adɛyiwa umbi. Umbi awuri igɔr agɛ, <Umɛn isi iwemɛn ubin, umɛn iwu agãrhã. Umɛn ikpurhi itɔ̃ itseryɛ iki iwe iyimɛn.> >> Uyesu akerhuwe abi irhãrhĩ ingbim usɔka
17.11: Icɛ Uyesu awu ru uzãrhã ukpuku uzĩ Urusharhima, unga azɛ̃rhã ra atsom Usamariya nggu Ugarhirhi.
17.12: Unga aka atsĩ ru ungwɛ̃rhũ uteu ukpɔɔ akatsak abi irhãrhĩ ingbim usɔka agbanga unga, adɛ̃ɛ̃ ukuka.
17.13: Umbɔ atsarhi irhakmbɔ agɛ, <<Uyesu, Uteiya, ugũ atorh umɛn!>>
17.14: Ivangyɛ unga aka anyã umbɔ, unga agɛ, <<Àka azĩ ra abika adzowe idɛm-Num umbɔ anyã umbi.>> Umbɔ awu ru utsĩndĩ uwuku uzĩ, na akerhumbɔ.
17.15: Unying ru umbɔ aka anyã unga aka akerhunga, unga abvui aba atsu ivum akpoi Unum.
17.16: Unga aba agba ra adak Uyesu na atar uwɛɛ ru unga. Unga uwi awu uner Usamariya.
17.17: Uyesu arhusa agɛ, <<Asi iwea inera usɔka kishoo aka akerhe? Abɔrɔ utɔɔrha angwɛ̃mbɔ?
17.18: Awu use ukpɔ utsu akpurha awu utsen uwurɛ ikiyikanga unga abvui aba ikpoi Unum?>>
17.19: Mɔcɛ unga agɔr unga agɛ, <<Usisok uzĩɔ. Imangmangngo ngge ikerhuwe ungo.>> Ibiba Iyɛrhe Unum (Umat 24.23-28,37-41)
17.20: Unuma nukpɔ abi Ufarisi arhusa unga agɛ Iyɛrhe Unum iwuri iba ukang? Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Ibiba Iyɛrhe Unum isi íwengge ubinkpi umbi aka inyã ra asumbi,
17.21: Unera asi ígɔra agɛ, <Àka anyã nggayɛ,> use <Nggayɔ,> ubinkutsu Iyɛrhe Unum iwu nggu umbi.>>
17.22: Mɔcɛ unga agɔr angwɛ̃ imesanga agɛ, <<Ivanga niyɔ ibarɔ, umbi aka ibee inyã unuma unying ri inum Ungwɛ̃-Ner, bɔr umbi asi ínyãmbi.
17.23: Anera awuri igɔr umbi agɛ, <Àka anyã nggawi ri nggimi,> use <Nggawɔ ru nggɔɔ.> Niba azĩmbi, niba adɔsumbi umbɔ.
17.24: Ubinkutsu unum Ungwɛ̃-Ner uwuri iwe ru nyaki inai iki inyaka irhangnge afã, usok ru ubang upfunga nggɔɔ uzĩ ubang ukpɔrɔ.
17.25: Bɔr awu ufang unga aka igbaashia ahwa uver abina arhɛrhɛ nu undan ukpirɛ ukpɛ̃kpɔ unga.
17.26: <<Ru nyaka ngge iki iwe ri inum Unuhu, rimi hã ikɛi ngge iki iwe ri ivang Ungwɛ̃-Ner.
17.27: Anera agha na ahwa, apfuna na apfunuwe, utsɛku unumkpi Unuhu aka atsĩ ru nggaa ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃, mɔcɛ amɛ̃ isopfung aba atsĩme umbɔ kishoo.
17.28: <<Iwe ru nyaka ha ri inum Urhutu, anera aka agha na ahwa, agoi na agoyiwe, akau irham na adzin idzin.
17.29: Bɔr ru unum Urhutu aka adzeka ru Usɔdɔm, umbɔ atsuke urha nggu akãã urha adzeka afã aba atsĩme umbɔ kishoo.
17.30: <<Ĩĩ, iwuri iwe rimi hã ru unum Ungwɛ̃-Ner aka idzeka.
17.31: Ru unum hã uwuruwi aka awu afafã ni itsi uvi iyanga na abinnga awu ra abĩ, unga niba acipuwanga inyanga ake. Rimi hã ikɛi, uwuku uwe ru usi, niba abvui abanga ri iya.
17.33: Kishoo abika abee ifɔrh urhɛmbɔ, umgbɔ uwuri igwirmgbɔ. Kishoo abika agwirhuwe urhɛmbɔ, afufɔrh umgbɔ.
17.34: Umum ididɛyiwa umbi, nu utsuu ukpu ha awuri inyãmbɔ inera ivaa nu ukoma unying. Awuri nyanguwe unying na abɔre unying.
17.35: Akatsɛrh avaa aka idɛ̃ɛ̃ igɔɔ ananga unying. Awuri nyanguwe unying na abɔre unying.>>
17.37: Umbɔ arhusa unga agɛ, <<Awuri iwe rinɛɛ Uteijee?>> Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Anangkɛ ukom uku uwe, anang hã amgbɛpɛ iki ikɔng.>>

18.1: Mɔcɛ Uyesu adɛyiwe angwɛ̃ imesanga unyaka arherhe aki ifɛn-Num ubɛn ivang na aneke igũ azhe.
18.2: Unga agɛ, <<Utepa nukpɔ uner uwuku utsu uvau aka asi igũa iwei Unum, asi ihwɛngnga unera.
18.3: Ru uteu ha utsɛ̃rhãpfu ruwɔ akɛyi ru utsa ha anu igɔr unga agɛ, <Umaa utsĩ ra ateu umum nggu abika akpɛ̃na umum.>
18.4: <<Unga atirhi akpɛ̃ɛ̃, bɔr unga abvui agɔr ra amɛnnga agɛ, <Umum ihwɛng ugɛ umum isi igũmum iwei Unum, ni isi ihwɛng anera,
18.5: bɔr utsɛ̃rhãpfu uwurɛ akɛna umum iwiwosha. Umum ima iyike unga, utsur ikikɛyanga izhengge umum.> >>
18.6: Uteijee agɛ, <<Àka agũ ubinkpi uner uwuku utsu uvau uwu amɛn aka atãrhã aka arherhe.
18.7: Unum asi íkorhuka anernga aka asɛng abinkɛ aka arhika, abirabɛ aki iciu ru utsuu na atenum ru unga? Unga awuri adɔ̃rhũnga ri iyike umbɔ?
18.8: Umum idɛyiwa umbi, awuri iyikuka umbɔ ifitem ikɛi ru ubinkpi umbɔ aka abee. Bɔr Ungwɛ̃-Ner aka iba, awuri ikpoa imangmang ru upfung?>> Unyaka arherhe uner Ufarisi nu uner uwuku uyɛisu ikirbi abĩ
18.9: Ra abirabɛ aka adzowe imangmang ra atsimbɔ agɛ umbɔ arhika, na anu iyɛɛi abikase, Uyesu arherhe unyaka arherhe ugɛ,
18.10: <<Inera ivaa atsĩ ifɛn-Num ru ufɔm Iya-Num, unying awu utsa Ufarisi, uwu uvaa awu uner uwuku uyɛi ikirbi abĩ.
18.11: Uner Ufarisi ha asok abera adɛ̃ɛ̃ afɛn-Num ri itsikamnga agɛ, <A Unum, umum itar uwɛɛ ĩdzaa ungo umum iki isi iwemum ru nyaka avɛu, abika ida irhirhika, abika atoma-dak, use uwuku uyɛi ikirbi abĩ uwurɛ.
18.12: Umum ikpem igha ubin idiki ivaa ri inuma utɔɔva, ni idzowe unying ra abina usɔka ra abinkɛ umum iki ikpo kishoo.>
18.13: <<Bɔr uner uwuku uyɛi ikirbi abĩ hã adɛ̃ɛ̃ uku uka. Asi ibera asunga arhisa afã, bɔr abangu ikɔknga na agɛ, <A Unum, ugũ atorh umum uner arhim.>
18.14: <<Umum idɛyiwa umbi, uner uwuku uyɛi ikirbi abĩ hã abvui azĩ ri iyanga, Unum anyanga unga awu uner uwuku urhika, bɔr asi inyangu utsa uwɔrɔ awea rimi. Ubɛn unerwi aka aberi itsinga, awuri irhɛrhuwe ike. Nu uwuruwi aka arhɛrhi itsinga, awuri ibiberuwe ike.>> Uyesu nggu angwɛ̃rhã awɛkaci (Umat 19.13-15; Umar 10.13-16)
18.15: Anera ikɛi akũ angwɛ̃rhã awɛkaci aba ru Uyesu abanga umbɔ. Angwɛ̃ imesanga aka anyã rimi, umbɔ atsɛrha umbɔ.
18.16: Bɔr Uyesu ayisa awɛkaci ha azĩ ru unga, na agɛ, <<Àka aneke awɛkaci aba ru umum, Àka niba akɛnmbi umbɔ, Iyɛrhe Unum iwu iyi ikpũmbɔ.
18.17: Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, ubɛn unerwi aka asi iyɛisa Iyɛrhe Unum ru nyaku uwɛkuci, asi ídɛ̃ɛ̃ atsĩã ri ngge.>> Uyɛrhe uner ubin (Umat 19.16-30; Umar 10.17-31)
18.18: Uyɛrhu Uyahuda uwɔɔ arhusa unga agɛ, <<A umarhem uwuku uze, umum ikorhe uguse ni ikpo urhɛ uwu ugbagbaa?>>
18.19: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Awu use utsu ungo uyisa umum uwuku uze? Uwuku uze ashia, Unum ukpekũ awu uwuku uze.
18.20: Ungo uhwɛngo íkpem iyɛrɛ, <Niba ufɛrɔ unera, niba utomungo-dak, niba uvɛpɔ ivɛu, niba ugbɛrɔ angwĩ utsukukɔ unera, udzowe igɔng ru utɛngo nu uyango.> >>
18.21: Uwɛdzɛm hã agɛ, <<A umarhem, umum iki idɔsumum akɛrɛ ha kishoo rimɔ̃ɔ̃, utirhi ri iwɛ̃nci.>>
18.22: Uyesu aka agũ rimi, unga agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ungo ubɔr ubina unying ukpekũ. Ugoshe abinngo kishoo, udzowe uhwɛka ra atsũwã, nu uba udɔsa umum. Mɔcɛ ungo uwuri iweɔ ru ugbɛta urhɛrhɛ ra afã.>>
18.23: Unga aka agũ rimi, amɛnnga aghong akarhãrhã, ubinkutsu unga awu uner ubin akarhãrhã.
18.24: Uyesu arhi unga na agɔr agɛ, <<Aghong uner ubin aka itsĩ ri Iyɛrhe Unum.
18.25: Idzidzɛrhe, uwuri ighwɔrhungge Urhakumi utsĩ ra angwĩ inepurha nu uner ubin aka itsĩ ri Iyɛrhe Unum.>>
18.26: Abika agũ rimi, arhusa agɛ, <<Ungaa adɛ̃ɛ̃ akpo ififɔrh?>>
18.27: Uyesu agɛ, <<Ubin ukpuku unang anera, Unum ananga ukpɔ.>>
18.28: Ubitru agɔr unga agɛ, <<Umɛn abɛ ineke abinmɛn kishoo ni idɔsa ungo!>>
18.29: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, unera asi íneke iya use utsɛrh, use angwɛ̃mbɔ, use ateinga, use awɛkaci ri itsi Iyɛrhe Unum,
18.30: na asi ikpoa arhɛrhɛ ru udan ukpirɛ, ru unum upfung uku ufa uku iba ikɛi unga akpo urhɛ uwu ugbagbaa.>> Uyesu abvui arherha arherhe akpenga (Umat 20.17-19; Umar 10.32-34)
18.31: Uyesu akũna umbɔ usɔkdũmɛn azĩ ri ibanga, na adɛyiwe umbɔ agɛ, <<Umɛn izĩ ufã Urusharhima, nu kishoo abinkɛ abika asɔm Arherhu-Num aka atsɛng ri itsi Ungwɛ̃-Ner awuri itsuafɛrke.
18.32: Awuri idzowe unga ra abok atsen abi Uyahuda. Umbɔ awuri iyɛia unga, arhena unga, ashau aci atsuyiwe unga, awuri ikwɛr unga, na afɛre unga.
18.33: Ru unum untaar unga awuri isoka ikɛi.>>
18.34: Bɔr angwɛ̃ imesanga asi igũ arherhanga ataimbɔ. Agbena awuwɔk ru umbɔ, nu umbɔ asi ihwɛngmbɔ ubinkpi unga aka arherhe. Uner ibvuta asunga ayanguke (Umat 20.29-34; Umar 10.46-52)
18.35: Uyesu aka ayoku Ujeriko, uner ibvuta asei nu ubang utsĩndĩã anu ifɛn.
18.36: Ivangyɛ unga aka agũ ititɔng anera arhɛrhɛ, unga arhusa agɛ awu use uni izãrhã?
18.37: Umbɔ adɛyiwe unga agɛ, <<Uyesu uner Unazarat unga atɔng.>>
18.38: Unga atsarhi irhaknga ayisa agɛ, <<Uyesu! Ungwɛ̃ Udauda! Ugũ atorh umum!>>
18.39: Abika azɛ̃rhã ra asu Uyesu atsɛrha unga agɛ unga unukutata, bɔr unga agbisha atsarhi irhaknga agɛ, <<A Ungwɛ̃ Udauda! Ugũ atorh umum.>>
18.40: Uyesu adɛ̃ɛ̃ na atsu umbɔ akũ uner ibvuta ha aba ru unga. Unga aka aba ukhapa, Uyesu arhusa unga agɛ,
18.41: <<Ungo ubee umum ikorhuwa ungo use?>> Unga agɛ, <<A Uteijee, umum ibee ikpo inyã anang.>>
18.42: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Uyɛi inyinyãngo. Imangmangngo ngge ikerhuwa ungo.>>
18.43: Kanying asunga ayanguke, unga adɔsu Uyesu na akpoi Unum. Anera kishoo aka anyã rimi, umbɔ akpoi Unum ikɛi.

19.1: Uyesu aka atsĩ ru Ujeriko, na azɛ̃rhã atɔng.
19.2: Uner uwɔɔ umɔ itsoka igburh Uzakka, unga awu unggbaashi abika ayɛi ikirbi abĩ, na awu ru ubin akarhãrhã.
19.3: Abee inyã ungamɔ awu Uyesu ha. Bɔr Uzakka akpinunga asi idɛ̃ɛ̃ anyãã Uyesu, anera arhɛmbɔ.
19.4: Nggee unga atĩ agbaashia azĩ afũ nggaa ucucii abee inyã unga, Uyesu ani itɔng udika ha.
19.5: Uyesu aka azĩ atsĩ ra anang ucucii ha, unga abera asunga afafã na agɔr unga agɛ, <<A Uzakka, ucipuwa ififitem, awu ufang umum iki icipa ri iyango irherɛ.>>
19.6: Nggee iki ififitem unga ahwarha acipuwa aba agbanga unga nggu agɔm.
19.7: Anera kishoo aka anyã rimi, umbɔ atirhi ibvun arherhe agɛ, <<Unga azĩ iwu utsen uner arhim.>>
19.8: Bɔr Uzakka asok adɛ̃ɛ̃ na agɔr Uteijee agɛ, <<A Uteijee, unyã! Icɛrɛ umum idzowe uteng abinkɛ umum iki iwu ra ake ra atsũwã, ni ifase idikunga inaa ra abirabɛ umum iki igha urhambɔ ri iyɛi ikirbi abĩ.>>
19.9: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ififɔrh iki itsĩngge ri iya ikɛrɛ irherɛ, ubinkutsu utsak uwurɛ iganga awu unang Uibrahim.
19.10: Ungwɛ̃-Ner aba ibee abirabɛ aka agwir, na afɔrh umbɔ.>> Unyaka arherhe uazurhfa usɔka (Umat 25.14-30)
19.11: Anera aka anu igosha akɛrɛ ha, unga atsĩã irherhe unyaka arherhe, ubinkutsu unga aka ayoka itsĩ Urusharhima, umbɔ akaifɛrhkɔ ugɛ use Uyesu awuri itsu Iyɛrhe Unum idzeka kanying ru Urusharhima.
19.12: Unga agɛ, <<Utsa uwɔɔ aka akpo imar iyiki ize asok azĩã itsim iyɛrhe ra abĩ akɔɔ, ra anang aka ader, na abvui aba ra abĩnga.
19.13: Nggee unga ayisa agãrhãnga usɔka, agashuwe umbɔ imang uazurhfa unying anying, na agɔr umbɔ ikɛi agɛ, <Àka akũ imang hã adzipa utsɛku umum iki iba.>
19.14: <<Bɔr abi utepunga akpɛ̃mbɔ unga, umbɔ adene itser umbɔ azĩ agɔr unga agɛ, <Umɛn isi ibemumɛn ungo uwu uyɛrhamɛn.>
19.15: <<Umbɔ aka atsĩme iyɛrhanga, unga abvui aba ri iya. Unga atsu umbɔ ayisuwe agãrhãnga hã, unga aka adzowe imang hã. Abee inyã angwĩkɛ umbɔ aka akpo atoma ri idzidzipambɔ.
19.16: <<Uwu inggbaashia aba adɛ̃ɛ̃ ra asunga na agɛ, <A uteiya, imang uazurhfango hã ikũwã umum uazurhfa usɔka.>
19.17: <<Uteiyanga agɛ, <Ĩhĩĩ, ungo udɛ̃ɛ̃, ugãrhũ uwuku uze, ubinkutsu ungo uweɔ ri idzidzɛrhe ru ubin ukpuku uci, umum iwuri ĩdzaamum ijee itepa usɔka.>
19.18: <<Uwu uvaa aba agɛ, <A uteiya imang uazurhfango hã ikũwã umum uazurhfa atɔ̃ɔ̃.>
19.19: <<Uteiyanga agɔr unga agɛ, <Ĩhĩĩ, ungo udɛ̃ɛ̃, ugãrhũ uwuku uze, ubinkutsu ungo uweɔ ri idzidzɛrhe ru ubin ukpuku uci, umum iwuri ĩdzaamum ungo iyɛrhe itepa itɔ̃ɔ̃.>
19.20: <<Mɔcɛ ugãrhũ uwɔɔ aba agɛ, <A uteiya, imang uazurhfango hã iyɛ, umum iwɔke ru utatorho.
19.21: Umum igũ iwei ungo, ungo ughong ikorhi ifɛrhɛ. Nu ubema abinkɛ ungo uku usi ingwɛ̃ɔ, nu ugbɛrɔ ubinkpi ungo uku usi idosɔ.>
19.22: <<Unga agɔr unga agɛ, <Ungo ugãrhã uwuku utãrhã, umum ikũ arherhe angwĩngo itsu ungo uvau. Ungo uhwɛngngo umum ighong ikorhi ifɛrhɛ, ni ibee abinkɛ umum iki isi ingwɛ̃mum, ni ĩgbɛtũ abinkɛ umum iki isi idoimum?
19.23: Awu use utsu ungo isi itsukukɔ imangmum ru ubanki, umum iki iba icɛrɛ iyɛi ngge nggu angwĩngge?>
19.24: <<Mɔcɛ unga agɔr abika adɛ̃ɛ̃ umɔ agɛ, <Àka ayɛise imang uazurhfamum unying hã ru unga, àka adzowe ru uwɔrɔ uwu uazurhfa usɔka.>
19.25: <<Umbɔ agɔr unga agɛ, <A uteiya, awea ra uazurhfa usɔka.>
19.26: <<Unga agɛ, <Umum idɛyiwa umbi, uwuruwi aka awe ru ihwihwɛng awuri itomuwe unga akpo arhɛrhɛ. Uwuruwi aka ashia, awuri iyɛse ungwɛ̃rhĩ ihwihwɛng ha unga aka awerangge.
19.27: Icɛrɛ, anggamtsakmum aka asi ibemumbɔ umum iki iwu uyɛrhambɔ, àka akũna umbɔ aba nggɛɛ na afɛre umbɔ ra asumum.> >> Uyesu atsĩ ru Urusharhima (Umat 21.1-11; Umar 11.1-11; Uyoh 12.12-19)
19.28: Uyesu aka arherhe akɛrɛ amaa, unga agbaashia azĩã ufã Urusharhima.
19.29: Unga aka ayoka uteu iyiki ici iyi Ubetafaji nu Ubetani udiki igũ iyɔrɔ umbɔ iki iyisa agɛ Igũ Acucii Uzaitun, unga adene angwɛ̃ imesanga avaa agɔr umbɔ agɛ,
19.30: <<Àka atsĩ ru uteu ukpuku uci nggɔɔ ra asumbi, ubɛn itsitsĩmbi, umbi awuri inyãmbi ungwɛ̃ uzhika aka abow adɛ̃ɛ̃, uwuruwi unera anasi ifũã umgbɔ. Aka agarha umgbɔ akũ aba nggɛɛ.
19.31: Unera aba arhusunga umbi agɛ, <Awu use utsu umbi agarha umgbɔ?> Àka adɛyiwe unga ugɛ, <Awu Uteijee abeea umgbɔ.> >>
19.32: Abɔrɔ unga aka adene umbɔ agbaashia, azĩ anyã umgbɔ ru nyaka unga aka adɛyiwe umbɔ.
19.33: Umbɔ aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ igarhu ungwɛ̃ uzhika ha, abi uzhika ha arhusa umbɔ agɛ, <<Awu use utsu umbi anu igarhu ungwɛ̃ uzhika ha?>>
19.35: Umbɔ akũ umgbɔ aba ru Uyesu, abɛtuwe atorhambɔ nu undzingmgbɔ, Uyesu afũ asei nu umgbɔ.
19.36: Unga awu ru uzãrhã, anera abɛtuwe atorhambɔ nu utsĩndĩã.
19.37: Ivangyɛ unga aka aba akhapa ri icipa ri Igũ Acucii Uzaitun, kishoo ikikɔng angwɛ̃ imesa atsĩmbɔ anggɔm, akpoi Unum nggu irhɛm ikerketangge ra abin idzeu kishoo umbɔ aka anyã.
19.38: Agɔr agɛ, <<Idorh iwe nggu uyɛrhe uwi aka aba ri itsok Uteijee! Ididɔɔr ra afã, nu ikpikpoi afafã!>>
19.39: Bɔr abi Ufarisi abɔɔ ri ikikɔnga agɔr Uyesu agɛ, <<A umarhem, utsɛrha angwɛ̃ imesango!>>
19.40: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umum idɛyiwa umbi, abɛrɛ ha aba anukutata, atarh awuri idze aciuke.>>
19.41: Unga aka ayoka Urusharhima na anyã utepa, unga aciu akpe uteu ha.
19.42: Na agɛ, <<Uda umbi awuri ihwɛngmbi abinkɛ aki ikũwã ididɔɔr! Bɔr nggayɛ umbi asi idɛ̃ɛ̃ anyãmbi.
19.43: Inuma niyɔ ibarɔ anggamtsakmbi awuri idzin ufɔm adzipa umbi. Abi iwa awuri ikena umbi amaa inanga, na ayɔm umbi.
19.44: Awuri ikwɛr umbi atar nu abĩ, umbi nggu awɛkaci ra abangdzinmbi. Asi ínekukumbɔ utarh unying nu undɔkakpɔ, ubinkutsu umbi asi ihwɛngmbi ivang ibiba Unum ru umbi.>> Uyesu ri Iya-Num (Umat 21.12-17; Umar 11.15-19; Uyoh 2.13-22)
19.45: Mɔcɛ unga atsĩ ru ufɔm Iya-Num, na awayiwe abika agoyiwe abin.
19.46: Agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Atsɛngmbɔ agɛ, <Iyamum iwu iya iki ifɛn-Num, > bɔr umbi atsu ike iwe anang awoi avɛu! >>
19.47: Ubɛn unuma unga amesuwe ru ufɔm Iya-Num. Bɔr ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num, nu abika amesuwe Ikpem nu anggbaashi anera abee ifɛr unga.
19.48: Rimi hã asi ikpombɔ udĩkpi umbɔ aka ikorhe, ubinkutsu anera kishoo ayurhi ra arherhanga.

20.1: Unuma nukpɔ unga aka anu imesuwe anera ru ufɔm Iya-Num, unga aka adzowe Isarhe Iyiki Ize, ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num na abika amesuwe Ikpem Umusa nu akakũmbɔ, aba agɔr unga agɛ,
20.2: <<Udɛyiwa umɛn ungo ukũ ijee iyikisong ukorhi ifɛrha iyɛrɛ ha? Ungamɔ adzaa ungo ijeea?>>
20.3: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umum ibee irhusa umbi, àka adɛyiwa umum.
20.4: Ubɔtisima Uyohana udzeka afã use udzeka anera?>>
20.5: Umbɔ akɛki itsũwã nggu adɔkambɔ, agɛ, <<Umɛn iba igɔr ugɛ, <Udzek ra afã,> unga awuri irhusa umɛn agɛ, <Awu use utsu umbi ashimbi ri imangmang ru unga?>
20.6: Bɔr umɛn iba igɔr ugɛ, <Udzek ra anera,> umɛn igũ iwei anera abɛrɛ, ubinkutsu, umbɔ anyangu Uyohana awu uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num.>>
20.7: Nggee umbɔ agɔr unga agɛ, <<Umɛn isi ihwɛngmɛn anangkɛ umgbɔ uku udze.>>
20.8: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umum igamum isi ídɛyiwamum umbi umum ikũ ijee iyikisong ikorha abin hã.>> Unyaka arherhe ri itsi abi irham imang (Umat 21.33-46; Umar 12.1-12)
20.9: Uyesu arherhuwe anera unyaka arherhe ugɛ, <<Unera nuwɔ akau icang irham inebi, na adzowuka abi irham imang, na azĩã uteu ukpɔɔ azĩ adãrhũnga.
20.10: Ivang inebi ha iki ibĩ, unga adene agãrhãnga ra abi irham imang hã agɛ, umbɔ adzowe ikpũrhã inebi ha ri icangnga, bɔr abi irham imang hã akwɛr ugãrhã hã na adene unga azĩã abok aka atãrhã.
20.11: Unga adene ugãrhũ uwu uvaa, uwu ha ikɛi umbɔ akwɛr na atsuyiwe unga atsa na awayiwe unga azĩã abok aka atãrhã.
20.12: Unga ana adene uwu untaar ikɛi, uwu ha umbɔ atsuyiwe unga isɔɔ na atare unga adzeka.
20.13: <<Mɔcɛ uner icang hã agɛ, <Umum ikorhi iguse ucɛ? Umum iwuri idene ungwɛ̃mum uwuruwi umum iki ibema, use umbɔ awuri idzowukumbɔ imor unga.>
20.14: <<Bɔr ivangyɛ abi irham imang hã aka anyã unga, umbɔ akɛki itsũwã nggu adɔkambɔ agɛ, <Uwɛrɛ unga awu uner ukam hã. Umɛn ifɛre unga nu ukam hã uwu ukpumɛn.>
20.15: Nggee umbɔ atare unga ru undzing ufɔm icang hã, na afɛre unga. <<Ude icɛ, uner icang irham hã awuri ikorha aguse nggu umbɔ?
20.16: Unga awuri iba atsĩme abi irham imang hã, na adzowe icanga ru aner abɔɔ.>> Ivangyɛ anera aka agũ rimi, umbɔ agɛ, <<Akɛrɛ ama aneke iwe rimi!>>
20.17: Uyesu arhi umbɔ, na arhusa agɛ, <<Awu use uwu agben itsɛng Arherhu-Num iki igɔr ugɛ, << <Utarhkpi abi idzin aka akpɛ̃mbɔ, ukpu ha uwu utarh angboki idzina> ?
20.18: Ubɛn unerwi aka igba ni itsi utarh ha, akpurha ashaka. Nu uwuruwi utarh ha uku igba nú unga, ukpurhu ugɔke unga.>> Arhusu ifai ikirbi abĩ ru Ukaisar (Umat 22.15-22; Umar 12.13-17)
20.19: Abika amesuwe Ikpem Umusa nu ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num abee utsĩndĩwi umbɔ aka idzur unga kanying, umbɔ ahwɛngmbɔ ugɛ arherhe unyaka arherhe akɛrɛ ri itsimbɔ. Bɔr umbɔ anu igũ iwei anera.
20.20: Adene anera azĩ akhapa ru unga, na akpeta agɛ umbɔ arhika. Abee idzur Uyesu ri irhɛm arherhanga na atsuke unga ru ubok ijee ugomna.
20.21: Nggee aner ha umbɔ aka adene arhusa unga agɛ, <<A umarhem, umɛn ihwɛngmɛn arherhango nu imesango irhika, ungo ushiɔ ri itɛngasu, ikɛi ungo umesuwe anera idzidzɛrhe ru utsĩndĩ Unum uku urhirhiki.
20.22: Irhikungge umɛn ifai ikirbi abĩ ru Ukaisar use isi irhikungge?>>
20.23: Bɔr unga anyã ikoiambɔ unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ,
20.24: <<Àka adɛyiwa ishaa imang hã. Awu uzirhzĩ ungaa, nu itsok ungamɔ iwu umɔ?>>
20.25: Umbɔ agɛ, <<Ukaisar.>> Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka adzowe Ukaisar ubin ukpu Ukaisar, na adzowe Unum ubin ukpu Unum.>>
20.26: Umbɔ afɔr idzur unga adambɔ ra arherhakɛ unga aka arherhe ra asu anera. Adzeidzeu ri idzipa arherhanga na akpurha anukutata. Arhusa arherhe isoku udzak (Umat 22.23-33; Umar 12.18-27)
20.27: Icɛ abi Usaduki agɔr agɛ isok ra akpe ishingge. Abɔɔ aba ru Uyesu arhusa agɛ,
20.28: <<A umarhem, Umusa atsɛnga umɛn agɛ, unera aba akpea na abɔruka utsɛ̃nga ashia ru ungwɛ̃, awu ufang ungwɛ̃mbɔ anyangu ukam utsɛrh ha na amare awɛkaci ru ungwɛ̃mbɔ.
20.29: Akatsak abɔɔ rabɔ utɔɔva anambɔ awu unying. Uwu inggbaashia apfunu utsɛrh, ashia ru ungwɛ̃ na akpea.
20.30: Uwu uvaa anyangu ukam utsɛrh ha na akpea rimi hã.
20.31: Mɔcɛ uwu untaar apfuna unga. Ikɛi ru nyaka ha, uwu utɔɔva apfunu utsɛrh ha na akpe asi ibɔruka ungwɛ̃.
20.33: Ru unum isok ra akpe, awuri iwu utsɛ̃ ungaa ru umbɔ? Ubinkutsu umbɔ utɔɔva ha apfunumbɔ unga.>>
20.34: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Anera ru upfung ukpirɛ apfuna na apfunuwe,
20.35: bɔr abirabɛ aka imɛ̃ɛ̃ isok ra akpe ikɛi, asei nggu upfung ukpɔrɔ uku iba asi ípfunumbɔ, asi ídzowukumbɔ ipfuna.
20.36: Umbɔ asi íbvui akpembɔ, umbɔ awu ru nyaka ípfu itser-Num. Awu angwɛ̃ Unum, umbɔ aka asok ra akpe.
20.37: Ikɛi Umusa adɛyika ugɛ abika akpe awuri isokmbɔ. Ra arherhakɛ unga aka arherhe ru ufum uku ugar urha, unga aka ayisu Uteijee, Unum uwu Uibrahim, nu Unum uwu Uishaku, nu Unum uwu Uyakubu.
20.38: Unga asi iwea Unum uwu ikom, bɔr awu Unum uwu abi urhɛ, ru unga kishoo awu ru urhɛ.>>
20.39: Abɔɔ abika amesuwe Ikpem agɛ, <<A umarhem, ungo urherhe mɔnɔ.>>
20.40: Mɔcɛ umbɔ ashimbɔ ri ikeramɛn iyiki irhusa unga arherhe akɔɔ. Ukiristo awu Ungwɛ̃ ungaa? (Umat 22.41-46; Umar 12.35-37)
20.41: Mɔcɛ Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Awuri ikorha aguse na agɔr agɛ, Ukiristo awu ungwɛ̃ Udauda?
20.42: Udauda nibikanga agɔr ru Ubvur Ambom agɛ, << <Uteijee agɔr Uteijeemum agɛ, <<Usei ru ubok ughamum,
20.43: utsɛku umum iki itsu anggamtsakngo ru andaidakngo.>> >
20.44: Udauda ayisa unga agɛ, <Uteijee>. Ude awuri ikorha aguse na awu ungwɛ̃nga?>> Uyesu ayare igoi abika amesuwe Íkpem Umusa (Umat 23.1-36; Umar 12.38-40)
20.45: Ivang anera aka anu ikpeto, Uyesu agɔr angwɛ̃ imesanga agɛ,
20.46: <<Àka angwɛ̃dzɛn nggu abika amesuwe Ikpem. Umbɔ abee itsim atorho akagɔng azɛ̃rhã, abee anera aghwe umbɔ ri inang izɛɛ, ikɛi umbɔ abee anera adzise umbɔ anang isei aka aze ra abã ifɛn-Num, nu anang isei aka aze ra anang irhowa.
20.47: Umbɔ awu abika aghawe abin atsɛ̃rhãpfu na avur ayambɔ, na adarhi ider ifɛn-Num iyi igbana. Ikpũ umbɔ awuri itsu umbɔ ufai akarhãrhã.>>

21.1: Uyesu aka abera arhi anyã, abi ubin aka atsuyi izũwãmbɔ ri ijara izũwã ru ufɔm Iya-Num.
21.2: Unga ikɛi anyã utsũwũ utsɛ̃rhãpfu iganga aka atsuke ungwɛ̃rhĩ íshaa imang ivaa umɔ.
21.3: Unga agɛ, <<Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, utsũwũ utsɛ̃rhãpfu uwurɛ atsu ananga abɔɔ kishoo.
21.4: Kishoo adzowe izũwãmbɔ ri iwu ru ubinmbɔ. Bɔr unga ri itsũwãnga, unga adzowe kishoo ubinkpi unga aka awu ra ukpɔ.>> Atsar imimaa upfung (Umat 24.1-35; Umar 13.1-31)
21.5: Angwɛ̃ imesanga abɔɔ anu irherhe arherhe ra abinkɛ umbɔ aka akũ agbishu Iya-Num, nggu atarh aka aze nu izũwãyɛ umbɔ aka adzise ru Unum, bɔr Uyesu agɛ,
21.6: <<Aba awu abin hã umbi aka azɛrhe, ivanga niyɔ ibarɔ utarh unying umbɔ asi íneke ukpɔɔ utsorhukpɔ nu undɔkakpɔ, awuri isituwe ake kishoo.>>
21.7: Umbɔ arhusa unga agɛ, <<A umarhem, ifɛrhɛ ha iwu ukang? Utsar ukpukusong ikɛi umbɔ aka inyã ri ivangyɛ ngge iki iyok?>>
21.8: Unga agɛ, <<Àka angwɛ̃dzɛn utsur umbɔ arhɛmmbɔ umbi. Ubinkutsu anera arhɛrhɛ aka iba ri itsokmum, umbɔ awuri igɔr agɛ, <Umum iwu unga,> nu <Ivanga iki iyongge.> Niba adɔsumbi umbɔ.
21.9: Umbi aba agũmbi isarhe iwa nu isoyi anang, niba agũmbi iwei. Awu ufang ifɛrhi iyɛrɛ ha igbaashia ikorhe, bɔr isok upfung isi íwengge kata.>>
21.10: Mɔcɛ unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Abĩ nggu abĩ akase awuri itang iwa nggu adɔkake. Iyɛrha abĩ nggu iyɛrha abĩ akase awuri itang iwa nggu adɔkake.
21.11: Umɔ awuri izusu upfunga akarhãrhã, ikɛi imerh nggu ikpo ri inanga irhɛirhɛ. Abin iwei ikɛi nu atsar agɔgɔngake aki idzeka afã.
21.12: <<Bɔr umbɔ awuri idzaa umbi uver, na adzowe umbi ra anang aka avarha arherhe aki abi Uyahuda na atsuke umbi ra abã ifɛn-Num nu ra agborzĩ, na atsu arherhe ri itsimbi ikɛi ra ayɛrhe nu agomna, ubinkutsu umbi awu abimum kata.
21.13: Akɛrɛ ha awuri iwu atsĩndĩkɛ umbi aka idɛyiwe umbɔ isarhe ri itsimum.
21.14: Bɔr àka atsu amɛnmbi, niba agũmbi ighong ubin umbi aka irherhe akaa atsimbi.
21.15: Ubinkutsu umum iwuri idzaamum umbi irhɛm nu itsoi arherhe akirakɛ anggamtsakmbi asi íwembɔ ru uning na akpɛ̃mbɔ.
21.16: Ateimbi, angwɛ̃mbi, abi ubãmbi, nu awɛrhambi awuri ighambɔ adakmbi. Awuri ifɛrukumbɔ abɔɔ ru umbi.
21.17: Anera kishoo awuri ikpɛ̃mbɔ umbi ri itsimum.
21.18: Bɔr igwar itsimbi unying isi ígwirngge.
21.19: Awu ibibimambi iwuri ĩdzaa umbi urhɛ.
21.20: <<Ivangyɛ umbi aba anyã abi iwa akan adziir Urusharhima, umbi ahwɛngmbi ugɛ itsitsimngge iki iyongge.
21.21: Mɔcɛ abirabɛ aka awu ru Uyahudiya atĩ afũ ra akpowa. Abirabɛ aka awu ru utepa atĩ adzeka. Nu abika awu ra awiya niba atsĩmbɔ utepa.
21.22: Ubinkutsu ivang iyiki itsu ufai riyɛ, iki itsuifɛr kishoo abinkɛ abika asɔm Arherhu-Num aka atsɛng.
21.23: Atorhmbi akatsɛrh abika awu ra ana nu abika akpɔm awɛkaci ri ivang hã! Uver akarhãrhã uwuri icipuwakpɔ nu abĩ, nu avɔm ikɛi iwuri igba ra anera.
21.24: Awuri ifɛre abɔɔ nggu akon aka ader, ikɛi awuri idzui abɔɔ akũ azĩ igãrhã ra abĩã kishoo. Atsen abi Uyahuda aba avur Urusharhima ukpɔ uwe ukpumbɔ utsɛki ivangmbɔ iki iba itsuifɛr.
21.25: <<Awuri inyãmbɔ atsar ri ishaa unum, ufɛ̃ nu idzɛɛr. Nu abĩã ikɛi, anera kishoo amɛnmbɔ awuri ida, umbɔ awuri igũ ighong akarhãrhã, ru ubvun nu ighwighwii ukau ukugɔng.
21.26: Anera awuri igbiwa uvermbɔ uzĩkpɔ iwei ra abin hã aka ikorhe ru upfung, na awuri izusa abin akagɔng afafã.
21.27: Ri ivang hã umbɔ aka inyã Ungwɛ̃-Ner iki iba ra amɛɛ nggu ijee ri ikpikpoi akarhãrhã.
21.28: Ifɛrhɛ iyɛrɛ iba itirhugge, àka agbisha adɛ̃ɛ̃ aker, ubinkutsu ivang ififɔrhmbi iki iyongge.>>
21.29: Uyesu arherhuwe umbɔ unyaka arherhe agɛ, <<Àka arhi ucucii uvorhvo nggu acucii akɔɔ kishoo.
21.30: Umbi aba anyã umgbɔ utirhi izɛɛ ayerhe aka afa, umbi nibikambi ahwɛngmbi ugɛ ikpũrhũnga isi idãrhũngge ni iba.
21.31: Rimi hã ikɛi, umbi aba anyã ifɛrhɛ iyɛrɛ ikorhungge, umbi ahwɛng agɛ Iyɛrhe Unum iki iyongge.
21.32: <<Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, udan ukpirɛ usi ítɔngkpɔ utsɛku ifɛrhɛ ha kishoo iki ikorhe.
21.33: Afã nggu abĩ awuri itɔngke, bɔr arherhamum asi ítɔngke. Arherhe isei idzɛu ivang
21.34: <<Àka angwɛ̃dzɛn, utsur amɛnmbi ayana atsĩke ri ihwihwa nu amɛn akatãrhã nu ifɛrhkɔ ibee abin upfung. Unum hã uba udzur umbi ru nyaku unggurhi.
21.35: Ubinkutsu iwuri iba ra atsi anera kishoo abika awu ru upfung.
21.36: Aka adzɛu ubɛn unuma na afɛn-Num agɛ umbi ama akpo iker iyiki ishɔɔr ri kishoo abin hã aka ikorhe, umbi awuri idɛ̃ɛ̃mbi ra asu Ungwɛ̃-Ner.>>
21.37: Ubɛn unuma Uyesu amesuwe ru ufɔm Iya-Num, nu untsuuka unga aka isaka adzeku utepa amaa utsuu ni igũyɛ umbɔ iki iyisa Igũ Acucii Uzaitun.
21.38: Ubɛn igɔ̃kpeka anera kishoo aka isaka azĩ ru ufɔm Iya-Num agũsha arherhanga.

22.1: Irhowu Uborodi ukpuku Usheru Uga iki iyongge. Umbɔ aki iyisa Irhowa Iyiki Igar Utɔng.
22.2: Ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu abika amesuwe Ikpem agũ iwei anera, nggee umbɔ abee udĩ ukpuku ufɛr Uyesu ri iwɔk.
22.3: Mɔcɛ Ushaitan atsĩ ru Uyahuda, uwu umbɔ aki iyisa Uiskariyoti, unying ra angwɛ̃ imesanga ha usɔkdũmɛn.
22.4: Uyahuda azĩ ra ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu anggbaashi abika adzɛu ufɔm Iya-Num akɛka arherhe nggu umbɔ ubinkpi unga aka ikorhe na adzowe Uyesu ru ubokmbɔ.
22.5: Umbɔ agɔm na abemi ifai unga uhwɛk.
22.6: Unga abemuwe na abee ugarha unga aka idzowe Uyesu ri ivangyɛ anera aka asi íhwɛngmbɔ. Ubin igha Irhowu iyiki Igar Utɔng (Umat 26.17-25; Umar 14.12-21; Uyoh 13.21-30)
22.7: Unum Irhowa Uborodi ukpuku isheru uga uku uba uwe, unumkpi umbɔ aka ingwã ungwɛ̃ itsurhi iyi Irhowa Iyiki Igar Utɔng adzowe idɛm-Num.
22.8: Uyesu adene Ubitru nggu Uyohana agɛ, <<Àka azĩ akorhuwa ubingha Irhowa Iyiki Igar Utɔng umɛn iki igha.>>
22.9: Umbɔ arhusa unga agɛ, <<Ungo ubee umɛn ikorhe rinɛɛ?>>
22.10: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi aba atsĩmbi ru utepa, umbi awuri igbopumbi unera aka atsã idzum amɛ̃. Àka adɔsa unga azĩ ri iyakɛ unga aka itsĩ,
22.11: àka adɛyiwe uteiya iyaa ugɛ, <Umarhem agɔr agɛ, <<Ubãã ungwɛ̃kpɔ umum iki igha Irhowa Iyiki Igar Utɔng nggu angwɛ̃ imesamum?>> >
22.12: Unga awuri idɛyiwanga nggaa ubã ri ubã afã nggu abina ru unɔrkang. Umɔ umbi aka ikorhuwa abina kishoo.>>
22.13: Umbɔ azĩmbɔ azĩ anyã abina kishoo ru nyaka Uyesu aka adɛyiwe umbɔ. Nggee umbɔ akorhu ubingha Irhowa Iyiki Igar Utɔng. Ubingha Uteijee (Umat 26.26-30; Umar 14.22-26; 1Uko 11.23-25)
22.14: Ivanga iki iwe, Uyesu nggu abi itsernga asei ra anang ubingha.
22.15: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umum iki ĩmɛni ikponi igha ubingha Irhowa Iyiki Igar Utɔng iyɛrɛ nggu umbi ni ĩdɔrhi ihwa ayetnum.
22.16: Umum idɛyiwa umbi, umum isi íbvui ighamum ngge utsɛku unumkpi ngge iki itsuifɛr ri Iyɛrhe Unum.>>
22.17: Unga anyangu ukpɛwa ha, atar uwɛɛ ru Unum na agɛ, <<Àka ayɛi agasha kishookambi.
22.18: Umum idɛyiwa umbi, umum isi íbvui ihwamum amɛ̃ inebi utsɛku Iyɛrhe Unum iki iba.>>
22.19: Na anyangu uborodi, atar uwɛɛ na atsɔka ukpɔ adzowe umbɔ, na agɛ, <<Ukpɛrɛ awu iyormum umbɔ aka adzaa ru umbi. Àka akorhe rimi hã na ayita umum.>>
22.20: Ru nyaka ha, umbɔ aka amaa igha ubingha, unga anyangu ukpɛwa agɛ, <<Ukpɛwa uwurɛ awu ibibemuwe-Num iyiki ifa iki itsuifɛr ra adzirhmum, aka idzek agba ru umbi.
22.21: Bɔr aka anyã ubok unerwi aka igha adakmum usei igha ubingha nggu umum nu utebur.
22.22: Ungwɛ̃-Ner awuri ikpe ru nyaku Unum aka abee, bɔr atorh uner ha aka agha adaknga.>>
22.23: Mɔcɛ angwɛ̃ imesa atirhi irhusa adɔkambɔ agɛ awu ungamɔ ru umbɔ awuri ikorhe akɛrɛ ha.
22.24: Ikɛi uning usomgbɔ ru umbɔ agɛ awu ungamɔ awuri iwu uwuku ugɔngmbɔ.
22.25: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Ayɛrhe atsen abi Uyahuda aka isaka adɛyiwe iyɛrhe ra anermbɔ. Anggbaashimbɔ ikɛi aka isaka ayisa atsimbɔ ugɛ umbɔ awu <abika ayike anermbɔ.>
22.26: Bɔr umbi, ishingge rimi. Uwuku ugɔnga ru umbi unga awu uwɛkucia, uyɛrhe ikɛi awu ufang unga awe ugãrhã.
22.27: Awu ungamɔ awu uwuku ugɔnga, uwuku usei na agha use ugãrhã? Asi iwea uwuku usei na agha? Bɔr umum uwe ru umbi ru nyaku ugãrhã.
22.28: Awu umbi adɛ̃ɛ̃ nggu umum ri kishoo ivang iyiki ivarha arherhamum.
22.29: Umum itsima umbi iyɛrhe, ru nyaku Utɛmum aka atsima umum iyɛrhe.
22.30: Ngge itsú umbi ama agha na ahwa nggu umum nú uteburmum, ri Iyɛrhamum, na asei ra anang isei Iyɛrhamum na avarhuwe arherhe anang usɔkdũmɛn aki Uisrairha.
22.31: <<A Usiman, a Usiman, Ushaitan aka arhusa abee itsitsɛka umbi ru nyaka umbɔ iki itsɛki itsem.
22.32: Bɔr umum iki ifɛn-Num ru ungo Usiman ugɛ, imangmango niba igbangge. Ri ivangyɛ ungo iki idzipa, ungo ufituwe angwɛ̃mbi.>>
22.33: Bɔr unga agɔr agɛ, <<A Uteijee, umum iwuri izĩ ugborzĩ nggu ungo ni ikpe nggu ungo.>>
22.34: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Umum idɛyiwa ungo Ubitru, ungo uwuri itsɛyingo ihwɛng umum idiki itaar irherɛ ni ikɔ idɔrhi igbɛr ukpee.>>
22.35: Mɔcɛ Uyesu arhusa umbɔ agɛ, <<Ivangyɛ umum iki idena umbi adzek, umbi asi inyãngumbi imang, ukpoka, nu abadak, umbi asheru use?>> Umbɔ agɛ, <<Ubin shikpɔ.>>
22.36: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Bɔr icɛrɛ ungo uba uweɔ ru ukpoki imang, unyanga nu ibɛi ikɛi, ungo uba ushiɔ ri ikon ikider, ugoshe atorhango nu ugoi unying.
22.37: Itsɛng Arherhu-Num hã iki igɔr ugɛ, <Avarha unga ra abi uvau,> awu ufang ngge itsuifɛr ri itsimum. Ĩĩ, ubinkpi umbɔ aka atsɛng ri itsimum, awu ufang ngge itsuifɛr.>>
22.38: Angwɛ̃ imesanga agɛ, <<A Uteijee, unyã akon aka aderkɛ avaa.>> Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Awu mɔnɔ.>> Uyesu afɛn-Num ni Igũ Acucii Uzaitun (Umat 26.36-46; Umar 14.32-42)
22.39: Uyesu adzek azĩ afũã Igũ Acucii Uzaitun ru nyaka unga aka abayi, angwɛ̃ imesanga asok adɔsa unga.
22.40: Unga aka azĩ atsĩ ra anang hã, unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka afɛn-Num, utsur umbi agbambi ru undeya.>>
22.41: Unga abɔre umbɔ na agɔpa azĩa anang aka ader ru nyaki itang utarh. Unga atararhu na afɛn-Num.
22.42: Agɛ, <<A Utɛ, ungo uba ubeengo, ungo uma unyanguwa ayetnum akɛrɛ. Rimi hã, asi iwea ibibeea umum bɔr ibibeea ungo ikorhe.>>
22.43: Nu ipfu itser-Num idzeka afã akapɛng ru unga ifituwe unga.
22.44: Awu ru uver akarhãrhã, na amina asunga na afɛn-Num. Izipunga idzek irhong nu abĩ ru nyaka adzirh.
22.45: Unga aka amaa ifɛn-Num na azĩ ra angwɛ̃ imesanga, unga akpo umbɔ awu ru urhɔ, azhe ida amɛn.
22.46: Unga arhusa umbɔ agɛ, <<Awu use utsu umbi arharhɔ? Àka asisok afɛn-Num utsur umbi agbambi ru undeya.>> Idzidzur Uyesu (Umat 26.47-56; Umar 14.43-50; Uyoh 18.2-11)
22.47: Anasi ibvura angwĩnga, ikikɔng anera iba, nu uner ha umbɔ iki iyisa Uyahuda, unying ru umbɔ usɔkdũmɛn hã, agbaashia ru umbɔ adɔsa. Unga aba awumu Uyesu na ashor atamnga.
22.48: Bɔr Uyesu arhusa unga agɛ, <<A Uyahuda, ungo uwuri ighadak Ungwɛ̃-Ner nggu ishor atam?>>
22.49: Ivangyɛ abika adɔsu Uyesu aka anyã ifɛrhɛ ha iki iwuri ikikorhe, umbɔ agɛ, <<A Uteijee, umɛn ikũ akon aka adermɛn ingbɛya umbɔ?>>
22.50: Unying ru umbɔ atsũ ikon iyiki idernga agbɛr ugãrhũ Ukugɔng Uwuku Udzowe Idɛm-Num, azharhuwe uto ubok ughanga.
22.51: Bɔr Uyesu agɛ, <<Ĩ'ĩ àka aneke umbɔ rimi!>> Na abangu uto ugãrhã hã akerhuwe ukpɔ.
22.52: Mɔcɛ Uyesu agɔr ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num, nu anggbaashi abika adzɛu Iya-Num, nu akakũ aka aba ru unga agɛ, <<Umbi adzeka nggu akon aka ader nu igbong ugɛɛ umbi aba idzur uvɛu?
22.53: Ubɛn unuma umum iwu nggu umbi ru ufɔm Iya-Num, umbi asi iberu ubokmbi adzurmbi umum. Bɔr awu ivangmbi riyɛ ri iyɛrhe uzĩ.>> Ubitru atsɛyinga ihwɛng Uyesu (Umat 26.57-58,69-75; Umar 14.53-54,66-72; Uyoh 18.12-18,25-27)
22.54: Mɔcɛ umbɔ adzur unga, akũna unga azĩmbɔ ri iya Ukugɔng Uwuku Udzowe Idɛm-Num. Ubitru azɛ̃rhã uku ukaa adɔsa umbɔ.
22.55: Bɔr umbɔ aka atai urha ra ateu ufɔm iya na akana asei umɔ, Ubitru asei nggu umbɔ.
22.56: Una igãrhã nuwɔ asei umɔ akhapa ru irhirhang urha, arhi Ubitru, na agɛ, <<Uner uwurɛ awu nggu unga.>>
22.57: Bɔr unga atsɛyi agɛ, <<A una hã, umum isi ihwɛng unga.>>
22.58: Ivanga ukunjiir iki itɔng, utsa uwɔɔ ikɛi anyã unga na agɛ, <<Ungo igango uwu nggu umbɔ.>> Ubitru agɛ, <<A utsak ha, umum isi iwumum nggu umbɔ!>>
22.59: Ukara unying uba utɔng, utsa uwɔɔ ikɛi agɔr agɛ, <<Asi iwea ubin itsɛi, utsak uwurɛ awu nggu unga, ubinkutsu awu utsa Ugarhirhi.>>
22.60: Ubitru agɛ, <<A utsa ha, umum isi ihwɛng ubinkpi ungo uku urherhe.>> Unga ana awu ra arherhe nu ikɔ igbɛrngge ukpee.
22.61: Uteijee adzipa arhi Ubitru. Mɔcɛ Ubitru ayitu urhɛm Uteijee aka arherhe nggu unga agɛ, <<Ungo uwuri itsɛyingo ihwɛng umum idiki itaar, ni ikɔ idɔrhi igbɛr ukpee irherɛ.>>
22.62: Unga asok adzek ra awiya na aciu na adɔng akarhãrhã. Ayɛɛi Uyesu (Umat 26.67-68; Umar 14.65)
22.63: Abirabɛ aka akpɔm Uyesu ayɛia unga na akwɛr unga.
22.64: Akũ atorho abope asunga na arhusa unga agɛ, <<Usɔm Arherhu-Num! Ungamɔ akwɛr ungo?>>
22.65: Arherhi irhɛm iyiki itãrhã irhɛirhɛ arhena unga. Uyesu ra ateu anggbaashi abi Uyahuda (Umat 26.59-66; Umar 14.55-64; Uyoh 18.19-24)
22.66: Ukpee uku usar, ikikɔng akakũ abi Uyahuda, nu ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu abika amesuwe Ikpem akɔng nu umbɔ akũ Uyesu azĩ ru umbɔ.
22.67: Umbɔ arhusa unga agɛ, <<Ungo uba uwu Ukiristo, usɔma umɛn.>> Uyesu adzipa agɔr agɛ, <<Umum iba isɔma umbi, umbi asi íwembi ri imangmang ru umum.
22.68: Umum ĩba irhusa umbi, umbi asi ídzipumbi urhɛm.
22.69: Bɔr udzur icɛrɛ uzĩ, Ungwɛ̃-Ner awuri isei ru ubok ugha Unum uwu ukugɔng.>>
22.70: Umbɔ kishoo arhusa agɛ, <<Ungo uwu Ungwɛ̃ Unum?>> Unga adzipa agɔr agɛ, <<Awu umbi arherhe.>>
22.71: Mɔcɛ umbɔ agɛ, <<Umɛn ibee ideka iyikisong ikɛi? Umɛn iki igũmɛn ra angwĩnga.>>

23.1: Mɔcɛ umbɔ kishoo asok akũna unga azĩmbɔ ru Ubirhatu.
23.2: Atirhi irhena unga agɛ, <<Umɛn inyã utsak uwurɛ adɛ̃ɛ̃ idzunuwe abimɛn. Unga agɔr agɛ anera niba afaimbɔ ikirbi abĩ ru Ukaisar, anu igɔr agɛ, unga uwu Ukiristo, uyɛrhe.>>
23.3: Nggee Ubirhatu arhusu Uyesu agɛ, <<Awu ungo uwu uyɛrha abi Uyahuda?>> Uyesu adzipa agɔr agɛ, <<Ĩĩ, iwu ru nyaka ha ungo uku urherhe.>>
23.4: Mɔcɛ Ubirhatu agɔr ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu arhɛrha anera kishoo agɛ, <<Umum isi ikpomum ubin uvau ru utsak uwurɛ.>>
23.5: Umbɔ ana angipa unga agɛ, <<Unga asoyiwe amɛn anera nggu imesanga ru Uyahudiya kishoo. Atirhi ru Ugarhirhi na aba atsĩã nggimi.>> Uyesu ra asu Uhiridu
23.6: Ubirhatu aka agũ rimi, unga arhusa agɛ use awu utsa Ugarhirhi.
23.7: Unga aka agũ agɛ Uyesu awu ri ijee iyɛrhe Uhiridu, unga adene umbɔ akũna unga azĩmbɔ ru Uhiridu, aka awu ru Urusharhima ri ivang hã.
23.8: Uhiridu aka anyã Uyesu, unga agɔm akarhãrhã, ubinkutsu aka adãrhũnga unga aka abee inyã unga. Unga aka agũã isarhanga, unga abee inyã abin idzeukɛ Uyesu aka ikorhe ra asunga.
23.9: Unga arhusa unga arherhe arhɛrhɛ, bɔr unga asi idzipunga urhɛm.
23.10: Ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu abika amesuwe Ikpem adɛ̃ɛ̃ atsuyi arherhe uvau akeketake nu Uyesu.
23.11: Mɔcɛ Uhiridu nggu abi iwanga anyã Uyesu uku ukwɛɛr na ayɛia unga. Atsime unga atorho iyɛrhe, na adene umbɔ akũna unga azĩmbɔ nu Ubirhatu ikɛi.
23.12: Ru unum hã umbɔ Uhiridu nggu Ubirhatu aka awu awɛrhɛ adɔka. Rimɔ̃ɔ̃ umbɔ awe ru igamtsak. Atsu ufai akpe ru Uyesu (Umat 27.15-26; Umar 15.6-15; Uyoh 18.39—19.16)
23.13: Ubirhatu ayisa ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num, nu anggbaashi anera nu anera kishoo.
23.14: Agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi akũ utsak uwurɛ aba agɛ unga anu idzunuwe anera. Umum irhusa unga ra asumbi isi ikpomum uvau ru unga ru arherhambi aka akũ aba ri itsinga.
23.15: Uhiridu ikɛi asi ikpoa uvau ru unga, unga abvui adene unga aba ru umɛn. Umbi anyãmbi, unga asi ikorhunga ubin ukpuku utsu ufai akpe.
23.16: Nggee, umum ikwɛre unga ugwɛɛ ni itsũwe unga.>>
23.18: Nggu urhɛma unying umbɔ atsu ivum, anu igɔr agɛ, <<Àka afɛre utsak uwurɛ, nu atsũwã umɛn Ubaraba.>>
23.19: Ubinkpi uku utsu umbɔ atsuke Ubaraba ru ugborzĩ, unga atsu abika abee itsũwe iyɛrha abĩã afɛre anera.
23.20: Ubirhatu abee itsũwe Uyesu, nggee unga ashɔ̃rhã umbɔ ikɛi.
23.21: Bɔr umbɔ abvui atsu ivum agɛ, <<Anyapuwe unga! Anyapuwe unga!>>
23.22: Unga abvui arherhe ide untaar agɛ, <<Awu use utsu? Akorhu use iyiki ibewe? Umum isi inyãmum uvau akpe ru unga. Nggee umum iwuri ikwɛre unga ugwɛɛ ni itsũwe unga.>>
23.23: Bɔr umbɔ atsarhi irhakmbɔ angipa abee umbɔ anyapuwe Uyesu nu igãrhãmau ucucii, ivummbɔ itsu ngge iwe rimi.
23.24: Nggee Ubirhatu atsukuka ufai akpe ru Uyesu ubinkpi umbɔ aka abee.
23.25: Unga atsũwũka uner ha umbɔ aka arhusa, na adzowe Uyesu umbɔ akorhu ubinkpi umbɔ aka abee. Inyinyapu Uyesu (Umat 27.32-44; Umar 15.21-32; Uyoh 19.17-27)
23.26: Abi iwa aka akũ Uyesu adzek, umbɔ adzur Usiman utsa Usayirin aka adzeku usi atsĩwã ru utepa, umbɔ atsu unga atsã igãrhãmau ucucii ha adɔsu Uyesu.
23.27: Arhɛrha anera adɔsa unga, nu akatsɛrh abɔɔ atsorha abok nu atsimbɔ aciu akpenga.
23.28: Bɔr Uyesu adzipa agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi ana Urusharhima, àka aneke iciupa umum akpe. Àka aciu akpe atsimbi nggu awɛkacimbi.
23.29: Ubinkutsu ivanga niyɔ ibarɔ umbɔ aka igɔr agɛ, <Idorh iwe nggu akatsɛrh abirabɛ aka awu akpirh, abirabɛ aka anasi imarmbɔ imar, nu abirabɛ umbɔ aka anasi iyammbɔ abɛ̃mbɔ!>
23.30: Mɔcɛ << <umbɔ awuri igɔr ígũ agɛ, <<Àka agba nú umɛn!>> Ikɛi na agɔr ampfũwã akagɔng agɛ, <<Àka atsire umɛn!>> >
23.31: Anera aba akorhe rimi ri ivangyɛ ucucii ha aka ana awu uku usum, awuri ikorha aguse ri ivangyɛ ngge iki ikoyi?>>
23.32: Abɔɔ inera ivaa awu avɛu, akũ umbɔ azĩ ifɛre nggu unga.
23.33: Umbɔ aka azĩ atsĩ ra anang hã umbɔ iki iyisa agɛ, <<Upfupfu Itsia.>> Umɔ umbɔ aka anyapuwe unga nu igãrhãmau ucucii nggu avɛu ha, unying ru ubok ugha, unying ru ubok ufer.
23.34: Uyesu agɛ, <<A Utɛ, utsũwe umbɔ amɔrmbɔ ubinkpi umbɔ aka akorhe.>> Umbɔ agasha atorhanga nggu itang isɛng.
23.35: Anera adesa na azɛrhe, anggbaashi acata unga agɛ, <<Unga afɔrhuka abɔɔ, uneke unga afɔrhe itsinga unga aba awu Ukiristo, uwuruwi Unum aka asɛng!>>
23.36: Abi iwa agɔpa afũ ayɛia unga ikɛi. Azĩ adzowe amɛ̃ inebi akika agbata.
23.37: Umbɔ agɛ, <<Ungo uba uwu uyɛrha abi Uyahuda, ufɔrh itsikamngo!>>
23.38: Afafã itsinga umbɔ atsɛng itsɛng agɛ, <<UWƐRƐ AWU UYƐRHA ABI UYAHUDA.>>
23.39: Unying ru umbɔ avɛu ha umbɔ aka anyapuwe arherhe arherhe aka atãrhã agɛ, <<Asi iwea ungo uwu Ukiristo? Ufɔrh itsingo nggu umɛn!>>
23.40: Bɔr uvɛu uwu uvaa atsɛrha unga agɛ, <<Hɛ, ungo usi igũo iwei Unum, ufaingo uku uwu ubina unying nggu unga?
23.41: Umɛn ihwa uvermɛn mɔnɔ, umɛn ifai ubinkpi umɛn iki ikorhe. Bɔr utsak uwurɛ ashia ru uvau.>>
23.42: Mɔcɛ unga agɛ, <<Uyesu, uyita umum ri ivang Iyɛrhango.>>
23.43: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Umum indɛyiwa ungo idzidzɛrhe, irherɛ ungo uwuri iwu nggu umum ra afã.>> Akpe Uyesu (Umat 27.45-56; Umar 15.33-41; Uyoh 19.28-30)
23.44: Awu idzingga atenuma, uzĩ udze utsire ananga kishoo utsɛku akara ataar aki urhɛɛ,
23.45: ishaa unum isi irhangngge. Nu urhaburhe ukpuku uwe ri Iya-Num uvaar agbɛra avaa.
23.46: Uyesu atsarhi irhaknga akarhãrhã ayisa agɛ, <<A Utɛ, umum itsuka ipfumum ru ubokngo.>> Unga aka arherhe rimi amaa, unga akpea.
23.47: Uteiya abi iwa ha aka anyã ifɛrhɛ ha iki ikorhe, unga akpoi Unum agɔr agɛ, <<Awu idzidzɛrhe utsak uwurɛ arhiku uner.>>
23.48: Ri ivang hã umbɔ kishoo aka akɔng umɔ ra anang hã, anyãmbɔ ifɛrhɛ ha iki ikorhe, umbɔ akwɛr ikɔkmbɔ na azĩmbɔ akimbɔ.
23.49: Bɔr kishoo abika ahwɛng unga, utoma nggu akatsɛrh abirabɛ aka adɔsa unga adzeka abĩ Ugarhirhi, adɛ̃ɛ̃ ukuka, na azɛrhi ifɛrha ha. Igwirhuwe Uyesu (Umat 27.57-61; Umar 15.42-47; Uyoh 19.38-42)
23.50: Unera nuwɔ itsoknga igburh Uyusuf, unying ru umbɔ akakũ abi Uyahuda, bɔr awu ra amɛn na arhiku uner,
23.51: unga asi ibemunga ubinkpi abimbɔ aki ikorhe. Unga adzeka abĩ Uyahuda, uteu Uarimatiya, na adzɛu Iyɛrhe Unum.
23.52: Unga asok azĩã ru Ubirhatu arhusa umbɔ adzowe ukom Uyesu.
23.53: Mɔcɛ unga acipuwe ukom hã, na akũ atorho aka aze abɛrh ukpɔ, na atsuke ukpɔ ru udzak. Udzak ha uwe ru utai umbɔ aka asim ni ifa, ukpurukpi umbɔ aka anasi itsumbɔ unera umɔ.
23.54: Unum hã uwu unum igbisha abin, unum ukpuku uwosha uku uyokpɔ.
23.55: Akatsɛrh ha aka adzeka abĩ Ugarhirhi adɔsu Uyesu, asok adɔsu Uyusuf azĩ anyã udzaka na anyã ininu ukom iyornga uku unu umɔ.
23.56: Mɔcɛ umbɔ abvui azĩmbɔ ri iya azĩ agbisha atsei isung na atsei akika adzuka. Ru unum ukpuku uwoshambɔ, umbɔ awosha ri ikpem.

24.1: Ru unum inggbaashia ri inuma utɔɔva, ri igɔ̃kpeka, akatsɛrh ha anyanga abinkɛ umbɔ aka agbisha azĩmbɔ ru udzaka.
24.2: Umbɔ akpo utarh ukpuku utsim ru udzaka uku ugɔ̃rhũkpɔ.
24.3: Bɔr umbɔ aka atsĩ, umbɔ asi inyãmbɔ ukom Uteijee Uyesu.
24.4: Umbɔ ana awe ri idzeu ifɛrhɛ ha, kanying inera ivaa idɛ̃ɛ̃ ikhapa ru umbɔ, itsim atorho aka aterha ake arhang ru nyaki ishaa unum.
24.5: Akatsɛrh ha agũ iwei na asũrhã atsimbɔ ra abĩ, aner ha agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Awu use utsu umbi abee uner urhɛ ra abika akpukpe?
24.6: Unga ashia nggimi, unga aka asoka! Aka ayitu ubinkpi unga aka adɛyiwa umbi, unga aka awu nggu umbi ru Ugarhirhi.
24.7: Agɛ awu ufang umbɔ aka idzowe Ungwɛ̃-Ner ra abi arhim, umbɔ anyapuwe unga nu igãrhãmau ucucii, ru unum untaar unga awuri isoka ikɛi.>>
24.9: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka apfuri ra anang udzaka abambɔ asɔme abɔrɔ udom hã (11), angwɛ̃ imesanga, nu irhɛ abɔɔ ifɛrha ha.
24.10: Awu umbɔ Umaryamu Umagadarha, nggu Uyowana, nu Umaryamu uyisa Uyaku, nu akatsɛrh abɔɔ aka awu nggu umbɔ, umbɔ asɔme abi itser Uyesu ifɛrha ha.
24.11: Bɔr umbɔ asi ibemumbɔ idzidzɛrhe akatsɛrh ha, ubinkutsu umbɔ anyanga arherhe ha awu isheri itsi.
24.12: Bɔr Ubitru asok atĩ azĩã ru udzaka, agba apfu, na anyã atorho ukpekũ, na abvui azĩã adzeidzeu ifɛrha ha iki iwe. Nú utsĩndĩ Uimawu (Umar 16.12-13)
24.13: Ru unum hã ikɛi inera ivaa abika adɔsu Uyesu aka azɛ̃rhã awuri izĩ ungwɛ̃rhũ uteu ukpɔɔ ugburh Uimawu. Iderkpɔ iyongge akirhomita usɔka nu unying uzĩ Urusharhima.
24.14: Umbɔ anu irherhe nggu adɔka ru ubɛn ubinkpi uku ukorhe.
24.15: Umbɔ aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ irherha arherhe ifɛrhɛ ha nggu adɔkambɔ, Uyesu nibikanga adzeka aba azɛ̃rhã nggu umbɔ.
24.16: Bɔr Uyesu asi ibeenga umbɔ ahwɛng ugɛ awu unga.
24.17: Unga arhusa umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi azɛ̃rhã na ani irherhu use ikivarhambi?>> Umbɔ atsurha adɛ̃ɛ̃, unyɛ̃ɛ̃mbɔ ughɔrhe.
24.18: Unying itsoka igburh Ukirhiyoba, arhusa unga agɛ, <<Awu ungo ikiyikango uwu utsen ru Urusharhima ungo uku usi ihwɛngngo ifɛrha ha iki ikorhe umɔ inum iyɛrɛ?>>
24.19: Unga arhusa umbɔ agɛ, <<Ifɛrhu use?>> Umbɔ agɛ, <<Arherhu Uyesu uner Unazarat, uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num, uner ijee ra arherhe nu ikikorhe ra asu Unum na anera kishoo.
24.20: Ikɛi ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu anggbaashi abɔɔ aka adzowe unga ra abi ijee Uroma, umbɔ atsuke unga ufai akpe, na anyapuwe unga nu igãrhãmau ucucii.
24.21: Bɔr umɛn ifosa ugɛ unga awuri ifai Uisrairha. Utoma rimi, ifɛrha ha iki ikorhe kishoo unum untaar nukpi.
24.22: Utoma rimi, akatsɛrhmɛn abɔɔ adzaa umɛn idzeu. Umbɔ azĩmbɔ ru udzaka ri igɔ̃ ukpea ukpirɛ,
24.23: bɔr umbɔ asi ikpombɔ ukom iyornga. Umbɔ asok aba agɔr umɛn ugɛ umbɔ anyãmbɔ irhi, ípfu itser-Num igɔr umbɔ igɛ awu nggu urhɛ.
24.24: Mɔcɛ abimɛn abɔɔ asok azĩmbɔ ru udzaka azĩ anyã rimi hã ru nyaka akatsɛrh ha aka arherhe, bɔr umbɔ asi inyãmbɔ unga.>>
24.25: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi adzunu use umbi rimi, amɛnmbi adɔ̃rhũ use rimi, ri iwe ru imangmang abinkɛ kishoo abika asɔm Arherhu-Num aka arherhe!
24.26: Asi iwea ufang Ukiristo aka ihwa ayetnum ri ifɛrha ha na atsĩ ri ikpikpoinga?>>
24.27: Na atirhi ru imesu Umusa nu iyi abika asɔm Arherhu-Num kishoo, asɔme umbɔ arherhe akirakɛ aka awe ri itsinga ri itsɛng Arherhu-Num kishoo.
24.28: Umbɔ aka ayoku ungwɛ̃rhũ uteu ha umbɔ aka izĩ, unga akorhe ugɛɛ unga awuri itɔng.
24.29: Umbɔ angipa unga agɔr agɛ, <<Usei nggu umɛn, unuma aka amaanga.>> Nggee unga azĩ asesa nggu umbɔ.
24.30: Ivangyɛ unga aka asei igha ubingha nggu umbɔ, unga anyangu uborodi, atar uwɛɛ adzowe Unum, na atsɔka adzowe umbɔ.
24.31: Mɔcɛ asumbɔ ayanga, umbɔ ahwɛng unga ikɛi, nu unga agwira ri inyĩnyãmbɔ.
24.32: Umbɔ arhusa adɔkambɔ agɛ, <<Anggɔm asi itsu amɛnmɛn ayiruke ri ivangyɛ unga aka arherhe arherhe nggu umɛn ru utsĩndĩ na amesuwa umɛn itsɛng Arherhu-Num?>>
24.33: Kanying umbɔ asok azĩmbɔ Urusharhima, umbɔ azĩ akpo abɔrɔ udom hã (11) ananga unying na abirabɛ aka awu nggu umbɔ.
24.34: Anu igɔr agɛ, <<Awu idzidzɛrhe! Uteijee aka asoka, adzekanga ru Usiman!>>
24.35: Mɔcɛ umbɔ ikivarhambɔ adzowe isarhe ubinkpi uku ukorhe ru utsĩndĩ, ru nyaka umbɔ aka ahwɛng Uyesu ri itsɔku uborodi. Uyesu adzeka ra angwɛ̃ imesanga (Umat 28.16-20; Umar 16.14-18; Uyoh 20.19-23; Aiy 1.6-8)
24.36: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ irherha arherhe ifɛrha ha, akpurha anyã Uyesu akapɛng adɛ̃ɛ̃ ra ateumbɔ, na agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Ididɔɔr iwe nggu umbi.>>
24.37: Bɔr umbɔ agbipa iwei ifɛr umbɔ, umbɔ akaifɛrhkɔ agɛ umbɔ anyã imãrhã.
24.38: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Awu use utsu umbi agũ iwei, awu use umbi anu icang ikɛi ra amɛnmbi?
24.39: Àka arhi abokmum, nu adakmum. Awu umum nibikami! Àka abanga umum agũ. Imãrhã ishingge ri ijuɛ nggu apfupfu ru nyaka umbi aka agũ ru umum.>>
24.40: Ivangyɛ unga aka arherhe rimi, unga adɛyiwe umbɔ aboknga nu adaknga.
24.41: Bɔr umbɔ ana acang ra amɛnmbɔ, ri itsi anggɔm nu idzeu akarhãrhã, unga arhusa umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi awembi ru ubingha ri nggimi?>>
24.42: Umbɔ adzowe unga awushu ubɛrh uwuku uvum.
24.44: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Arherhamum ha rakɛ, umum iki idɛyiwa umbi rimɔ̃ɔ̃ umum iki iwu nggu umbi. Ugɛ awu ufang abina kishoo aka itsuafɛr ri itsimum umbɔ aka atsɛng ri Íkpem Umusa, nu abvur abika asɔm Arherhu-Num, nu Ambom.>>
24.45: Mɔcɛ unga ayanguwe amɛnmbɔ umbɔ ahwɛng itsɛng Arherhu-Num.
24.46: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Itsɛng hã iyɛ iki itsɛng igɛ awu ufang Ukiristo aka ihwa ayetnum na asoka ra akpe ru unum untaar.
24.47: Ni igɛ idzidzipa nu itsũwe arhim awuri idzowe isarhangge ri itsoknga, ra abĩã kishoo, awuri itirhi ru Urusharhima.
24.48: Awu umbi awuri idekuwe anera ifɛrha iyɛrɛ.
24.49: Umum iwuri idenukũ ubinkpi Utɛmum aka abemuwa, bɔr aka adãrhã ru utepa utsɛku umbi aka iyɛi ijee iyiki idzeka afã.>> Ififũ Uyesu ra afã (Umar 16.19-20; Aiy 1.9-11)
24.50: Ivangyɛ unga aka akũna umbɔ adzek azĩ akhapa ru Ubetani, unga abera aboka atsuke idorh ru umbɔ.
24.51: Unga aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ itsuke umbɔ idorh, umɔ unga abɔruka umbɔ, ashupa unga afũmbɔ ra afã.
24.52: Mɔcɛ umbɔ adzowe unga igɔng na apfuri azĩmbɔ Urusharhima nggu anggɔm akarhãrhã.
24.53: Ubɛn unuma ikɛi umbɔ akɔng ru ufɔm Iya-Num anu ikpoi Unum.

1.1: Ri inggbaashia Urhɛm uwekpɔ, Urhɛm hã uwu nggu Unum, urhɛm hã uwu Unum.
1.2: Unga awu nggu Unum ri inggbaashia.
1.3: Awu ru uboknga umbɔ aka amuna abina kishoo. Agɛ unga ashia, ubin usi ímunukpɔ ra abin hã umbɔ aka amuna.
1.4: Ru unga urhɛ uwemgbɔ, urhɛ ha awu irhirhang ra anera kishoo.
1.5: Irhirhang hã irhang ru uzĩ, bɔr uzĩ hã usi ihwɛngkpɔ ngge.
1.6: Unera nuwɔ Unum aka adene unga aba. Itsoknga igburh Uyohana.
1.7: Unga aba awu ideka ri irhirhang hã, nggee ru uboknga anera kishoo ama awe ru imangmang.
1.8: Unga asi iwea irhirhang hã. Unga aba awu ideka irhirhang hã ukpekũ.
1.9: Uwu ha aka awe irhirhang iyi idzidzɛrhe aka abanga ru upfung. Unga aka idzowe irhirhang ru anera kishoo ru upfung.
1.10: Urhɛm hã uwe ru upfung. Upfunga umuna ru uboknga, bɔr upfung hã usi ihwɛngkpɔ unga.
1.11: Unga aba ru upfungkpi uku uwe ukpunga, bɔr anernga asi iyɛimbɔ unga.
1.12: Rimi hã kishoo abika ayɛi unga, nu abika adzowe imangmang ri itsoknga, unga adzowuka umbɔ ijee umbɔ awe angwɛ̃ Unum.
1.13: Awu Unum abema ngge iwe rimi ngge itsu umbɔ awu angwɛ̃nga, asi iwea imar iyi anera, use ikponi iyor, use isisɛng anera itsu umbɔ awu angwɛ̃ Unum.
1.14: Urhɛm hã uwu unera nu usei nggu umɛn. Umɛn inyãmɛn igɔngnga, igɔngyɛ iki iwu iyi unanyĩ Ungwɛ̃wi aka adzeku Utɛ. Awu nggu imimuta nu idzidzɛrhe.
1.15: Uyohana adzowuka ideka ri itsinga. Atsarhi irhaknga agɛ, <<Uwɛrɛ awu unga hã umum iki irherha arherhe ri itsinga ri ivangyɛ umum iki ĩgɔr ugɛ, <Uwuruwi aka iba ru undzingmum ananga umum, ubinkutsu awea umbɔ adɔrha amar umum.> >>
1.16: Umɛn kishoo iyɛi idorh irhɛirhɛ iki idzeku imimutanga.
1.17: Adzaa Íkpem ru ubok Umusa, bɔr imimuta nu idzidzɛrhe idzeku ubok Uyesu Ukiristo.
1.18: Unera anasi inyãã Unum, bɔr unanyi Ungwɛ̃nga adɛyiwa umɛn iwiwe Unum. Unanyi Ungwɛ̃ hã akhapa nggu Unum Utɛ, unga itsikamnga awu Unum. Uyohana atsɛyinga iwe Ukiristo (Umat 3.1-12; Umar 1.1-8; Irh 3.1-18)
1.19: Ideka Uyohana iyɛ, ri ivangyɛ abi ijee Uyahuda ru Urusharhima adene abika adzowe idɛm-Num abɔɔ nu abi Urhawi ru Uyohana arhusa unga agɛ, <<Ungo uwu ungamɔ?>>
1.20: Uyohana adekuwe umbɔ ra awiya agɛ, <<Asi iwea umum iwu Ukiristo.>>
1.21: Umbɔ arhusa unga agɛ, <<Ungo uwu ungamɔ? Awu ungo uwu Uirhiya?>> Unga agɛ, <<Ĩ'ĩ.>> Umbɔ arhusa ikɛi agɛ, <<Awu ungo uwu uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num hã Umusa aka arherhe ugɛ ibanga?>> Unga agɛ, <<Ĩ'ĩ.>>
1.22: Umbɔ agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ude ungo uwu ungamɔ? Udɛyiwa ubinkpi umɛn iki izĩ idɛyiwe abika adena umɛn. Ungo udɛyiwa umɛn use ri itsingo?>>
1.23: Uyohana akũ arherhe uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num Uishaya agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Awu umum iwu urhɛmkpi uku idũwã ra arhum ugɛ, <Àka agbishu utsĩndĩ Uteijee uku urhirhiki.> >>
1.24: Mɔcɛ abi Ufarisi ha umbɔ aka adene,
1.25: arhusu Uyohana agɛ, <<Awu use utsu ungo usorhuwe ubɔtisima uba ungo usi iweɔ Ukiristo, ikɛi ungo usi iweɔ Uirhiya, ikɛi ungo usi iweɔ uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num hã Umusa aka arherhe ugɛ ibanga?>>
1.26: Uyohana agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umum isorhuwe ubɔtisima nggu amɛ̃, bɔr uwɔɔ ruwɔ ru umbi, uwuruwi umbi aka asi ihwɛngmbi unga.
1.27: Unga awuri iba ru undzingmum, uwuruwi umum isi ímɛ̃mum igarhuwe arhi abadaknga.>>
1.28: Kishoo akɛrɛ ha akorhe ru Ubetani, ugar Azɛ̃ Urdun, anangkɛ Uyohana aki isorhuwe ubɔtisima. Uyesu Ungwɛ̃ Itsurhi Unum
1.29: Ukpe uku usar, Uyohana anyã Uyesu aka azɛ̃rhã aba ra anangnga, Uyohana agɛ, <<Àka anyã, Ungwɛ̃ Itsurhi Unum uwuruwi aka itsũwe arhim upfunga!
1.30: Uwɛrɛ awu unga hã nuwi umum iki ĩgɔr ĩgɛ, <Uwɔɔ ruwɔ aba ru undzingmum ananga umum, ubinkutsu, unga aka awea umbɔ adɔrha amar umum.>
1.31: Umum isi ihwɛng unga, bɔr umum iki isorhu ubɔtisima nggu amɛ̃ ngge ítsu abi Uisrairha ama ahwɛng unga.>>
1.32: Mɔcɛ Uyohana adzowe ideka iyɛrɛ agɛ, <<Umum inyã Ipfu-Num iki icipuwa ru nyaku unurhɛu ra afã, iba isei nu unga.
1.33: Umum isi ihwɛng unga, bɔr Unum uwuku udena umum ĩba isorhu ubɔtisima nggu amɛ̃, unga agɔr umum agɛ, <Utsakwi ungo uku unyã Ipfu-Num icipuwa iseingge nu unga, awu unga hã nuwɔ aka isorhuwe ubɔtisima nggu Ipfu Isarsatangge.>
1.34: Umum inyãmum ngge iki iwe rimi hã ni iwemum ri ideka ugɛ unga awu Ungwɛ̃ Unum.>> Angwɛ̃ imesa Uyesu abi inggbaashia (Umat 4.18-22; Umar 1.16-20; Irh 5.2-11)
1.35: Ukpe uku usar ikɛi Uyohana adɛ̃ɛ̃ nggu angwɛ̃ imesanga avaa.
1.36: Unga aka anyã Uyesu aka azɛ̃rhã atɔng, unga agɛ, <<Àka anyã, Ungwɛ̃ Itsurhi Unum!>>
1.37: Angwɛ̃ imesa ha ikivarhambɔ aka agũ arherhe Uyohana, umbɔ adɔsu Uyesu.
1.38: Uyesu aka adzipa arhi undzingnga, anyã umbɔ aka adɔsa unga, unga arhusa umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi abee use?>> Umbɔ agɛ, <<Rabbi, ungo usei ri inɛɛ?>> Agben <<Rabbi>> agburh <<A umarhem.>>
1.39: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka aba, umbi awuri inyãmbi.>> Nggee angwɛ̃ imesa ha azĩ anyã anangkɛ unga aka asei. Umbɔ atsĩ umɔ ra akara annaa aki urhɛɛ na asei nggu unga unum hã.
1.40: Uandarawu, ungwɛ̃mbɔ Usiman Ubitru, awu umɔ ri iner ha ikivarhangge iki igũ arherhe Uyohana ri itsi Uyesu ni idɔsa unga.
1.41: Uandarawu atirha abee ungwɛ̃mbɔ Usiman, agɔr unga agɛ, <<Umɛn iki ikpomɛn Uarhmasihu,>> agbena agburh <<Ukiristo.>>
1.42: Unga akũ Usiman azĩã ru Uyesu. Uyesu arhi unga na agɛ, <<Ungo uwu Usiman ungwɛ̃ Uyohana. Awuri iyisa ungo Ukefa,>> agbena aka agburh <<Ubitru.>> Uyesu ayisu Ufirhibu nu Unataniyerh
1.43: Ukpe uku usar ikɛi Uyesu abee izĩ Ugarhirhi. Unga akpo Ufirhibu, agɔr unga agɛ, <<Udɔsa umum.>>
1.44: Ufirhibu awu uner Ubetsaida, uteumbɔ Uandarawu nu Ubitru.
1.45: Ufirhibu akpo Unataniyerh, agɔr unga agɛ, <<Umɛn iki ikpomɛn uner ha umbɔ aka atsɛng isarhanga ru ubvur Íkpem Umusa nu abvur abika asɔm Arherhu-Num. Unga awu Uyesu uner Unazarat, ungwɛ̃ Uyusuf.>>
1.46: Unataniyerh arhusa agɛ, <<Ubin uku uze udɛ̃ɛ̃ udzekpɔ ru Unazarat?>> Ufirhibu agɛ, <<Uba unyã.>>
1.47: Uyesu aka anyã Unataniyerh aka aba ru unga, unga agɔr agɛ, <<Àka anyã uner Uisrairha uwu idzidzɛrhe, uwuruwi aka asi igbɛrangwĩ.>>
1.48: Unataniyerh arhusu Uyesu agɛ, <<Ungo ukorhu uguse nu uhwɛng umum?>> Uyesu agɛ, <<Umum inyãmum ungo ru usĩrhũ ucucii uvorhvo, nu Ufirhibu adɔrha ayisa ungo.>>
1.49: Mɔcɛ Unataniyerh agɔr Uyesu agɛ, <<A umarhem, ungo uwu Ungwɛ̃ Unum. Ungo uwu Uyɛrhe Uisrairha.>>
1.50: Uyesu agɔr Unataniyerh agɛ, <<Ubinkutsu ungo uwe ri imangmang, umum iki idɛyiwa ungo ugɛ umum inyãmum ungo ru usĩrhũ ucucii uvorhvo? Ungo uwuri inyinyãɔ abinkɛ aka anangke rimi.>>
1.51: Unga atoma adɛyiwe unga agɛ, <<Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, umbi awuri inyãmbi afã aka iyanga, ípfu itser-Num ikɛi ifũrhã ni icipa ni itsi Ungwɛ̃-Ner.>>

2.1: Ru unum ukpu untaar umbɔ awe ru irhowa ipfuna ru Ukana ukpu Ugarhirhi. Uya Uyesu awe umɔ.
2.2: Aghwi Uyesu nu angwɛ̃ imesanga ri ipfuna hã.
2.3: Ivangyɛ amɛ̃ inebi aka amaa, uya Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Amɛ̃ inebi aka amaake.>>
2.4: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<A uya, awu ufang asi iwea ungo udɛyiwa umum ubin ukpuku ukukorhe. Ivangmum inasi ibangge.>>
2.5: Uyanga agɔr abika atɔ̃ itser ri irhowa ha agɛ, <<Àka akorhe kishoo ubinkpi unga aka agɔr umbi ikikorhe.>>
2.6: Ídzor niyɔ utɔ̃ĩ iyiriyɛ umbɔ aka akũ atarh adzin aden ra anang hã. Ubɛn idzora ighangge idzum amɛ̃ itɔ̃ɔ̃ use utɔ̃ĩ. Abi Uyahuda aka isaka akũ amɛ̃ asorh ayormbɔ iyi agbeyambɔ.
2.7: Uyesu agɔr abika atɔ̃ itser ri irhowa ha agɛ, <<Àka atsu amɛ̃ atɔk ídzor iyɛrɛ.>> Nggee umbɔ atsu amɛ̃ atɔke ídzor ha uku urhɛrhɛki.
2.8: Mɔcɛ unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Icɛrɛ àka ashɔyi, adzowe unggbaashi abika atɔ̃ itser irhowa ha.>> Umbɔ ashɔyi adzowe.
2.9: Utei irhowa ha avupa agũ ake aka adzipa awu amɛ̃ inebi. Unga asi ihwɛngnga anangkɛ ake aka adzek, bɔr abika ashɔyi adzowe ahwɛngmbɔ. Mɔcɛ unga ayisu utsa ipfuna hã ri ibanga,
2.10: agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ubɛn unera aka isaka agbaashia adzowe amɛ̃ inebi aka azea na adɔrha akũ akirakɛ aka asi ikpanga azeke. Bɔr ungo uwɔkɔ amɛ̃ inebi aka azea nu udɔrhu ukũ icɛrɛ uba!>>
2.11: Akɛrɛ ha ake awu ubin idzeu nu utsar ukpu inggbaashia ukpu Uyesu aka akorhe. Akorha ake ru Ukana ukpu Ugarhirhi. Akɛrɛ adɛyiwe igɔngnga nu angwɛ̃ imesanga atsu imangmangmbɔ ru unga.
2.12: Akɛrɛ aka amaa Uyesu asok acipa azĩ Ukafanahum, unga nu uyanga nu angwɛ̃mbɔ nu angwɛ̃ imesanga. Nggɔɔ ha umbɔ asei inuma ukunjiir. Uyesu asare Iya-Num (Umat 21.12-13; Umar 11.15-17; Irh 19.45-46)
2.13: Ivang Irhowa Iyiki Igar Utɔng iyi abi Uyahuda iki iyo, Uyesu azĩ Urusharhima.
2.14: Ru ufɔm Iya-Num, unga anyã anera adɛ̃ɛ̃ igoyiwe ínak nu ídɔi nu anurhɛu. Ikɛi unga anyãã abika afaruwe uhwɛk asei umɔ.
2.15: Nggee Uyesu akũ arhi awɛyi asharhe, akũ awayiwe kishoo anera nu ídɔi nu ínak ru ufɔm Iya-Num hã. Ikɛi unga ayii atebur iyi abika afaruwe uhwɛk ha, asituwe íshaa uhwɛkmbɔ kishoo.
2.16: Mɔcɛ Uyesu agɔr anera abika agoyiwe anurhɛu ha agɛ, <<Àka akũ akɛrɛ apfu adzek nggimi! Niba adzipu iya Utɛmum iweke anang izɛɛ!>>
2.17: Angwɛ̃ imesanga ayitu ubinkpi uku utsɛng ra Arherhu-Num ugɛ, <<Ibibemayɛ umum iki iwurangge ri iyango iwuri ikpĩa umum ru nyaku urha.>>
2.18: Mɔcɛ anggbaashi abi Uyahuda arhusu Uyesu agɛ, <<Utsar idzeu ukusong ungo iki idɛyiwa umɛn ugɛ ungo uweɔ ri ijeeyɛ iki itsu ungo ukorha akɛrɛ ha?>>
2.19: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka abupuwe Iya-Num ikɛrɛ, umum iwuri iberukũ ake ikɛi ri inuma itaar.>>
2.20: Abi Uyahuda agɔr unga agɛ, <<Anyanga amɛka isɔka inaa ni ímɛka utɔ̃ĩ adzin Iya-Num ikɛrɛ nu ungo ugɔr ugɛ ungo idzine ake ri inuma itaar?>>
2.21: Bɔr iya-Numkɛ unga aka arherhe awu iyornga.
2.22: Uyesu aka asoka akpe, angwɛ̃ imesanga ayita arherhe ha Uyesu aka arherhe. Mɔcɛ umbɔ awe ru imangmang ri itsɛng Arherhu-Num nu arherhe Uyesu.
2.23: Ivang Uyesu aka awe ru Urusharhima ri Irhowa Iyiki Igar Utɔng, anera arhɛrhɛ aka anyã atsar abin idzeukɛ unga aka akorhe, umbɔ adzowe imangmang ru unga.
2.24: Bɔr Uyesu ashia ri imangmang ru umbɔ, ubinkutsu unga ahwɛnga amɛn anera kishoo.
2.25: Unga asi ibeenga unera adɛyiwe unga ubin ri itsi anera ubinkutsu unga ahwɛnga abinkɛ aka awe ra amɛn anera.

3.1: Unera nuwɔ itsoka igburh Unikodimu. Awu unggbaashi abi Uyahuda na awu utsa Ufarisi.
3.2: Unga aba ru Uyesu ru untsuuka, agɔr Uyesu agɛ, <<A umarhem, umɛn ihwɛngmɛn ungo uwu umarhemwi aka adzeku Unum, ubinkutsu unera asi ídɛ̃ɛ̃ akorhunga abin idzeu nu atsarkɛ ungo uku ikorhe, Unum aba asi iwea nggu unga.>>
3.3: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Umum indɛyiwa ungo idzidzɛrhe, aba asi imarmbɔ unera ide ivaa, asi ídɛ̃ɛ̃ atsĩã ri Iyɛrhe Unum.>>
3.4: Unikodimu arhusa agɛ, <<Abvui amar unera aguse ri ikɔ̃ uner? Idzidzɛrhe asi íbvui atsĩã ra anaa uyanga umbɔ amar unga ide ivaa!>>
3.5: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Umum indɛyiwa ungo idzidzɛrhe, umbɔ aba asi imarmbɔ unera ra amɛ̃ nu Ipfu-Num, asi ídɛ̃ɛ̃ atsĩã Iyɛrhe Unum.
3.6: Ubinkpi unera aka amar uwu uner, bɔr ubinkpi Ipfu-Num iki imar uwu ipfu.
3.7: Niba ugũo idzeu umum iki igɔr ungo ugɛ, <Awu ufang umbɔ abvui amar umbi.>
3.8: Ugba ufɛu ra anangkɛ ukpɔ uku ubee. Ungo ugũo ititɔngkpɔ, bɔr ungo usi ihwɛngo anangkɛ ukpɔ uku udzek, ikɛi ungo usi ihwɛngo anangkɛ ukpɔ uku izĩ. Iwu rimi nggu unerwi Ipfu-Num iki imar.>>
3.9: Unikodimu arhusu Uyesu agɛ, <<Akɛrɛ ha akorha aguse na awe?>>
3.10: Uyesu agɛ, <<Ungo uwu umarhem uwuku ugɔng ru Uisrairha, bɔr ungo usi ihwɛngo abina akɛrɛ?
3.11: Umum indɛyiwa ungo idzidzɛrhe, umɛn irherha abinkɛ umɛn iki ihwɛng, ikɛi umɛn ĩdzaa umbi ideka abinkɛ umɛn iki inyã, bɔr utsɛku icɛrɛ umbi akpɛ̃mbi iyɛi idekayɛ umɛn iki isɔma umbi.
3.12: Uba umum irherhuwa umbi arherhe ra abinkɛ aka uwe ru upfung nu umbi asi iwembi ri imangmang, ude umbi akorha aguse na awe ru imangmang umum ĩba isɔma umbi abinkɛ aka awe ra afã?
3.13: Unera anasi ifũã ra afã. Ungwɛ̃-Ner ukpekũ unga aka adzek umɔ acipuwa.
3.14: Ru nyaku Umusa aka aberi ibvui nu ucici ra arhum, rimi hã ikɛi awu ufang umbɔ aberu Ungwɛ̃-Ner,
3.15: agɛ uwuruwi aka awea ri imangmang ru unga ama akpo urhɛ uwu ugbagbaa.
3.16: <<Unum abemu upfunga akarhãrhã nggee unga adzowe unanyĩ Ungwɛ̃nga, agɛ ubɛn unera aka awea ri imangmang ru unga asi íkpea, bɔr unga awuri ikpo urhɛ uwu ugbagbaa.
3.17: Unum asi idenuka Ungwɛ̃nga ru upfung agɛ unga atsu uvau ru upfung, bɔr agɛ upfung ukpo ififɔrh ru uboknga.
3.18: Ubɛn uwuku uwe ru imangmang ru Ungwɛ̃ Unum, asi ítsumbɔ uvau ru unga, bɔr uwuruwi aka asi iwea ri imangmang ru unga, aka atsumbɔ uvau ru unga, ubinkutsu asi idzowuka imangmang ri itsok unanyĩ Ungwɛ̃ Unum.
3.19: Nu izharha arherhenga iwe ri iminɛ. Irhirhang itsĩwã ru upfung, bɔr anera abemu uzĩ anangmbɔ irhirhang, ubinkutsu itsermbɔ iwu iyiki ibewe.
3.20: Ubɛn uwuku utɔ̃itser iyiki ibewe akpɛ̃ irhirhang, asi íbanga ri irhirhang, utsur umbɔ anyãmbɔ itsernga.
3.21: Bɔr uwuku utɔ̃itser idzidzɛrhe aka isaka aba ra anang aka arhurhang ngge itsú umbɔ anyã ra awiya agɛ abinkɛ unga aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ ikikorhe awu Unum ayike unga.>> Ideka Uyohana Uner Ubɔtisima ru Uyesu
3.22: Akɛrɛ aka amaa, Uyesu nu angwɛ̃ imesanga adzek azĩmbɔ abĩ Uyahudiya, umɔ unga amaa inuma irhɛirhɛ nggu umbɔ, anu ikorhuwe ubɔtisima ra anera.
3.23: Uyohana ikɛi anu ikorhuwe ubɔtisima ru Uainon uku ukhapa nggu Usarhim, ubinkutsu amɛ̃ awu arhɛrhɛ umɔ. Anera ubɛn unum akɛyi ru unga umɔ azĩ isorhu ubɔtisima.
3.24: Akɛrɛ ha akorhuke kata, umbɔ adɔrha agbange Uyohana ru ugborzĩ.
3.25: Umɔ angwɛ̃ imesu Uyohana atsĩmbɔ uning nggu utsa Uyahuda uwɔɔ ra arherhi isorh iyor ru nyaka agbeyi abi Uyahuda.
3.26: Umbɔ azĩmbɔ ru Uyohana agɔr unga agɛ, <<A umarhem, utsa ha umbi aka awu nggu unga unum hã ru ugar ubang Azɛ̃ Urdun, uwu ha ungo uku udzowe ideka ri itsinga hã, unggawɔ nggɔɔ adɛ̃ɛ̃ isorhuwe ubɔtisima. Anera kishoo azĩ ru unga.>>
3.27: Mɔcɛ Uyohana agɛ, <<Unera asi idɛ̃ɛ̃ ayɛisa ubin, Unum aba asi ídzowuka ukpɔ ra afã.
3.28: Umbi awu idekamum, umum ĩgɔr ugɛ, <Asi iwea umum iwu Ukiristo, bɔr adena umum inggbaashia ĩba.>
3.29: Utsak uwuku ufa unga apfunu utsɛrh uwuku ufa. Bɔr uwɛrhu utsak uwuku ufa uwuku uzĩ irhowa ipfuna hã aka isaka adzɛu igũ irhak utsak uwuku ufa, na aka isaka agɔm anggɔm ri ivangyɛ unga aka igũ irhak utsak uwuku ufa ha. Anggɔm hã awu akimum, atsuafɛr icɛrɛ.
3.30: Awu ufang unga awu ukugɔnga, bɔr awu ufang umum iwu uku ucia. Uwuruwi aka adzeka afã aba
3.31: <<Uwuruwi aka adzeka afã aba ananga anera kishoo. Uwuruwi aka adzeka abĩ awu uwu abĩ na arherhe ra abinkɛ aka awu ra abĩ. Uwuruwi aka adzeka afã aba ananga kishoo.
3.32: Unga arherhe ideka ubinkpi unga aka agũ na anyã, bɔr anera asi iyɛimbɔ idekanga.
3.33: Ubɛn unera aka ubemu idekanga atsu utsar adɛyiwe ugɛ Unum arherhi idzidzɛrhe.
3.34: Uwu ha Unum aka adene arherhe irhɛm Unum, ubinkutsu adzowe Ipfu iyiriyɛ iki isi ímaangge.
3.35: Utɛ abemu Ungwɛ̃ na atsuke abina kishoo ru uboknga.
3.36: Ubɛn uwuku uwe ru imangmang ru Ungwɛ̃ awea ru urhɛ uwu ugbagbaa, bɔr ubɛn uwuku ukpɛ̃ɛ̃ Ungwɛ̃ asi ínyãã urhɛ, ubinkutsu avɔm Unum awu ni itsinga.>>

4.1: Abi Ufarisi aka agũ ugɛ Uyesu ani akposha angwɛ̃ imesa ananga Uyohana na ani akorhuwe umbɔ ubɔtisima.
4.2: Bɔr asi iwea Uyesu aka isaka akorhuwe umbɔ ubɔtisima hã, awu angwɛ̃ imesanga aka isaka akorhuwe.
4.3: Ivangyɛ Uteijee aka agũ akɛrɛ, unga asoka ru Uyahudiya na abvui azĩã Ugarhirhi.
4.4: Unga awuri itsĩ ru Usamariya atɔng.
4.5: Nggee unga aba atsĩ ru uteu ukpɔɔ ru Usamariya umbɔ iki iyisa Usaikar, ukhapa ra abĩkɛ Uyakubu aka adzowe ungwɛ̃nga Uyusuf.
4.6: Uvãã amɛ̃ Uyakubu uwe ra anang hã. Azhe uzɛ̃rhã aka afɛr Uyesu, unga asei ra angwĩ uvãã amɛ̃ hã. Aka awu idzingga atenuma.
4.7: Utsɛrh Usamariya uwɔɔ aka aba ishɔyi amɛ̃, Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ungo uma udzaango amɛ̃ umum ihwa?>>
4.8: Angwɛ̃ imesanga aka azĩmbɔ ru utepa igoi ubingha.
4.9: Utsɛrh Usamariya ha agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ungo uwu utsa Uyahuda. Umum iwu utsɛrh Usamariya. Awu use utsu ungo urhusa umum amɛ̃ aka ahwa?>> Unga arhusa akɛrɛ ubinkutsu abi Uyahuda aka asi isaka agbopumbɔ nggu abi Usamariya.
4.10: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Uba ungo uhwɛngo izũwã Unum nu unerwi aka arhusa ungo amɛ̃ aka ahwa, ungo uwuri ifɛnungo unga, unga adzaa ungo amɛ̃ akika adzowe urhɛ.>>
4.11: Utsɛrh ha agɔr Uyesu agɛ, <<A uteiya, umum inyã ungo ushiɔ ru ubin ukpuku ushɔi nu uvãã amɛ̃ ukpi uwu ughorghotakpɔ. Ri inɛ̃ɛ̃ ungo iki ikpo amɛ̃ akika adzowe urhɛ ha?
4.12: Use ungo unango utɛmɛn Uyakubu, unga aka aneka uvãã amɛ̃ ru umɛn? Unga nibikanga ahwa amɛ̃ hã, ikɛi angwɛ̃nga, nu íjuɛnga aka ahwa umɔ.>>
4.13: Uyesu agɛ, <<Ubɛn uwuku uhwa amɛ̃ akɛrɛ awuri ibvui agũã ugɔ̃ amɛ̃ ikɛi.
4.14: Bɔr ubɛn uwuku uhwa amɛ̃mum iki ĩdzowe unga asi íbvui agũã ugɔ̃ amɛ̃ ugbagbaa. Amɛ̃ hã umum iki idzowe unga awuri iwu akwiu amɛ̃ ru umbɔ aka idzowe urhɛ uwu ugbagbaa.>>
4.15: Utsɛrh ha agɔr unga agɛ, <<A uteiya, udzaa umum amɛ̃ hã utsur umum ibvui ĩgũmum ugɔ̃ amɛ̃ ikɛi ni isi íbvui ikɛyiwamum ishɔng amɛ̃ nggimi.>>
4.16: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Uzĩ uyisu utsakngo umbi aba nggimi.>>
4.17: Unga agɛ, <<Umum ishimum ru utsak.>> Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ungo urherhi idzidzɛrhe ungo uku ugɔr ugɛ, ungo ushiɔ ru utsak.
4.18: Ubinkutsu ungo uku uweɔ ra atsaka atɔ̃ɔ̃ nu unerwi umbi aka awu nggu unga icɛrɛ asi iwea utsakngo. Ungo urherhe ishaa idzidzɛrhe.>>
4.19: Utsɛrh ha agɛ, <<A uteiya, umum inyã ungo uwu uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num.
4.20: Atokamɛn adzowe Unum igɔng ri igũ iyɛrɛ, bɔr umbi abi Uyahuda agɛ Urusharhima ukpɔ umɛ̃ɛ̃ awu ufang anera adzowe igɔng ru Unum.>>
4.21: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<A utsɛrh ha, uwe ru imangmang ra abinkɛ umum iki irherhe. Ivanga niyɔ ibarɔ anera asi ídzowukumbɔ Utɛ igɔng ri igũ iyɛrɛ use ru Urusharhima.
4.22: Umbi abi Usamariya asi ihwɛngmbi ubinkpi umbi aka idzowe igɔng. Bɔr umɛn abi Uyahuda ihwɛngmɛn ubinkpi umɛn iki idzowe igɔng, ubinkutsu udĩ ififɔrh udzeka ra abi Uyahuda.
4.23: Bɔr ivanga niyɔ ibarɔ, iki ibangge, abika adzowe igɔng idzidzɛrhe aka idzowe Utɛ igɔng ri Ipfu nu idzidzɛrhe, ubinkutsu Utɛ abee ikpũ abi ha adzowe unga igɔng.
4.24: Unum awu ipfu, abika adzowe unga igɔng ikɛi awu ufang umbɔ adzowe igɔng ri Ipfu nu idzidzɛrhe.>>
4.25: Utsɛrh ha agɛ, <<Umum ihwɛng Uarhmasihu, awu unga umbɔ iki iyisa Ukiristo, nggawɔ abarɔ. Ivangyɛ unga aka iba, unga awuri idɛyiwanga umɛn abina kishoo.>>
4.26: Mɔcɛ Uyesu adɛyiwe unga agɛ, <<Umum uner arherhakɛ nggu ungo, iwu unga.>> Angwɛ̃ imesa abvui aba ru Uyesu
4.27: Ivang hã niyɔ angwɛ̃ imesanga abvui aba adzeidzeu umbɔ aka anyã unga adɛ̃ɛ̃ arherhe nggu ukutsɛrh. Bɔr unera asi igɔra agɛ, <<Ungo ubee use,>> use arhusa unga agɛ, <<Awu use utsu ungo urherha arherhe nggu unga?>>
4.28: Mɔcɛ utsɛrh ha abɔruka idzum amɛ̃nga umɔ na atsĩã ru utepa na agɔr anera agɛ,
4.29: <<Àka aba anyã unerwi aka adɛyiwa umum kishoo abinkɛ umum iki ikorhe! Awu unga awu Ukiristo?>>
4.30: Umbɔ adzeku utepa aba ra anang Uyesu.
4.31: Angwɛ̃ imesanga ashɔ̃rhã unga agɛ, <<A umarhem, uma ugha ubingha.>>
4.32: Bɔr unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umum iwemum ru ubinkpi umum iki igha umbi aka asi ihwɛngmbi ukpɔ.>>
4.33: Mɔcɛ angwɛ̃ imesanga arhusa adɔka agɛ, <<Use unera akũ ubingha akowe unga?>>
4.34: Bɔr Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Ubinghamum ukpi, umum ikorhu ubin amɛn uwuku udena umum ĩba, ikɛi imashuwe itseryɛ unga aka adzaa umum.
4.35: Uba umbi aka isaka agɔr agɛ, <Abɔr afɛ̃ɛ̃ anaa umbɔ atirhi igbɛr abin>? Bɔr umum idɛyiwa umbi, aka agbisha arhi icanga. Iki ikɔ̃ngge, ni iki iwengge iyiki igbigbɛr.
4.36: Uner uwuku ugbɛr abin hã aka ikpoa itosanga, ikɛi unga ani ikɔng anera aka akpo urhɛ uwu ugbagbaa, ngge itsú uner uwuku udoi nu uner uwuku ugbugbɛr agɔm anggɔm urhɔnga.
4.37: Ake awu idzidzɛrhe, ake aka agɔr agɛ, <Uwɔɔ adoi, nu uwɔɔ agbɛr.>
4.38: Umum idena umbi igbɛr abinkɛ umbi aka asi itɔ̃mbi itser ake. Abɔɔ umbɔ atɛ̃wã itsera, umbi agbɛr ugarh ititɛ̃wãmbɔ.>>
4.39: Abi Usamariya awu arhɛrhɛ ru uteu ha umbɔ aka awe ru imangmang ru Uyesu ri itsi ideka utsɛrh ha aka agɔr agɛ, <<Unga adɛyiwa umum kishoo abinkɛ umum iki ikorhe.>>
4.40: Abi Usamariya aka aba ru unga, umbɔ ashɔ̃rhã unga asei nggu umbɔ, unga asei inuma ivaa.
4.41: Arherhanga atsu anera arhɛrhɛ awe ru imangmang.
4.42: Umbɔ agɔr utsɛrh ha agɛ, <<Umɛn iwe ru imangmang ru Uyesu, ubinkutsu asi iwea ubinkpi ungo uku urherhe ukpekũ, bɔr icɛrɛ umɛn igũmɛn nibikamɛn ni ihwɛngmɛn ugɛ uwɛrɛ ha idzidzɛrhe unga awu Uwuku Ufɔrh upfunga.>> Uyesu akerhuwe ungwɛ̃ uner itser ijee
4.43: Inuma ivaa ha iki imaa unga asok azĩã Ugarhirhi.
4.44: Uyesu nibikanga adekuka ugɛ uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num aka isaka ashia ri imor ra abĩnga.
4.45: Ivangyɛ unga aka itsĩ Ugarhirhi, abi Ugarhirhi ayɛi unga aboka avaa, ubinkutsu umbɔ ikɛi azĩmbɔ Irhowa Iyiki Igar Utɔng hã ru Urusharhima na anyãmbɔ kishoo abin Uyesu aka akorhe.
4.46: Mɔcɛ Uyesu abvui azĩã iyepu uteu Ukana ukpu Ugarhirhi, anangkɛ unga aka adzipa amɛ̃ ake awu amɛ̃ inebi. Utsa uner itser ijee nuwɔ uwuruwi ungwɛ̃nga aka aghonga unga ru Ukafanahum.
4.47: Ivangyɛ utsa ha aka agũ ugɛ Uyesu aka adzeku Uyahudiya abvui abanga Ugarhirhi, unga azĩ ru unga ashɔ̃rhã unga ama aba akerhuwe ungwɛ̃nga, aka abɔr akpe.
4.48: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Umbi aba asi inyãmbi atsar nu abin idzeu, umbi asi íwembi ri imangmang.>>
4.49: Uner itser ijee ha agɛ, <<A Uteiya, uba umɛn izĩmɛn utsur ungwɛ̃mum akpea.>>
4.50: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ungo udɛ̃ɛ̃ uzĩɔ. Ungwɛ̃ngo awuri ibɛka.>> Utsa ha awea ri imangmang nu ubin Uyesu aka arherhe nggu unga, umɔ unga azĩã.
4.51: Ana awe ru utsĩndĩ ugãrhãnga agbanga unga, agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ungwɛ̃ngo abɛka.>>
4.52: Unga arhusa umbɔ ivangyɛ ungwɛ̃ hã aka atirhi igũ ugarha. Umbɔ agɔr unga agɛ, <<Imani iyor ha ineke unga arhɛkɛ ru ukara unying.>>
4.53: Utei ungwɛ̃ hã ayita, ivang hã niyɔ Uyesu agɔra unga agɛ, <<Ungwɛ̃ngo awuri ibɛka.>> Nggee unga nu aner iyanga kishoo awe ru imangmang.
4.54: Akɛrɛ awu ubin idzeu ukpu uvaa Uyesu aka akorhe unga aka adzeku Uyahudiya azĩ Ugarhirhi.

5.1: Akɛrɛ aka amaa, Uyesu azĩã irhowa abi Uyahuda ru Urusharhima.
5.2: Ru Urusharhima ukau amɛ̃ nukpɔ umbɔ iki iyisa ri idũ abi Uyahuda agɛ Ubetasda. Ukpɔ ukhapa ru angwĩ ufɔm, anangkɛ ídɔi iki itsĩ. Aka akũ atarh atang nggaa atsurha atɔ̃ɔ̃ adzipu ukau ha.
5.3: Awu ra atsurha ha abi irhãrhã nu abi ibvuta, nu akatarhu nu abi ishayi iyor arhɛrhɛ aka isaka anu umɔ.
5.5: Uner uwɔɔ aka amaa imɛka isɔka itaar ni imɛka utɔrɔk asi idɛ̃ɛ̃ azɛ̃rhũnga.
5.6: Uyesu aka anyã ininunga, ikɛi ahwɛnga utsa ha aka adãrhũnga nggu irhãrhã hã, unga arhusu uner irhãrhã hã agɛ, <<Ungo ubeengo ikikerhe?>>
5.7: Uner irhãrhã hã agɛ, <<A uteiya, umum ishimum ru unera aka iyika umum itsĩ ru amɛ̃ ivangyɛ ake aka idzipa. Umum ĩba itita ibee itsitsĩwã, uwɔɔ agbaangashia ru umum.>>
5.8: Mɔcɛ Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Usisok, unyangu ufarngo, ukũ uzɛ̃rhã!>>
5.9: Kanying, uner ha akerhunga. Anyangu ufarnga atirhunga uzɛ̃rhã. Akɛrɛ ha akorhe ru unum ukpuku uwosha.
5.10: Nggee anggbaashi abi Uyahuda agɔr utsa ha aka akerhe agɛ, <<Awu unum ukpuku uwosha. Ikpem ikɛnngge ungo itsã ufar.>>
5.11: Bɔr utsa ha agɛ, <<Unerwi aka akerhuwa umum agɔr umum agɛ, <Unyangu ufarngo uso uzɛ̃rhã.> >>
5.12: Nggee umbɔ arhusa unga agɛ, <<Awu ungamɔ uner ha aka agɔr ungo ugɛ unyanga umgbɔ uso uzɛ̃rhã?>>
5.13: Utsa ha aka akerhe asi ihwɛngnga awu ungamɔ akerhuwe unga, ubinkutsu Uyesu aka azɛ̃rhã atsĩã ra anera arhɛrhɛ umɔ.
5.14: Ivanga ukunjiir iki itɔng Uyesu akpo unga ri Iya-Num na agɔr unga agɛ, <<Unyã ungo uku ukerhungo! Uneke arhim utsur ubin uku unangkpɔ akɛrɛ ha ukpokpɔ ungo.>>
5.15: Utsa ha azĩ adɛyiwe anggbaashi abi Uyahuda agɛ awu Uyesu unga akerhuwe unga. Urhɛ ru ubok Ungwɛ̃
5.16: Ngge itsu anggbaashi abi Uyahuda adzowe uver ru Uyesu, ubinkutsu itser iyiki ikikerhe ha unga aki itɔ̃ ru unum ukpuku uwosha.
5.17: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Utɛmum anu itser utsɛku irherɛ, umum rimi hã ini ititɔ̃.>>
5.18: Arherha akɛrɛ atsu anggbaashi abi Uyahuda abee ifɛre Uyesu. Agɔr agɛ unga asi izharhuka ikpem unum ukpuku uwosha ukpekũ, bɔr unga agɔr agɛ Unum awu Utɛnga na anu inyãngu itsinga uku kpengkpeng nggu Unum.
5.19: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, Ungwɛ̃ asi íkorhunga ifɛrhɛ nibikanga, unga akpurha akorhu ubinkpi unga aka anyã Utɛnga aki ikorhe, ubinkutsu ubinkpi Utei iki ikorhe awu ukpɔ Ungwɛ̃ hã awuri ikorhe.
5.20: Ubinkutsu Utɛ abemu Ungwɛ̃ na adɛyiwe unga kishoo abinkɛ unga aka isaka akorhe. Ĩĩ, umbɔ awuri idɛyiwe unga abinkɛ aka anangke akɛrɛ ha nu umbi awuri idzedzeu.
5.21: Ru nyaku Utɛ iki isoyiwe abika akpukpe na adzowe umbɔ urhɛ, rimi Ungwɛ̃ hã awuri idzowe urhɛ ru kishoo abirabɛ unga aka abee idzidzowe.
5.22: Rimi hã, Utɛ asi ítsuka uvau ru unera, bɔr adzowe ijee itsu uvau ru Ungwɛ̃nga,
5.23: ngge itsú umbɔ kishoo adzowe igɔng ru Ungwɛ̃ ru nyaka umbɔ iki idzowe igɔng ru Utɛ. Uwuruwi aka asi idzowuka igɔng ru Ungwɛ̃, asi idzowuka igɔng ru Utɛ uwuku udene unga.
5.24: <<Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, uwuku ugũ arherhamum na adzowuka imangmang ru uwuku udena umum ĩba, awea ru urhɛ uwu ugbagbaa na asi ítsumbɔ unga uvau. Unga aka agar akpe azĩã urhɛ.
5.25: Umum indɛyiwa umbi idzidzɛrhe, ivanga niyɔ ibarɔ ni iki ibangge abika akpe awuri igũmbɔ urhɛm Ungwɛ̃ Unum nu abika agũ hã awuri ibɛkmbɔ.
5.26: Ru nyaku Utɛ aka awe ru urhɛ ri itsikamnga, rimi hã unga aka adzowe Ungwɛ̃nga ijee iyiki idzowe urhɛ.
5.27: Utɛ ikɛi adzowuka unga ijee iyiki ivarha arherhe, ubinkutsu unga awu Ungwɛ̃-Ner.
5.28: <<Niba agũmbi idzeu akɛrɛ ha, ivanga niyɔ ibarɔ kishoo abika awe ra adzak awuri igũmbɔ urhɛmnga
5.29: na adzeka. Abika akorhe iyiki ize awuri isok ra akpe abɛk, bɔr abika akorhe iyiki ibewe awuri isok akpo uvau itsitsĩme.
5.30: Umum nibikami isi ídɛ̃ɛ̃ ikorhumum ubin. Umum itsu uvau ubinkpi umum iki igũ ukpekũ. Itsu uvaumum iwu iyiki irhika, ubinkutsu isi idɔsumum ubinkpi amɛnmum aki ibee bɔr aki uwuku udena umum. Ideka ri itsi Uyesu
5.31: <<Umum ĩba idzowe ideka itsimum, idekamum isi iwengge idzidzɛrhe.
5.32: Bɔr uner uwɔ aba adzowe ideka ri itsimum, umum ihwɛng ideka ha ri itsimum iwe idzidzɛrhe.
5.33: <<Adzaanga umbi ideka idzidzɛrhe ri ivangyɛ umbi adene anera azĩ ru Uyohana.
5.34: Asi iwea ugɛ umum itsorhi itsimum ri ideku unera, bɔr umum irherhe rimi ngge ítsu umbi adɛ̃ɛ̃ akpo ififɔrh.
5.35: Uyohana awu ru nyaki irhirhang iki igar ni irhang, umbi atsũmbi igũibɛn irhirhangnga ri ivanga ukunjiir.
5.36: <<Bɔr umum iwemum ri idekayɛ iki inangngge ideka Uyohana. Ubinkutsu itseryɛ Utɛmum aka adzaa umum imasha, iyiriyɛ umum iki inũ itɔ̃ icɛrɛ, ngge idekuwe ugɛ awu Utɛ unga adena umum.
5.37: Utɛ uwuku udena umum adzowuka ideka ri itsimum. Umbi anasi anyãmbi unga use agũmbi urhɛmnga
5.38: nu arherhanga asi iseike ru umbi, ubinkutsu umbi asi iwembi ri imangmang ru uwu ha unga aka adene.
5.39: Umbi atsu amɛnmbi ivarhi itsɛng Arherhu-Num, ubinkutsu umbi akaifɛrhkɔ ugɛ umbi awuri ikpikpombi urhɛ uwu ugbagbaa ru ngge. Itsɛng Arherhu-Num hã ngge idzowe ideka ri itsimum.
5.40: Bɔr umbi akpɛ̃mbi iba ru umum aba akpo urhɛ.
5.42: Bɔr umum ihwɛng umbi. Umum ihwɛng ugɛ umbi asi ibemumbi Unum ra amɛnmbi.
5.43: Umum iba ri itsok Utɛmum, umbi asi iyɛimbi umum, bɔr uwɔɔ aba, aba ri itsok ukamnga, umbi awuri iyɛimbi unga.
5.44: Umbi awuri ikorha aguse na awe ru imangmang uba umbi ayɛi ukpoi ra adɔkambi, bɔr umbi asi ibeembi iyɛi ikpikpoi iki idzeku Unum unying ukpekũ?
5.45: <<Bɔr aka niba akaimbi ifɛrhkɔ ugɛ umum iwuri ihwitumum umbi ru Utɛ. Uwuku uhwita umbi awu Umusa, uwuruwi umbi aka afosa.
5.46: Agɛ umbi awembi ri imangmang ru Umusa, umbi awuri iwembi ri imangmang ru umum, ubinkutsu unga atsɛng itsɛng ri itsimum.
5.47: Bɔr umbi aba ashimbi ri imangmang ra abinkɛ Umusa aka atsɛng, umbi akorha aguse na awe ru imangmang ra abinkɛ umum iki irherhe?>>

6.1: Akɛrɛ aka amaa Uyesu agar Ukau ukpu Ugarhirhi, ukpɔ uku uwe ukau ukugɔng ukpu Utibariya.
6.2: Nggaa ikikɔng anera idɔsa unga, ubinkutsu umbɔ aka anyã atsar abin idzeukɛ unga aka akorhuwe abi irhãrhã.
6.3: Mɔcɛ Uyesu afũã ri ifɛn igũ aseisa umɔ nggu angwɛ̃ imesanga.
