20.1: Ri igɔ̃kpeka ru unum ukpu inggbaashia ri inuma utɔɔva, ukpe una usi isarkpɔ, Umaryamu Umagadarha azĩã ru utai ha, anyã utarh ukpuku utsim ra angwĩ utai ha uku ugɔ̃rhũkpɔ.
20.2: Nggee unga atĩ azĩã ru Ubitru nu ungwɛ̃ imesa uwuruwi Uyesu aka abema, agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Aka atsũwũkumbɔ Uteijee ru udzaka! Umɛn isi ihwɛngmɛn anangkɛ umbɔ aka angwɛ̃we unga!>>
20.3: Nggee umbɔ Ubitru nu angwɛ̃ imesa ha adzek azĩmbɔ ru utai ha.
20.4: Ikivarhambɔ atĩtser, bɔr ungwɛ̃ imesa uwɔrɔ afaru Ubitru atɔnga, agbaashia azĩ atsĩã ra anang utai ha.
20.5: Unga agbapfu arhi anyã atorho hã aka anu, bɔr unga asi itsĩa ru utai ha.
20.6: Mɔcɛ Ubitru aba ra andzingnga, atsĩã ru utai ha na anyã atorho ha aka anu umɔ.
20.7: Ikɛi anyã atorhakɛ umbɔ aka abope ni itsi Uyesu. Aka afeta anu ra anang akɔɔ awuweke nggu anang atorha ha.
20.8: Mɔcɛ ungwɛ̃ imesa uwɔɔ uwuku uggbaashia azĩ atsĩ ra anang utai ha, atsĩã ru utai ha. Ivangyɛ unga aka anyã, unga awe ru imangmang.
20.9: Bɔr ri ivang hã umbɔ anasi ihwɛngmbɔ itsɛng Arherhu-Num iki igɔr igɛ awu ufang Uyesu awuri isoka ra akpe.
20.10: Mɔcɛ angwɛ̃ imesa ha abvui azĩmbɔ ra ayambɔ. Uyesu adzeka ru Umaryamu Umagadarha (Umat 28.9-10; Umar 16.9-11)
20.11: Bɔr Umaryamu adɛ̃ɛ̃ ra awiya utai ha na aciu akpe. Adɛ̃ɛ̃ iciu akpe ha nukpi, unga agbapfu na arhi ru utai ha.
20.12: Unga anyã ípfu itser-Num ivaa nggu atorho aka aterha asei ra anangkɛ ukom iyor Uyesu uku unu bɔr ushikpɔ umɔ. Ipfu itser-Num hã unying isei udiki itsia, iyi ivaa isei udika adaknga.
20.13: Ípfu itser-Num hã irhusa unga igɛ, <<A utsɛrh ha, ungo uciu usengu?>> Unga agɛ, <<Aka ashipukumbɔ iyor Uteijeemum, umum isi ihwɛng anangkɛ umbɔ aka akũna unga azĩ.>>
20.14: Unga aka amaa irherha arherha ha, unga adzipa anyã Uyesu aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ umɔ bɔr unga asi ihwɛngnga ugɛ awu Uyesu.
20.15: Uyesu arhusa unga agɛ, <<A utsɛrh ha, ungo uciu usengo? Ungo uni ubee ungamɔ?>> Unga akaifɛrhkɔ agɛ use awu uner itser icang hã, nggee unga agɛ, <<A uteiya, aba awu ungo ushupa unga, ungo udɛyiwa anangkɛ ungo uku ungwɛ̃we unga nu umum izĩ ishupa unga.>>
20.16: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Umaryamu!>> Unga adzipa azĩ udiku Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Urabboni!>> Ri idũ abi Uyahuda agbena agburh, <<A umarhem.>>
20.17: Uyesu agɛ, <<Niba ukpɔmɔ umum, ubinkutsu umum inasi izĩmum ru Utɛ kata. Bɔr uzĩ ra angwɛ̃mɛn ugɔr umbɔ ugɛ, <Umum ibvui izĩ ru Utɛmum nu Utɛmbi, izĩ ru Unummum nu Unummbi.> >>
20.18: Umaryamu Umagadarha azĩ nggu isarhe ha, agɔr angwɛ̃ imesa ha agɛ, <<Umum inyãmum Uteijee!>> Unga adɛyiwe umbɔ ubinkpi Uyesu aka adɛyiwe unga. Uyesu adzeka ra angwɛ̃ imesanga (Umat 28.16-20; Umar 16.14-18; Irh 24.36-49)
20.19: Urhɛɛ uku uwe ru unum ukpu inggbaashia ri inuma utɔɔva, angwɛ̃ imesa Uyesu akɔng ananga unying. Iwei anggbaashi abi Uyahuda itsu umbɔ agbange angwĩ ubã kishoo. Uyesu aba adɛ̃ɛ̃ ra ateumbɔ na agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Ididɔɔr ima iwe nggu umbi!>>
20.20: Unga aka arherhe rimi amaa, mɔcɛ unga adɛyiwe aboknga nu igbɔmnga. Angwɛ̃ imesa ha agɔm anggɔm umbɔ aka anyã Uteijee.
20.21: Uyesu abvui agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Ididɔɔr ima iwe nggu umbi! Ru nyaku Utɛ aka adena umum, rimi hã umum ini idena umbi.>>
20.22: Unga aka arherhe rimi amaa, mɔcɛ unga afɛte uwoianga ru umbɔ, agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka ayɛi Ipfu Isarsatangge.
20.23: Ubɛn unera umbi aka atsũwe arhimnga, aka atsũwũkumbɔ ake nukpɔ. Ubɛn unera umbi aka asi itsũwũkumbi, asi itsũwũkumbɔ nukpɔ.>> Uyesu adzeka ru Utoma
20.24: Utoma, uwuruwi umbɔ iki iyisa Akãrhghwɛ̃, unying ru umbɔ usɔkdũmɛn hã, ashia umɔ nggu umbɔ ri ivang hã Uyesu aka aba.
20.25: Nggee angwɛ̃ imesa ha agɔr unga agɛ, <<Umɛn inyãmɛn Uteijee.>> Bɔr Utoma agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umum iba isi inyãmum ughwee akusa ra aboknga, ni ishɔmu itokmum ru ughwee akusa ha, ikɛi ni ishɔmu ubokmum ru ughwee asawa ha ri igbɔmnga, umum isi íwemum ri imangmang.>>
20.26: Inuma utɔrɔk iki itɔng angwɛ̃ imesa ha akɔng ri iya ha, ikɛi Utoma awu nggu umbɔ. Angwĩ ubã agbang, bɔr Uyesu aba adɛ̃ɛ̃ ra ateumbɔ na agɛ, <<Ididɔɔr ima iwe nggu umbi!>>
20.27: Mɔcɛ unga agɔr Utoma agɛ, <<Utsu itokngo ru ungɛɛ, unyã abokmum. Unamu ubokngo ushɔma ri igbɔmmum. Uneke icicang, bɔr uwe ru imangmang.>>
20.28: Utoma agɔr unga agɛ, <<A Uteijeemum nu Unummum!>>
20.29: Uyesu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ungo unyã umum ngge itsu ungo uwe ru imangmang. Idorh iwe nggu abirabɛ aka asi inyãmbɔ umum bɔr ana awembɔ ri imangmang.>> Awu use utsu umbɔ atsɛng ubvur uwurɛ
20.30: Uyesu akorhe atsar abin idzeu arhɛrhɛ ra asu angwɛ̃ imesanga, akirakɛ umbɔ aka asi itsɛngmbɔ ru ubvur uwurɛ.
20.31: Bɔr atsɛng akɛrɛ ru umbi awe ru imangmang ugɛ Uyesu unga awu Ukiristo, Ungwɛ̃ Unum, mɔcɛ ru ubok imangmang ru unga, umbi ama akpo urhɛ ri itsoknga.

21.1: Akɛrɛ ha aka amaa, Uyesu abvui adzeka ra angwɛ̃ imesanga nú ubang ukau ukugɔng ukpu Utibariya. Riminɛ ngge iki ikorhe.
21.2: Usiman Ubitru nu Utoma, uwuruwi ha umbɔ iki iyisa Akãrhghwɛ̃, nu Unataniyerh aka adzeku Ukana ukpu Ugarhirhi, nu angwɛ̃ Uzabadi, nu ikɛi angwɛ̃ imesa abɔɔ avaa awu urhɔnga.
21.3: Ubitru agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umum iwuri idze izĩ udɛm.>> Angwɛ̃ imesa abika abɔr agɛ, <<Umɛn izĩmɛn nggu ungo.>> Nggee umbɔ adzek atsĩ ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ azĩmbɔ. Bɔr ru utsuu ukpu ha umbɔ asi idzurmbɔ ubin.
21.4: Ivang ukpe uku usar, umbɔ akpurha anyã Uyesu aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ ri ifɛn ukau ukugɔng hã, bɔr angwɛ̃ imesa ha asi ihwɛngmbɔ ugɛ awu Uyesu.
21.5: Uyesu ayisa umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi awɛrhamum, umbi awembi ra abɛrh?>> Umbɔ agɛ, <<Ĩ'ĩ.>>
21.6: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka atang igbermbi udiku ubok ugha ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ hã, umbi awuri ikpombi akɔɔ.>> Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka atang, umbɔ asi idɛ̃ɛ̃ adarhumbɔ igber ha ubinkutsu, arhɛrha abɛrha amor.
21.7: Mɔcɛ ungwɛ̃ imesa ha uwu Uyesu aka abema agɔr Ubitru agɛ, <<Awu Uteijee!>> Ivang Usiman Ubitru aka agũ agɛ awu Uteijee, unga anyangu untamanga uwuruwi unga aka atsimuwe, atama na ater isha atsĩã ra amɛ̃.
21.8: Angwɛ̃ imesa abika abɔr igambɔ azĩmbɔ ru ubang ukau ukugɔng ru ukhukhɔɔ ha, agbĩrhã nggu igber ha iki itɔk nggu abɛrh ha. Umbɔ asi idermbɔ nggu abĩ ubang ukau ha, awu ru nyaki ivarha adaka anaka ataar (300).
21.9: Ivang umbɔ aka adzeka nú abĩã, umbɔ anyã akãã urha ra anang hã nu abɛrh nú ake, nu uborodi.
21.10: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka akũ abɛrh akɔɔ aba ra akirakɛ umbi aka adzui icicɛrɛ.>>
21.11: Usiman Ubitru afũ ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ hã agbiir igber ha akũ azĩ ri ifɛn ukau ha. Igber ha itɔk nggu nggaa abɛrh unaka ni isɔka itɔ̃ɔ̃ nu ataar (153). Bɔr kishoo nu irhɛ abɛrh ha riminɛ, igber ha isi ipupungge.
21.12: Uyesu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka aba atsu ukpee.>> Ra angwɛ̃ imesa ha, unera asi iwea ri ikeramɛn iyiki irhusa unga ugɛ, <<Ungo uwu ungamɔ?>> Umbɔ ahwɛngmbɔ agɛ awu Uteijee.
21.13: Uyesu aba anyangu uborodi adzowe umbɔ, na akorhe rimi nggu abɛrh ha.
21.14: Uyesu aka asok ra akpe, ide untaar riyɛ unga aka adzeyiwa ra angwɛ̃ imesanga. Uyesu nggu Ubitru
21.15: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka amaa itsukpee, Uyesu agɔr Usiman Ubitru agɛ, <<A Usiman ungwɛ̃ Uyohana, ungo ubema umum unango ibibemayɛ abɛrɛ aka abema umum?>> Ubitru agɛ, <<Ĩĩ, Uteijee, ungo uhwɛngo umum iki ibema ungo.>> Uyesu agɛ, <<Ufuka angwɛ̃ itsurhimum.>>
21.16: Uyesu abvui arhusa unga agɛ, <<A Usiman ungwɛ̃ Uyohana, idzidzɛrhe ungo ubemungo umum?>> Unga agɛ, <<Ĩĩ, Uteijee, ungo uhwɛngo ugɛ umum ĩbemum ungo.>> Uyesu agɛ, <<Urhisa ídɔimum.>>
21.17: Uyesu arhusa unga ide untaar agɛ, <<A Usiman ungwɛ̃ Uyohana, ungo ubemungo umum?>> Amɛn Ubitru aghong, Uyesu aka arhusa unga idikũnga itaar agɛ, <<Ungo ubemungo umum?>> Unga agɛ, <<A Uteijee, ungo uhwɛngo abina kishoo, ungo uhwɛngo ugɛ umum ĩbemum ungo.>> Uyesu agɛ, <<Ufukuwa ídɔimum.
21.18: Umum indɛyiwa ungo idzidzɛrhe, ivangyɛ ungo uku uwu uwɛdzɛm, ungo iki isaku utsim abinngo nibikango nu uzĩ anangkɛ ungo uku ubee. Bɔr ivangyɛ ungo uba ukɔ̃ɔ̃ ungo uwuri ibera abokngo nu uwɔɔ atsima ungo atorho na akũna ungo azĩ anangkɛ ungo uku usi ibeengo izizĩ.>>
21.19: Uyesu arherhe rimi unga adɛyiwe ikpũ akpe Ubitru aka awuri ikpe akpoi Unum. Mɔcɛ unga agɔr Ubitru agɛ, <<Udɔsa umum.>> Uyesu nu ungwɛ̃ imesa uwɔɔ
21.20: Ubitru adzipa arhi undzing anyã ungwɛ̃ imesa ha, uwuruwi Uyesu aka abema aka adɔsa umbɔ. Uwɛrɛ ha unga awu ungwɛ̃ imesa ha uwuku ufata ri ikɔ Uyesu ri ivang iki igha Irhowa Iyiki Igar Utɔng na arhusu Uyesu agɛ, <<A Uteijee, awu ungamɔ awuri igha adakngo?>>
21.21: Ivang Ubitru aka anyã unga, unga arhusu Uyesu agɛ, <<A Uteijee, utsak uwurɛ awu use ikorhe nggu unga?>>
21.22: Uyesu agɛ, <<Umum iba ibee unga abɛk utsɛku umum iki ibvui iba, awu use awe akingo? Awu ufang ungo udɔsa umum!>>
21.23: Akɛrɛ ha atsu arherhe ha atɛ̃rhã ra abika adɔsu Uyesu ugɛ ungwɛ̃ imesa ha asi íkpea. Bɔr Uyesu asi igɔra ugɛ asi íkpea, agɔr agɛ, <<Umum iba ibee unga abɛk utsɛku umum iki ibvui iba, awu use awe akingo?>>
21.24: Uwɛrɛ ha unga awu ungwɛ̃ imesa ha aka ani idzowe ideka ra abin akɛrɛ, ikɛi unga atsɛng ake. Umɛn ihwɛngmɛn idekanga iwu idzidzɛrhe.
21.25: Bɔr abin akɔɔ arhɛrhɛ Uyesu aka akorhe. Agɛ umbɔ atsɛngmbɔ ubɛn ubin, umum ikaifɛrhkɔ ugɛ upfunga kishoo usi íwekpɔ ru ubã ukpuku udɛ̃ɛ̃ unyanga abvurkɛ umbɔ aka itsɛng.

1.1: A uze Utiyofirhu, ru ubvurmum uwu inggbaashia, umum itsɛng abina kishoo akirakɛ Uyesu aka atirha akorhe na amesuwe
1.2: utsɛku unumkpi umbɔ aka ashupa unga afũ azĩ ra afã. Ipfu Isarsatangge iki idarh unga amaa itsu itser ra abi itser Uyesu unga aka asɛng.
1.3: Unga aka ahwa ayetnum amaa, unga adɛyiwe itsinga ra abi itser Uyesu ha na akorhi ikpũ abinkɛ aka atsu umbɔ anyã unga awea ru urhɛ. Unga adzeyiwa ru umbɔ inuma isɔka inaa na arherhe arherhe Iyɛrhe Unum.
1.4: Ivanga niyɔ unga aka asei ighigha nggu umbɔ, unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka niba adzembi ru Urusharhima, bɔr àka adzɛu izũwũ Utɛmum aka abemuwa, umum iki irherha ngge ri igigũmbi.
1.5: Uyohana asorhuwe anera ubɔtisima nggu amɛ̃, bɔr inuma ukunjiir iki iba, awuri isorhuwa umbi ubɔtisima nggu Ipfu Isarsatangge.>>
1.6: Nggee umbɔ aka akɔng, umbɔ arhusa unga agɛ, <<A Uteijee, awu icɛrɛ ungo iki ibvui udzowe iyɛrhe Uisrairha?>>
1.7: Bɔr unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Asi iwea umbi awuri ihwɛng ivanga use inumyɛ Utɛ aka angwɛ̃ ri ijeenga.
1.8: Bɔr umbi awuri iyɛimbi ijee ri ivangyɛ Ipfu Isarsatangge iki icipuwa nu umbi, umbi awuri iwu idekamum ru Urusharhima, nu kishoo abĩ Uyahudiya nu aki Usamariya, uzĩ utsĩ ra abĩã kishoo.>>
1.9: Unga aka arherha akɛrɛ ha amaa, umbɔ ashupa unga ra asumbɔ afũ afafã, nu amɛɛ atsirke unga ri inyĩnyãmbɔ.
1.10: Umbɔ aka atsu asumbɔ arhi izizĩnga ra afã, kanying inera ivaa itsim atorho akika aterha idɛ̃ɛ̃ ikhapa nggu umbɔ.
1.11: Iner ha igɔr umbɔ ugɛ, <<Umbi abi Ugarhirhi, awu use utsu umbi adɛ̃ɛ̃ nggimi anu irhi afã? Uyesu ha umbɔ aka ashupa ru umbi ha akũ azĩmbɔ ra afã, awuri ibvui abanga ru nyaka umbi aka anyã ififũnga ra afã.>> Asɛng Umatiya unga ayɛi itser Uyahuda
1.12: Mɔcɛ umbɔ abvui azĩ Urusharhima adzeku Igũ Acucii Uzaitun, iyiriyɛ iki ikhapa ru Urusharhima, iderngge iki iyongge ukirhomita unying.
1.13: Umbɔ aka azĩ atsĩ, umbɔ afũmbɔ ru ubã afã ra anangkɛ umbɔ aka asei. Awu umbɔ Ubitru, Uyohana, Uyaku nu Uandarawu, Ufirhibu nu Utoma, Ubatorhomi nu Umatiyu, Uyaku ungwɛ̃ Uharhfa nu Usiman Uzarhoti, nu Uyahuda ungwɛ̃ Uyaku.
1.14: Abɛrɛ ha kishoo aka isaka atsu atsimbɔ akɔng ri ifɛn-Num nggu amɛn unying, nggu akatsɛrh abɔɔ nu Umaryamu, uyisa Uyesu, nu angwɛ̃mbɔ Uyesu.
1.15: Inum hã niyɔ Ubitru aka asok adɛ̃ɛ̃ ri ikikɔng abika adɔsa, iyiriyɛ iki iyongge inera unaka ni isɔka ivaa, na agɛ,
1.16: <<Umbi angwɛ̃mɛn nu anapumɛn, awu ufang ngge iki itsuifɛr Arherhu-Num aki Ipfu Isarsatangge iki irherhe ishaisha ra angwĩ Udauda, ri itsi Uyahuda, unga aka agbaashia ra abika adzur Uyesu.
1.17: Unga uwi awe ru umɛn, awea ri itser ri itser iyɛrɛ.>>
1.18: Nggu itosayɛ unga aka akpo iyi amɛn aka abewe, Uyahuda akũ agoi idɛɛ, umɔ unga aka agba nggu itsia, iyora iyar iyanga, abina anaanga kishoo adzeka awiya.
1.19: Kishoo anera ru Urusharhima agũmbɔ akɛrɛ ha, nggee umbɔ ayisi idɛɛ ha agɛ <<Uakarhdama,>> ri idũmbɔ agbena agburh <<Idɛɛ Adzirh.>>
1.20: Unga agɔr agɛ, <<Ubinkutsu atsɛngmbɔ ru Ubvur Ambom ugɛ, << <Uneke iyanga ima iwu arhang, utsur unera aseisa umɔ,> nu, << <Uneke itsernga ikɛi uner uwɔɔ ama anyangu ukam.>
1.21: Nggee awu ufang umɛn isɛng unera unying ra aner abɛrɛ aka awu nggu umɛn ri ivanga kishoo Uteijee Uyesu aka awu nggu umɛn,
1.22: udzur ri ivangyɛ Uyohana aka asorhuwe unga ubɔtisima uba utsĩ ri ivangyɛ umbɔ aka ashupuwe unga ra ateumɛn. Awu ufang umɛn isɛng unera aka awe ru ideka isisoknga ra akpe nggu umɛn.>>
1.23: Nggee umbɔ aden inera ivaa, Uyusuf umbɔ iki iyisa Ubarsabba, ikɛi umbɔ iki iyisa Ujustu, nu Umatiya.
1.24: Mɔcɛ umbɔ afɛn-Num agɛ, <<A Uteijee, ungo uhwɛng amɛn anera kishoo. Ra abɛrɛ ikivarhambɔ, udɛyiwa uwuruwi ungo uku usɛng
1.25: unga anyangi itser uner itser Uyesu, iyi Uyahuda aka aneke na azĩã anang hã aka awe akinga.>>
1.26: Mɔcɛ umbɔ atang isɛng ru umbɔ. Umatiya unga agha, nggee umbɔ atoma unga nggu abi itser Uyesu, udom hã.

2.1: Unum irhowu Upentiko iki iwe, abika adɔsa kishoo akɔng ananga unying.
2.2: Kanying umbɔ agũ irhak iki idzeka afã ru nyaku ugba ukom, udzeka afã uba utɔkpɔ iyakɛ umbɔ aka asei.
2.3: Mɔcɛ umbɔ anyã ubina ru nyaki ikon urha, uku ugasha ucipuwa ra atsimbɔ unying anying.
2.4: Nu kishoo awu nggu Ipfu Isarsatangge, atsĩmbɔ irherhe idũ abikase Ipfu-Num iki idzowe umbɔ ijeea.
2.5: Ri ivang hã ru Urusharhima abi Uyahuda abi iwei Unum aka asei umɔ adzeka ru ubɛn abĩ upfung ukpirɛ.
2.6: Umbɔ aka agũ ubvun ugba ha, anera aka akɔng adzunumbɔ, ubinkutsu ubɛn unera agũ umbɔ arherhe idũnga.
2.7: Umbɔ adzeidzeu akarhãrhã, na arhusa agɛ, <<Kishoo abika arherha arherha ha, asi iwembɔ aner Ugarhirhi?
2.8: Awu use utsu ubɛn unera ru umɛn agũ umbɔ arherhe idũnga?
2.9: Umɛn abɛ iwu abi Upartiya, nu Umadiya nu Uerhama, nu aner abĩ Umesofotamiya, nu abi Uyahudiya nu abi Ukafadokiya, nu abi Upanta nu abi Uasiya,
2.10: nu abi Ufirijiya nu abi Upamfirhiya, aka adzeka abĩ Umasar, nu ikɛi abɔɔ aka akhapa ru abĩ Urhibiya aka akhapa ru Usayirin. Umɛn abɔɔ idzeku Uroma,
2.11: ru umɛn hã, abɔɔ awu abi Uyahuda na abirabɛ aka adzipa adɔsa agbeyambɔ, ikɛi abɔɔ awu abi Ukarita nu abi Urharaba, kishoo iki igũ umbɔ anu irherhe abin idzeu Unum ri idũmɛn!>>
2.12: Kishoo adzeidzeu na adzunumbɔ, agɔr adɔkambɔ agɛ, <<Agben akɛrɛ ha awu use?>>
2.13: Bɔr abɔɔ umɔ ayɛia umbɔ agɛ, <<Ahwa adɛ afĩrhã!>> Ubitru adzowe isarhe ra anera
2.14: Bɔr Ubitru abere nggu umbɔ udom hã, atsarhi irhaknga arherhe arherhe nggu anera agɛ, <<Umbi abimɛn abi Uyahudiya nu kishoo abi Urusharhima, umum idɛyiwa umbi arherhe akɛ, àka akpeto ru ubinkpi umum iki irherhe.
2.15: Anera abɛrɛ asi ifĩrhũmbɔ adɛ ru nyaka umbi aka akaifɛrhkɔ, nggayɛ awu akara utɔɔrha aki ukpee!
2.16: Ĩ'ĩ, awu ubin hã nukpi uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num Uyowɛrh aka arherhe agɛ,
2.17: << <Unum agɔr agɛ, ri inum iyiki imimasha, umum iwuri itsuke Ipfumum ra anera kishoo. Nu awɛkacimbi akatsɛrh na akatsak awuri isɔm Arherhu-Num, na awɛdzɛmmbi awuri inyãmbɔ irhi, nu akakũmbi ikɛi awuri irheyimbɔ urhɔ.
2.18: Ra agãrhãmum akatsɛrh nu akatsak, umum iwuri itsuke Ipfumum ri inum hã, nu umbɔ ikɛi awuri isɔmmbɔ Arherhu-Num.
2.19: Umum iwuri idɛyiwe abin idzeu afafã ra afã, na atsar anɔnɔr nu abĩ, adzirh, nu urha, nu ikɛi azoo aka afĩrhã asok arhɛrhɛ.
2.20: Ishaa unum iwuri idzipa iwu uzĩ, ufɛ̃ ikɛi uwuri iwu uku uzhãĩ ru nyaka adzirh, kata ibiba nggaa ikpikpoi unum ukpu Uteijee.
2.21: Nu ubɛn unera aka afɛn Uteijee awuri ikpoa ififɔrh.>
2.22: <<Umbi abimɛn abi Uisrairha, àka akpeto ra arherhe akɛrɛ, Uyesu aka awu uner Unazarat unerwi Unum aka asɛng unga akorha abin idzeu, nu abin igbigba na atsar, akirakɛ Unum aka akorhe ru umbi ri itsinga, ru nyaka umbi itsikammbi aka ahwɛng.
2.23: Utsak uwurɛ adzowe unga ru umbi ri ikikorhu Unum ikɛi ri itsernga nu ihwihwɛngnga, umbi akũ akusa akwɛr anyapuwe unga nu igãrhãmau ucucii, afɛre unga ra abok abi arhim.
2.24: Bɔr Unum asoyika unga na ashɔɔrka unga ru uver akpe, ubinkutsu akpe asi idɛ̃ɛ̃ akpɔmke unga.
2.25: Udauda arherhunga arherhe ri itsinga agɛ, << <Ubɛn ivang umum inyã Uteijee awu nggu umum. Ubinkutsu unga awe ru ubok ughamum, umum isi ízusumum.
2.26: Nggee amɛnmum agɔm anggɔm, arhɛmmum agũibɛn akarhãrhã iyormum ikɛi iwuri iwosha ri ifosa,
2.27: Ubinkutsu, ungo usi ínekango umum ru udzak, use ungo ineke Usarkasar Unerngo avɔ̃ɔ̃.
2.28: Ungo uku utsu umum ihwɛng utsĩndĩ urhɛ, ungo uwuri itɔka umum nggu anggɔm ra anangngo.>
2.29: <<Umbi abimɛn abi Uisrairha, umum iwemum ri ikeramɛn iki idɛyiwa umbi ugɛ utoka atokamɛn Udauda aka akpea nu umbɔ aka adzakukumbɔ unga, ikɛi udzaknga uwu nggu umɛn uba utsĩ irherɛ.
2.30: Bɔr unga awu uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num, na ahwɛnga Unum aka abemuka unga nggu uyirh agɛ, unga awuri itsu unangnga unying nu utarh isei iyɛrhanga.
2.31: Unga aka anyã, arherha arherhe isisok Ukiristo ra akpe, agɛ asi ínekukumbɔ iyornga ru udzak, iyornga ikɛi isi ívɔ̃ngge.
2.32: Unum aka asoyika Uyesu ha nggu urhɛ, nu umɛn kishoo iwu ideka umɔ ni idzidzɛrha ha.
2.33: Unum adzowe unga imor nu ubok ughanga, unga aka ayɛi ibibemuwe Ipfu Isarsatangge ru Utɛ, na awupuwa ubinkpi umbi aka anyã na agũ icɛrɛ.
2.34: Udauda asi ifũã ra afã, bɔr unga agɔr agɛ, << <Uteijee agɔr Uteijeemum agɛ, <<Usei nu ubok ughamum,
2.35: utsɛku umum iki itsu anggamtsakngo awu ubin uku utsorhe andaidakngo.>> >
2.36: <<Nggee, uneke aner Uisrairha ahwɛng ugɛ, Unum aka atsu Uyesu uwuruwi, umbi aka anyapuwe nu ucucii awu Uteijee na awu Ukiristo ikɛi.>>
2.37: Anera aka agũ rimi, amɛnmbɔ agbɛra adzɛu, na agɔr Ubitru nu abi itser Uyesu abɔɔ, agɛ, <<Umbi angwɛ̃mɛn, umɛn ikorhi uguse?>>
2.38: Ubitru agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka adzipa ra arhimmbi umbɔ asorhuwa umbi ubɔtisima ri itsok Uyesu Ukiristo ngge atsũwe arhimmbi. Ikɛi umbi awuri iyɛimbi izũwũ Ipfu Isarsatangge.
2.39: Ubinkutsu ibibemuwe ha iwu iyimbi nu angwɛ̃mbi nu kishoo abi anang aka ader, umbɔ abirabɛ Uteijee Unummɛn aka awuri iyisa umbɔ.>>
2.40: Nggu irhɛm iyɔɔ irhɛirhɛ unga aka adzowe itsũwã na afituwe umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka afɔrh atsimbi ru ubinkpi uku udzɛu abi amɛn akatãrhã aki udan ukpirɛ.>>
2.41: Abika ayɛi isarhanga hã umbɔ akorhuwe umbɔ ubɔtisima, ru unum hã umbɔ ayombɔ inera anaka agɔnga ataar (3,000) atoma ri irhɛɛmbɔ. Iwɛrhɛ abika adɔsa
2.42: Umbɔ atsu atsimbɔ ri ikpeto ri imesa abi itser Uyesu, nu iwɛrhɛ abika adɔsa, nu itsɔku uborodi ri ifɛn-Num.
2.43: Unum akorha abin igbigba na abin idzeu arhɛrhɛ ru ubok abi itser Uyesu, nu ubɛn unera agũ idzeu.
2.44: Kishoo abika adɔsa awu unying, nu abinmbɔ kishoo awu aki adɔkambɔ.
2.45: Agoyiwe abin ukammbɔ, na agashuwe uhwɛka ra adɔkambɔ uku kpengkpeng ri itsũwãmbɔ.
2.46: Ubɛn unum umbɔ anu ikɔng ru ufɔm Iya-Num nggu amɛn unying. Agha ubingha ananga unying ra ayambɔ, agha na ahwa nggu anggɔm nu itɛnamɛn,
2.47: akpoi Unum na awe ru izama ra anera kishoo. Ubɛn unuma Uteijee anu itomuwe umbɔ abika afɔrh.

3.1: Unuma nukpɔ Ubitru nu Uyohana azɛ̃rhã azĩ ri Iya-Num ri ivang ifɛn-Num ra akara ataar ra atenuma.
3.2: Icɛ unera nuwɔ amar unga akatarhu, ubɛn unuma umbɔ asaka ashupa unga azĩ adene ru angwĩ ufɔm Iya-Num umbɔ iki iyisa agɛ, <<Angwĩ Ufɔm Aka aze,>> nu unga afɛn uhwɛk ru abika azĩ ru ufɔm Iya-Num.
3.3: Unga aka anyã Ubitru nu Uyohana aka awuri itsitsĩ, unga afɛnu uhwɛk ru umbɔ.
3.4: Umbɔ Ubitru nggu Uyohana aka atsu asumbɔ arhi unga, mɔcɛ Ubitru agɔr unga agɛ, <<Urhi umɛn!>>
3.5: Nggee amɛn ukatarhu ha azĩke udikambɔ, akaifɛrhkɔ iyɛi ubin ru umbɔ.
3.6: Bɔr Ubitru agɛ, <<Umum ishimum ru uhwɛk, bɔr ubinkpi umum iki iwurakpɔ ukpɔ umum iki ĩdzaa ungo. Ri itsok Uyesu Ukiristo uwu Unazarat usisok, uzɛ̃rhuzɛ̃rhã.>>
3.7: Akũ ubok akpɔm ubok ughanga abera unga, kanying adaknga ri ikpor adaknga awu akeketake.
3.8: Unga ater isha! Asok adɛ̃ɛ̃, na atirhi uzɛ̃rhã atsĩ ru ufɔm Iya-Num nggu umbɔ, azɛ̃rhã na atengasha na akpoi Unum ikɛi.
3.9: Ivangyɛ kishoo anera aka anyã unga aka azɛ̃rhã na akpoi Unum,
3.10: umbɔ ikɛi ahwɛngmbɔ ugɛ awu unga anu isei ru Angwĩ Ufɔm Iya-Num Aka Aze. Umbɔ adzeidzeu akarhãrhã nggu ubinkpi uku ikorhe nggu unga. Isarhe Ubitru ra angwĩ iya Usorhomon
3.11: Ukatarhu ha aka akpɔm abokmbɔ Ubitru nu Uyohana, mɔcɛ anera kishoo adzeidzeu na atĩ abambɔ ru umbɔ ru anangkɛ umbɔ iki iyisa agɛ angwĩ iya Usorhomon.
3.12: Ubitru aka anyã rimi, unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi aner Uisrairha, awu use utsu akɛrɛ atsu umbi adzeidzeu? Awu use utsu ikɛi umbi arhi umɛn ugɛɛ awu ijeemɛn use awu idɔsu Unummɛn itsu ukatarhu ha azɛ̃rhũ uzɛ̃rhã?
3.13: Unum uwu Uibrahim, Uishaku nu Uyakubu, Unum uwu atokamɛn, unga akpoi ugãrhãnga Uyesu, uwu ha umbi aka adzowe unga umbɔ afɛre, ikɛi umbi aka akpɛ̃mbi unga ra asu Ubirhatu, nggayɛ unga abee itsuwe unga.
3.14: Umbi akpɛ̃mbi Usarkasar ha Uner Uwuku Arhurhika, na afɛna umbɔ atsũwã umbi uner uwuku ufɛr aner.
3.15: Umbi afɛre uner uwuku udzowe urhɛ, bɔr Unum azituka unga ra akpe. Umɛn iwu ideka ra akɛrɛ ha.
3.16: Awu imangmang ru itsok Uyesu, ngge itsu utsak uwurɛ umbi aka ahwɛng na anyã awu akerketawɔ. Awu itsok Uyesu nu imangmangyɛ iki iba ru unga, ngge idzowe utsak uwurɛ ikikerhe, umbi kishoo aka anyãmbi.
3.17: <<Umbi abimɛn, umum ihwɛng awu ida ihwihwɛng itsu umbi akorhe rimi, ru nyaka anggbaashimbi.
3.18: Bɔr awu akɛrɛ ha Unum aka atsu ake atsuafɛr ra arherhakɛ unga aka arherhe ra angwĩ abika asɔm Arherhu-Num kishoo, agɛ Ukiristo awuri ihwa uver.
3.19: Nggee àka adzipa ra arhimmbi, na adɔsu Unum, nggee itsú umbɔ asorhe arhimmbi,
3.20: nu unga ama adene Ukiristo ha, uwuruwi unga aka asɛng unga awu uwu umbi, Uyesu ififɔrhmbi.
3.21: Awu ufang unga asei ra afã utsɛku ivangyɛ Unum aka ifaruwe abina kishoo, ru nyaka unga aka abemuwe ishaisha ra angwĩ asarkasar abika asɔm Arherhu-Num.
3.22: Ubinkutsu Umusa agɔr agɛ, <Uteijee Unummbi awuri iberuwanga umbi uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num uwɔɔ ra abimbi, ru nyaka umum, awu ufang umbi aka igũ ubinkpi unga aka awuri idɛyiwa umbi kishoo.
3.23: Ubɛn unerwi aka asi ikpea ato ru uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num hã, awuri itsũwũkumbɔ unga ra anernga.>
3.24: <<Idzidzɛrhe, kishoo abika asɔm Arherhu-Num, udzur ru Usamairha uba ra asu, kishoo arherhambɔ arherhe aki inum iyɛrɛ.
3.25: Umbi awu abika agha ukam abika asɔm Arherhu-Num, nu ukam ibibemuwe-Num ra atokambi. Unga aka agɔr Uibrahim agɛ, <Ru unangngo anera kishoo ru upfung awuri ikpo idorh.>
3.26: Unum aka aberuwe ugãrhãnga, unga agbaashia adene unga aba ru umbi, ru umbi akpo idorh ri idzipuwe ubɛn unera ru umbi ru utsĩndĩ uwuku ubewanga.>>

4.1: Ivangyɛ umbɔ Ubitru nggu Uyohana aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ arherhe nggu anera, abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu anggbaashi abi idzɛu Iya-Num nu abi Usaduki aba ru umbɔ.
4.2: Umbɔ agũ avɔm, ubinkutsu abi itser Uyesu anu imesuwe anera ugɛ ikom iwuri isongge nggu urhɛ ru nyaku Uyesu aka asok ra akpe.
4.3: Umbɔ adzur umbɔ Ubitru nu Uyohana agbange utsɛku ukpe unum uvaa, ubinkutsu urhɛɛ uku uwekpɔ.
4.4: Bɔr anera arhɛrhɛ abika agũ isarhe ha awe ru imangmang, nu irhɛɛ abika adɔsa iyongge anaka agɔnga atɔ̃ɔ̃.
4.5: Unum uvaa, ayɛrhe nu akakũ nu abika amesuwe ikpem umbɔ akɔng ru Urusharhima.
4.6: Uhanana Ukugɔng Uwuku Udzowe Idɛm-Num awu umɔ, nggu Ukayafa, nu Uyohana, nu Uarhekzanda, nu ikɛi kishoo abirabɛ aka awu ru ubã abika adzowe idɛm-Num.
4.7: Atsu umbɔ akũ Ubitru nu Uyohana aba adɛ̃ɛ̃ ra ateumbɔ, na atirhi irhusa umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi akũ ijee iyikisong use itsok iyikisong akũ akorha akɛrɛ ha?>>
4.8: Mɔcɛ Ubitru, awu nggu Ipfu Isarsatangge, unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi ayɛrhe nu akakũ anera!
4.9: Umbi ayisa umɛn irherɛ, arhusa umɛn icicorhayɛ umbɔ aka akerhuwe ukatarhu uwurɛ, umbi abee ihwɛng ubinkpi uku ukerhuwe unga?
4.10: Umɛn ibee umbi nu abi Uisrairha kishoo ahwɛng ugɛ, awu ri itsok Uyesu Ukiristo uwu Unazarat, uwuruwi umbi aka afɛre unga ri inyapuwe unga nu igãrhãmau ucicii, uwuruwi Unum aka asoyiwe ra akpe, atsu utsak uwirɛ akerhe adɛ̃ɛ̃ akerketawɔ ra asumbi.
4.11: Uyesu ha unga awu << <Utarhkpi umbi abi idzin aka akpɛ̃, ukpɔ uwu utarh angboki idzin.>
4.12: Asi íkpombɔ ififɔrh ru uner uwɔɔ, asi idzowukumbɔ itsok ikɔɔ ru upfung umɛn iki ikpo ififɔrh ri ike.>>
4.13: Ivangyɛ ateiya aka anyã ikeramɛn Ubitru nu Uyohana, umbɔ ahwɛngmbɔ ugɛ umbɔ asi itsĩmbɔ imesa, umbɔ adzeidzeu, na adiki ihwɛng agɛ umbɔ awu nggu Uyesu.
4.14: Bɔr umbɔ aka anyã utsa uwuku ukerhe ha adɛ̃ɛ̃ nggu umbɔ, umbɔ asi ikpombɔ ubinkpi umbɔ aka irherhe.
4.15: Nggee umbɔ atsu umbɔ adzembɔ ru udzepurhe ha, na akɛki itsũwã nggu adɔka.
4.16: Umbɔ arhusa agɛ, <<Umɛn ikorhi uguse nggu anera abɛrɛ? Ubinkutsu anera ru Urusharhima aka ahwɛngmbɔ ugɛ aka akorhumbɔ nggaa abin idzeu ru abok anera abɛrɛ, umɛn isi ídɛ̃ɛ̃ itsɛyimɛn.
4.17: Bɔr utsur arherhe ha atsĩ amaake ra anera, umɛn igbiite atombɔ utsur umbɔ abvui arherhumbɔ arherhe nggu anera ri itsok ha.>>
4.18: Mɔcɛ umbɔ ayisa abi itser Uyesu ha atsu umbɔ niba abvui arherhumbɔ arherhe, use imesa ri itsok Uyesu.
4.19: Bɔr Ubitru nu Uyohana adzipa agɛ, <<Àka avarhe nibikambi irhikungge ra anang Unum umɛn ĩdɔsa arherhambi ni ineke ĩdɔsa Arherhu-Num?
4.20: Ubinkutsu, umɛn isi ídɛ̃ɛ̃ inekukumɛn irherhe ubinkpi umɛn iki igũ ni inyã ikɛi.>>
4.21: Umbɔ aka atoma aziya umbɔ, umbɔ atsũwe umbɔ azĩmbɔ. Asi ikpombɔ ubinkpi umbɔ aka ikorhe na adzowe umbɔ uver, ubinkutsu anera kishoo akpoi Unum ru ubinkpi uku ukorhe.
4.22: Utsa ukatarhu uwuku ukpo idzeu ikikerhe ha, imɛknga iki inangngge isɔka inaa. Ifɛn-Num abika adɔsa
4.23: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka atsũwe umbɔ Ubitru nu Uyohana azĩmbɔ ra abimbɔ, umbɔ asɔme kishoo abinkɛ ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu akakũ aka adɛyiwe umbɔ.
4.24: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka agũ rimi, umbɔ atsarhi irhakmbɔ ri ifɛn-Num nggu amɛn unying agɛ, <<A Uteijee uner ijee kishoo, ungo umuna afã nggu abĩ nu akau akagɔng, nu abina kishoo aka awe ra ake.
4.25: Arherhango ri Ipfu Isarsatangge, ungo uku urherhe ra angwĩ ugãrhãngo, utokamɛn Udauda ugɛ, << <Awu use utsu abĩã kishoo agũ uvɔm nu anera akaifɛrhkɔ iyiki itãrhã?
4.26: Ayɛrhe ru upfung agbopa atsimbɔ abee iwa, nu anggbaashi abĩã akɔng ananga unying awe ru igamtsa nggu Uteijee, nu ikɛi Ukiristonga.>
4.27: Awu idzidzɛrhe, uyɛrhe Uhiridu nu Ubuntu Ubirhatu agbopumbɔ itsi nggu atsen abi Uyahuda nu aner Uisrairha ru uteu ukpirɛ. Awembɔ ri ikpikpɛ̃ɛ̃ nggu ugãrhãngo Uyesu usarkasar, uwuruwi ungo uku usɛng unga awu Ukiristo.
4.28: Umbɔ akorhe abinkɛ kishoo ijeengo nu ibibemango iki itsu ishaisha ugɛ ngge ikorhe.
4.29: A Uteijee, ungo ugũo iziziyambɔ ra atsimɛn nu uma uyike agãrhãngo nggu ikeramɛn irherha arherhango.
4.30: Uberu ubokngo ukpuku ukerhe ikɛi ukorhu nggaa abin idzeu nu igbigba ri itsok ugãrhãngo Uyesu usarkasar.>>
4.31: Umbɔ aka afɛn-Num amaa, anangkɛ umbɔ aka akɔng adiki izizusa. Mɔcɛ atsuke umbɔ kishoo Ipfu Isarsatangge, umbɔ adɛ̃ɛ̃mbɔ irherha Arherhu-Num nggu ikeramɛn. Abika adɔsa agasha abinmbɔ nggu adɔka
4.32: Mɔcɛ kishoo abika adɔsa amɛnmbɔ awu unying. Ubɛn unera asi iwea ru ubin ukamnga, bɔr umbɔ agasha abinkɛ umbɔ aka awurake nggu adɔka.
4.33: Nggu ijee nggaa abi itser Uyesu aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ arherhe isisok Uteijee Uyesu ra akpe, nu imimuta irhɛirhɛ iki iwu ru umbɔ kishoo.
4.34: Unera asi ibee ubin adaka ru umbɔ. Ubinkutsu abi icang irham nu abi aya agoyiwe ake na akũ uhwɛka
4.35: aba adzowe ra abi itser Uyesu, umbɔ agashuwe anera ri itsũwãmbɔ.
4.36: Rimi hã uner itsok Uyusuf aka akorhe awu unang Urhawi, adzeku Usayifuru, uwuruwi abi itser Uyesu iki iyisa unga Ubarnaba, agbena agburh <<Uner uwuku Ufituwe.>>
4.37: Unga aka agoshe icangnga iyɔɔ, unga akũ uhwɛka aba adzowe abi itser Uyesu.

5.1: Unera nuwɔ itsoka igburh Uhananiya, nggu utsɛ̃nga Usafiratu, agoshe icang irhammbɔ iyɔɔ.
5.2: Nggu ihwihwɛng utsɛ̃nga, unga atsũ uhwɛka angwɛ̃ ukpunga na akũ ukpuku ubɔr aba angwɛ̃we ra adak abi itser Uyesu.
5.3: Mɔcɛ Ubitru agɛ, <<A Uhananiya, awu use utsu ungo uneke Ushaitan atsĩ ra amɛnngo? Ungo ugbɛrangwĩ utsuke Ipfu Isarsatangge, ungo ikɛi utsũɔ̃ ubin ukpɔɔ ru uhwɛk icanga?
5.4: Isi iwengge iyingo ungo udɔrhu ugoshe? Ungo uku ugoshe ikɛi, uhwɛka usi iwekpɔ ri ijeengo? Awu use utsu ungo ukaifɛrhkɔ iyiki ikorhu ubin hã? Ungo usi igbɛrangwĩ utsukukɔ unera, ungo ugbɛr utsuke Unum.>>
5.5: Ivangyɛ Uhananiya aka agũ rimi, unga agba nu abĩ akpea. Nggaa iwei ifɛr anera kishoo aka agũ ubinkpi uku ukorhe.
5.6: Mɔcɛ awɛdzɛm aba, akũ atorho abvur ukom iyornga, na akũna unga adzek adzake.
5.7: Aka ayoka akara ataar nu utsɛ̃nga atsĩwã, asi ihwɛngnga ubinkpi uku ukorhe.
5.8: Ubitru arhusa unga agɛ, <<Udɛyiwa umum, awu uhwɛk ha nukpi kishoo umbi aka agoshe icang hã?>> Unga agɛ, <<Ĩĩ, uhwɛk ngge niyɔ.>>
5.9: Ubitru agɔr unga agɛ, <<Awu use utsu umbi agbopa atsimbi na aviri Ipfu Uteijee? Unyã! Adak abika adzake utsakngo akɔ ra angwĩ ubã, umbɔ awuri itsã ungo adzek ikɛi.>>
5.10: Kanying unga agba nu adak Ubitru akpea. Mɔcɛ awɛdzɛm aka atsĩwã aba anyã unga aka akpea, umbɔ ashupa unga adzek azĩ adzak akhapuwe ru udzak utsaknga.
5.11: Nggaa iwei akarhãrhã ifɛr kishoo abika adɔsa nu kishoo abika agũ ifɛrha ha. Abi itser Uyesu akerhuwe anera
5.12: Abi itser Uyesu akorhuwe abin idzeu nu abin igbigba ra anera arhɛrhɛ. Nu abi imangmang kishoo aki isaka akɔng ra Angwĩ Iya Usorhomon.
5.13: Bɔr uner uwɔɔ asi itsĩ atomunga ru umbɔ, kishoo rimi hã anera ana adzowe umbɔ imor.
5.14: Irhɛ akatsak nu akatsɛrh abika awe ru imangmang ru Uteijee ikpurhi idɛ̃ɛ̃ ititoma ri irhɛmbɔ.
5.15: Ubinkpi abi itser Uyesu aka akorhe utsu anera akũ abi irhãrhã adzeka ra atsĩndĩ, abɛta umbɔ nu atakarha nu afarmbɔ, ugɛ Ubitru aba atɔnga, usakanga uma utɔng nu abɔɔ.
5.16: Anera arhɛrhɛ aka adzeyi ri iteu iyiki ikhapa ru Urusharhima, akɔng akũ abi irhãrhã aba nu abirabɛ ípfu iyiki ibewe iki idzowe umbɔ uver, nu kishoo akerhumbɔ. Adzowe abi itser Uyesu uver
5.17: Ukugɔng Uwuku Udzowe Idɛm-Num nu kishoo abirabɛ aka awu nggu unga, awu abi ukpui Usaduki, agũ unyɛ̃ɛ̃ abi itser Uyesu akarhãrhã.
5.18: Ngge itsu umbɔ asok adzur abi itser Uyesu atsuke umbɔ ru ugborzĩ.
5.19: Bɔr ru untsuuka ipfu itser Uteijee itsuruwe angwĩ ubã ugborzĩ hã ikũna umbɔ idzekngge. Igɔr umbɔ igɛ,
5.20: <<Àka azĩ adɛ̃ɛ̃ ru ufɔm Iya-Num na adɛyiwe anera undzuma arherhe akɛrɛ aki urhɛ uwuku ufa.>>
5.21: Ukpekpeka, umbɔ atsĩ ru ufɔm Iya-Num, ru nyaka ngge iki idɛyiwe umbɔ, umbɔ atirhi imesuwe anera. Mɔcɛ Ukugɔng Uwuku Udzowe Idɛm-Num nu abirabɛ aka awu nggu unga aka aba atsĩ, umbɔ akɔng abi udzepurhe, aka awu akakũ Uisrairha kishoo, na adene itser ugɛ akũ abi itser Uyesu ha ru ugborzĩ hã aba.
5.22: Bɔr abi idzɛu Iya-Num azĩ atsĩ ru ugborzĩ hã, abeea umbɔ, umbɔ ashimbɔ umɔ, umbɔ azĩ asɔme umbɔ
5.23: agɛ, <<Umɛn inyã ugborzĩ ugbang uku kpengkpeng, abi idzɛu ikɛi adɛ̃ɛ̃ adzɛu angwĩ ubã, bɔr umɛn iki itsuri, umɛn isi inyãmɛn unera ru ugborzĩ hã.>>
5.24: Anggbaashi abi idzɛu Iya-Num nu ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num aka agũ rimi, amɛnmbɔ aghong akarhãrhã, akaifɛrhkɔ ubinkpi uku ikorhe ri ifɛrhɛ iyɛrɛ ha.
5.25: Mɔcɛ utsa uwɔɔ aba agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka anyã! Abi ha abɛ umbi aka atsuku ugborzĩ adɛ̃ɛ̃ ru ufɔm Iya-Num, anu imesuwe anera.>>
5.26: Mɔcɛ unggbaashi abi idzɛu Iya-Num nggu abi idzɛu ha azĩ akũ abi itser Uyesu aba, bɔr asi ikũmbɔ ri inggang. Anggbaashi ha anu igũ iwei anera utsur umbɔ atang umbɔ atarh.
5.27: Umbɔ aka akũ abi itser Uyesu aba, atsu umbɔ adɛ̃ɛ̃ ra asu abi itser udzepurhe, mɔcɛ Ukugɔng Uwuku Udzowe Idɛm-Num anu irhusa umbɔ.
5.28: Agɛ, <<Umɛn ivangamɛn umbi akarhãrhã igɛ umbi niba abvui amesukumbi anera ri itsok ikɛrɛ ha. Bɔr nggayɛ umbi aka amaakumbi Urusharhima kishoo nggu imesambi ikɛi umbi abee itsuka umɛn uvau adzirh utsa ha!>>
5.29: Bɔr Ubitru nu abi itser Uyesu abɔɔ agɛ, <<Awu ufang umɛn iki idɔsa arherhu Unum inangmɛn arherhe anera!
5.30: Unum uwu atokamɛn unga asoyiwe Uyesu ra akpe, uwuruwi umbi aka afɛre ri inyapuwe unga ni igãrhãmau ucucii.
5.31: Unum aka aberuwe unga, atsu unga asei ru ubok ughanga, awu unggbaashi na awu Uner Uwuku Ufɔrh ikɛi na atsuruwe Uisrairha utsĩndĩ idzidzipambɔ ikɛi akpo itsũwe arhim.
5.32: Umɛn iwu ideka ri ifɛrha iyɛrɛ ha, iwu rimi ikɛi Ipfu Isarsatangge, iyiriyɛ Unum aka adzowe abika adɔsa unga.>>
5.33: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka agũ rimi, umbɔ agũ avɔm akarhãrhã na abee ifɛre umbɔ.
5.34: Bɔr utsa Ufarisi uwɔɔ itsoka igburh Ugamarhiyerh, uwuku umesuwe Íkpem Umusa, uwuruwi anera kishoo aki asaka adzowe unga imor, asok adɛ̃ɛ̃ ru udzepurhea, atsu umbɔ akũ abi itser Uyesu adzeka awiya kata.
5.35: Mɔcɛ unga agɔr abi udzepurhe ha agɛ, <<Umbi abimɛn Uisrairha àka angwɛ̃dzɛn na arhi anyã ubinkpi umbi aka abee ikorhuwe anera abɛrɛ.
5.36: Ivanga niyɔ isha uner uwɔɔ aka adzeka, itsoka igburh Utuda, anyangi itsinga awu ubin ukpɔɔ. Anera ayombɔ anaka anaa aki idɔsa unga, bɔr afɛrkumbɔ unga, na asitukumbɔ abika adɔsa unga, ake awu imimashambɔ.
5.37: Akɛrɛ ha aka amaa ikɛi, uwɔɔ itsoka igburh Uyahuda utsa Ugarhirhi adzeka ri ivangyɛ umbɔ aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ ivarhe irhɛ anera atsu anera adɔsa unga umbɔ awe ru igamtsa nggu agomnati. Unga ikɛi afɛrkumbɔ unga, abika adɔsa unga kishoo asitumbɔ.
5.38: Nggee, umum idzaa umbi itsũwã, àka adzembi ru utsĩndĩ anera abɛrɛ, àka neke umbɔ azĩmbɔ! Ubinkutsu ibibemambɔ use itsermbɔ iba iwu iyi anera, iwuri isitungge.
5.39: Bɔr itsermbɔ ha iba idzeku Unum, umbi asi ídɛ̃ɛ̃ akɛnmbi umbɔ, utsur umbi awembi ri ifuw nggu Unum.>> Nggee umbɔ ayɛimbɔ itsũwã Ugamarhiyerh.
5.40: Umbɔ ayisa abi itser Uyesu ha, atsu umbɔ akwɛre umbɔ ugwɛɛ. Na avange atombɔ utsur umbɔ arherhumbɔ arherhe ri itsok Uyesu, na atsũwe umbɔ azĩmbɔ.
5.41: Abi itser Uyesu ha asok azĩmbɔ agɔm akarhãrhã agɛ Unum anyã umbɔ amɛ̃ɛ̃mbɔ ihwa uver nu atsa ri itsok Uyesu.
5.42: Ubɛn unuma, umbɔ asi inekukumbɔ imesuwe anera ri idzowe Isarhe Iyiki Ize ri Iya-Num nu aya ugɛ Uyesu unga awu Ukiristo.

6.1: Ri inum hã angwɛ̃ imesa anu ititoma arhɛrhɛ, umɔ abi Uyahuda abika agũ idũ abi Uherhini atsĩmbɔ ibvun arherhe ri itsi abi Uyahuda abika agũ idũ abi Ibrani ubinkutsu abika agau ubingha ubɛn unuma anu irhi atsɛ̃rhãpfu abi idũ Uherhini uku ungwaan.
6.2: Nggee umbɔ usɔkdũmɛn hã ayisa anera kishoo angwɛ̃ imesa agɛ, <<Isi irhikungge umɛn ineke isarhe Arherhu-Num ni itsĩmɛn igashu ubingha.
6.3: Umbi angwɛ̃mɛn nu anapumɛn, àka asɛng inera utɔɔva ra abimbi abirabɛ umbɔ aka ahwɛng umbɔ awu nggu Ipfu-Num nu itsoi. Umɛn iki idzowe itser iyɛrɛ ru umbɔ,
6.4: nu umɛn itsu amɛnmɛn ri ifɛn-Num ni imesuwe Arherhu-Num.>>
6.5: Abika adɔsa kishoo agũibɛn ubinkpi umbɔ aka arherhe. Mɔcɛ umbɔ asɛng Uistifanu, uwuruwi aka awe ru imangmang akarhãrhã na awu nggu Ipfu Isarsatangge, nu Ufirhibu nu Uburokora nu Unikano, nu Utimon, nu Ubarmina, nu Unikorha aka adzeku Uantakiya, adzipa atsĩ agbeyi abi Uyahuda.
6.6: Umbɔ akũ anera abɛrɛ aba aden ra asu abi itser Uyesu, umbɔ aka afɛn-Num na atsoyiwe umbɔ abok.
6.7: Nggee Arherhu-Num atɛ̃rhã. Irhɛ angwɛ̃ imesa ru Urusharhima ikpurhi idɛ̃ɛ̃ itoma akarhãrhã, nu arhɛrhɛ abika adzowe idɛm-Num adɔsumbɔ imangmang hã. Adzur Uistifanu
6.8: Uistifanu, awu nggu imimuta nu ijee akarhãrhã, akorha abin akagɔng aki idzeu nu aki igbigba ra anera.
6.9: Bɔr abɔɔ abi ubã ifɛn-Num ukpɔɔ umbɔ iki iyisa agɛ Ubã Ifɛn-Num Abika Adzek Ukam, asoyimbɔ uning nggu Uistifanu. Abɛrɛ ha awu abi Uyahuda abika adzeku Usayirin nu Uarhekzandiriya, nu ikɛi abika adzeka abĩ Ukirhikiya, nu aki Uasiya.
6.10: Bɔr afɔr uning adambɔ nggu itsoi iyi Ipfu-Num iki idzowe unga arherhe.
6.11: Mɔcɛ umbɔ aghɔ̃rhã agɔr anera abɔɔ ri iwɔk umbɔ agɛ, <<Umɛn igũ Uistifanu anu irhenu Umusa na arhenu Unum ikɛi.>>
6.12: Nggee umbɔ asoyiwe amɛn anera nu akakũ nu abika amesuwe ikpem. Umbɔ asok adzur Uistifanu akũ azĩmbɔ ra asu abi udzepurhe.
6.13: Umbɔ akũ anera abi ideka igbɛrangwĩ aba, umbɔ agɔr agɛ, <<Utsak uwurɛ ubɛn unuma unga anu irherhi iyiki itãrhã ru usarkasar anang akɛrɛ nu Íkpem Umusa ikɛi.
6.14: Umɛn igũ unga agɔr agɛ Uyesu uner Unazarat ha awuri ibibupuwe anang akɛrɛ na afaruwe agbeyi Umusa aka abɔra umɛn.>>
6.15: Kishoo abika asei ru udzepurhe ha awing asumbɔ arhi Uistifanu, anyã asunga awu ru nyaka aki ipfu itser-Num.

7.1: Mɔcɛ Ukugɔng Uwuku Udzowe Idɛm-Num arhusu Uistifanu agɛ, <<Arherha akɛrɛ ha awu idzidzɛrhe?>>
7.2: Uistifanu agɛ, <<Umbi angwɛ̃mɛn nu atesmɛn, àka akpeto ru umum! Unum uwuku ukpukpoi adzeka ru utokamɛn Uibrahim ri ivangyɛ unga aka awu ra abĩ Umesofotamiya, unga anasi iseisa ru Uharan.
7.3: Unum agɔr unga agɛ, <Uso ra abĩmbi, ubɔre abimbi, uzĩ abĩkɛ umum iki idɛyiwa ungo.>
7.4: <<Nggee unga asoka abĩ abi Ukarhdi, azĩ aseisa ru Uharan. Utɛnga aka akpe amaa, Unum adene unga aba ra abĩkɛ umbi aka asei umɔ icɛrɛ.
7.5: Unum asi idzowuka Uibrahim ukam abĩ hã, uko ider udaka unying. Bɔr Unum abemuka unga agɛ unga awuri itsu abĩ hã awu akinga nggu unangnga iki idɔsu undzingnga, nggayɛ Uibrahim ana ashia ru ungwɛ̃ ri ivang hã.
7.6: Unum arherhe nggu unga agɛ, <Unangngo awuri iwemgbɔ atsen ra abĩ akase, abi abĩ hã awuri itsu umbɔ igãrhã, awuri idzowe umbɔ ayetnum imɛka inaka inaa.
7.7: Umum iwuri itsukukũ uver ra abĩ hã umbɔ aka iwu igãrhã. Akɛrɛ ha aka imaa ikɛi, unang Uibrahim awuri idze adzaa umum igɔng ra anang akɛrɛ.>
7.8: Unum adzowe Uibrahim ibibemuwe utsar ukpu usorhe. Uibrahim aka amar Uishaku, unga asorhuwe unga ru unum ukpu utɔrɔk. Uishaku unga amar Uyakubu, Uyakubu amar atokamɛn usɔkdũmɛn.
7.9: <<Atokamɛn hã agũ unyɛ̃ɛ̃ ungwɛ̃mbɔ aka agburh Uyusuf, umbɔ agoshe unga azĩã igãrhã ru Umasar. Bɔr Unum awu nggu unga,
7.10: atsũwũka unga ri inyãyernga kishoo. Unum ikɛi atsu Uyusuf awu uner itsoi awe ru izama ra asu Ufir'auna uyɛrhe Umasar, nggee unga atsu unga awu ugomna Umasar ru udzepurhenga kishoo.
7.11: <<Mɔcɛ imerh itsĩngge abĩ Umasar kishoo nu Ukan'ana, itoma nggu ayetnum akarhãrhã, itsu atokamɛn ashimbɔ ru ubingha.
7.12: Ivangyɛ Uyakubu aka agũ ugɛ ubingha uwekpɔ ru Umasar, unga adene atokamɛn azĩmbɔ Umasar uzɛ̃rhã ukpu inggbaashia.
7.13: Ru uzɛ̃rhãmbɔ ukpu uvaa Uyusuf adɛyiwe itsikamnga ru angwɛ̃mbɔ, mɔcɛ Ufir'auna ikɛi ahwɛng abi iyambɔ Uyusuf.
7.14: Akɛrɛ aka amaa Uyusuf atsu umbɔ ayisuwe utɛnga Uyakubu asok aba ru unga, nu kishoo abi iyambɔ, awu isɔka utɔɔva na atɔ̃ɔ̃.
7.15: Mɔcɛ Uyakubu azĩã Umasar. Ru nggɔɔ ha unga nggu atokamɛn aka akpe,
7.16: na akũ akom ayormbɔ azĩmbɔ Ushekem, adzake umbɔ ru udzak ukpu Uibrahim aka agoi nggu uhwɛk uazurhfa ru ubok awɛ Uhamor ru Ushekem.
7.17: <<Bɔr ivangyɛ iki itsuifɛr iyi ibibemuwe-Num ru Uibrahim iki iyok, anermɛn atɛ̃rhã akarhãrhã ra abĩ Umasar.
7.18: Mɔcɛ uyɛrhe uwɔɔ ru Umasar, uwuruwi aka asi ihwɛngnga Uyusuf agha iyɛrhe Umasar.
7.19: Unga agha urha unangmɛn na ayɔm atokamɛn na atsu umbɔ atãyĩwe irheng angwɛ̃mbɔ ngge ikpeyi.
7.20: <<Ivang hã niyɔ umbɔ aka amar Umusa, unga awu uzeze ungwɛ̃. Anɛta unga afɛ̃ɛ̃ ataar ri iya utɛnga.
7.21: Umbɔ aka angwɛ̃we unga ra awiya, unapa Ufir'auna unga ashupa unga akpɔm ru nyaku ungwɛ̃nga.
7.22: Amesuwe Umusa ri kishoo itsoi abi Umasar na awe ru ijee ra arherhe nu ikikorhe.
7.23: <<Ivangyɛ Umusa aka atsĩ imɛka isɔka inaa, unga avarhe na asok azĩã iyepa angwɛ̃mbɔ abi Uisrairha.
7.24: Unga aka anyã utsa Umasar aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ iyɔm ungwɛ̃mbɔ, unga azĩ ayɛsuwe ungwɛ̃mbɔ afɛruka utsa Umasar ha.
7.25: Umusa akaifɛrhkɔ agɛ abimbɔ awuri ihwɛngmbɔ ugɛ Unum awuri ikũ unga akũ afɔrh umbɔ, bɔr umbɔ asi ihwɛngmbɔ.
7.26: Unum uvaa, Umusa aba anyã abi Uisrairha avaa aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ ifuw. Unga abee igbopa atsimbɔ akũwe umbɔ ididɔɔr, agɔr agɛ, <Umbi anerabɛ, umbi awu angwɛ̃yi. Awu use utsu umbi ayɔm adɔka?>
7.27: <<Bɔr uwuku uyɔm undɔkanga hã ayiru Umusa adene ri ifɛna na agɛ, <Ungaa atsu ungo uwu uyɛrhamɛn, nu uwuku utsu uvau ru umɛn?
7.28: Ungo ubee ifɛre umum ru nyaka ungo uku ufɛr utsa Umasar arhɛkɛ ha?>
7.29: Ivangyɛ Umusa aka agũ rimi, unga atĩ azĩã Umidiyan, umɔ unga awea utsen ru nggɔɔ ha unga amar awɛkaci avaa akatsa.
7.30: <<Imɛka isɔka inaa iki itɔng, ipfu itser-Num idzeka ra asu Umusa ra arhum ri ikon urha iki igar ru ufum uku ukhapa ri Igũ Usinai.
7.31: Ivangyɛ Umusa aka anyã rimi, unga adzeidzeu umɔ. Unga aka agɔpa azĩ na agbisha arhi, unga agũ urhɛm Uteijee uku ugɔr ugɛ,
7.32: <Awu umum Unum uwu atokango, Unum uwu Uibrahim, nu Uishaku nu Uyakubu.> Iyor Umusa izang unga afɔr irhi adaka.
7.33: <<Mɔcɛ Uteijee agɔr unga agɛ, <Utsũwe abadakngo, anangkɛ ungo uku udɛ̃ɛ̃ umɔ awu asarkasar abĩ.
7.34: Idzidzɛrhe, umum inyãmum ayetnum anermum ru Umasar. Umum iki igũmum akpembɔ, umum icipuwa iba ishɔɔte umbɔ. Icɛrɛ uba umum idena ungo ubvui uzĩ Umasar.>
7.35: <<Awu Umusa ha nuwi umbɔ aka akpɛ̃ na agɛ, <Ungaa atsuka ungo uwu uyɛrhamɛn nu uwu uwuku utsu uvau ru umɛn?> Unga hã Unum aka adene unga awu unggbaashi na awu uwuku ufɔrh, ru ubok ipfu itser-Num hã iki idzeka ru unga ru ufum hã.
7.36: Unga akũna umbɔ adzeku Umasar na akorha abin idzeu nu abin igbigba ru Umasar, ru Ukau uku Ubãrhã nu ikɛi ra arhum imɛka isɔka inaa.
7.37: <<Umusa ha unga agɔr abi Uisrairha agɛ, <Unum awuri idzaanga umbi uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num ra anermbi ru nyaka umum.>
7.38: Unga awu nggu ikikɔng atokamɛn abi Uisrairha ra arhum, nggu ipfu itser-Num hã iki irherha arherhe nggu unga ni Igũ Usinai, nu nggu atokamɛn, na ayɛi arherhe urhɛ aka adzeku Unum akũ akũwã umɛn.
7.39: <<Bɔr atokamɛn akpɛ̃mbɔ idɔsa arherhanga hã. Akpɛ̃mbɔ unga, na agũ ikpona ibvui izĩ abĩ Umasar ra amɛnmbɔ.
7.40: Agɔr Uharuna agɛ, <Ugbishuwa umɛn anum abirabɛ aka idarh umɛn. Umusa ha aka akũna umɛn adzeka ra abĩ Umasar, umɛn isi ihwɛngmɛn ubinkpi uku ukpo unga!>
7.41: Ivang hã niyɔ umbɔ aka agbishu ugberhe usaku ungwɛ̃ inak. Adzowe idɛm ru umgbɔ anu izek irhowa agɔm anggɔm nu ubinkpi umbɔ aka akũ abokmbɔ agbisha.
7.42: Bɔr Unum adzipu undzingnga nggu umbɔ. Na aneke umbɔ atsĩ idzowe igɔng ru ídzɛr afã ngge iwu anummbɔ. Akɛrɛ ha awu uku kpengkpeng nggu ubinkpi umbɔ aka atsɛng ru abvur abika asɔm Arherhu-Num agɛ, << <Umbi angwãmbi ijuɛ na adzaambi umum idɛm ri imɛka isɔka inaa ra arhum, umbi abi iya Uisrairha?
7.43: Umbi azɛ̃rhã nggu ishia Umorhek nu idzɛɛr ugberhe Urifan, agberhe aki ha umbi aka agbisha adzowe ake igɔng. Ngge iki iwu rimi, umum iwiwayiwe umbi ra abĩmbi,> ifaru Ubabirha itɔng.
7.44: <<Atokamɛn awe ru utsurha uwuruwi uku utsu umbɔ ahwɛng ideka Unum ru umbɔ ra arhum. Awu umgbɔ, uwu utsurhawi Unum aka atsu Umusa agbisha, ikɛi umbɔ agbisha umgbɔ uku kpengkpeng ubinkpi Unum aka adɛyiwe Umusa.
7.45: Utsurha ha ruwɔ atokamɛn aka akũ umgbɔ aba ra abĩ akɛrɛ umbɔ aka ayɛi ri ivang Ujoshuwa, Unum aka awayiwe atsen ra asumbɔ. Umgbɔ uwu umɔ uba utsĩ ivang Udauda,
7.46: unga aka awe ru imimuta Unum, na afɛna agɛ unga amaa adzine anang ru Unum uwu utokamɛn Uyakubu.
7.47: Bɔr awu Usorhomon unga adzine iya ha.
7.48: <<Rimi hã Nggaa Uwuku Ugɔng asi iseisa ri iyakɛ aki anera iki idzin. Ubin ukpu uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num aka agɔr agɛ,
7.49: << <Afã awu anang isei iyɛrhamum, nu upfung uwu anangkɛ umum iki iden andaidakmum. Ikpũ iya iyikisong umbi aka idzina umum? Uteijee agɔr. Use anang akasong awu anang akika uwoshamum?
7.50: Asi iwea abokmum adzin abin akɛrɛ ha kishoo?>
7.51: <<Umbi agbau abi igbĩrhĩ anera, nggu amɛn akika asheru usorhe nu ato! Umbi awe ru nyaka atokambi, ubɛn ivang umbi asi idɔsumbi Ipfu Isarsatangge.
7.52: Ra abika asɔm Arherhu-Num, uwukusong atokambi asi idzowukumbɔ unga uver? Afɛrkumbɔ abirabɛ aka arherhe arherhe ri itsi uwuku ububa Uwuku Arhurhika ha. Nu umbi igambi aghambi adaknga, umbi afɛre unga.
7.53: Umbi ayɛimbi Íkpem iyiki itsu itser ru ubok ípfu itser-Num bɔr umbi asi idɔsumbi.>> Atang atarh nu Uistifanu
7.54: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka agũ rimi, amɛnmbɔ adak akarhãrhã, afar anyĩmbɔ agũ avɔm nggu unga.
7.55: Bɔr Uistifanu awu nggu Ipfu Isarsatangge, awing asunga arhi afã anyã ikpikpoi Unum, nu Uyesu aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ nu ubok ugha Unum.
7.56: Uistifanu agɛ, <<Àka anyã, umum inyã afã atsuri nu Ungwɛ̃-Ner adɛ̃ɛ̃ nu ubok ugha Unum.>>
7.57: Bɔr umbɔ akũ abok abvure atombɔ, atsarhi irhakmbɔ atsuyi ivum awirhi azĩ ru unga,
7.58: akũna unga adzek azĩ undzing utepa, adɛ̃ɛ̃ atang unga atarh nu unga. Abika adzowe ideka igbɛrangwĩ hã angwɛ̃we atorhambɔ nggu uwɛdzɛm uwɔɔ agburh Ushawurhu.
7.59: Umbɔ aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ itang atarh nu unga, umɔ Uistifanu afɛn-Num agɛ, <<A Uteijee Uyesu, uyɛi ipfumum.>>
7.60: Mɔcɛ unga atararhu, na atsarhi irhaknga agɛ, <<A Uteijee niba ukpɔmmɔ arhim akɛrɛ nu atsimbɔ.>> Unga aka arherhe rimi amaa, na akpea.

8.1: Ushawurhu awu umɔ abemuka ifɛr Uistifanu. Uver ha utsu abika adɔsa asitumbɔ Ru unum hã nggaa uver utsĩkpɔ ra abika adɔsa ru Urusharhima, asituwe umbɔ kishoo ra abĩ abi Uyahudiya nu aki Usamariya, akpurha abɔre abi itser Uyesu.
8.2: Mɔcɛ aner Unum adzake Uistifanu, aciu akpenga akarhãrhã.
8.3: Bɔr Ushawurhu akpurha adɛ̃ɛ̃ idzowe uver ra abika adɔsa akarhãrhã. Atsĩrhã aya aya, adzui akatsak nu akatsɛrh atsuyiwe umbɔ ru ugborzĩ. Ufirhibu ru Usamariya
8.4: Abɔrɔ ha umbɔ aka asituwe adzowe Isarhe Iyiki Ize ri inangyɛ umbɔ aka azĩ.
8.5: Ufirhibu azĩã uteu Usamariya, adzowe isarhe Ukiristo umɔ.
8.6: Anera aka agũ, na anyã abin idzeukɛ unga aka akorhe umbɔ angwɛ̃ amɛnmbɔ ru ubinkpi unga iki irherhe.
8.7: Ípfu iyiki ibewe itsuyi ivum ni idzeyingge ru ayor anera arhɛrhɛ, akerhuwe abi ishayi iyor na akatarhu arhɛrhɛ.
8.8: Nggee umbɔ agɔm anggɔm akarhãrhã ru uteu ha. Usiman uner igoka
8.9: Unera nuwɔ itsoka igburh Usiman anu itser igoka adzowe idzeu ra anera kishoo ru uteu Usamariya. Anu iberi itsinga agɛ unga awu nggaa uner.
8.10: Nu anera kishoo, uwuku ugɔng nu uwuku uci, atsu amɛnmbɔ nu unga anu igɔr agɛ, <<Utsak uwurɛ awe ru ijee iyi Unum umbɔ iki iyisa nggaa Ijee.>>
8.11: Umbɔ adɔsa unga ubinkutsu aka adera unga aka anu ikorhuwe umbɔ abin idzeu nggu igbigba igokanga.
8.12: Bɔr umbɔ aka awe ru imangmang ri Isarhe Iyiki Ize iyiriyɛ Ufirhibu aka arherhe iyi Iyɛrhe Unum nu iyi itsok Uyesu Ukiristo, asorhuwe umbɔ ubɔtisima, akatsak nu akatsɛrh.
8.13: Usiman nibikanga awea ri imangmang, umbɔ aka asorhuwe unga ubɔtisima ikɛi unga adɔsunga Ufirhibu ubɛn anang. Unga aka anyã Ufirhibu akorha atsar nu abin idzeu, unga adzeidzeu akarhãrhã.
8.14: Abi itser Uyesu aka awe ru Urusharhima aka agũ abi Usamariya aka ayɛimbɔ Arherhu-Num, umbɔ adene umbɔ Ubitru nggu Uyohana azĩ ru umbɔ.
8.15: Umbɔ aka azĩ atsĩ, umbɔ afɛne-Num ru umbɔ ama ayɛi Ipfu Isarsatangge,
8.16: ubinkutsu, Ipfu Isarsatangge ina isi icipuwangge nu unyinga umbɔ kata, akpurha akorhuwe umbɔ ubɔtisima ri itsok Uteijee Uyesu.
8.17: Mɔcɛ Ubitru nu Uyohana atsorhuwe abok nu umbɔ, umbɔ ayɛi Ipfu Isarsatangge.
8.18: Usiman aka anyã ugɛ awu itsorha abok abi itser Uyesu iki isaki itsu ikpo Ipfu-Num, unga adzowe umbɔ uhwɛk.
8.19: Na agɛ, <<Udzaa umum ijee ha igamum, umum ĩba itsorhumum ubok nu ubɛn unera unga akpo Ipfu Isarsatangge.>>
8.20: Ubitru agɔr unga agɛ, <<Uhwɛkngo nggu ungo aka atsim, ungo ukaifɛrhkɔ ugɛ ungo ukũ uhwɛk uyɛi izũwũ Unum!
8.21: Ungo ushiɔ ru ugau ri itser iyɛrɛ, ubinkutsu, amɛnngo asi irhikuke ra asu Unum.
8.22: Udzipa ru iyiki ibewa iyɛrɛ nu ufɛn-Num ru Uteijee. Use unga awuri itsũwãnga ungo ri ikpũ ifɛrhkɔ iyɛrɛ ra amɛnngo.
8.23: Ubinkutsu umum inyã amɛnngo awu nggu unyɛ̃ɛ̃ akarhãrhã aka abow ra arhim.>>
8.24: Mɔcɛ Usiman agɛ, <<Àka afɛnuwa umum Uteijee, utsur abin hã umbi aka arherhe akorhuke nggu umum.>>
8.25: Ivangyɛ umbɔ Ubitru nggu Uyohana aka amaa idzowe isarhe Arherhu Uteijee, umbɔ abvui azĩmbɔ Urusharhima, adzowe Isarhe Iyiki Ize ri iteu Usamariya irhɛirhɛ. Ufirhibu nu uner Uitiyofiya
8.26: Icɛ ipfu itser Uteijee igɔr Ufirhibu igɛ, <<Uso uzĩ unɔr utsĩndĩ arhum uwuku udzeku Urusharhima uzĩ Ugaza.>>
8.27: Nggee unga asok adzek azĩã, unga agbopu uner Uitiyofiya uwuruwi aka awu unggbaashi, abika angwɛ̃ kishoo abin Ukadi uyɛrhe Uitiyofiya, aka awu ukutsɛrh. Aka azĩ Urusharhima idzowe igɔng.
8.28: Unga awu ru utsĩndĩ uwuku uzĩ usoi, asei ru ikar inyãwãnga anu ivarhu ubvur uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num Uishaya.
8.29: Ipfu-Num igɔr Ufirhibu igɛ, <<Uzĩ ukhapa nu ikar inyãwã iyɔrɔ.>>
8.30: Ufirhibu atĩ azĩ nu ikar inyãwã hã agũ utsa ha adɛ̃ɛ̃ ivarhe ubvur uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num Uishaya. Ufirhibu arhusa unga agɛ, <<Ungo ugũ utaingo ubinkpi ungo uku uvarhe?>>
8.31: Unga agɛ, <<Umum ikorhi iguse, unera aba asi igbisha adɛyiwanga umum?>> Na ayisu Ufirhibu afũ ikar inyãwã hã umbɔ asei.
8.32: Uner Uitiyofiya ha adɛ̃ɛ̃ ivarhe ubvur Arherhu-Num aka agɔr ugɛ, <<Adarh unga ru nyaki idɔi azĩmbɔ ingwĩngwã, ru nyaku ungwɛ̃ itsurhi iki unukutata ru ubok uwuku ukone igwar iyorngge, unga asi iyangunga angwĩnga.
8.33: Akwɛɛte unga na akɛnmbɔ unga idzidzɛrhanga. Ungaa idɛ̃ɛ̃ arherhe arherhe ri itsi unangnga? Ubinkutsu anyangu urhɛnga adzembɔ ru upfung.>>
8.34: Uner Uitiyofiya ha arhusu Ufirhibu, agɛ, <<Udɛyiwa umum, kabɔɔ, uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num hã arherhe arherhe ha ri itsi ungaa, ri itsinga use ri itsi uner uwukuse?>>
8.35: Mɔcɛ Ufirhibu atirhi nu ugbɛr itsɛng Arherhu-Num uwu ha adzowe unga Isarhe Iyiki Ize iyi Uyesu.
8.36: Umbɔ awe ru uzɛ̃rhã nú utsĩndĩ hã, azĩ anyã amɛ̃, Uner Uitiyofiya ha agɛ, <<Unyã amɛ̃ akɛ! Awu use ikɛn umum isi ísorhmum ubɔtisima?>>
8.38: Unga atsu umbɔ ajimu ikar inyãwã hã ngge idɛ̃ɛ̃. Umbɔ Ufirhibu nggu utsa ha ikivarhambɔ acipa atsĩmbɔ ra amɛ̃. Mɔcɛ Ufirhibu asorhuwe ubɔtisima ru utsa ha.
8.39: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka adzeka ra amɛ̃, Ipfu Uteijee ishupungge Ufirhibu, Uner Uitiyofiya ha asi ibvui anyã unga ikɛi, bɔr azĩã uzɛ̃rhãnga na agɔm anggɔm.
8.40: Ufirhibu, anyã itsinga, ru Uazotu. Umɔ unga atsĩrhã ri kishoo iteu, adzise Isarhe Iyiki Ize azĩ atsĩã Ukaisariya.

9.1: Ri ivang hã Ushawurhu anu igha unggbaashi nggu iziya angwɛ̃ imesu Uteijee. Unga asok azĩã ru Ukugɔng Uwuku Udzowe Idɛm-Num,
9.2: ashɔ̃rhã unga amaa atsɛng abvur adzowe anggbaashi abã ifɛn-Num ru Udimashku, ubinkutsu unga aba azĩ akpoa abika adɔsu Utsĩndĩ Uteijee, akatsak use akatsɛrh, unga abow umbɔ akũ aba Urusharhima.
9.3: Unga aka azɛ̃rhã azĩ akhapa nggu Udimashku, kanying irhirhang idzeka afã irhang idzipa unga.
9.4: Unga agba anu nu abĩ na agũ urhɛm ukpɔɔ uku ugɔr unga ugɛ, <<A Ushawurhu, a Ushawurhu, awu use utsu ungo udzaa umum uver?>>
9.5: Ushawurhu arhusa agɛ, <<Awu ungo ungaa Uteijee?>> Urhɛm hã ugɔr ugɛ, <<Awu umum Uyesu uwuruwi ungo uku udɛ̃ɛ̃ idzowe uver.
9.6: Icɛrɛ usisok utsĩ ru utepa, nggɔɔ ha umbɔ awuri idɛyiwambɔ ubinkpi awu ufang ungo iki ikorhe.>>
9.7: Abika azɛ̃rhã nggu Ushawurhu afɔr arherhe adambɔ, umbɔ agũmbɔ urhɛm hã na asi inyãmbɔ unera.
9.8: Ushawurhu asoka abĩ na ayanga asunga bɔr asi idɛ̃ɛ̃ anyã ubin. Nggee umbɔ akpɔm aboknga adarh unga atsĩ ru Udimashku.
9.9: Unga amaa inuma itaar, asunga awu ibvuta, asi ighaa na asi ihwaa ubin ikɛi.
9.10: Ungwɛ̃ imesa Uyesu nuwɔ ru Udimashku itsoka igburh Uhananiya. Uteijee ayisa unga ru irhi agɛ, <<A Uhananiya!>> Unga anyũwã agɛ, <<Umumwi, Uteijee.>>
9.11: Uteijee ha agɔr unga agɛ, <<Usisok utsĩ ri iya Uyahuda nu utsĩndĩ uwɔ umbɔ iki iyisa agɛ uku Urhirhiki urhusa ugɛ use uner Utarsu itsoka iki igburh Ushawurhu awu umɔ, unggawɔ adɛ̃ɛ̃ ifɛn-Num mɔnɔ.
9.12: Ru irhi unga aka anyã unerwi aka agburh Uhananiya aka aba atsorhu ubok nu unga, unga abvui anyãã ikɛi.>>
9.13: Uhananiya agɛ, <<A Uteijee, umum iki nggũshumum arherhe utsak uwirɛ ra anera arhɛrhɛ, nu amɛn aka abewe unga aki ikorhuwe abika adɔsa ungo akarhãrhã ru Urusharhima.
9.14: Nggayɛ ikɛi ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num aka adzowukumbɔ unga ijee iyiki idzui kishoo abirabɛ aka afɛn ungo.>>
9.15: Bɔr Uteijee agɔr Uhananiya agɛ, <<Uzĩ! Awu utsa ha uwi umum iki isɛng unga aka itɔ̃ itser iyiki idzowe isarhe itsokmum ra atsen abi Uyahuda nu ayɛrhambɔ nu aner Uisrairha.
9.16: Umum iwuri idɛyikũ unga ikpũ ayetnumkɛ awu ufang unga aka ihwa ri itsokmum.>>
9.17: Nggee Uhananiya asok azĩã azĩ atsĩ ri iya. Atsorha aboknga nu Ushawurhu, na agɛ, <<A ungwɛ̃mɛn Ushawurhu, Uteijee Uyesu uwuruwi aka adzeka ru ungo nu utsĩndĩ ibibango nggimi unga adena umum ĩba ru ungo ubvui unyã anang ikɛi nu uwe nggu Ipfu Isarsatangge.>>
9.18: Kanying, abina ru nyaka afeka abɛrh ahwor ra asu Ushawurhu agba, mɔcɛ unga abvui anyã anang. Unga asok, umbɔ asorhuwe unga ubɔtisima.
9.19: Unga aka agha ubingha amaa, unga akpo iker iyornga. Ushawurhu amaa inum iyɔɔ asei nggu angwɛ̃ imesa ru Udimashku.
9.20: Kanying Ushawurhu atirhunga idzowe isarhe Uyesu ra abã ifɛn-Num abi Uyahuda agɛ Uyesu awu Ungwɛ̃ Unum.
9.21: Kishoo abika agũ unga adzeidzeu na arhusa agɛ, <<Asi iwea unga afɛyiwe abika afɛn uner ha, Uyesu, ru Urusharhima? Unga asi ibanga idzui anera nggimi akũ azĩ ra ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num?>>
9.22: Bɔr isarhe Ushawurhu ikpurhi idɛ̃ɛ̃ ititoma ri iker nu ijee, itsu abi Uyahuda abika asei ru Udimashku adzeidzeu na adzuna, unga aka adɛyiwe idzidzɛrhe ugɛ Uyesu awu Ukiristo.
9.23: Inuma irhɛirhɛ iki imaa, abi Uyahuda akɛki itsũwã iyiriyɛ umbɔ aka ifɛre Ushawurhu.
9.24: Bɔr Ushawurhu aka agũ ubinkpi umbɔ aka arherhe. Nu utsuu na atenum, atsu asumbɔ adzɛu ingwĩ utepa abee ifɛre unga.
9.25: Bɔr angwɛ̃ imesanga ashupa unga ru uzĩng ru untsuuka acipuwe unga ra angwĩ ubandzin ufɔm utepa.
9.26: Ivangyɛ unga aka abvui aba atsĩ Urusharhima, unga abee igbopi itsi nggu awɛ imesu Uyesu, bɔr kishoo agũ iwei unga, umbɔ asi idzowukumbɔ imangmang ugɛ unga awu ungwɛ̃ imesa idzidzɛrhe.
9.27: Bɔr Ubarnaba akũna unga akũ azĩã ra abi itser Uyesu. Adɛyiwe umbɔ Ushawurhu aka anyã Uteijee nu utsĩndĩ nu Arherhu Uteijee nggu Ushawurhu, nu Isarhe Iyiki Ize Ushawurhu adũwã ri itsok Uyesu ru Udimashku asi igũa iwei.
9.28: Nggee Ushawurhu asei nggu umbɔ na azɛ̃rhã nggu umbɔ ru Urusharhima, adzowe isarhe ri itsok Uteijee asi igũa iwei.
9.29: Ikɛi unga anu irherha arherhe na awe ru uning nggu abi Uyahuda abika agũ idũ abi Uherhini, bɔr umbɔ abee utsĩndĩ uwuku ufɛre unga.
9.30: Abika adɔsa aka ahwɛng rimi, umbɔ akũna unga azĩmbɔ Ukaisariya adene unga azĩã Utarsu.
9.31: Mɔcɛ abika adɔsa ru Uyahudiya, nu Ugarhirhi, nu Usamariya, akpombɔ ididɔɔr. Umbɔ akpo iker nu ififita akarhãrhã ri Ipfu Isarsatangge, atɛ̃rhã awu arhɛrhɛ nggu iwei Uteijee. Ubitru akerhuwe Uiniya
9.32: Ubitru aka azɛ̃rhã amaa abĩã kishoo, unga azĩã ra abika adɔsa ha ru Urhidda.
9.33: Umɔ unga aka agbopa nggu uner uwɔɔ agburh Uiniya, uwuruwi aka aghong irhãrhĩ iyiki ishayi iyor anu imɛka utɔrɔk.
9.34: Ubitru agɔr unga agɛ, <<A Uiniya, Uyesu Ukiristo aka akerhuwanga ungo. Uso ufetu ufarngo.>> Kanying Uiniya asoka.
9.35: Kishoo aner Urhidda nu abi abĩ Usharon anyã unga aka akerhunga, umbɔ adzipa awu abi Uteijee. Ubitru azituwe ukom Utabita
9.36: Ru Ujopa ungwɛ̃ imesu Uyesu nuwɔ, itsoka igburh Utabita, agbena agburh <<Udooka,>> uwuku udzowe itsinga ri itɔ̃ itser iyiki ize, na ayike atsũwã.
9.37: Ri ivang hã unga aghong akpea, umbɔ aka asorhuwe iyornga na angwɛ̃we unga ru ubã afã.
9.38: Urhidda ukhapa nggu Ujopa angwɛ̃ imesa aka agũ agɛ Ubitru awe ru Urhidda, umbɔ adene inera ivaa izĩ ru unga ashɔ̃rhã unga agɛ, <<Kabɔɔ uba ru umɛn ifetem!>>
9.39: Ubitru asok azĩã nggu umbɔ, unga aka azĩ atsĩ umbɔ akũna unga afũmbɔ ru ubã afã hã. Kishoo atsɛ̃rhãpfu adɛ̃ɛ̃ adziira unga, aciu akpe adɛyiwe atorho ha Udooka aka adzise umbɔ unga aka awu nggu umbɔ.
9.40: Ubitru atsu umbɔ kishoo adzek ra awiya, unga atar arhuk na afɛn-Num. Adzipa udiku ukom utsɛrh ha, agɛ, <<A Utabita, usisok.>> Unga ayanga asunga, unga aka anyã Ubitru unga asok asei isei.
9.41: Ubitru adzowe uboknga ayike unga asok adɛ̃ɛ̃ nu adaknga. Mɔcɛ unga ayisa abika adɔsa na atsɛ̃rhãpfu ha adzowuka Utabita ru umbɔ nggu urhɛ.
9.42: Isarhe iyɛrɛ itɛ̃rhã kishoo ru Ujopa, anera arhɛrhɛ aka adzowe imangmang ru Uteijee.
9.43: Ubitru asei inuma irhɛirhɛ ru Ujopa ri iya uwɔɔ uner itser abvur ijuɛ itsoka igburh Usiman.

10.1: Unera nuwɔ ru Ukaisariya itsoka igburh Ukonerhiyu, unga awu uteiya abi iwa ru ukpui Uitarhiya ra abi iwa Uroma.
10.2: Unga nu abi iyanga kishoo awu abika adzowe igɔng na agũ iwei Unum, atsu itsinga akarhãrhã ri idzowe izũwã irhɛirhɛ ra atsũwã, na afɛn-Num ubɛn ivang.
10.3: Unuma nukpɔ aka ayoka akara ataar ra atenuma, unga anyã ipfu itser-Num ru irhi, iki igɔr unga igɛ, <<A Ukonerhiyu!>>
10.4: Unga atsu asunga ri iwei na arhusa agɛ, <<A Uteijee, awu use?>> Ipfu itser-Num igɔr unga igɛ, <<Unum aka agũã ifɛn-Numngo nu iyiyikeyɛ ungo uku iyike atsũwã. Unga ayɛi ngge ru nyaku izũwã.
10.5: Udene anera icɛrɛ umbɔ azĩ Ujopa ayisuwa Usiman uwu ha umbɔ iki iyisa unga Ubitru.
10.6: Unggawɔ asei nggu Usiman uwuku utɔ̃itser abvur ijuɛ, uwuruwi iyanga iki iwe ru ubang ukau ukugɔng.>>
10.7: Ivangyɛ ipfu itser-Num iyiki irherha arherhe nggu unga iki izĩngge, Ukonerhiyu ayisa agãrhãnga avaa, nu uner iwa uwuku udɔsu Unum ra abika atɔ̃ itsernga.
10.8: Unga aka amaa idɛyiwe umbɔ abina kishoo aka akorhe na adene umbɔ azĩmbɔ Ujopa.
10.9: Ra atenuma unum uvaa agãrhũ Ukonerhiyu awe ru uzɛ̃rhã umbɔ aka ayo ru utepa, Ubitru afũ ni itsi uvi abee ifɛn-Num.
10.10: Imerh ifɛr unga, unga abee igha ubin, bɔr umbɔ aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ ikorhu ubingha, unga anyã irhi.
10.11: Unga anyã afã aka atsuri, unga anyã ubina ru nyaka atorho ukoma atɛtɛi uku ucipuwa nu abĩ nggu angbokake anaa aka ayurhi.
10.12: Ru ake ubɛn ikpũ ijuɛ iyi adaka anaa iwu umɔ, nu iyiki ikaikai, íbvui nu ígwer nu anunu afafã.
10.13: Mɔcɛ unga agũ urhɛm uku ugɔr unga ugɛ, <<A Ubitru, uso, ungwãnu utãi.>>
10.14: Bɔr Ubitru agɛ, <<ĩ'ĩ Uteijee! Umum inasi ighamum ubin arhim use ukpurukpi uku usi isarkpɔ.>>
10.15: Unga abvui agũ urhɛm hã idevaa, uku ugɔr ugɛ, <<Ubinkpi Unum aka asare ukpɔ, niba ugɔrɔ ukpɔ ugɛ usi isarkpɔ.>>
10.16: Ifɛrhɛ iyɛrɛ ha ikorhe idiki itaar, nu kanying umbɔ unyangu atorha ha afũmbɔ ra afã.
10.17: Amɛn Ubitru ana awe ri icang agben irhi ha umbɔ aka adɛyiwe unga, aner ha Ukonerhiyu aka adene arhusa na adɛ̃ɛ̃ ra angwĩ iya.
10.18: Umbɔ ayisa arhusa agɛ, <<Usiman uwuruwi umbɔ iki iyisa Ubitru asei umɔ?>>
10.19: Ubitru ana awe ri ifɛrhkɔ irhi ha, Ipfu-Num igɔr unga igɛ, <<Usiman, inera itaar iyɛ idɛ̃ɛ̃ ibeea ungo.
10.20: Nggee uso ucipa uzĩ ru umbɔ. Niba ucango izĩ nggu umbɔ, ubinkutsu awu umum idene umbɔ.>>
10.21: Ubitru acipa azĩ ru aner ha, agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Awu umum umbi aka abee. Awu use utsu umbi aba?>>
10.22: Aner ha agɛ, <<Umɛn idzeku Ukonerhiyu uteiya abi iwa. Arhiku uner na agũ iwei Unum, awuri imor ra asu abi Uyahuda kishoo. Usarkasar ipfu itser-Num itsu unga adena itser ugɛ ungo uba ri iyanga, unga awuri igigũa ubinkpi ungo iki irherhe.>>
10.23: Mɔcɛ Ubitru akũna umbɔ atsĩ, ayɛi umbɔ awu atsen ri iyanga. Ubitru ri iya Ukonerhiyu Unum untaar Ubitru azĩã nggu umbɔ, nu abika adɔsa abɔɔ aka adzeku Ujopa azĩ urhɔnga.
10.24: Unum unaa umbɔ atsĩmbɔ Ukaisariya. Ukonerhiyu aka afosi ibibambɔ ayisa abimbɔ kishoo nu awɛrhanga abi idzidzɛrhe.
10.25: Ubitru awuri itsĩ ri iya nukpi, Ukonerhiyu agbanga unga atararhu ra asunga, adzowe unga igɔng.
10.26: Bɔr Ubitru atsu unga asisok agɛ, <<Usisok! Umum iwu unera ukpekũ ru nyaka ungo.>>
10.27: Ubitru aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ arherhe nggu unga, atsĩ akpo anera arhɛrhɛ aka akɔng.
10.28: Unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi ahwɛngmbi ugɛ isi imɛ̃ngge uner Uyahudiya agbopi itsi use unga azĩ iyepa atsen abi Uyahuda. Bɔr Unum aka adɛyiwanga umum agɛ umum niba iyisumum unera igɛ asi isara, use asi itɛna.
10.29: Nggee ivangyɛ umbɔ aka adene ugɛ umum ĩba, umum isi ikpɛ̃mum. Icɛrɛ umum ibee irhusa awu use utsu umbi ayisa umum.>>
10.30: Ukonerhiyu agɛ, <<Inuma inaa iki itɔng ru nyaki ivang iyɛrɛ nu akara ataar aki urhɛɛ. Umum iwuri ifɛn-Num ri iyamum, kanying umum inyã unera aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ ra asumum atsim atorho aka aterha ake arhang.
10.31: Uner ha agɛ, <A Ukonerhiyu, Unum aka agũã ifɛn-Numngo na ayitunga ungo iki iyike atsũwã.
10.32: Udene itser ru Ujopa umbɔ ayisuwa Usiman, uwuruwi umbɔ iki iyisa Ubitru. Unga awu utsen ri iya Usiman, uwuku utɔ̃itser abvur ijuɛ uwuruwi iyanga iki iwe ru ubang ukau azɛ̃ akagɔng.>
10.33: Ngge itsu kanying umum idene umbɔ ayisa ungo, aze ungo uku uba. Icɛrɛ Umɛn abɛ ikɔng kishoo ra asu Unum, umɛn iwuri ikpeto ru ubɛn ubinkpi Uteijee aka atsuka ungo udɛyiwa umɛn.>>
10.34: Mɔcɛ Ubitru atirhi irherhuwe umbɔ arherhe agɛ, <<Idzidzɛrhe umum ihwɛng Unum asi itɛnga asu.
10.35: Bɔr ayɛi anera ra abĩã kishoo abika agũ iwei unga na akorhu ubinkpi uku urhika.
10.36: Umbi ahwɛngmbi itseryɛ Unum aka adene ra aner Uisrairha, agɛ Isarhe Iyiki Ize iyi ididɔɔr iba ru ubok Uyesu Ukiristo, unga aka awu Uteijee kishoo.
10.37: Umbi ahwɛngmbi ubinkpi uku ukorhe umaa abĩ Uyahudiya kishoo, utirhi ru Ugarhirhi ri ivangyɛ Uyohana aka idzowe isarhe iyi ubɔtisima.
10.38: Umbi ahwɛngmbi ubinkpi uku ukorhe Unum aka adzukuwe atsei na atsuke Ipfu Isarsatangge nu ijee ru Uyesu uwu Unazarat, unga aka azɛ̃rhã akorhi iyiki ize akerhuwe kishoo abirabɛ aka awe ru ijee Undenggũ, ubinkutsu Unum awu nggu unga.
10.39: <<Umɛn iwu ideka ru ubɛn ubinkpi unga aka akorhe ra abĩ abi Uyahuda, nu Urusharhima. Umbɔ afɛre unga ri inyinyapuwe unga ni igãrhãmau ucucii.
10.40: Bɔr Unum asoyika unga ra akpe ru unum ukpu untaar na atsu unga adzeka umbɔ anyã unga.
10.41: Asi iwea anera kishoo anyã unga, akpurha adzeka ra abirabɛ Unum aka asɛng umɛn iwu ideka, umɛn iki igha ni ihwa nggu unga aka asoka akpe.
10.42: Unga atsu umɛn idzowe isarhe ra anera ni idɛyiwe anera ugɛ, awu unga hã nuwi Unum aka asɛng unga awuri itsu uvau abi urhɛ na abika akpe.
10.43: Abika asɔm Arherhu-Num kishoo adzowukumbɔ ideka ri itsinga agɛ, ubɛn unera aka adzowuka imangmang ru unga awuri ikpoa itsũwe arhim ri itsoknga.>>
10.44: Ubitru awu ra arherhe nukpi, Ipfu Isarsatangge icipuwangge nu abirabɛ aka anu igosha arherhanga kishoo.
10.45: Abi usorhe abi Uyahuda abika adɔsa, abirabɛ aka aba nggu Ubitru, adzeidzeu umbɔ aka anyã atsen abi Uyahuda ayɛimbɔ izũwã Ipfu Isarsatangge.
10.46: Ubinkutsu umbɔ agũ umbɔ anu irherhi idũ iyikise na adzowe igɔng ru Unum. Mɔcɛ Ubitru agɛ,
10.47: <<Unera awea unga aka ikɛn isorhuwe ubɔtisima nggu amɛ̃ ra anera abɛrɛ umbɔ aka ayɛi Ipfu Isarsatangge ru nyaka umɛn iki ikpo?>>
10.48: Nggee unga atsu umbɔ asorhuwe umbɔ ubɔtisima ri itsok Uyesu Ukiristo. Mɔcɛ umbɔ ashɔ̃rhã unga ama asei nggu umbɔ inuma ukunjiir.

11.1: Abi itser Uyesu na abika adɔsa ra abĩ abi Uyahudiya kishoo agũ ugɛ atsen abi Uyahuda ikɛi ayɛimbɔ Arherhu-Num.
11.2: Nggee Ubitru aka azĩ ufã Urusharhima, abi usorhe abi Uyahuda abi imangmang azɔka unga arherhe.
11.3: Na agɛ, <<Awu use utsu ungo uzĩ ru abika ashimbɔ ru usorhe ugha ubingha nggu umbɔ?>>
11.4: Mɔcɛ Ubitru atirha asɔme umbɔ uku kpengkpeng ubinkpi uku ukorhe.
11.5: Unga agɛ, <<Umum iwu ru uteu Ujopa idɛ̃ɛ̃ ifɛn-Num, ni inyã irhi. Umum inyã ubina uku ucipuwa ru nyaka atorho ukoma uwuku ugɔng aka adzeka afã nggu angbokake anaa ayurhi, aba ra anangkɛ umum iki iwe.
11.6: Umum iki ingbiki irhi umum inyã ijuɛ iyi adaka anaa nu ijuɛ arhum iyiki ibewe, nu iyiki ikaikai, nu anunu.
11.7: Mɔcɛ umum igũ urhɛm ukpɔɔ uku ugɔr umum ugɛ, <A Ubitru, usisok ungwãnu utãi.>
11.8: <<Bɔr umum ĩgɔr ĩgɛ, <Ĩ'ĩ a Uteijee! Ubinkpi uku usi isarkpɔ use utɛnkpɔ unasi itsĩkpɔ ra angwĩmum.>
11.9: <<Mɔcɛ urhɛm hã udzeka afã urherhe idevaa, ugɛ, <Ubinkpi Unum aka asare niba ugɔrɔ ugɛ usi isarkpɔ.>
11.10: Akɛrɛ ha akorhe idiki itaar, na ashupa abin hã afũmbɔ ra afã ikɛi.
11.11: <<Ri ivang hã inera itaar umbɔ aka adene umbɔ adzeku Ukaisariya aba ru umum, adɛ̃ɛ̃ nu angwĩ iyakɛ umum iki iwe.
11.12: Ipfu-Num igɔr umum igɛ umum ĩdɔsa umbɔ niba icicang umum izĩ nggu umbɔ. Angwɛ̃mɛn utɔ̃ĩ hã aka azĩ nggu umum, umɛn izĩ itsĩ ri iya utsak uwurɛ.
11.13: Unga adɛyiwa umɛn unga aka anyã ipfu itser-Num iki idɛ̃ɛ̃ ri iyanga, ni igɔr igɛ, <Udene umbɔ azĩ ayisuwa Usiman ru Ujopa uwuruwi umbɔ iki iyisa Ubitru.
11.14: Unga awuri iba asɔma ungo isarheyɛ ungo nu iyango kishoo aki ikpo ififɔrh.>
11.15: <<Umum iki itirhi arherhe, Ipfu Isarsatangge icipuwa nu atsimbɔ ru nyaka ngge iki icipuwa nu atsimɛn ri inggbaashia.
11.16: Mɔcɛ umum iyita Arherhu Uteijee aka agɔr agɛ, <Uyohana akorhu ubɔtisima nggu amɛ̃, bɔr awuri isorhuwa umbi ubɔtisima nggu Ipfu Isarsatangge.>
11.17: Nggee Unum aba adzowe umbɔ izũwã uku kpengkpeng ubinkpi unga aka adzaa umɛn, iki iwe ru imangmang ru Uteijee Uyesu Ukiristo, umum igburh ungamɔ umum iki ikɛn Unum?>>
11.18: Umbɔ aka agũ rimi, umbɔ asi ikpombɔ ubinkpi umbɔ aka irherhe, umbɔ akpoi Unum agɛ, <<Ugũ uko atsen abi Uyahuda Unum akorhuka umbɔ utsĩndĩ idzidzipa nu ikpo urhɛ.>> Abika adɔsa ru Uantakiya
11.19: Uver uku utsu abika adɔsa asita ri ifɛre Uistifanu abɔɔ azĩ abĩ Ufinikiya, nu aki Usayifuru, nu uteu Uantakiya, adzowe isarhe Arherhu-Num ra abi Uyahuda ukpekũ.
11.20: Aner Usayifuru nu Usayirin abika adɔsa azĩ Uantakiya adɛyiwe abi Uherhini, ikɛi arherha ha, adzowe umbɔ Isarhe Iyiki Ize iyi Uteijee Uyesu.
11.21: Ubok Uteijee uwu nggu umbɔ, anera arhɛrhɛ ikɛi awe ru imangmang na adzipa awe abi Uteijee.
11.22: Isarhe ubinkpi uku ikorhe ru Uantakiya izĩ itsĩngge ra ato abika adɔsa aka awe ru Urusharhima, umbɔ adene Ubarnaba azĩã ru Uantakiya.
11.23: Unga aka azĩ atsĩ anyã imimutayɛ Unum aka ikorhuwe umbɔ, unga agɔm anggɔm na adɛyiwe umbɔ kishoo adɛ̃ɛ̃ aker nggu amɛnmbɔ ru Uteijee.
11.24: Ubarnaba awu uner uwuku uze, awu nggu Ipfu Isarsatangge nu imangmang, nu anera arhɛrhɛ aka aba atoma awu abi Uteijee.
11.25: Mɔcɛ Ubarnaba azĩ ibee Ushawurhu ru Utarsu.
11.26: Ivangyɛ unga aka anyã unga, unga akũna unga abanga Uantakiya. Amaa amɛka unying umbɔ Ubarnaba nggu Ushawurhu aki ikɔng nggu abika adɔsa amesuwe anera arhɛrhɛ. Awu ru Uantakiya umbɔ aka atirhi iyisa angwɛ̃ imesu Uyesu nggu itsok <<Abi Ukiristo.>>
11.27: Ri ivang hã abika asɔm Arherhu-Num abɔɔ aka adzeku Urusharhima aba Uantakiya.
11.28: Unera unying ru umbɔ, itsoka igburh Uagabu. Asok abera adɛ̃ɛ̃ na arherha arherhe ru ubok ijee Ipfu-Num. Agɛ ikpũ imerh niyɔ igɔigɔng iwuri itɛ̃rhã ru upfunga kishoo. Ikpũ imerh ha itsuifɛr ri ivangyɛ Ukarhaudiyu aka awu uyɛrhe.
11.29: Angwɛ̃ imesa ha, akɛki itsũwã nggu adɔkambɔ agɛ, umbɔ akɔng abin adene ake azĩ ayike abika adɔsa ru Uyahudiya, ubɛn unera ri ikernga.
11.30: Umbɔ akorhe rimi hã, adene izũwãmbɔ izĩ ra akakũmbɔ ru ubokmbɔ Ubarnaba nu Ushawurhu.

12.1: Ivang ha niyɔ Uyɛrhe Uhiridu aka adzui abika adɔsa abɔɔ, abee idzowe umbɔ uver.
12.2: Unga atsu umbɔ afɛre Uyaku ungwɛ̃mbɔ Uyohana nggu ikon iyiki ider.
12.3: Unga aka anyã agɛ abi Uyahuda agũibɛn ubinkpi unga aka akorhe, unga adzur Ubitru ikɛi. Akɛrɛ akorhe ri ivang Irhowa Uborodi ukpuku Usheru Uguga.
12.4: Umbɔ aka adzur unga amaa, unga atsuke unga ru ugborzĩ, nu ubok abi iwa usɔka nu utɔ̃ĩ umbɔ adzɛu unga inera inaa inaa. Uhiridu akaifɛrhkɔ ikũna unga azĩ ra asu anera umbɔ atsu uvaunga, Irhowa Iyiki Igar Utɔng ha iba imaangge.
12.5: Nggee Ubitru aka awe ru ugborzĩ, abika adɔsa atsu amɛnmbɔ ifɛne-Num ru unga.
12.6: Ru untsua ha Uhiridu aka akaifɛrhkɔ agɛ ukpe uba usarkpɔ unga awuri ikũ Ubitru akũ aba avarhuwe arherhanga. Unga anu ra ateu abi iwa avaa, abope nggu inyãwã ivaa, nu abika adzɛu ugborzĩ, ikɛi abɔɔ adɛ̃ɛ̃ ra angwĩ ubã adzɛu.
12.7: Kanying ipfu itser Uteijee akapɛng, irhirhang irhange ugbora. Ipfu itser-Num ikwɛr Ubitru ri igbɔmnga izita unga. Igɔr igɛ, <<Usisok, ifetem!>> Inyãwã hã igarhungge ra abok Ubitru.
12.8: Mɔcɛ ipfu itser-Num igɔr unga igɛ, <<Utsim atorhango, nu utsu abadakngo.>> Ubitru akorhe rimi hã. Ipfu itser-Num igɔr unga igɛ, <<Utama atorhango udɔsa umum.>>
12.9: Ubitru adɔsa unga adzek ru ugborzĩ, asi ihwɛngnga ugɛ ubinkpi ipfu itser-Num hã iki ini ikorhe uwu idzidzɛrhe, unga akaifɛrhkɔ ugɛ unga anyã irhi.
12.10: Umbɔ aka atɔng abi idzɛu abi inggbaashia nu abi uvaa aba ra angwĩ ufɔm utepa aka awu nggu angwĩ ubã azɔu. Angwĩ ubã atsuri nibikake, nu umbɔ adzek ra ake. Umbɔ aka azɛ̃rhã nú ider utsĩndĩã unying, kanying ipfu itser-Num hã igwirngge ri inyĩnyã Ubitru.
12.11: Mɔcɛ Ubitru aka atsĩ ra amɛnnga, na agɛ, <<Icɛrɛ umum iki ihwɛng idzidzɛrhe ugɛ, Uteijee unga adene ipfu itsernga ngge ifɔrh umum ru ubok Uhiridu, ikɛi nu kishoo iyiki ibeweyɛ anggbaashi abi Uyahuda aka abee ikorhuwa umum.>>
12.12: Ivangyɛ Ubitru aka ahwɛng akɛrɛ ha, unga azĩã ri iya Umaryamu uyisa Uyohana umbɔ iki iyisa Umarku, ra anangkɛ anera aka akɔng arhɛrhɛ anu ifɛn-Num.
12.13: Ubitru aka akwɛr angwĩ ufɔm ha, una igãrhã agburh Uroda asok aba irhi awu ungaa nuwi.
12.14: Unga aka ahwɛng urhɛm Ubitru, anggɔm anyaike unga asi itsurunga ananga unga abvui atĩ atsĩ ri iya adɛyiwe umbɔ agɛ, <<Ubitru uwɔ adɛ̃ɛ̃ ra angwĩ udzepurhe rɔ!>>
12.15: Umbɔ agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ungo uku uzhɔma!>> Unga ana agɔr ugɛ awu Ubitru. Umbɔ agɛ, <<Awu ufang awu ipfu itsernga.>>
12.16: Bɔr Ubitru akpurha adɛ̃ɛ̃ ikwɛr angwĩ iya, umbɔ aka atsuri angwĩ ubã hã na anyã unga, umbɔ adzeidzeu.
12.17: Ubitru akorhuwe umbɔ utsara nggu uboknga umbɔ anu utata, na adɛyiwe umbɔ ikikorhe Uteijee aka akũna unga adzek ru ugborzĩ. Unga agɛ, <<Àka adɛyiwe Uyaku nu abika adɔsa abɔɔ abin hã.>> Unga agɔr rimi mɔcɛ unga adzek azĩã anang akɔɔ.
12.18: Ru unkpeka, idzidzuna isi iwengge ukunjiir ra abi iwa ri ifɛrhɛ ha iki ikorhe nggu Ubitru.
12.19: Uhiridu aka abeea unga asi ikpoa, unga arhusa abi idzɛu ha ubinkpi uku ukorhe nggu Ubitru, na atsu umbɔ afɛre umbɔ. Akpe Uhiridu Mɔcɛ Uhiridu adzeka abĩ Uyahudiya azĩã Ukaisariya aseisa umɔ kata.
12.20: Uhiridu awe ri ifuw nggu aner Utaya nu abi Usidon, umbɔ asok aba akɔng ananga unying abee irherha arherhe nggu unga. Na akpo ibibema ru Ubirhatu, unggbaashi abi itser ri iya uyɛrhe, umbɔ azĩmbɔ ru uyɛrhe Uhiridu abee isei uku utɔɔ, ubinkutsu umbɔ atsu amɛnmbɔ nú abĩ iyɛrha ha na akpo ubingha.
12.21: Unumkpi umbɔ aka ungwɛ̃ Uhiridu atsim atorhi iyɛrhanga, asei nu utarh iyɛrhe arherhe arherhe nggu anera.
12.22: Ikikɔnga iki igũ urhɛmnga, umbɔ atsarhi irhakmbɔ agɛ, <<Heee! Urhɛm unum nukpi usi iwekpɔ urhɛm unera.>>
12.23: Kanying, ipfu itser Uteijee ikwɛr unga ubinkutsu unga asi idzowuka igɔng ru Unum, adzudzi agha unga, utsɛku unga aka akpe.
12.24: Bɔr Arherhu-Num akpurha adɛ̃ɛ̃ ititoma na atɛ̃rhã.
12.25: Ivangyɛ umbɔ Ubarnaba nu Ushawurhu aka amaa itsermbɔ, umbɔ abvui aba ru Urusharhima, umbɔ akũ nggu Uyohana uwuruwi umbɔ iki iyisa Umarku.

13.1: Ra abika adɔsa ru Uantakiya umɔ abika asɔm Arherhu-Num abɔɔ nu abika amesuwe awu umɔ, Ubarnaba nu Usimiyon uwuruwi umbɔ iki iyisa Uwuku Ufĩrhã, nu Urhushiyu aka adzeku Usayirin nu Umanayen uwuruwi aka awu uwɛrhɛ uyɛrhe Uhiridu udzur ri ingwɛ̃nci, nu ikɛi Ushawurhu.
13.2: Umbɔ aka anu idzowe igɔng Uteijee na akpem igha ubin, Ipfu Isarsatangge ha igɔr umbɔ igɛ, <<Àka asɛnga umum Ubarnaba, nu Ushawurhu, umbɔ awu abi itseryɛ umum iki iyisa umbɔ aka itɔ̃.>>
13.3: Umbɔ aka akpem igha ubin na afɛn-Num amaa, umbɔ atsorhuwe abok nu umbɔ na adene umbɔ azĩmbɔ. Ru Usayifuru
13.4: Ipfu Isarsatangge idene Uburhu nu Ubarnaba, umbɔ azĩmbɔ Usarhukiya, umɔ umbɔ atsĩ ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ azĩmbɔ Usayifuru.
13.5: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka azĩ atsĩ Usarhami, umbɔ adzowe isarhe Arherhu-Num ra abã ifɛn-Num aki abi Uyahuda. Uyohana, umbɔ iki iyisa Umarku, awu nggu umbɔ anu iyike umbɔ ri itser.
13.6: Umbɔ aka azɛ̃rhã amaa umpfũwã hã kishoo aba atsĩ Upafo, umɔ umbɔ aka agbopu utsa Uyahudiya uwɔɔ uner igoka uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num igbɛrangwĩ itsoka igburh Ubar-Joshuwa,
13.7: uwuruwi aka awu nggu ugomna Usarjiyu Uburhu, unga awu uner itsoi. Ugomna ayisu Ubarnaba nu Ushawurhu abee igũ Arherhu-Num.
13.8: Bɔr uner igoka ha Uarhima, itsoknga rikɔ ri idũ abi Uherhini, awe ri igamtsa nggu Ushawurhu nu Ubarnaba, abee ikɛn ugomna utsur unga adzowuka imangmang.
13.9: Mɔcɛ Ushawurhu, uwu umbɔ iki iyisa Uburhu, awu nggu Ipfu Isarsatangge, atsu asunga arhi Uarhima,
13.10: na agɛ, <<Ungo uwu ungwɛ̃ Undenggũ unggamtsak kishoo abin akika aze. Ungo uwu nggu ikpũ igbɛrangwĩ iyiki ibewe ukpekũ. Ungo udɛ̃ɛ̃ idzipu atsĩndĩ idzidzɛrhe uwu Uteijee umgbɔ uwu igbɛrangwĩ!
13.11: Icɛrɛ ubok Uteijee uwe ri igamtsa nggu ungo. Ungo uwuri iwu uner itapa, ungo usi ínyãɔ irhirhang ishaa unum ri ivanga.>> Kanying ibur nu uzĩ utsirkpɔ unga, unga anu ibibãrhã, abee uwuruwi aka ikpɔm ubok adarh unga.
13.12: Ivangyɛ ugomna aka anyã abinkɛ aka akorhe, unga adzowuka imangmang, ubinkutsu unga adzeidzeu akarhãrhã ri imesa ri itsi Uteijee. Ru Uantakiya aki Upisidiya
13.13: Uburhu nu awɛrhu uzɛ̃rhãnga atsĩ ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ asoku Upafo azĩmbɔ Uperga ru abĩ Upamfirhiya, anangkɛ Uyohana Umarku aka abɔre umbɔ na abvui azĩã Urusharhima.
13.14: Asoku Uperga azĩmbɔ Uantakiya ru abĩ Upisidiya. Ru unum ukpuku uwoshambɔ atsĩ ru ubã ifɛn-Num asei.
13.15: Umbɔ aka amaa ivarhe ubvur Íkpem Umusa nu abvur abika asɔm Arherhu-Num, anggbaashi ubã ifɛn-Num hã adene itser ru umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi angwɛ̃mɛn, umbi aba awembi ri irhɛm iyiki ififitayɛ umbi aka idzowe anera, umbi ama arherhe.>>
13.16: Uburhu aka abera adɛ̃ɛ̃, aberu uboknga na atirha arherhe agɛ, <<Umbi abimɛn abi Uisrairha, nu atsen abi Uyahuda nu abi iwei Unum, àka akpeto ru umum!
13.17: Unum uwu aner Uisrairha unga asɛng atokamɛn, aberuwe umbɔ ri ivangyɛ umbɔ aka awu ra abĩ Umasar, unga akũna umbɔ adzek umɔ nggu ijee iyiki igɔng.
13.18: Abima nggu umbɔ imɛka isɔka inaa ra arhum.
13.19: Unga aka amaa ivur abĩã utɔɔva ru Ukan'ana na adzowe ukam abĩmbɔ ra aner Uisrairha.
13.20: Akɛrɛ ha ayoke imɛka anaka anaa ni isɔka itɔ̃ɔ̃ (450). <<Akɛrɛ ha aka amaa, Unum aberuwe abɔɔ ru umbɔ awe abika atsu uvau utsɛku ivang uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num Usamairha.
13.21: Mɔcɛ aner Uisrairha abee umbɔ atsime umbɔ uyɛrhe, Unum atsũwe Ushawurhu ungwɛ̃ Ukish, uner unang Ubanjami, uwuruwi aka awu uyɛrhe imɛka isɔka inaa.
13.22: Umbɔ aka atsũwe Ushawurhu, Unum atsime Udauda awu uyɛrhambɔ. Arherhu-Num ri itsi Udauda agɔr agɛ, <Umum ikpo Udauda ungwɛ̃ Ujesse, awu uner ikɔkmum, unga awuri ikorha abina kishoo aki amɛnmum.>
13.23: <<Awe ru unang utsak uwurɛ Unum aka akowe abi Uisrairha uwuku ufufɔrh, Uyesu, ru nyaka unga aka abemuwe.
13.24: Ivangyɛ Uyesu aka aba Uyohana aka adzowuka abi Uisrairha kishoo isarhe idzidzipa nu isorhu ubɔtisima.
13.25: Ivangyɛ itser Uyohana iki iyo imimaa, unga agɛ, <Umbi akaifɛrhkɔ ugɛ umum iwu ungamɔ? Umum isi iwemum unga hã. Ĩ'ĩ. Bɔr uwɔɔ ruwɔ aka iba ru undzingmum, uwuruwi arhi abadaknga umum isi ímɛ̃mum igarhuwe ake.>
13.26: <<Umbi abimɛn, anang Uibrahim, nu atsen abi Uyahuda nu abi iwei Unum ru umbi, awu ru umɛn umbɔ aka adene arherhe ififɔrh akɛrɛ.
13.27: Aner Urusharhima nu ayɛrhambɔ, umbɔ asi ihwɛngmbɔ ugɛ unga awu Uner Uwuku Ufɔrh ha. Umbɔ ikɛi asi ihwɛngmbɔ arherhe abika asɔm Arherhu-Num umbɔ iki ivarhe ubɛn unum ukpuku uwosha. Bɔr umbɔ atsu arherhe abika asɔm Arherhu-Num atsuafɛr, ri itsu uvau akpe ru Uyesu.
13.28: Umbɔ aka asi ikpombɔ uvau uwuku ufɛr unga, rimi hã umbɔ ngipu Ubirhatu umbɔ afɛre unga.
13.29: Ikikorhambɔ iki itsuifɛr kishoo ubinkpi umbɔ aka atsɛng ri itsinga, umbɔ acipuwe unga nu igãrhãmau ucucii, adzake unga ru ughwee utarh.
13.30: Bɔr Unum asoyika unga ra akpe ha.
13.31: Inuma irhɛirhɛ unga aka adzeyiwa ra abirabɛ aka adzeku Ugarhirhi adɔsa unga azĩ Urusharhima. Abirabɛ icɛrɛ umbɔ awu idekanga ra anera.
13.32: <<Umɛn idɛyiwa umbi Isarhe Iyiki Ize. Ubinkpi Unum aka abemuwe atokamɛn,
13.33: unga aka atsu ake atsuafɛr ru umɛn, angwɛ̃mbɔ, ri isoyiwe Uyesu ra akpe. Ru nyaka ngge iki itsɛng ru ubom ukpu uvaa ru Ubvur Abom igɛ, << <Ungo uwu ungwɛ̃mum, irherɛ umum iki iwu Utɛngo.>
13.34: Idzidzɛrhe Unum aka asoyiwe unga ra akpe ha utsur unga avɔ̃ɔ̃, arherhe ri írhɛm iyɛrɛ agɛ, << <Umum iwuri idzaamum umbi usarkasar ídorh iyi idzidzɛrhe umum iki ibemuwe Udauda.>
13.35: Nggee unga agɔr ru ubom ukpɔɔ agɛ, << <Ungo usi íneke Usarkasarngo avɔ̃ɔ̃.>
13.36: <<Udauda aka amaa itseryɛ Unum aka adzowe unga ri ivangnga. Mɔcɛ unga akpea, umbɔ adzake unga nggu atokanga, iyornga ivɔ̃ngge.
13.37: Bɔr uwuruwi Unum aka asoyiwe unga ra akpe asi ivɔ̃ɔ̃.
13.38: <<Umbi abimɛn, àka akpeto! Umɛn iwu nggimi ni idũwũwa umbi ugɛ atsũwe arhimmbi iwu ru ubok Uyesu.
13.39: Ru uboknga kishoo uwuruwi aka awe ru imangmang, umbɔ aka atsũwũkumbɔ arhimnga, akirakɛ Íkpem Umusa iki isi idɛ̃ɛ̃ itsũwũkũngge.
13.40: Àka angwɛ̃dzɛn utsur abin hã abvur abika asɔm Arherhu-Num aka arherhe akorhuke ru umbi. Agɔr agɛ,
13.41: << <Àka anyã, umbi abika ayɛi itser Unum! Àka adzeidzeu na akpe, umum iwuri ikorhu ubin ukpɔɔ ri inummbi, ukpurukpi umbi asi ídzowukumbi imangmang, ru unerwi aka idɛyiwa umbi.> >>
13.42: Uburhu nu Ubarnaba aka azɛ̃rhã awuri idzidzek ru ubã ifɛn-Num hã, anera ashɔ̃rhã umbɔ ama aba arherhe arherhe ra abin hã ikɛi unum ukpuku uwosha iki iba.
13.43: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka asoyiwe anera, abi Uyahuda arhɛrhɛ nu atsen abi Uyahuda aka adzipa atsĩ agbeyi abi Uyahuda adɔsu Uburhu nu Ubarnaba, nu umbɔ ikivarhambɔ adzowe umbɔ itsũwã umbɔ adɛ̃ɛ̃ aker ri imimutu Unum.
13.44: Unum ukpuku uwosha ukpɔɔ uku ukɔru uba irhɛɛ anera ru utepa idzek ikɔng inũ igosha Arherhu Uteijee.
13.45: Ivangyɛ abi Uyahuda aka anyã ikikɔng anera irhɛirhɛ, umbɔ agũ unyɛ̃ɛ̃ akarhãrhã, umbɔ adzuse igbɛrangwĩ nu ubinkpi Uburhu aka arherhe umbɔ atsĩmbɔ irhena unga.
13.46: Mɔcɛ Uburhu nu Ubarnaba asi igũmbɔ iwei, agɔr agɛ, <<Umbi abi Uyahuda imɛ̃ɛ̃ngge umɛn itirhi isarhe Arherhu-Num nggu umbi. Bɔr umbi aka akpɛ̃mbi na anyanga atsimbi asi imɛ̃mbi ikpo urhɛ uwu ugbagbaa, umɛn izĩ ra atsen abi Uyahuda.
13.47: Ubinkutsu ubin hã nukpɔ Uteijee aka atsuka umɛn agɛ, << <Umum iki isɛng ungo uwu irhirhang ra atsen abi Uyahuda, ugɛ umbi awuri ikũ ififɔrh azĩ atsĩ ri imimashu upfung.> >>
13.48: Ivangyɛ atsen abi Uyahuda aka agũ rimi, umbɔ agɔm anggɔm na akpoi Arherhu Uteijee, abirabɛ umbɔ aka asɛng umbɔ aka ikpo urhɛ uwu ugbagbaa adzowe imangmang.
13.49: Arherhu Uteijee atɛ̃rhã amaake abĩã kishoo.
13.50: Bɔr abi Uyahuda azɔka akatsɛrh abɔɔ abi iwei Unum abirabɛ umbɔ iki isaka adzowe umbɔ igɔng na abika agɔng abɔɔ ru utepa. Asoyikumbɔ uver ru umbɔ Uburhu nu Ubarnaba, awayiwe umbɔ ru abĩmbɔ.
13.51: Nggee umbɔ awashuwe uzurhu adakmbɔ umgbɔ uwu utsar ikpikpɛ̃ɛ̃ ra atsi abi utepa, na azĩmbɔ Uikoniya.
13.52: Nu angwɛ̃ imesa agɔm akarhãrhã, awu nggu Ipfu Isarsatangge.

14.1: Ubina unying uku ukorhe ru Uikoniya. Uburhu nu Ubarnaba aka atsĩ ru ubã ifɛn-Num abi Uyahuda. Adzowe isarhe nggu ijee ru nggaa ikikɔng anera abi Uyahuda nu Atsen abi Uyahuda awe ru imangmang.
14.2: Bɔr abi Uyahuda abirabɛ aka akpɛ̃ iwe ru imangmang asoyiwe amɛn atsen abi Uyahuda adakuwe amɛnmbɔ nggu umbɔ Uburhu nu Ubarnaba.
14.3: Bɔr abi itser Uyesu asei adãrhã umɔ, adzowe isarhe ri ikeramɛn imimuta ru Uteijee. Nu unga abemunga isarhambɔ ri idzowe umbɔ ijee umbɔ akorha abin idzeu nu abin igbigba.
14.4: Abi uteu ha agau agbɛra avaa, abɔɔ adɔsu undzing abi Uyahuda, abɔɔ adɔsu undzing abi itser Uyesu.
14.5: Mɔcɛ atsen abi Uyahuda nu abi Uyahuda atoma nggu anggbaashimbɔ abee idzowe abi itser Uyesu uver na atange umbɔ atarh.
14.6: Ivangyɛ abi itser Uyesu aka agũ rimi, umbɔ atĩ azĩmbɔ iteu Urhistira nu Udarbe ru Urhikoniya nu ikãwãngge.
14.7: Umɔ umbɔ adɛ̃ɛ̃mbɔ idzowe Isarhe Iyiki Ize. Uburhu nu Ubarnaba ru Urhistira nu Udarbe
14.8: Ru Urhistira unera nuwɔ awu ukatarhu, amar unga ukatarhu anasi izɛ̃rhũnga uzɛ̃rhã.
14.9: Unga agũshu isarhe Uburhu. Uburhu atsu asu nu unga, anyã imangmangnga imɛ̃ngge umbɔ akerhuwe unga,
14.10: na atsarhi irhaknga agɛ, <<Usisok udɛ̃ɛ̃ nu adakngo!>> Ukatarhu ha ater isha atirhunga uzɛ̃rhã.
14.11: Ivangyɛ ikikɔnga iki inyã ubinkpi Uburhu aka akorhe, umbɔ atsarhi irhakmbɔ ivanga unying arherhe ri idũ Urhikoniya agɛ, <<Anum acipuwambɔ ru umɛn ru asaka anera!>>
14.12: Umbɔ atar itsok Ubarnaba agɛ Uzeyu, Uburhu umbɔ atare unga agburh Uherme, ubinkutsu unga awu uyɛrhe arherha ha.
14.13: Uwuku udzowe idɛm-Zeyu, uwuruwi ugbor ishiyanga uku uwu ra awiya ukhapa ru utepa, akũ ínak iyiki itsak nu ífur akũ aba ra angwĩ utepa ubinkutsu unga nu anera arhɛrhɛ abee idzowe idɛm ru abi itser Uyesu.
14.14: Bɔr abi itser Uyesu Ubarnaba nu Uburhu aka agũ rimi, amɛnmbɔ aghong umbɔ avapuwe atorhambɔ na atĩ atsĩ ri ikikɔnga, atsarhi irhakmbɔ atsu ivum agɛ,
14.15: <<Umbi anera, awu use utsu umbi akorhe rimi hã? Umɛn ikpurhi iwu anera, ru nyaka umbi. Umɛn ikũ Isarhe Iyiki Ize ikũwã umbi, idɛyiwa umbi idzidzipa ra abin aka atãrhã akɛrɛ na awe abi Unum uwu urhɛ, uwuruwi aka amuna afã nu abĩ, nu akau akagɔng, nu kishoo abinkɛ aka awe ra ake.
14.16: Ivang iyi isha, unga aneke abĩã kishoo azɛ̃rhã ru udĩkpi umbɔ aka abee.
14.17: Bɔr unga asi inekuka idɛyiwe ugɛ unga awu umɔ ri ikorhe abin aka aze ra anera. Unga acorhuwa umɛn ri idzaa inai ra afã nu abingha, adzaa umbi ubingha umbi agha, na atsu umbi agɔm anggɔm ra amɛnmbi.>>
14.18: Uko nggu arherha akɛrɛ umbɔ agũ uver kata na akɛn anera abɛrɛ ikorhuwe umbɔ idɛm.
14.19: Mɔcɛ abi Uyahuda abɔɔ adzeku Uantakiya nu Uikoniya aba adzipa amɛn ikikɔnga. Umbɔ atang atarh nu Uburhu na adɔ̃rhã unga azĩmbɔ ru undzing utepa, akaifɛrhkɔ agɛ unga aka akpea.
14.20: Bɔr angwɛ̃ imesa aka akɔng akan adziira unga, unga asoka na azɛ̃rhã atsĩã ru utepa. Unum uvaa unga nu Ubarnaba azĩmbɔ Udarbe. Ibvui iba Uantakiya aki Usuriya
14.21: Umbɔ adzowe Isarhe Iyiki Ize ru utepa na akpo angwɛ̃ imesa arhɛrhɛ. Mɔcɛ umbɔ abvui azĩmbɔ Urhistira, nu Uikoniya nu Uantakiya aki Upisidiya,
14.22: afituwe angwɛ̃ imesa ha umbɔ adɛ̃ɛ̃ aker ri imangmangmbɔ hã. Agɔr agɛ, <<Awu ufang umɛn iki ihwa uver urhɛrhɛ ni idɔrhi ikpo itsĩ Iyɛrhe Unum.>>
14.23: Uburhu nu Ubarnaba asɛnge umbɔ akakũ ukpui abika adɔsa, nggu ikpem igha ubin nu ifɛn-Num umbɔ aka ayɛruwe umbɔ ru Uteijee, uwuruwi umbɔ aka awe ri imangmang ru unga.
14.24: Amaa uzɛ̃rhã adɔsa udika abĩ Upisidiya, aba atsĩ abĩ Upamfirhiya,
14.25: umbɔ aka adũwã Arherhu-Num ru Uperga, mɔcɛ umbɔ azĩmbɔ Uatarhiya.
14.26: Adzeku Uatarhiya atsĩ ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ abvui azĩmbɔ Uantakiya, anangkɛ umbɔ aka abee iwembɔ imimutu Unum ri itseryɛ umbɔ aka atɔ̃ amaa.
14.27: Umbɔ aka azĩ atsĩ Uantakiya, umbɔ akɔng abika adɔsa asɔme kishoo ubinkpi Unum aka akorhe ru ubokmbɔ nu amɛnkɛ umbɔ aka atsuruwe utsĩndĩ imangmang ra atsen abi Uyahuda igambɔ.
14.28: Umbɔ asei adermbɔ ru nggɔɔ ha nggu angwɛ̃ imesa.
