15.1: Aner abɔɔ adzeku Uyahudiya aba ru Uantakiya anu imesuwe abika adɔsa agɛ, <<Umbɔ aba asi isorhuwambɔ umbi usorhe ru nyaki Íkpem Umusa iki iwe, umbi asi íkpombi ififɔrh.>>
15.2: Awu uning akarhãrhã umbɔ Uburhu nu Ubarnaba aka akorhe nggu aner ha ra arherhe akɛrɛ. Nggee umbɔ asɛng umbɔ Uburhu nu Ubarnaba nu abɔɔ umbɔ azĩ Urusharhima ra abi itser Uyesu nu akakũ abika adɔsa ri itsi arherhe ha.
15.3: Abika adɔsa ha azĩ adene umbɔ azĩmbɔ, na adɔsa udika abĩ Ufinikiya nu aki Usamariya, umbɔ asɔm arherhe atsen abi Uyahuda aka adzipa azĩ ru Unum. Arherha akɛrɛ atsu abika adɔsa kishoo agɔm anggɔm akarhãrhã.
15.4: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka azĩ atsĩ Urusharhima, abika adɔsa nu abi itser Uyesu nu akakũ ayɛi umbɔ, Uburhu nu Ubarnaba asɔme umbɔ kishoo ubinkpi Unum aka akorhe ra abokmbɔ.
15.5: Bɔr abika adɔsa abɔɔ abika awu ru ugbɛr uwu abi Ufarisi asok adɛ̃ɛ̃ na agɛ, <<Awu ufang abi imangmang ra atsen umbɔ asorhuwe umbɔ usorhe na adɔsi Íkpem Umusa.>>
15.6: Abi itser Uyesu na akakũ akɔng arherha arherhe ri itsi arherhe ha.
15.7: Umbɔ aka amaa uning akarhãrhã, mɔcɛ Ubitru asok adɛ̃ɛ̃ na agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi angwɛ̃mɛn, umbi ahwɛngmbi rimɔ̃ɔ̃ Unum asɛng umum ru umbi agɛ atsen abi Uyahuda agũ Isarhe Iyiki Ize ru ubokmum na awe ru imangmang.
15.8: Unum aka ahwɛng amɛn anera, adeyiwa agɛ unga aka ayɛisa umbɔ ri idzowe umbɔ Ipfu Isarsatangge ru nyaka unga aka adzaa umɛn.
15.9: Unga asi iyotunga ugɛ umɛn iwiwemɛn nggu umbɔ unga asaruka amɛnmbɔ ri imangmangmbɔ.
15.10: Nggee, awu use utsu umbi anu iviru Unum ri itsorhuwe abin aka amor ru atsi angwɛ̃ imesa abɛrɛ umɛn nu atesmɛn iki isi idɛ̃ɛ̃ itsãmɛn?
15.11: Ĩ'ĩ! Umɛn ihwɛng ugɛ awu imimuta Uteijee Uyesu ngge inu ifɔrha umɛn, ru nyaka ngge iki ifɔrhe umbɔ.>>
15.12: Kishoo ikikɔng anera inũ ukutata na akpeto ru Ubarnaba nu Uburhu umbɔ aka asɔme umbɔ abin idzeu nu igbigbayɛ Unum aka akorhuwe atsen abi Uyahuda ru ubokmbɔ.
15.13: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka amaa arherhe ha, Uyaku agɛ, <<Umbi angwɛ̃mɛn, aka akpeto ru umum.
15.14: Usiman asɔma umɛn ikikorhu Unum unga aka atirha asɛng abɔɔ ra atsen abi Uyahuda umbɔ awu abinga.
15.15: Akɛrɛ ha awu uku kpengkpeng nggu arherhe abika asɔm Arherhu-Num. Umbɔ aka atsɛng agɛ,
15.16: << <Akɛrɛ ha aka imaa umum ibvui ĩbamum iba idzin utsurha Udauda uku ugba. Umum ibvui iberukũ igbigbangge, umum ibvui itarukũ.
15.17: Nggee anera abika abɔr aka ibeea umum Uteijee, nu kishoo atsen abi Uyahuda umum iki isɛng umbɔ awu abimum.> Awu Uteijee uwuku ukorha abin hã arherhe arherhe akɛrɛ.
15.19: <<Nggee, aba awu inyĩnyãmum, isi imɛ̃ngge umɛn ipare atsen abi Uyahuda abika adzipa aba udiku Unum.
15.20: Bɔr umɛn itsɛnge umbɔ ubvur isɔme umbɔ niba aghambɔ ubinkpi umbɔ aka ayɛruwe ru ugberhe, use itoma-dak, nu atãi ijuɛyɛ umbɔ aka ashĩrhũwe urhɔka, use atãi adzirh.
15.21: Ubinkutsu aka avarhukumbɔ Íkpem Umusa ru ubɛn utepa ishaisha, na avarhumbɔ ra abã ifɛn-Nummbɔ ubɛn unum ukpuku uwosha.>> Ubvur akakũ uzĩ ru atsen abika adzipa
15.22: Mɔcɛ abi itser Uyesu nggu akakũ nu kishoo abika adɔsa, anyã azea umbɔ asɛng anera ra adɔkambɔ adene umbɔ azĩ Uantakiya nggu Uburhu nu Ubarnaba. Umbɔ asɛng Uyahuda uwu umbɔ iki iyisa Ubarsabba, nu Usirha, ikivarhambɔ aka awu anggbaashi ra abika adɔsa.
15.23: Nggu umbɔ adene ubvur uwurɛ uwu utsɛng ugɛ, Abi itser Uyesu nu akakũ abika adɔsa, angwɛ̃mbi, Uzĩ ra abika adɔsa atsen abi Uyahuda ru Uantakiya, ra abĩ Usuriya nu aki Ukirhikiya, Ighwe.
15.24: Umɛn igũ abɔɔ adzeku umɛn asoyiwa amɛnmbi nggu arherhambɔ, adzunuwa umbi nggu ubinkpi umbɔ iki irherhe, asi iwea umɛn idene umbɔ.
15.25: Nggee umɛn iki ibema ni inyã azea umɛn isɛng abɔɔ idene umbɔ aba ru umbi nggu awɛrhamɛn umbɔ Ubarnaba nggu Uburhu,
15.26: abirabɛ aka adzowe urhɛmbɔ ri itsok Uteijeemɛn Uyesu Ukiristo ha.
15.27: Nggee umɛn idene umbɔ Uyahuda nggu Usirha aba ru umbi asɔma umbi abin hã ra angwĩmbɔ umɛn iki itsɛng.
15.28: Ipfu Isarsatangge nu umɛn inyã azea umɛn niba itsukamɛn umbi imoryɛ iki inangngge umbi, umɛn ikpurhi isɔma umbi abinkɛ aka awu ufang.
15.29: Umbi niba aghambi ubinkpi umbɔ aka ayɛruwe nu agberhe, use atãi ijuɛyɛ umbɔ aka ashĩrhũwe urhɔka, use itãi adzirh, use itoma-dak. Umbi aba atsammbi atsimbi ra abin akɛrɛ, umbi akorhe iyiki ize nukpɔ. Aka azĩ uku utɔɔ.
15.30: Umbɔ adene umbɔ itser ha abvui azĩmbɔ Uantakiya, anangkɛ umbɔ aka akɔng abika adɔsa adzowe umbɔ ubvur ha.
15.31: Ivangyɛ anera aka avarhu ubvur ha, umbɔ agɔm anggɔm nggu itɛnamɛn nu arherhe ififitayɛ umbɔ aka avarhe.
15.32: Uyahuda nu Usirha, umbɔ awu abika asɔm Arherhu-Num, arherha arherhe ififita na afituwe abika adɔsa nggu irhɛm arherhe.
15.33: Umbɔ aka amaa ivang iyɔɔ umɔ, umbɔ adene abika adɔsa azĩ nggu igũibɛn iyi ididɔɔr ra abirabɛ aka adene umbɔ.
15.35: Uburhu nu Ubarnaba asei adãrhũmbɔ ivang ru Uantakiya nu aner abɔɔ arhɛrhɛ aka amesuwe na adzowe isarhe Arherhu Uteijee. Igigau Uburhu nu Ubarnaba
15.36: Ivanga ukunjiir iki itɔng Uburhu agɔr Ubarnaba agɛ, <<Uba umɛn izĩmɛn ubɛn iteuyɛ umɛn iki idzowe isarhe Arherhu Uteijee izĩ iyepa angwɛ̃mɛn nu anapumɛn, ni inyãni ubinkpi umbɔ iki ikorhe.>>
15.37: Ubarnaba abee ikũ nggu Uyohana, umbɔ iki iyisa Umarku, umbɔ azĩ urhɔnga.
15.38: Bɔr Uburhu asi ikaifɛrhkɔ ugɛ izengge umbɔ akũna unga, ubinkutsu, unga asi idɛ̃ɛ̃nga nggu umbɔ ri itser ru Upamfirhiya.
15.39: Uning igigau utsotsoramgbɔ, utsu umbɔ agaumbɔ. Ubarnaba akũ Umarku umbɔ atsĩ ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ azĩmbɔ Usayifuru.
15.40: Bɔr Uburhu asɛng Usirha umbɔ azĩmbɔ, abika adɔsa afɛne umbɔ Uteijee unga atsu imimutanga idzɛu umbɔ.
15.41: Unga adɔsa udika abĩ Usuriya nu aki Ukirhikiya, afita abika adɔsa.

16.1: Uburhu agbaashia aba Udarbe mɔcɛ na azĩ uteu Urhistira, anangkɛ ungwɛ̃ imesa uwɔɔ itsoka igburh Utimoti. Uyanga awu una Uyahudiya uwuku ududɔsa, bɔr utɛnga awu utsa Uherhini.
16.2: Abika adɔsa ru Urhistira nu Uikoniya arherhi iyiki ize ri itsinga.
16.3: Uburhu abee ikũ unga azĩ uzɛ̃rhã, nggee unga atsu umbɔ asorhuwe unga usorhe, ubinkutsu abi Uyahuda abi anang hã kishoo ahwɛngmbɔ utɛ Utimoti awu utsa Uherhini.
16.4: Umbɔ aka azɛ̃rhã atsĩrhĩ iteu, anu idɛyiwe anera abinkɛ abi itser Uyesu nu akakũ ru Urusharhima, adɛyiwe abika adɔsa, adɔsa ake.
16.5: Ngge itsu abika adɔsa atoma awu akerketambɔ ri imangmang, nu irhɛmbɔ inũ ititoma ubɛn unuma. Uburhu anyã izĩ Umakidoniya ri irhi
16.6: Uburhu nu awɛrhu uzɛ̃rhãnga azĩ udika abĩ Ufirijiya na aki Ugarhatiya, ubinkutsu Ipfu Isarsatangge ikɛnngge umbɔ idzowe isarhe Uteijee ru abĩ Uasiya.
16.7: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka aba atsĩ nu atsom abĩ Umisiya, umbɔ abee izĩ abĩ Ubitiniya, bɔr Ipfu Uyesu ikɛnngge umbɔ.
16.8: Nggee umbɔ adɔsa udika abĩ Umisiya acipa azĩmbɔ uteu Utoruwa.
16.9: Nu untsuuka Uburhu anyã irhi uner abĩ Umakidoniya aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ na ashɔ̃rhã unga agɛ, <<Uma uba Umakidoniya uba uyika umɛn.>>
16.10: Uburhu aka anyã irhi ha, kanying umɛn ingbika abinmɛn izĩmɛn Umakidoniya, ubinkutsu umɛn inyã Unum unga ayisa umɛn idzowe Isarhe Iyiki Ize ru umbɔ. Urhidiya awea ri imangmang
16.11: Umɛn isok ru ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ idzeku Utoruwa uku urhirhiki izĩmɛn Usamutarkiya. Unum uvaa umɛn itsĩmɛn Uniyaforhi.
16.12: Umɛn idze umɔ izĩmɛn uteu Ufirhipi, ukpuku uwe anang isei abi Uroma uteu ukugɔnga ra abĩ Umakidoniya. Umɛn imaa inuma umɔ.
16.13: Ru unum ukpuku uwosha umɛn idzeka angwĩ utepa izĩmɛn ru ubang azɛ̃, anangkɛ umɛn iki itsar ugɛ awu anang ifɛn-Num. Umɛn isei ni irherha arherhe ra akatsɛrh aka akɔng umɔ.
16.14: Utsɛrh uwɔɔ ra abika akpeto itsoka igburh Urhidiya, unga awu una uteu Utiyatira anu igoyiwe atorho undzuna, uwuku udzowe igɔng ru Unum. Uteijee ayanguwe amɛnnga unga akpeto ru ubinkpi Uburhu aka arherhe.
16.15: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka asorhuwe unga ubɔtisima nggu aner iyanga, unga ayisa umɛn izĩ ri iyanga agɛ, <<Umbi aba abemumbi agɛ umum iwu uwuku uwe ru imangmang ru Uteijee, àka aba acipa ri iyamum.>> Unga aka agbiir amɛnmɛn umɛn ibemumɛn. Agbang Uburhu nu Usirha ru ugborzĩ
16.16: Unum ukpɔɔ umɛn izĩ ra anang ifɛn-Num ni igbopu una uwɔɔ awu ugãrhã awuri ipfu iyiki ibewe iyi irhi. Unga aka isaka akposhuwe uhwɛk ru ateiyanga akarhãrhã ri itser irhi ha.
16.17: Unga anu idɔsu Uburhu nu umɛn, atsu ivum, anu igɔr agɛ, <<Abɛrɛ awu agãrhũ Unum Uwuku Ugɔng anu idɛyiwa umbi utsĩndĩ uwuku ufɔrh.>>
16.18: Anu ikorhe rimi inuma irhɛirhɛ utsɛku Uburhu agũ avɔm, na adzipa agɔr ipfu iyiki ibewe ha agɛ, <<Umum itsu ungo ri itsok Uyesu Ukiristo upfudzeka ru unga!>> Kanying ipfu iyiki ibewe ha idzekngge ru unga.
16.19: Ivangyɛ ateiya una hã aka anyã utsĩndĩ ikpo uhwɛkmbɔ uku uborhmgbɔ, mɔcɛ umbɔ adzur Uburhu nu Usirha agbĩrhã umbɔ azĩmbɔ ra anang izɛɛ ra asu abi ijee.
16.20: Umbɔ aka akũna umbɔ azĩ ra abika atsu uvau abi Uroma na agɛ, <<Aner abɛrɛ awu abi Uyahuda, adɛ̃ɛ̃ isoyiwe amɛn utepmɛn.
16.21: Anu imesuwa agbeyakɛ aka asi imɛ̃ke ri ikpemyɛ umɛn abi Uroma iki iyɛi use umɛn ĩdɔsa.>>
16.22: Anera akɔng nu atsimbɔ Uburhu nu Usirha, abika atsu uvau atsuke anera atsimuwe atorhambɔ na akwɛr umbɔ.
16.23: Umbɔ aka akwɛr umbɔ akarhãrhã amaa, atsuke umbɔ ru ugborzĩ, atsu uner idzɛu angwɛ̃dzɛn na adzɛu umbɔ.
16.24: Unga aka ayɛi itsera, unga atsuke umbɔ ru unɔrkang ugbora, atsuke adakmbɔ ru ukhɔɔ.
16.25: Ayoka ikɔ untsuuka Uburhu nu Usirha afɛn-Num atsusa abom ikpoi Unum, abirabɛ umbɔ aka agbange ru ugborzĩ hã akpeto ru umbɔ.
16.26: Kanying nggaa izizusa abĩ itsu atarh idzin ugbor uzĩ hã azusa. Kanying kishoo angwĩ ubã ugbor uzĩ atsuri, kishoo inyãwã iyiriyɛ umbɔ aka abow abi ugbora igarhe.
16.27: Uner adzɛu ugborzĩ hã aka azir ru urhɔ anyã angwĩ ubã agbora adɛ̃ɛ̃ iyɛm, unga awɔɔr ikonnga abee ifɛre itsinga, ubinkutsu akaifɛrhkɔ agɛ abirabɛ umbɔ aka agbange ru ugborzĩ hã aka atĩmbɔ.
16.28: Bɔr Uburhu atsarhi irhaknga atsu ivum agɛ, <<Niba unayikɔ itsingo! Umɛn abɛ kishoo iwu umɔ!>>
16.29: Uner udzɛu ugborzĩ hã agɔr umbɔ akũ irhirhang aba, mɔcɛ unga asok adɛr atsĩ azang iwei ifɛr unga atararhu ra asu Uburhu nu Usirha.
16.30: Mɔcɛ unga akũna umbɔ adzeka ra awiya na arhusa agɛ, <<Umbi anggbaashi, umum ikorhu use aka awu ufang ni ikpo ififɔrh?>>
16.31: Umbɔ agɛ, <<Uwe ru imangmang ru Uteijee Uyesu, ungo uwuri ikpikpoɔ ififɔrh, ungo nu abi iyango.>>
16.32: Mɔcɛ umbɔ arherhe Arherhe Uteijee asɔme unga nu abirabɛ aka awu ri iyanga kishoo.
16.33: Ru untsuua ha ri ivang hã uner idzɛu ugbor ha aka akũna umbɔ azĩ asorhe isɔɔmbɔ. Kanying unga nu abi iyanga kishoo asorhuwe umbɔ ubɔtisima.
16.34: Unga akũna umbɔ atsĩã ri iyanga akowe umbɔ ubingha. Unga nu abi iyanga kishoo agɔm anggɔm ubinkutsu umbɔ kishoo awembɔ ri imangmang ru Unum.
16.35: Ukpe uku usar, abika atsu uvau adene ambow ikow agɛ, <<Atsũwe aner abɛrɛ.>>
16.36: Nggee uner idzɛu ugbor ha adɛyiwe Uburhu agɛ, <<Abika atsu uvau agɔr agɛ atsũwe umbi. Icɛrɛ aka adzek. Azĩ uku utɔɔ.>>
16.37: Bɔr Uburhu agɔr uner idzɛu ugbor ha agɛ, <<Akwɛr umɛn ra asu anera na asi ivarhumbɔ arherhe, umɛn abɛ iwu aner Uroma, na atsuke umɛn ru ugborzĩ. Icɛrɛ umbɔ awuri itsũwe umɛn ri iwɔk? Ĩ'ĩ, rinɛɛ! Uneke umbɔ aba nibikambɔ aba atsũwe umɛn idzek.>>
16.38: Ambow ikow ha azĩ asɔme abika atsu uvau arherha akɛrɛ ha. Abika atsu uvau aka agũ agɛ Uburhu nu Usirha awu aner Uroma, iwei ifɛr umbɔ.
16.39: Nggee umbɔ aba ashɔ̃rhã umbɔ Uburhu nu Usirha, atsũwe umbɔ, na adene umbɔ adzek ru ugborzĩ, na ashɔ̃rhã umbɔ ama adzek ru utepa.
16.40: Ivangyɛ umbɔ Uburhu nu Usirha aka adzek ru ugborzĩ hã, umbɔ abvui azĩmbɔ ru iya Urhidiya, umɔ umbɔ aka akɔng nggu abika adɔsa na afituwe umbɔ. Mɔcɛ umbɔ abɔrukumbɔ utepa.

17.1: Uburhu nu Usirha aka azɛ̃rhã adɔsa udiku iteu Uamfiporhi nu Uafirhoniya, aba atsĩ uteu Utasarhonika, anangkɛ ubã ifɛn-Num abi Uyahuda uku uwe.
17.2: Ru nyaku Uburhu aka abayi, atsĩ ru ubã ifɛn-Num hã, inum iyiki iwiwosha itaar umbɔ aka anu irhisi itsɛng Arherhu-Num nggu umbɔ.
17.3: Unga anu isɔme umbɔ na adɛyiwe umbɔ idzidzɛrhe agɛ awu ufang Ukiristo aka ihwa uver na asoku udzak. Uburhu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Uyesu ha umum iki inu indɛyiwa umbi unga awu Ukiristo.>>
17.4: Abɔɔ abi Uyahuda abemumbɔ arherhe Uburhu nu Usirha, nu arhɛrhɛ abi Uherhini abika agũ iwei Unum nu akatsɛrh akagɔng atomi itsi nggu umbɔ.
17.5: Bɔr abi Uyahuda abikase agũ unyɛ̃ɛ̃, umbɔ akɔng awɛ ugbau ra atsĩndĩ, umbɔ aka akɔng kishoo ahwita abi utepa. Akũ avɔm atsĩ ri iya Ujason abee Uburhu nu Usirha abee ikũna umbɔ adzeka ra anera.
17.6: Bɔr umbɔ aka asi inyãmbɔ umbɔ, umbɔ adarhu Ujason nu abika adɔsa abɔɔ akũna umbɔ azĩmbɔ ra asu abi ijee utepa, atsuyi ivum agɛ, <<Aner abɛrɛ abika asoyi amɛn ubɛn ananga ru upfung nggabɛ aka abambɔ nggimi.
17.7: Ujason ayɛi umbɔ akũ atsĩ ri iyanga. Kishoo akpɛ̃mbɔ idɔsi ikpem Ukaisar, anu igɔr agɛ uyɛrhe uwɔɔ, itsoknga igburh Uyesu.>>
17.8: Umbɔ aka agũ rimi, anera nu abi ijee utepa agũ avɔm akarhãrhã.
17.9: Mɔcɛ umbɔ atsu Ujason na anera abɔɔ afai uhwɛk na aneke umbɔ azĩmbɔ. Uburhu nu Usirha ru Ubiriya
17.10: Utsuu uku ufin abika adɔsa adene Uburhu nu Usirha azĩmbɔ Ubiriya. Umbɔ aka azĩ atsĩ umɔ, umbɔ atsĩ ru ubã ifɛn-Num abi Uyahuda.
17.11: Abi Ubiriya awu ra amɛn akika agũ arherhe ha anangmbɔ abi Utasarhonika, ubinkutsu ayɛi arherhe ha aboka avaa avaa. Anu itsu asumbɔ ri itsɛng Arherhu-Num ubɛn unuma abee inyã ubinkpi Uburhu aka arherhe uwu idzidzɛrhe.
17.12: Abi Uyahuda arhɛrhɛ awe ru imangmang, nu abi Uherhini, akatsɛrh abika agɔng nu ikɛi akatsak.
17.13: Bɔr abi Uyahuda ru Utasarhonika aka agũ agɛ Uburhu adɛ̃ɛ̃ idzowe isarhe Arherhu-Num ru Ubiriya, umbɔ asok azĩmbɔ umɔ ikɛi. Umbɔ aka azĩ atsĩ, ahwita anera asoyiwe amɛnmbɔ.
17.14: Kanying kanying abika adɔsa akũ Uburhu azĩ ru ubang ukau azɛ̃ akagɔng, bɔr Usirha nu Utimoti aseimbɔ ru Ubiriya.
17.15: Abirabɛ aka azĩ adene Uburhu akũna unga azĩ atsĩmbɔ Uatina. Abvui aba akũ nggu itser Uburhu aka adene umbɔ ugɛ Usirha nu Utimoti aba akpo unga iki ifefetem. Uburhu ru Uatina
17.16: Uburhu aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ adzɛu umbɔ ru Uatina, amɛnnga aghong akarhãrhã unga aka anyã utepa nggu agberhe arhɛrhɛ.
17.17: Nggee unga aka isaka arherha arherhe ru ubã ifɛn-Num nggu abi Uyahuda nu abi Uherhini abɔɔ abika agũ iwei Unum, ikɛi ubɛn unuma unga iki irherha arherhe nggu abirabɛ unga iki ikpo ra anang izɛɛ.
17.18: Rimi hã ikɛi abi ifɛrhkɔ itsoi umbɔ iki iyisa Uabikuriya nu Usitokiya anu irherha arherhe nggu unga. Abɔɔ arhusa agɛ, <<Uwɛrɛ uner ugbugbewa uwurɛ abee igɔr agɛ use?>> Abɔɔ agɛ, <<Awu uner uwuku udzowe isarhe anum abɔɔ abĩ akase.>> Ubinkutsu umbɔ arherhe rimi Uburhu anu idzowe Isarhe Iyiki Ize iyi Uyesu, nu isok ra akpe.
17.19: Mɔcɛ umbɔ akũna unga azĩmbɔ udzepurhe anang ikikɔngyɛ umbɔ aki iyisa Igũ Uarasa agɔr unga agɛ, <<Uba udɛyiwa umɛn imesa iyiki ifa iyɛ ungo uku unu imesuwe.
17.20: Ungo ukũ itsen arherhe ake atsĩ ra atomɛn, umɛn ibee ihwɛng agbena.>>
17.21: Kishoo aner Uatina nu atsen abika asei umɔ, anyangi ivangmbɔ asi ikorhumbɔ ubin bɔr anu irherhe na agosha abin aka afa.
17.22: Uburhu asok adɛ̃ɛ̃ ra asu ikikɔnga, na agɛ, <<Umbi aner Uatina! Umum inyã umbi awu abika abema agbeyi akarhãrhã nu afɛna kishoo.
17.23: Ubinkutsu ivangyɛ umum iki izɛ̃rhã imaa utepa umum inyãmum abinkɛ umbi iki idzowe igɔng nu ake, ikɛi umum inyãmum ubeu idɛm anummbi nggu itsɛng iki igɔr igɛ, <UZĨ RU UNUMWI UMBƆ AKA ASI IHWƐNGMBƆ.> Ubinkpi umbi aka asi ihwɛngmbi na adzowe igɔng ru ukpɔ, awu unga umum iki inu idɛyiwa umbi.
17.24: <<Unumwi aka amunu upfung nu kishoo abinkɛ aka awu umɔ awu Uteijee afã nu abĩ na asi iseisa ra aya-Numkɛ anera iki idzin.
17.25: Unga asi ibeenga anera ayike unga, asi ibeenga ubin, ubinkutsu, awu unga adzowe anera kishoo urhɛ nu uwoyi nu abina kishoo.
17.26: Awu ru unera unying unga aka amunu idũa kishoo, agɛ umbɔ asei ra ananga kishoo ru upfung, unga angwɛ̃ ivangyɛ umbɔ aka isei atsĩ nu inangyɛ umbɔ aka isei.
17.27: Unum akorhe rimi ngge itsú anera ibeea unga, na awuri ima abãrhã azĩmbɔ ru unga, na awuri ikpombɔ unga. Idzidzɛrhe, asi idera nggu ubɛn unera ru umɛn.
17.28: <Ubinkutsu, iwu ru unga umɛn iki iwe ru urhɛ, ni izɛ̃rhã, ni ibɛk.> Ru nyaka abika atsɛng ambommbi abɔɔ aki igɔr agɛ, <Umɛn iwu unangnga.>
17.29: <<Ngge iki iwe ugɛ umɛn iwu unang Unum, asi imɛ̃ɛ̃ umɛn ikaifɛrhkɔ ugɛ Unum awu ru uzirhzĩ uzinarhi use uazurhfa use atarh, ubinkpi unera iki ikorhe ri itsoinga.
17.30: Ri iyi isha Unum asi ibeenga idzowe anera uver ihwihwɛng iki ishingge ru umbɔ, bɔr icɛrɛ unga atsu anera kishoo ubɛn ananga umbɔ adzipa.
17.31: Ubinkutsu unga aka angwɛ̃ɛ̃ unumkpi unga aka iba atsu uvau iyi idzidzɛrhe ru upfunga ru ubok uwɔɔ unga aka asɛng. Unga aka adɛyiwa arherhe ha iwuri iwe rimi ra anera kishoo ri isoyiwe uner ha ra akpe.>>
17.32: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka agũ arherhe isisok ra akpe, abɔɔ acata, bɔr abɔɔ agɛ, <<Umɛn ibee ibvui igũ ubinkpi ungo uku irherhe ra arherha akɛrɛ.>>
17.33: Awu umɔ Uburhu aka abɔre umbɔ.
17.34: Bɔr abɔɔ ukunjiir agbopa nggu Uburhu awe abi imangmang. Ru umbɔ ha awu Udiyonisiyu, uner itser ru udzepurhe, nu utsɛrh uwɔɔ itsoka igburh Udamari, na abɔɔ nggu umbɔ.

18.1: Akɛrɛ ha aka amaa, Uburhu abɔruka Uatina na azĩã Ukorinti.
18.2: Nggɔɔ ha unga aka agbopa nggu utsa Uyahuda uwɔɔ itsoka igburh Uakirha, unga awu uner abi abĩ Ufontu. Unga nu utsɛ̃nga Ubiriskirha anai idzeka abĩ Uitarhiya, ubinkutsu Ukarhaudiyu atsu abi Uyahuda kishoo adzembɔ ru Uroma. Uburhu azĩ inyã umbɔ.
18.3: Ubinkutsu itsermbɔ iwu unying iyiki isɔr utenti, mɔcɛ unga aseisa umbɔ atɔ̃ itser urhɔnga.
18.4: Ubɛn unum ukpuku uwosha Uburhu atsĩã arherhe ru ubã ifɛn-Num abee igbiir amɛn abi Uyahuda na Atsen abi Uyahuda.
18.5: Ivangyɛ umbɔ Usirha nu Utimoti aka adzeku Umakidoniya aba, Uburhu adzowe ivanga kishoo ri idzowe isarhe, adekuwe abi Uyahuda agɛ Uyesu unga awu Ukiristo.
18.6: Bɔr abi Uyahuda aka asi ibemumbɔ na irhena unga, unga azusu uzurhu ra atorhanga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Adzirhmbi awu ra atsimbi! Umum ishimum ru uvau. Icɛrɛ umum iwuri izĩ ra Atsen abi Uyahuda.>>
18.7: Mɔcɛ unga asok azĩã ri iya uwɔɔ itsoka igburh Utitiyu Ujustu, uwuku udzowe igɔng Unum. Iyanga iki ikhapa ru abã ifɛn-Num.
18.8: Ukiribu, unggbaashi ubã ifɛn-Num, awea ri imangmang ru Uteijee, unga nggu aner iyanga kishoo. Abi Ukorinti abɔɔ arhɛrhɛ aka agũ unga awembɔ ri imangmang, umbɔ akorhuwe umbɔ ubɔtisima.
18.9: Untsuuka nukpɔ Uteijee arherhe arherhe nggu Uburhu ru irhi agɔr unga agɛ, <<Niba ugũo iwei, udzowe isarhe, niba unuɔ ukutatata.
18.10: Ubinkutsu umum iwu nggu ungo, unera ashia aka itsu ubok akorhuwa ungo ifɛrhɛ, anermum awu arhɛrhɛ ru utepu ukpirɛ.>>
18.11: Nggee Uburhu asei umɔ amɛka nu utenga, amesuwe umbɔ Arherhu-Num.
18.12: Ivangyɛ Ugarhiyo aka awu unggbaashi abĩ Uakaya, abi Uyahuda agbopa atsimbɔ igamtsa nggu Uburhu akũna unga azĩmbɔ ru udzepurhe uku uvarha arherhe.
18.13: Agɔr agɛ, <<Utsak uwurɛ atsu anera adzowe igɔng ru Unum ru utsĩndĩwi Íkpem iki ikɛnngge.>>
18.14: Uburhu aka abee irherha arherhe, Ugarhiyo agɔr abi Uyahuda agɛ, <<Uda unga akorhu ubin ukpɔɔ uku usi izekpɔ use ukpuku ubewe ri Íkpem, umum igũmum na umbi.
18.15: Bɔr ngge iki iwu uning ru irhɛm, atsutsok nu Íkpemmbi, umbi aka azĩ arherhe amaa nibikambi. Umum ishimum ra amɛn aka atsu uvau ri ikpũ abin akɛrɛ.>>
18.16: Mɔcɛ unga awayika umbɔ ru udzepurhe uku uvarha arherhanga.
18.17: Mɔcɛ umbɔ kishoo adzur Usostanu unggbaashi ubã ifɛn-Num, akwɛre unga ugwɛɛ ru udzepurhe uku uvarha arherhe. Bɔr Ugarhiyo asi irhisa. Ubiriskirha, Uakirha nu Uaporho
18.18: Uburhu asei ru uteu Ukorinti inuma irhɛirhɛ. Na aneke abika adɔsa na atsĩ ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ azĩmbɔ abĩ Usuriya, umbɔ Ubiriskirha nu Uakirha azĩ urhɔnga nggu unga. Bɔr uyirhkpi unga aka ayirh utsu umbɔ akone itsinga ru uteu Ukankiriya unga adɔrha azĩ.
18.19: Umbɔ aka azĩ atsĩ ru Uafisa, umɔ Uburhu aka abɔre umbɔ Ubiriskirha nu Uakirha. Unga atsĩã ru ubã ifɛn-Num arherha arherhe nggu abi Uyahuda.
18.20: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka ashɔ̃rhã unga ama adãrhã nggu umbɔ, unga asi ibemunga.
18.21: Bɔr unga aka awuri ibɔre umbɔ, unga abemuwe agɛ, <<Umum ibvui inbamum ru umbi Unum aba abemunga.>> Mɔcɛ unga atsĩ ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ adzeka ru Uafisa.
18.22: Unga aka acipa ru uteu Ukaisariya, unga afũã ighwe abika adɔsa ru Urusharhima, mɔcɛ unga acipa azĩã uteu Uantakiya.
18.23: Unga aka adãrhã amaa ru Uantakiya, Uburhu asok atsĩrhã ra abĩ Ugarhatiya na abĩ Ufirijiya, adɔsu ititeu ayike angwɛ̃ imesa adɛ̃ɛ̃ aker.
18.24: Ivang hã utsa abi Uyahuda uwɔɔ itsoka igburh Uaforho, aba ru Uafisa. Unga awu uner uteu Uarhekzandiriya ru Umasar. Unga ahwɛnga arherhe afina na ahwɛng itsɛng Arherhu-Num akarhãrhã.
18.25: Aka amesukumbɔ unga ru utsĩndĩ Uteijee, unga aka isaka anyar asunga arherhe uku urhirhiki ri itsi Uyesu, bɔr unga akpurha ahwɛng ubɔtisima Uyohana.
18.26: Unga atirha adzowe isarhe nggu ikernga kishoo ru ubã ifɛn-Num. Umbɔ Ubiriskirha nu Uakirha aka agũ arherhanga, umbɔ akũna unga azĩmbɔ ri iyambɔ na atoma adɛyiwe unga utsĩndĩ Unum.
18.27: Ivangyɛ Uaporho aka abee izĩ abĩ Uakaya, abika adɔsa afituwe unga na atsɛnge ubvur ra angwɛ̃ imesa ru Uakaya umbɔ ayɛi unga. Unga aka azĩ atsĩ umɔ unga amɛna ayike abirabɛ aka awe ru imangmang ru Unum ru ubok imimuta.
18.28: Ubinkutsu unga ananga abi Uyahuda ra asu anera nggu ijee arherhe akarhãrhã, adɛyiwe umbɔ ri itsɛng Arherhu-Num agɛ Uyesu unga awu Ukiristo.

19.1: Ivangyɛ Uaforho aka awu ru Ukorinti, Uburhu azɛ̃rhã ru utsĩndĩ abĩã azĩ atsĩ Uafisa, umɔ unga akpo angwɛ̃ imesa abɔɔ.
19.2: Arhusa umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi ayɛimbi Ipfu Isarsatangge ri ivangyɛ umbi aka awuri imangmang?>> Umbɔ agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ĩ'ĩ, umɛn isi igũmɛn ugɛ Ipfu Isarsatangge iwengge.>>
19.3: Nggee Uburhu arhusa agɛ, <<Asorhuwa umbi ikpũ ubɔtisima uwukusong rimi?>> Umbɔ agɛ, <<Ikpũ ubɔtisima Uyohana.>>
19.4: Uburhu agɛ, <<Ubɔtisima Uyohana uwe uwu idzidzipa. Unga adɛyiwe anera umbɔ awe ru imangmang ru uwuruwi aka iba ru undzingnga, awu unga hã awu Uyesu.>>
19.5: Umbɔ aka agũ rimi, umbɔ asorhuwe umbɔ ubɔtisima ri itsok Uteijee Uyesu.
19.6: Ivangyɛ Uburhu aka atsorhuwe umbɔ abok, Ipfu Isarsatangge icipuwangge nu umbɔ, umbɔ atsĩmbɔ irherha arherhe ri idũ iyikise na asɔm Arherhu-Num.
19.8: Uburhu atsĩ ru ubã ifɛn-Num adzowe isarhe nggu ikeramɛn afɛ̃ɛ̃ ataar, anu arherhe na agbiir amɛnmbɔ aba ra arherhe Iyɛrhe Unum.
19.9: Bɔr abɔɔ abi itsi iki iker akpɛ̃mbɔ iwe ru imangmang, na arherhe iyiki ibewe ru Utsĩndĩ Uteijee ra asu anera. Nggee Uburhu abɔruka umbɔ, na akũ angwɛ̃ imesa azĩ amesuwe umbɔ ubɛn unuma ru ubã imesa Utiranu.
19.10: Akɛrɛ ha anu ikorhe rimi utsɛku imɛka ivaa, ngge itsu kishoo abi Uyahuda nu abi Uherhini abika asei ra abĩ Uasiya agũ Arherhu Uteijee.
19.11: Unum anu ikorha abin idzeu akɔɔ awuweke ru ubok Uburhu,
19.12: utsɛku umbɔ aki ikũ ushanga atorho nu atorhi itser iyɛ iki ibanga unga akũ azĩ ru abi irhãrhã akerhe, nu ípfu iyiki ibewe ikɛi ibɔrukungge umbɔ.
19.13: Abɔɔ abi Uyahuda abika azɛ̃rhã atsĩrhĩ iteu atsusuwe ípfu iyiki ibewe abee ikũ itsok Uteijee Uyesu akorhe rimi hã. Agɔr agɛ, <<Umum itsũ umbi ri itsok Uyesu, Uburhu aka adũwã, àka apfu adzek.>>
19.14: Angwɛ̃ Usikeba utɔɔva uner Uyahudiya ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nuwɔ, anu ikorhe rimi hã.
19.15: Unuma nukpɔ ipfu iyiki ibewe igɔr umbɔ igɛ, <<Uyesu umum ihwɛng unga, umum ikɛi ihwɛng Uburhu, umbi awu umbɔ ungaa?>>
19.16: Mɔcɛ uner ha aka awuri ipfu iyiki ibewe ha ater isha afũã nu umbɔ atɔnga ikermbɔ kishoo. Akwɛr umbɔ adzek igbĩrhĩ ri iya ha atĩ nggu isisɔɔ.
19.17: Ivangyɛ kishoo abi Uyahuda nu abi Uherhini abika asei ru Uafisa aka agũ ubinkpi uku ukorhe, iwei ifɛr umbɔ kishoo, umbɔ adzowe igɔng ru itsok Uteijee Uyesu.
19.18: Arhɛrhɛ abika awe ru imangmang aba akũ angwĩmbɔ asɔm itser iyiki ibeweyɛ umbɔ aka akorhe ru awiya.
19.19: Anera arhɛrhɛ abi igoka akarha abvurmbɔ akpĩĩwe ra asu anera kishoo. Uhwɛk abvur ha utsĩkpɔ íshaa imang uazurhfa anaka agɔnga isɔka itɔ̃ɔ̃ (50,000).
19.20: Ru utsĩndĩ hã Arherhu Uteijee aka adzek atɛ̃rhã akarhãrhã nggu ijee.
19.21: Akɛrɛ ha aka akorhe kishoo amaa, Uburhu abee izĩ Urusharhima, awuri izɛ̃rhã atɔng udika abĩ Umakidoniya nu aki Uakaya. Agɛ, <<Umum iba izĩ itsĩ imaamum nggɔɔ ha, awu ufang umum izĩ iyepa Uroma ikɛi.>>
19.22: Unga adene abika ayike unga ikivarhambɔ, Utimoti nu Uarastu, azĩmbɔ Umakidoniya, unga iganga asei ivanga ukunjiir ra abĩ Uasiya. Ubvun ru Uafisa
19.23: Ivang hã iki iyo ubvun uku ugɔng usomgbɔ ra abika adɔsu Utsĩndĩ hã.
19.24: Uner unai uwɔɔ itsoka igburh Udimitiriyu, uwuruwi aki ikũ uazurhfa anak azirhzĩ iya ugberhe Uartemi. Unga nu abi itsernga akposhu uhwɛk ri itsermbɔ ha akarhãrhã.
19.25: Unga akɔng umbɔ, nu abika atɔ̃ ikpũ itser ha, na agɛ, <<Umbi anermɛn, àka ahwɛng ugɛ nggu itser iyɛrɛ umɛn iki ikpo abin.
19.26: Umbi anyãmbi na agũmbi asi iwea ri nggimi ru uteu Uafisa ukpekũ, abĩ Uasiya kishoo abɔr ukunjiir, Uburhu uwurɛ aka igbiite amɛnmbɔ na anu igɔr agɛ anum abɛ umbɔ iki ikũ abok agbisha asi iwembɔ anum.
19.27: Ighighong iwe asi íwea igba abĩ itsermɛn ukpekũ, bɔr iya-num nggaa Uartemi awuri itsu ike ishike ru ugarh, nu Uartemi nibikanga, umbɔ iki idzowe igɔng ra abĩ Uasiya nu upfunga kishoo, awuri ishia ri igɔng.>>
19.28: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka agũ rimi, avɔm afɛr umbɔ akarhãrhã, umbɔ atirhi itsarhi irhakmbɔ agɛ, <<Igɔng iwe nggu Uartemi aki Uafisa!>>
19.29: Kanying utepa kishoo udzunukpɔ. Agbĩrhũ Ugayu nu Uaristaku, aner Umakidoniya, abirabɛ aka awu awɛrhu uzɛ̃rhũ Uburhu. Anera kishoo atĩ azĩmbɔ ra anang ikikɔnga.
19.30: Uburhu abee itsĩ ra anang ikikɔnga, bɔr angwɛ̃ imesa akɛnmbɔ unga.
19.31: Anggbaashi abɔɔ ra abĩ Uasiya, abirabɛ aka awu awɛrhu Uburhu, adene itser ashɔ̃rhã unga agɛ unga niba atsĩã ra anang ikikɔnga.
19.32: Anera aka akɔng umɔ adzunumbɔ, abɔɔ asi ihwɛngmbɔ ubinkpi uku utsu umbɔ akɔng. Abɔɔ atsarhi irhakmbɔ arherhe arherhe, abɔɔ anu irherha akimbɔ awuweke.
19.33: Abi Uyahuda ayiru Uarhekzanda ra asu abɔɔ ri ikikɔnga unga atsu ivum abee unga arherha arherhe. Unga aberu uboknga umbɔ anukutata ru unga ikaa itsinga ra anera.
19.34: Bɔr umbɔ aka ahwɛng agɛ unga awu utsa Uyahuda, umbɔ atsarhi irhakmbɔ kishoo agɛ, <<Igɔng iwe nggu Uartemi ukpu Uafisa.>> Akorhe rimi ayombɔ akara avaa.
19.35: Bɔr uner itsɛng utepa atsu umbɔ anukutata, na agɛ, <<Umbi aner Uafisa, upfunga kishoo usi ihwɛngkpɔ ugɛ uteu Uafisa ukpuku udzɛu iya nggaa Uartemi, nu asarkasar utarh ha uku udzeka afã uba ugba?
19.36: Iki isi iwengge ubin itsɛyi nggu abin akɛrɛ, imɛ̃ngge umbi adɔɔr amɛnmbi niba azangmbi.
19.37: Nggayɛ anerabɛ umbi aka akũ aba nggimi, asi ivɛumbɔ ivɛu ra aya-num, asi irhenumbɔ unummɛn Uartemi.
19.38: Bɔr Udimitiriyu nu awɛrhi itsernga aba awembɔ ru ubin ukpuku ughong amɛnmbɔ nggu ubɛn unera, udzepurhe ukpuku uvarha arherhe ukpi utsurirɛ, ikɛi abika atsu uvau, adɛ̃ɛ̃ azĩ atsumbɔ arherhe ri itsimbɔ.
19.39: Aba awu ubin ukpɔɔ umbi aka abee, àka ahwɛng ugɛ awuri irherha ake ru udzepurhe ukpuku uvarha arherhe.
19.40: Ngge iki iwe rimi, igbaigba iwe ru umɛn, ubinkutsu awuri itsumbɔ arherhamɛn ri isoyamɛn irherɛ, ni isi ídɛ̃ɛ̃ isɔmmɛn awu use utsu isoyamɛn hã. Ni isi ítsɛngamɛn awu use utsu isoyamɛn hã.>>
19.41: Unga aka arherhe rimi amaa, na asoyika ikikɔnga.

20.1: Ivangyɛ isoya amɛn hã iki idɔɔr, Uburhu ayisa angwɛ̃ imesa ha, unga aka amaa ifituwe umbɔ, aghwe umbɔ unuma na azĩã abĩ Umakidoniya.
20.2: Unga aka azɛ̃rhã ri inang hã, arherhuwe irhɛm irhɛirhɛ iyiki ififita ra anera, na amasha atsĩã abĩ Uherha.
20.3: Umɔ unga asei afɛ̃ɛ̃ ataar, na abee itsĩ ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ azĩ abĩ Usuriya, na agũ ugɛ abi Uyahuda aka adzɛu abee ikorhe iyiki ibewe nggu unga ri ivang hã, nggee unga abvui adɔsu udiku Umakidoniya.
20.4: Abika azĩ nggu unga awu Usopata ungwɛ̃ Upuru aka adzeku Ubiriya, Uaristaku nu Usakundu aner Utasarhonika, nu Ugayu uner Udarbe, nu Utimoti ikɛi, nu Utikiku nu Uturofimu aner abĩ Uasiya.
20.5: Aner abɛrɛ agbaashia asok azĩmbɔ idzɛu umɛn ru Utoruwa.
20.6: Bɔr umɛn itsĩ ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ ru Ufirhipi umbɔ aka amaa Irhowa Uborodi Ukpuku Usheru Uguga, umɛn imaa inuma itɔ̃ɔ̃ ni ikpo umbɔ ru Utoruwa. Umɔ umɛn isei inuma utɔɔva. Uyutiku asok ra akpe
20.7: Ru unum inggbaashia ri inuma utɔɔva umɛn ikɔng itsɔku uborodi. Uburhu adzowe isarhe ru umbɔ, unga abee isisok ukpe unum uvaa, adɛ̃ɛ̃ adzowe isarhe utsɛku ikɔ untsuuka.
20.8: Atseu irhirhang awu arhɛrhɛ ru ubã afã hã umɛn iki ikɔng.
20.9: Ungwɛ̃dzɛm uwɔɔ itsoknga igburh Uyutiku, asei nu angwĩ ugba, agbɛu urhɔ ri ivangyɛ Uburhu aka anu idzowe isarhe iyiki ider. Urhɔ uku unyangu Uyutiku, unga ashɔɔr ri iya afã ugbɛr uwu untaar aba agba umbɔ ashupa unga ukoma.
20.10: Uburhu acipuwa nu abĩ, aba agbapfu nu ungwɛ̃dzɛm hã na akarha unga awuma na agɛ, <<Niba agũmbi ighong. Awu nggu urhɛnga!>>
20.11: Mɔcɛ unga abvui afũã ni iya afã. Unga atsɔku uborodi, atãi, na adɛ̃ɛ̃nga arherhe utsɛku ukpe uku usar, unga azĩã.
20.12: Umbɔ akũ ungwɛ̃dzɛm hã azĩmbɔ nggu urhɛnga, na akpo idɔngamɛn akarhãrhã. Uzɛ̃rhãmbɔ adzeku Utoruwa azĩ Umirhetu
20.13: Umɛn iso izĩmɛn ru ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃, umɛn idzur udĩ izĩmɛn Uassu. Umɛn itsar ishupu Uburhu umɔ, ubinkutsu unga avarhe rimi ri inggbaashia, unga aka azɛ̃rhã na adak azĩ.
20.14: Unga aka akpo umɛn ru Uassu, umɛn ishupa unga izĩmɛn Umitirhen.
20.15: Unum uvaa umɛn izɛ̃rhã ru ukhukhɔɔ ĩba itɔng ifɛn Ukiyo. Unum untaar ikɛi umɛn igar izĩ Usamo, unum unaa umɛn itsĩ ru Umirhetu.
20.16: Uburhu asi ibeenga itsĩ ru Uafisa utsur ivanga imaangge ru Uasiya, azang abee itsĩ ru Urusharhima, ngge iba imɛ̃ngge, ru unum irhowu Upentiko. Uburhu aghwe unggbaashi nu akakũ ididɔsa
20.17: Awu ru Umirhetu, Uburhu aka ayisa akakũ ri ikikɔng abika adɔsa ru Uafisa.
20.18: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka aba atsĩ, unga agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi ahwɛngmbi ikpũ isiseimum ri ivanga kishoo umum iki iwu nggu umbi, udzur ru unumkpi umum iki itsĩ ra abĩ Uasiya.
20.19: Umum itɔ̃ itser Uteijee nggu ididɔɔr akarhãrhã nu anyĩ. Nu ngge iki iwe ugɛ abi Uyahuda atsu umum ayetnum nggu andeya.
20.20: Umbi ahwɛngmbi umum isi ibvurmum angwĩ ri ĩdzaa umbi kishoo isarhayɛ iki iyika umbi bɔr umum imesuwa umbi ra ayambi nu awiya ikɛi.
20.21: Umum isɛmmum abi Uyahuda nu atsen abi Uyahuda ugɛ awu ufang umbɔ adzipa aba ru Unum na atsu amɛnmbɔ ru Uteijeemɛn Uyesu.
20.22: <<Nu icɛrɛ, Ipfu-Numyɛ iki iyira umum iwuri izĩ Urusharhima, isi ihwɛng ubinkpi iki ikorhe nggu umum umɔ.
20.23: Umum ikpurhi ihwɛng ugɛ ubɛn uteu Ipfu Isarsatangge iki igbiitangge atomum ugɛ ugborzĩ nu uver ukpɔ udzɛu umum.
20.24: Bɔr umum isi inyã urhɛmum uwekpɔ ubin. Umum ikpurhi ibee imaa itseryɛ Uteijee Uyesu aka adzaa umum, idekuwe arherhe Isarhe Iyiki Ize iyi imimutu Unum.
20.25: <<Icɛrɛ umum ihwɛng ubɛn unera ru umbi umum iki izɛ̃rhã idũwã isarhe Iyɛrhe Unum, asi ínyãã asumum ikɛi.
20.26: Nggee, umum idɛyiwa umbi irherɛ ugɛ, umum ishimum ru uvau adzirh anera kishoo.
20.27: Ubinkutsu, umum isi ibvurmum angwĩmum ri isɔma umbi kishoo abinkɛ Unum aka abee.
20.28: Àka adzɛu atsimbi nu kishoo ukpui abika adɔsa, Ipfu Isarsatangge iki itsũ umbi awu anggbaashimbɔ. Àka adzɛu abika adɔsu Unum, abirabɛ unga aka akũ adzirh Ungwɛ̃nga agoi.
20.29: Umum ihwɛngmum ĩba isokũ, íjui ngbako iwuri itsĩngge ru umbi isi ínekũngge ukpui idɔi ha.
20.30: Abɔɔ ru umbi asok adɛ̃ɛ̃ idzidzunuwe idzidzɛrhe ha abee igbiir amɛn angwɛ̃ imesa azĩ ru umbɔ.
20.31: Nggee àka adɛ̃ɛ̃ adzɛu! Àka ayita ugɛ imɛka itaar nu utsuu na atenum umum isi ibvurmum angwĩmum ri isɛm umbi kishoo nggu anyĩ.
20.32: <<Icɛrɛ umum iyɛruwe umbi ru Unum. Àka aneke urhɛm imimutanga ngge idɛ̃ɛ̃ idzin umbi ni idzaa umbi ukam ru abirabɛ aka awe asarkasar kishoo.
20.33: Umum inasi igũmum unyɛ̃ɛ̃ uhwɛk unera use atorhanga.
20.34: Umbi nibikambi ahwɛngmbi umum ikũ abokmum itɔ̃ itser ifai itsũwãmum nu iyi abirabɛ aka awu nggu umum.
20.35: Ra abina kishoo umum iki ikorhe, umum idɛyiwa umbi ugɛ awu ufang umbi atɔ̃ ikpũ itser iyiki itso ha ayike abika asheri iker, na ayita Arherhu Uteijee Uyesu aka agɔr agɛ, <Idzidzowe iwe ru idorh inangngge iyiyɛi.> >>
20.36: Ivangyɛ unga aka irherhe rimi, unga atararhu nggu umbɔ kishoo na afɛn-Num.
20.37: Umɔ umbɔ kishoo aciu akpe na awumu Uburhu na ashor unga.
20.38: Ubinkpi uku utsu amɛnmbɔ aghong akarhãrhã, awu arherhakɛ unga aka arherhe ugɛ umbɔ asi íbvui anyãmbɔ asunga ikɛi. Mɔcɛ umbɔ azĩ adene unga nu ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃.

21.1: Ivangyɛ umɛn iki ibɔre umbɔ, itsĩ ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ izĩmɛn Ukosi. Unum uvaa umɛn izĩmɛn Urod, idzek umɔ izĩmɛn Upatara.
21.2: Umɛn iki ikpo ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ uwuku uzĩ abĩ Ufinikiya, umɛn itsĩ izĩmɛn.
21.3: Umɛn iki itirhi inyã Usayifuru, umɛn itɔng udiku unɔrmgbɔ, umɛn izĩmɛn Usuriya. Umɛn icipa ru Utaya, ubinkutsu ru ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ umɛn ucipuwe abinke.
21.4: Umɛn iki ikpo angwɛ̃ imesa umɔ, umɛn isei umɔ inuma utɔɔva. Mɔcɛ ru ubok Ipfu-Num umbɔ adɛyiwe Uburhu unga niba azĩã Urusharhima.
21.5: Bɔr ivang iyiki isisokmɛn iki iwe, umɛn iso idɛ̃ɛ̃mɛn uzɛ̃rhãmɛn. Angwɛ̃ imesa kishoo nu atsɛ̃mbɔ nu awɛkacimbɔ akũna umɛn azĩ adena nu undzing utepa. Mɔcɛ umɛn iki itar arhu nu ubang ukau ukugɔng ni ifɛn-Num.
21.6: Umɛn ighwe unuma ra adɔka imaa ni itsĩ ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃, umbɔ abvui azĩmbɔ ra ayambɔ.
21.7: Umɛn itsĩmɛn uzɛ̃rhãmɛn idzeku Utaya, itsĩmɛn Utorhemayi, umɔ umɛn iki ighwe ighwe nggu angwɛ̃mɛn nu anapumɛn, umɛn imaa unuma unying nggu umbɔ.
21.8: Unum uvaa umɛn isok izĩmɛn Ukaisariya. Umɛn itsĩ isei ri iya Ufirhibu uwuku udzowe Isarhe Iyiki Ize, unying ru umbɔ utɔɔva ha umbɔ aka asɛng umbɔ ayike abi itser ru Urusharhima.
21.9: Unga awu ra anakatsɛrh anaa aka anasi ipfunumbɔ awu abika asɔm Arherhu-Num.
21.10: Umɛn iki imaa inum iyɔɔ umɔ, uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num itsoka igburh Uagabu, adzeka abĩ Uyahudiya aba atsĩ.
21.11: Unga aka aba atsĩ, unga anyangu ikpɔm Uburhu, abow adaknga na aboknga na agɛ, <<Ubinkpi Ipfu Isarsatangge iki igɔr igɛ, <Riminɛ anggbaashi abi Uyahuda ru Urusharhima aka ibow uner ikpɔm iyɛrɛ, na atsuke unga ra abok Atsen abi Uyahuda.> >>
21.12: Ivangyɛ umɛn iki igũ rimi, umɛn nu abi anang hã ishɔ̃rhũ Uburhu unga niba azĩã Urusharhima.
21.13: Mɔcɛ Uburhu agɛ, <<Awu use utsu umbi aciu na adakuwe amɛnmum? Umum iki igbishi imaamum, ibibow ukpekũ isi iwengge ubin, bɔr afɛre umum ru Urusharhima ri itsok Uteijee Uyesu.>>
21.14: Umɛn iki isi idɛ̃ɛ̃ ikɛnmɛn unga, umɛn inumɛn ukutata, ni ĩgɔr igɛ, <<Uneke ibibemu Uteijee iwe.>>
21.15: Akɛrɛ ha aka amaa umɛn ingbika abinmɛn izĩmɛn Urusharhima.
21.16: Angwɛ̃ imesa abɔɔ adzeku Ukaisariya aba adena umɛn, akũna umɛn azĩmbɔ ru Umanason, uwuruwi umɛn iki icipa ri iyanga. Unga awu uner Usayifuru unying ra angwɛ̃ imesa abi inggbaashia. Uburhu aka atsĩ Urusharhima
21.17: Ivangyɛ umɛn iki itsĩ Urusharhima, angwɛ̃mɛn nu anapumɛn ayɛi umɛn nggu ibibema.
21.18: Unum uvaa Uburhu nggu umɛn izĩmɛn inyã Uyaku, nu kishoo akakũ awu umɔ.
21.19: Uburhu aka aghwe umbɔ amaa, unga adɛyiwe umbɔ agbɛgbɛra agbɛra abinkɛ Unum aka akorhuwe Atsen abi Uyahuda ru ubok itseryɛ unga aka atɔ̃.
21.20: Umbɔ aka agũ rimi amaa, umbɔ akpoi Unum, na agɔr Uburhu agɛ, <<A ungwɛ̃mɛn, urhi unyã, irhɛ anaka agɔnga abi Uyahuda asong abika awe ru imangmang! Kishoo atsu amɛnmbɔ ri idɔsi Íkpem!
21.21: Aka asɔmukumbɔ arherhango, ugɛ ungo umesuwe kishoo abi Uyahuda abika asei ra atsen abi Uyahuda umbɔ aneke Íkpem Umusa, ungo ugɔr umbɔ ugɛ, umbɔ niba asorhukumbɔ usorhe ra awɛkacimbɔ, use adɔsa agbeyi abi Uyahuda.
21.22: Umɛn ikorhu ugusemɛn? Nggayɛ umbɔ awuri igũmbɔ agɛ ungo uku ubango.
21.23: Nggee ukorhu ubinkpi umɛn iki idɛyiwa ungo, inera niyɔ inaa iwu nggu umɛn aka ayirh uyirh.
21.24: Utsĩ ra anera abɛrɛ, uzĩ umbɔ asare umbi ivanga unying ru ungo ufai uhwɛkmbɔ, ngge itsú umbɔ akone atsimbɔ. Rimi hã itsu ubɛn unera awuri ihwɛngnga ugɛ kishoo abinkɛ umbɔ aka arherhe ri itsingo asi iweke idzidzɛrhe, bɔr awuri inyĩnyãmbɔ ungo uku udɔsi Íkpem.
21.25: Atsen abi Uyahuda abika awe ru imangmang, umɛn iki itsɛng abvur idɛyiwe umbɔ ugɛ umɛn ibee umbɔ niba aghambɔ ubinkpi umbɔ aka ayɛruwe ru agberhe, use adzirh, asi ítãimbɔ ijuɛyɛ umbɔ aka ashĩrhũ urhɔkngge, asi ítomumbɔ-dak.>>
21.26: Unum untaar Uburhu akũna anera abɛrɛ umbɔ asare unga nggu umbɔ. Mɔcɛ unga atsĩã ri Iya-Num, adɛyiwe abika adzowe idɛm-Num unumkpi uku utsufɛr isisarmbɔ. Ru unum hã ubɛn unera ru umbɔ aka idzowe izũwũ idɛm. Adzur Uburhu
21.27: Inuma utɔɔva ha iki iyo imimaa, abi Uyahuda abɔɔ aka adzeka abĩ Uasiya anyã Uburhu ri Iya-Num. Umbɔ ahwita anera ri ikikɔnga kishoo umbɔ adzur unga.
21.28: Atsu ivum agɛ, <<Umbi aner Uisrairha, àka ayika umɛn! Uner ha nuwi aki azɛ̃rhã amesuwe anera kishoo awe ru igamtsa ra anermɛn nu Íkpemmɛn nu anang akɛrɛ. Asi iwea akɛrɛ ha ukpekũ, bɔr unga aka akũ Atsen abi Uyahuda abɔɔ atsĩwã ru ufɔm Iya-Num aba atsuke arhim ru usarkasar anang akɛrɛ.>>
21.29: Umbɔ agɛ iwe rimi umbɔ aka anyãmbɔ Uburhu nggu Uturofimu, uner Uafisa, ru utepa. Umbɔ akaifɛrhkɔ agɛ Uburhu unga akũna unga atsĩ ru ufɔm Iya-Num.
21.30: Uteu ha kishoo udzunukpɔ, anera asok atĩ aba akɔng. Azĩ adzur Uburhu, agbĩrhã unga adzek ru ufɔm Iya-Num, umbɔ afɔmukumbɔ angwĩ ufɔma kanying.
21.31: Abee ifɛre unga nukpi, mɔcɛ isarhe izĩ itsĩngge ru ukugɔng abi iwa Uroma igɛ Urusharhima kishoo uku udzunukpɔ.
21.32: Kanying unga akarha abi iwa Uroma na ateiyambɔ, atĩ azĩmbɔ ri ikikɔnga. Ivangyɛ anera aka anyã ukugɔng nu abi iwanga, umbɔ anekukumbɔ ikwɛr Uburhu.
21.33: Ukugɔng abi iwa ha aba adzur Uburhu atsu umbɔ abow unga nggu inyãwã ivaa. Mɔcɛ na arhusa agɛ, <<Unga awu ungamɔ, na akorhu use?>>
21.34: Ikikɔnga itsuyi ivum igwarha arherhe, abɔɔ agɛ akɛrɛ abɔɔ agɛ akɔrɔ. Uteiya abi iwa ha aka asi idɛ̃ɛ̃ adzura usu arherhe ha igwarha arherhe irhɛngge, unga atsu umbɔ akũ Uburhu azĩmbɔ aya abi iwa.
21.35: Ivangyɛ Uburhu aka aba atsĩ ru abeu angwĩ iyaa, abi iwa ashupa unga, umbɔ aka anyã anera abee ifɛre unga.
21.36: Ikikɔng anera iki idɔsa umbɔ inũ itsuyi ivum igɛ, <<Afɛre unga, afɛre unga!>> Uburhu arherhe arherhe nggu ikikɔnga
21.37: Umbɔ aka akũ Uburhu ayo itsĩ ra aya abi iwa, unga ashɔ̃rhã ukugɔng abi iwa ha agɛ, <<Kabɔɔ ungo uma uneka umum irherha arherhe nggu ungo?>> Unga agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ungo uhwɛngo idũ abi Uherhini?
21.38: Asi iwea ungo uwu utsa Umasar ha isha uwuku ukũ isoyamɛn uba akũ anera anaka agɔng anaa abika afɛr aner ukũ azĩ ra arhum?>>
21.39: Uburhu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Umum iwu utsa Uyahudiya, idzeku Utarsu ra abĩ Ukirhikiya, umum iwu ungwɛ̃ undzumu uteu ukugɔng. Kabɔɔ uma uneka umum irherha arherhe nggu anera abɛrɛ.>>
21.40: Unga aka aneke unga arherhe, Uburhu adɛ̃ɛ̃ nu abeu ha aberu uboknga ra anera umbɔ anu ukutata. Umbɔ aka anu ukutata, unga arherhe arherhe nggu umbɔ ri idũ abi Uyahuda.

22.1: Uburhu agɛ, <<Umbi angwɛ̃mɛn nu atesmɛn, àka akpeto ru umum ikaa itsimum.>>
22.2: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka agũ unga arherhewe umbɔ ri idũ abi Uyahuda, umbɔ agbisha anu ukutata. Mɔcɛ Uburhu agɛ,
22.3: <<Umum iwu utsa Uyahudiya. Amar umum ru Utarsu ra abĩ aki Ukirhikiya, bɔr akpɔm umum ru utepu ukpirɛ. Umum itsĩ imesa ru ubok Ugamarhiyerh. Amesuwa umum abina kishoo aki Íkpem atokamɛn. Umum iwemum ri itsu amɛn ri idɔsu Unum, ru nyaka umbi kishoo aki ikorhe irherɛ.
22.4: Idzowukũ uver ra abika adɔsu utsĩndĩ uwirɛ, ifɛyiwe umbɔ, idzui akatsak nu akatsɛrh itsuyikumum umbɔ ru ugborzĩ,
22.5: ru nyaku Ukugɔng Uwuku Udzowe Idɛm-Num nu ikikɔng akakũ abi Uyahuda kishoo aka iwu idekamum. Umum iyɛisũ abvur ru umbɔ iwuri ikũ izĩ ru abimbɔ ru Udimashku. Umum izĩ umɔ ibee idzui abirabɛ aka adɔsu utsĩndĩ uwurɛ ikũ iba Urusharhima, umbɔ adzowe umbɔ ayetnum. Uburhu aka adzipa adɔsu Uteijee (Aiy 9.1-19; 26.12-18)
22.6: <<Umum iwu ru uzɛ̃rhã, iki iyokũ itsĩ Udimashku ra atenuma, kanying nggaa irhirhang ra afã irhang idzipa umum.
22.7: Umum ĩgba inũ nu abĩ ni igũ urhɛm uku ugɔr umum ugɛ, <A Ushawurhu! A Ushawurhu! Awu use utsu ungo udzaa umum uver?>
22.8: <<Umum irhusa inggɛ, <Awu ungo ungamɔ Uteijee?> <<Mɔcɛ urhɛm hã ugɔr umum ugɛ, <Awu umum Uyesu uner Unazarat uwuruwi ungo uku unu idzowe uver.>
22.9: Abirabɛ aka awu nggu umum anyãmbɔ irhirhang hã, bɔr asi igũmbɔ urhɛm hã uku unu arherhe nggu umum.
22.10: <<Nggee umum irhusa inggɛ, <A Uteijee, umum ikorhi uguse?> <<Mɔcɛ Uteijee agɔr umum agɛ, <Usisok, utsĩ ru Udimashku. Umɔ umbɔ aka idɛyiwa kishoo ubinkpi umum iki itsu ungo ikorhe.>
22.11: Iker irhirhang hã iki itsu umum itapa, abirabɛ aka awu nggu umum akpɔm abokmum adarh umum atsĩ Udimashku.
22.12: <<Utsa uwɔɔ agburh Uhananiya aba inyã umum. Awu uner uwuku udzowe itsinga idɔsu Unum ri Íkpem Umusa, abi Uyahuda kishoo abika awu umɔ aka isaka adzowe unga igɔng.
22.13: Unga aba adɛ̃ɛ̃ akhapa ru umum agɔr umum agɛ, <A ungwɛ̃mɛn Ushawurhu, ukpo inyã anang!> Kanying asumum ayanga, umum idɛ̃ɛ̃ inyã unga.
22.14: <<Mɔcɛ unga agɛ, <Unum uwu atokamɛn asɛng ungo, ungo uhwɛng amɛnnga, nu unyã Uner Uwuku Urhurhika ha nu ugũ urhɛm ra angwĩnga.
22.15: Ubinkutsu ungo uwuri iwu idekanga ru ubɛn unera, ru ubinkpi ungo uku unyã nu ugũ.
22.16: Icɛrɛ ungo udzɛu use? Usisok, usorhu ubɔtisima, nu usorh arhimngo adzek ri ifɛn ri itsoknga.> Uyisa Uburhu
22.17: <<Umum iki ibvui iba Urusharhima iwe ri ifɛn-Num ru ufɔm Iya-Num, umum inyã irhi
22.18: ni inyã Uteijee aka arherhe nggu umum agɛ, <Ifetem! Udzekɔ ru Urusharhima kanying, ubinkutsu, umbɔ asi íyɛimbɔ idekango ri itsimum.>
22.19: <<Umum igɔr ugɛ, <A Uteijee, umbɔ nibikambɔ ahwɛngmbɔ umum iki itsĩrhã abã ifɛn-Num itsuke abika awe ru imangmang ru ungo, ru ugborzĩ na ikwɛre umbɔ ugwɛɛ.
22.20: Nu ivang umbɔ aka ifɛr Uistifanu uwu idekango, umum nibikami idɛ̃ɛ̃ umɔ, umum iwu ru undzingmbɔ ru ubinkpi umbɔ aka akorhe, awu umum idzɛu atorho abika afɛr unga.>
22.21: <<Mɔcɛ Uteijee agɔr umum agɛ, <Uso uzĩ, umum iwuri idena ungo uzĩ nggɔɔ ra anang akika ader ra atsen abi Uyahuda.> >>
22.22: Ikikɔnga ikpeto ru Uburhu utsɛku unga aka arherhe akɛrɛ. Mɔcɛ umbɔ atsarhi irhakmbɔ atsui ívum agɛ, <<Afɛre ikpũ uner uwurɛ! Isi imɛ̃ngge unga abɛk!>>
22.23: Umbɔ aka atsuyi ívum atsimuwe antamambɔ atãyĩwe, asoyi uzurhu ru ugba.
22.24: Ukugɔng abi iwa ha atsu umbɔ akũ Uburhu azĩmbɔ ru aya abi iwa. Atsu umbɔ akwɛre ugwɛɛ, abee unga asɔm ubinkpi uku utsu ikikɔnga itsuyiwe unga ivum rimi.
22.25: Umbɔ aka agbiir aboknga abow na abee ikwɛr unga, Uburhu agɔr uteiya abi iwa aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ akhapa umɔ agɛ, <<Imɛ̃ngge ungo ukwɛre ugwɛɛ ru uner Uroma umbɔ aka anasi itsu umbɔ uvau ru unga?>>
22.26: Ivangyɛ uteiya abi iwa ha aka agũ rimi, unga azĩ ru ukugɔng hã azĩ agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ungo ubee ikorhu uguse? Utsak uwurɛ awu uner Uroma.>>
22.27: Ukugɔng hã aba agɔr Uburhu agɛ, <<Usɔma umum idzidzɛrhe, ungo uwu uner Uroma?>> Uburhu agɔr agɛ, <<Ĩĩ.>>
22.28: Mɔcɛ ukugɔng hã agɛ, <<Umum ikũ uhwɛk urhɛrhɛ ikpo iwe uner Uroma.>> Uburhu agɛ, <<Umum iwu undzumu ungwɛ̃ Uroma.>>
22.29: Abika abee irhusa unga urherhe abvui azĩmbɔ ra andzing kanying. Ukugɔng hã aka ahwɛng agɛ Uburhu awu uner Uroma, iwei ifɛr unga, nggayɛ unga aka abowpa unga. Uburhu ra asu abi udzepurhe
22.30: Unum uvaa, ukugɔng hã abee ihwɛng ubinkpi Uburhu aka ikorhuwe abi Uyahuda umbɔ atsu arherhanga. Unga agarhuwe abok Uburhu na atsu ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu abi udzepurhe abi Uyahuda kishoo akɔng. Mɔcɛ unga akũ Uburhu aba adɛ̃ɛ̃ ra asumbɔ.

23.1: Uburhu arhi abi udzepurhe ha ra asumbɔ na agɛ, <<Umbi angwɛ̃mɛn, umum iki itɔ̃ itsermum ĩba itsĩ irherɛ ra amɛn aka aze kishoo ra asu Unum.>>
23.2: Akɛrɛ ha atsu Uhananiya Ukugɔng Uwuku Udzowe Idɛm-Num, atsu abika adɛ̃ɛ̃ ayo nggu Uburhu akwɛr unga nu angwĩnga.
23.3: Mɔcɛ Uburhu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Unum unga awuri ikwɛr ungo, uner ukpukpeta! Ungo usei nu utsu umum uvau ri idɔsi Íkpem Umusa, bɔr ungo nibikango uzharhukɔ Íkpema ungo uku utsu umbɔ akwɛr umum.>>
23.4: Abirabɛ aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ akhapa ru Uburhu agɔr unga agɛ, <<Ukugɔng Uwuku Udzowe Idɛm-Num ungo uku urhena?>>
23.5: Uburhu agɛ, <<Umbi angwɛ̃mɛn, umum isi ihwɛng unga aka awu Ukugɔng Uwuku Udzowe Idɛm-Num. Ubinkutsu itsɛng Arherhu-Num igɔrngge ugɛ, <Niba arhenumbɔ uyɛrhe.> >>
23.6: Ivangyɛ Uburhu aka anyã ugɛ abɔɔ awu abi Usaduki, abɔɔ ikɛi awu abi Ufarisi, unga atsarhi irhaknga ru udzepurhe ha agɛ, <<Umbi angwɛ̃mɛn, umum iwu uner Ufarisi, ungwɛ̃ Ufarisi. Umum idɛ̃ɛ̃ umbɔ avarhuwa umum arherhe ri itsi umum iki ifosa ugɛ abika akpe awuri isok ra akpe.>>
23.7: Ivangyɛ unga aka arherhe akɛrɛ ha, uning usomgbɔ ra abi Ufarisi nu abi Usaduki, ikikɔnga igashungge.
23.8: Abi Usaduki awembɔ ri imangmang ugɛ isok ra akpe ishingge, ípfu itser-Num ishingge use ípfu ishingge. Abi Ufarisi awembɔ ri imangmang ugɛ kishoo aweke.
23.9: Isoyamɛn igɔigɔng isongge. Abɔɔ abika amesuwe Ikpem ru ukpui ukpu Ufarisi asok adɛ̃ɛ̃ uning akarhãrhã agɛ, <<Umɛn isi ikpomɛn utsak uwurɛ nggu uvau. Ungaa ahwɛng, use awu ipfu use ipfu itser-Num irherha arherhe nggu unga?>>
23.10: Uning utsotsoramgbɔ uku usoyi, ukugɔng abi iwa ha agũ iwei ugɛ utsur umbɔ ashakukumbɔ Uburhu. Unga atsu abi iwa ha acipa avur Uburhu ri inggang akũ azĩmbɔ aya abi iwa.
23.11: Utsuu uku ufin, Uteijee adɛ̃ɛ̃ akhapa ru Uburhu, na agɛ, <<Uker amɛnngo! Ru nyaka ungo uku udzowe idekamum ru Urusharhima, nggee awu ufang ungo iki idekuwe umum ru Uroma.>> Avarhi itsũwã iyiki ifɛr Uburhu
23.12: Ukpee unum uvaa, abi Uyahuda akɔng avarhe ifɛre Uburhu ayirh uyirh ugɛ umbɔ asi íghambɔ asi íhwambɔ ubin, utsɛku umbɔ aka ifɛr Uburhu.
23.13: Anang umbɔ isɔka inaa umbɔ aka avarhi ikorhe iyiki ibewe ha.
23.14: Umbɔ asok azĩmbɔ ru ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu akakũ anera, na agɛ, <<Umɛn iki iyirh nggaa uyirh, igɛ umɛn isi íghamɛn ubin utsɛku umɛn iki ifɛr Uburhu.
23.15: Nggee, umbi nggu abi udzepurhe, àka adene itser umbɔ adɛyiwe ukugɔng abi iwa ha, umbɔ akũna unga akũwã ru umbi, àka akpeta ugɛ umbi abee ibvui arhusa arherhanga hã agũni ikɛi. Umɛn iki igbishi imaamɛn, umɛn iwuri ifɛre unga, unga adɔrha aba atsĩ.>>
23.16: Bɔr ungwɛ̃ unapumbɔ Uburhu aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ na agũ arherhe aka abewe ha, unga atsĩ ru aya abi iwa asɔmuka Uburhu.
23.17: Mɔcɛ Uburhu ayisu unying ra ateiya abi iwa Uroma agɛ, <<Ukũ ungwɛ̃dzɛm uwurɛ uzĩ ru uku ugɔngmbi, abee idɛyiwe unga ubin ukpɔɔ.>>
23.18: Nggee uteiya abi iwa Uroma ha akũ ungwɛ̃dzɛm hã azĩã ru uku ugɔngmbɔ na agɛ, <<Uburhu uwɔrɔ ru ugborzĩ ukpɔrɔ, ayisa umum ugɛ, umum ikũ ungwɛ̃dzɛm uwurɛ iba ru ungo, ubinkutsu unga awuri isɔma ungo ubin ukpɔɔ.>>
23.19: Ukugɔng hã adzur ubok ungwɛ̃dzɛm hã, akũna unga azĩã ri ifɛna arhusa unga ikiyikanga agɛ, <<Ungo ubee isɔma umum use?>>
23.20: Unga agɛ, <<Abi Uyahuda abee igɔr ungo ukũ Uburhu uzĩ ru udzepurhe udã, akpeta ugɛ umbɔ abee igbisha arhusa arherhe Uburhu.
23.21: Bɔr niba ubemukɔ, ubinkutsu inera itɔngngge isɔka inaa iki iwoi adzɛu unga. Aka ayirhmbɔ ugɛ umbɔ asi íghambɔ ubin utsɛku umbɔ aka ifɛre unga. Icɛrɛ umbɔ adzɛu ibibemango ukpekũ.>>
23.22: Nggee ukugɔng hã adene ungwɛ̃dzɛm hã azĩã, na agbiite atonga agɛ, <<Niba udɛyikɔ unera ugɛ ungo uku usɔmango umum arherhe akɛrɛ.>> Adene Uburhu azĩã ru ugomna Uferhi
23.23: Mɔcɛ unggbaashi ha ayisa ateiya abi iwa Uroma avaa agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Àka agbisha abinmbi, umum idena umbi azĩ Ukaisariya ra akara utɔɔrha aki utsuu irherɛ, nggu abi iwa inaka ivaa, nu abi iwa abɔɔ isɔka utɔɔva abika afũ inyãwã, nu abi iwa inaka ivaa abika atang iwa nggu asawa.
23.24: Àka akpowe ínyãwãyɛ Uburhu aka ifũ, umbi afɔrh unga akũ azĩ ru ugomna Uferhi.>>
23.25: Unggbaashi abi iwa ha atsɛng ubvur riminɛ agɛ,
23.26: Udzeku Ukarhaudiya Urhisiya, Uzĩ ru nggaa uner uwuku ugɔng ugomna Uferhi, Umum ighwe ungo.
23.27: <<Uner uwurɛ abi Uyahuda adzur unga abee ifɛre unga, umum iso nggu abi iwamum umɛn ifɔrhe unga, ubinkutsu umum igũ unga awu utsa Uroma.
23.28: Umum iki ibee igũ uvauwi uku utsu umbɔ atsu arherhanga, nggee umum ikũna unga izĩ ru udzepurhembɔ.
23.29: Umum igũ umbɔ arhena unga ra arherhe íkpemmbɔ, bɔr umum isi ikpomum unga akorhunga ubinkpi uku utsu akpe use ugborzĩ.
23.30: Ivangyɛ umum iki ĩgũ iyiki ibeweyɛ umbɔ aka atsar ikorhe nggu utsa ha, kanying umum idene umbɔ akũ unga aba ru ungo. Ikɛi umum itsu abika atsu arherhe ri itsinga umbɔ aba asɔm ubinkpi umbɔ aka anyã unga akorhe ra asungo.>>
23.31: Nggee abi iwa, atɔ̃ itsermbɔ ru nyaka umbɔ aka atsuke, akũ Uburhu azĩmbɔ Uantifatiri nu untsuuka.
23.32: Unum uvaa abi iwa abika afũ inyãwã akũna unga azĩmbɔ ra asu, ra abɔɔ abvui azĩmbɔ ru aya abi iwambɔ.
23.33: Abi iwa abika afũ inyãwã aka azĩ atsĩ Ukaisariya, umbɔ adzowe ubvur ha ru ugomna, na atsuke Uburhu ru uboknga.
23.34: Ugomna hã aka avarhu ubvur ha na arhusu Uburhu ugɛ unga adzek udika abĩ akasong. Unga aka agũ agɛ Uburhu adzeka abĩ Ukirhikiya,
23.35: unga agɛ, <<Umum iwuri ĩgũmum arherhango, ri ivang abika atsu arherhe ri itsingo aka iba.>> Mɔcɛ unga atsu umbɔ adzɛu unga ru udzepurhe iyɛrhe Uhiridu aka adzin.

24.1: Inuma itɔ̃ɔ̃ iki imaa Ukugɔng Uwuku Udzowe Idɛm-Num Uhananiya azĩ Ukasariya nggu akakũ abɔɔ nu urhoya uwɔɔ itsoka igburh Utarturhu, atsu arherhe Uburhu ru ugomna.
24.2: Ivang umbɔ aka ayisu Uburhu atsĩ, urhoya Utarturhu atsu arherhe Uburhu ra asu ugomna Uferhi agɛ, <<Awu itsoingo itsu umɛn igũibɛn ididɔɔr iyiki ider, ikɛi ihwihwɛng iyi unuma itsu igbigbisha iba ra abĩmɛn.
24.3: Ra afɛna kishoo nu inanga, a uteiya Uferhi, umɛn itar uwɛɛ urhɛrhɛ ru ungo.
24.4: Bɔr umum isi ĩbeemum igha ivangngo, umum ishɔ̃rhã ungo uma udɔng amɛnngo ukpeto ru umɛn ukunjiir.
24.5: <<Umɛn ikpo utsak uwurɛ awu uner uwuku utsuyi ifuw, anu ikũ isoyamɛn atsĩwã ra abi Uyahuda ru ubɛn ananga ru upfung. Unga awu unggbaashi agbeyi abi Unazarat.
24.6: -8 Abee itsu arhim ri Iya-Num, nggee umɛn idzur unga. Ungo uba urhusungo unga nibikango, ungo uwuri igũo idzidzɛrhe kishoo ubinkpi umɛn iki irherhe ri itsinga.>>
24.9: Abi Uyahuda awu ru undzing akɛrɛ ha, agɔr ugɛ ífɛrha ha iwu idzidzɛrhe. Uburhu akaa itsinga ra asu ugomna Uferhi
24.10: Ivangyɛ ugomna aka adzowe unga ijee arherhe Uburhu agɛ, <<Umum ikaa itsimum nggu itɛnamɛn ubinkutsu umum ihwɛng ungo uku umaa imɛka irhɛirhɛ ungo uku uvarhuwe arherhe ra abĩ akɛrɛ.
24.11: Ungo uba ugbishu urhisɔ, ungo ihwɛngngo ugɛ anasi itɔnga inuma usɔkdũmɛn umum iki izĩ ĩzdowe igɔng ri Iya-Num ru Urusharhima.
24.12: Abika atsu arherhamum asi ikpombɔ umum idɛ̃ɛ̃mum uning nggu unera ri Iya-Num, use isoyiwe amɛn anera ra abã ifɛn-Num, use ra anang akɔɔ ru utepa.
24.13: Asi ídɛ̃ɛ̃ adɛyiwambɔ ungo ubinkpi umbɔ aka akũ atsu arherhamum.
24.14: Bɔr umum isɔma ungo ra awiya, umum idzowe igɔng ru Unum uwu atokamɛn ru Utsĩndĩ hã, umbɔ aka ayisa ukpui uku ukpɛ̃. Bɔr umum iwemum ri imangmang ri kishoo abinkɛ aka awe ri Íkpem Umusa nu ru abvur abika asɔm Arherhu-Num.
24.15: Ififosamum ru Unum iwu unying nggu anera abɛrɛ, ugɛ abika arhurhika awuri isok ra akpe nu abika ada irhirhika.
24.16: Ngge itsu ubɛn ivang umum inũ itsu amɛnmum uku ushashaki ra asu Unum nu unera.
24.17: <<Imɛka irhɛrhɛ iki imaa, umum ibvui iba Urusharhima ikũ ízũwã abin ĩba indzowe anera ayike atsũwãmɛn, ni indzowe ídɛm-Num.
24.18: Umum iki imaamum isare itsikammum ivangyɛ abɛrɛ ha aka aba akpo umum ru ufɔm Iya-Num. Isi iwemum ri ikikɔng anera, isi isoyikũ amɛn anera.
24.19: Bɔr abi Uyahuda rabɔ adzeka abĩ Uasiya, awu umɔ, imɛ̃ngge umbɔ aba ra anangngo aba atsu arherhamum umbɔ aba awembɔ ra arherhe nggu umum.
24.20: Use ungo uneke anera abɛrɛ asɔm uvauwi umbɔ aka akpo ru umum ivangyɛ umum iki idɛ̃ɛ̃ ra asu abi udzepurhe.
24.21: Arherhambɔ awu unying ukpekũ umbɔ aka itsu umum uvau, umum iki itsarhi irhakmum ra asumbɔ ĩgɔr inggɛ, <Awu arherhe isisok ra akpe umbɔ aka avarha arherhamum ra asumbi irherɛ.> >>
24.22: Mɔcɛ Uferhi, uwuku uhwɛng Utsĩndĩ Uyesu akarhãrhã, agɔpuwe unuma agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Utsɛku unumkpi ukugɔng Urhisiya aka iba kata, umum idɔrhi izharhuwa arherhango.>>
24.23: Unga atsu uteiya abi iwa Uroma adzɛu Uburhu na aneke unga agayi iyornga na aneke awɛrhanga adzowe ubinkpi unga aka abee.
24.24: Inum iyɔɔ iki imaa Uferhi aba nggu utsɛ̃nga Udurusirha, una Uyahuda. Adene umbɔ akũ Uburhu aba, ru unga akpeto ra arherhe Uburhu aki imangmang ru Ukiristo Uyesu.
24.25: Ivangyɛ Uburhu aka anu idɛyiwe irhirhika, nu ikpɔm amɛn, nu nggaa unum ukpuku uvarha arherhe uku iba, itsu iwei ifɛr Uferhi, unga agɔr Uburhu agɛ, <<Iki iwu mɔnɔ icɛrɛ! Ubvui uzĩɔ̃. Umum iba ikpomum ivanga, umum idene umbɔ ayisuwa ungo.>>
24.26: Ri ivang hã unga atsu amɛnnga Uburhu awuri idzowe unga uhwɛk igha angwĩ, ngge itsu Uferhi ayisa unga ubɛn ivang asei irhɛrh nggu unga.
24.27: Imɛka ivaa iki imaa Ufokiyu Ufestu awea ugomna ru ugarh Uferhi. Uferhi abee itɛnamɛn ra abi Uyahuda, unga aneke Uburhu ru ugborzĩ.

25.1: Inuma itaar iki imaa Ufestu aka atsĩ ra abĩ hã, asoku Ukaisariya azĩã Urusharhima,
25.2: umɔ ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu anggbaashi abi Uyahuda atsu arherhe Uburhu ru unga.
25.3: Umbɔ ashɔ̃rhũ Ufestu unga ama atsu umbɔ akũ Uburhu abvui azĩ Urusharhima, ubinkutsu aka agbisha abee iwoi na afɛre unga ru utsĩndĩ.
25.4: Bɔr Ufestu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Adzudzɛu Uburhu ru Ukaisariya, umum nibikami isi ídãrhũmum ni ibvui izĩ umɔ.
25.5: Utsak uwurɛ aba awea ru uvau, anggbaashimbi abɔɔ aba umɛn izĩmɛn urhɔnga, azĩ atsu arherhe ri itsinga.>>
25.6: Inuma isi inangngge utɔrɔk, use usɔka, unga aka amaa nggu umbɔ, unga abvui azĩã Ukaisariya. Ukpee unum uvaa unga asei nú udzepurhe uku uvarha arherhe, atsu umbɔ akũ Uburhu aba ra asunga.
25.7: Ivang Uburhu aka adzeka, anggbaashi abi Uyahuda abika adzeku Urusharhima aba adɛ̃ɛ̃ adziira unga, atsuyi urherhe arhɛrhɛ uwuku utso ri itsinga, akirakɛ aka ashike ru idzidzɛrhe.
25.8: Mɔcɛ Uburhu akaa itsinga agɔr agɛ, <<Umum isi igbamum uvau ri Íkpem abi Uyahuda use ri Iya-Num use ru Ukaisar.>>
25.9: Bɔr Ufestu abee itɛnne amɛn abi Uyahuda, unga agɔr Uburhu agɛ, <<Ungo ubeengo izĩ Urusharhima umbɔ avarhuwa arherhango ra asumum ru nggɔɔ ha?>>
25.10: Uburhu agɛ, <<Umum iwu ra asu Ukaisar, ru udzepurhe uku uvarha arherhe, anangkɛ ngge iki imɛ̃ɛ̃ umbɔ avarhuwa umum arherhe. Umum isi ikorhumum iyiki ibewe ra abi Uyahuda, ungo nibikango uhwɛngo rimi hã.
25.11: Umum ĩba ikorhumum ubinkpi uku umɛ̃ɛ̃ akpe, umbɔ afɛre umum, umum isi ikpɛ̃mum akpe. Bɔr idzidzɛrhe iba ishingge ra arherhe ha abi Uyahuda aka atsu ru umum, unera asi ídɛ̃ɛ̃ adzowuka umum ru umbɔ. Umum ifɛna akũ arherhamum izĩ ru Ukaisar!>>
25.12: Ufestu aka akɛki itsũwã nggu abi udzepurhenga, mɔcɛ unga agɛ, <<Ungo ugɔr ugɛ akũ arherhango azĩ ru Ukaisar. Ungo uwuri izĩ ru Ukaisar.>> Uburhu ra asu Uagiripa nu Ubani
25.13: Inuma ukunjiir iki itɔng uyɛrhe Uagiripa nu Ubani abambɔ Ukaisariya, aba ighwe ugomna Ufestu.
25.14: Umbɔ amaa inuma irhɛirhɛ nggɔɔ ha, Ufestu arherhe arherhe Uburhu nggu uyɛrhe agɛ, <<Unera nuwɔ Uferhi aka aneka unga ru ugborzĩ.
25.15: Ivangyɛ umum iki iwe ru Urusharhima, ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num nu anggbaashi abi Uyahuda atsu arherhe utsak uwurɛ, ashɔ̃rhã umum ima itsu ubinkpi uku iwu uvau akpe ru unga.
25.16: <<Umum idɛyiwe umbɔ ugɛ umɛn abi Uroma iki isaki isi idzowukumɛn unera ra abika atsu arherhe ri itsinga, bɔr awuri idzowukumbɔ ivang unga akaa itsinga ra asumbɔ ra arherha ha.
25.17: Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka aba nggimi nggu umum, umum isi idãrhũmum, unum uvaa umum isei nú utarh iyɛrhe ni itsu umbɔ akũ uner ha aba.
25.18: Abika atsu arherhe ha aka asok arherhe, umbɔ asi irherhumbɔ abin aka abewe akirakɛ umum iki ikau ra amɛnmum.
25.19: Bɔr umbɔ akpurha awu ru uning ra agbeyi ha umbɔ aka amesuwe, nu utsa uwɔɔ agburh Uyesu aka akpea, bɔr Uburhu agɔr agɛ awea ru urhɛ.
25.20: Umum iki isi ikpomum usu uku udɔsa arherhe ha, umum irhusa unga ugɛ use unga abemunga izĩ Urusharhima umbɔ avarhuwe arherhanga umɔ nggu abin akɛrɛ.
25.21: Bɔr Uburhu aka abee uyɛrhe Ukaisar unga azharhuwe arherhanga, umum itsu umbɔ adzɛu unga utsɛku ivangyɛ umum iki idene unga azĩ ru Ukaisar.>>
25.22: Mɔcɛ uyɛrhe Uagiripa agɔr Ufestu agɛ, <<Umum ibee igũ ru utsa ha nibikami.>> Ufestu agɛ, <<Udã ungo uwuri igũo unga.>>
25.23: Unum untaar Uagiripa nu Ubani adzek ri ijee iyɛrhambɔ, aba nggu akagɔng abi iwa nu anggbaashi abi utepa atsĩwã udzepurhe iyɛrhe. Mɔcɛ Ufestu atsu umbɔ akũ Uburhu atsĩwã.
25.24: Ufestu agɛ, <<A uyɛrhe Uagiripa, nu kishoo abirabɛ aka awu nggimi nggu umɛn, umbi anyã utsak uwurɛ! Abi Uyahuda kishoo aka atsu arherhe ri itsinga ru umum ru Urusharhima nu nggimi ru Ukaisariya, atsuyi ivum agɛ isi imɛ̃ngge umbɔ neke unga abɛk.
25.25: Bɔr umum inyã unga asi ikorhunga ubinkpi umbɔ aka ifɛre unga. Ubinkutsu unga nibikanga abee arherhanga azĩ ra asu uwuku ugɔng Ukaisar, umum idene unga azĩã Uroma.
25.26: Bɔr umum ishimum ru undzumu ubinkpi umum iki itsɛnge uyɛrhe uwuku ugɔng ru Uroma ri itsinga. Ngge iki iwe rimi umum ikũ unga iba ru umbi kishoo, undzumunga ru ungo uyɛrhe Uagiripa, inggɛ umɛn ĩba irhi arherhe ha imaamɛn umum ima ikpo ubinkpi umum iki itsɛng.
25.27: Ubinkutsu ri inyĩnyãmum, awu ijijam umbɔ adene uner ugborzĩ ru uwuku ugɔng Ukaisar na asi ikpombɔ undzumu arherhe ha umbɔ aka itsɛng.>>

26.1: Mɔcɛ Uagiripa agɔr Uburhu agɛ, <<Adzaambɔ ijeea ungo ukaa itsingo.>> Nggee Uburhu aberu uboknga, atirhi arherhe agɛ,
26.2: <<A uyɛrhe Uagiripa, umum inyãmum iwu ra andzui iki iwe ugɛ awu ru ungo umum idɛ̃ɛ̃ ikaa itsimum irherɛ ru urherhe anggbaashi abi Uyahuda iki irherhe ri itsimum,
26.3: undzumunga ugɛ ungo uhwɛngo ibibayi abi Uyahuda nu abinkɛ umbɔ iki iwe ru uning ra ake. Nggee, uma udɔɔr amɛnngo ukpeto ru umum.
26.4: <<Abi Uyahuda kishoo ahwɛngmbɔ ikpũ isiseimum utirhi ri iwɛdzɛmmum, ra abĩmɛn nu ru Urusharhima uba utsĩ irherɛ.
26.5: Ahwɛngmbɔ umum utirhi ri iwɛdzɛm. Umbɔ aba abemumbɔ, adɛ̃ɛ̃ idzowukumbɔ ideka ri itsimum ugɛ umum iwu ru ukpui agbeyamɛn ukpuku uwu utsotsorakpɔ, umum iwu utsa Ufarisi.
26.6: Ubinkutsu umbɔ avarhuwa umum arherhe irherɛ, awu ififosa ru ubinkpi Unum aka abemuwe atokamɛn.
26.7: Awu ibibemuwe ha riyɛ idũmɛn usɔkdũmɛn aka afosa abee inyã ngge itsuifɛr. Ngge itsu umbɔ aka amina asumbɔ adɔsu Unum ru utsuu ra atenum. A uyɛrhe, awu ififosa ha itsu anggbaashi abi Uyahuda agɔr agɛ umum iwu ru uvau.
26.8: Awu use utsu umbi ashimbi ri imangmang ugɛ Unum adɛ̃ɛ̃ asoyika abika akpe?
26.9: <<Umum nibikami isha inyã ugɛɛ awu ufang umum ikorha abina arhɛrhɛ akika akpɛ̃ itsok Uyesu uner Unazarat.
26.10: Ubinkpi umum iki ikorhe nukpɔ ru Urusharhima, umum iki ikpo ijee ra ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num iyiki igbange asarkasar anera arhɛrhɛ ru ugborzĩ. Ivangyɛ umbɔ aka itsu ufai akpe ru umbɔ, umum iwu ru undzing abika atsu ufai ha.
26.11: Ivanga irhɛirhɛ umum iki ĩdɔsa abã ifɛn-Num kishoo idzise umbɔ uver, ni ibee itsu umbɔ arheni itsok Uyesu. Umum igũ avɔm nggu umbɔ akarhãrhã nggee umum ikɛn umbɔ ri iteu iyɔɔ iyi abĩ akase idzowe umbɔ uver. Uburhu asɔm idzidzipanga (9.1-19; 22.6-16)
26.12: <<Ru uzɛ̃rhã ukpu ifɛrha ha umum iwuri izĩ Udimashku, ri ijee ateiya abika adzowe idɛm-Num.
26.13: Aka ayoka atenuma, a uyɛrhe, umum iwu ru utsĩndĩ ni inyã irhirhang iyɔɔ iki inangngge irhirhang ishaa unum irhang idzeka afã, iba idzipa umum nggu awɛrhu uzɛ̃rhãmum.
26.14: Umɛn kishookamɛn igba ra abĩ, nu umum igũ urhɛm ukpɔɔ ri idũ abi Uyahuda, uku ugɔr umum ugɛ, <A Ushawurhu, a Ushawurhu, awu use utsu ungo udzaa umum uver? Ungo ukpurhu unayiwe itsingo, ru nyaki inak iki igbopi itsingge nggu igbong uner ughãwã.>
26.15: <<Mɔcɛ umum irhusa inggɛ, <Awu ungo ungaa Uteijee?> <<Uteijee agɔr umum agɛ, <Awu umum Uyesu uwu ungo uku udzowe uver.
26.16: Bɔr icɛrɛ usisok udidɛ̃ɛ̃ nu adakngo. Umum idzeka ru ungo ibee isɛng ungo uwu uner itsermum nu uwu ideka ubinkpi ungo uku unyã ru umum nu abinkɛ umum iki idɛyiwa ungo.
26.17: Umum iwuri ifɔrhamum ungo ra anerngo nu atsen abi Uyahuda umum iki idena ungo uzĩ ru umbɔ.
26.18: Ungo iyanguwe asumbɔ, umbɔ adzipa adzek ru uzĩ aba ri irhirhang, na adzeki ijee Ushaitan aba ru Unum, ngge itsú umbɔ ama akpo itsũwe arhim, na ama akpo anang nggu abirabɛ umbɔ aka asɛng umbɔ ru ubok imangmangmbɔ ru umum.>
26.19: <<Nggee a uyɛrhe Uagiripa, umum isi ikpɛ̃mum idɔsa irhiyɛ iki idzeka afã iba ru umum.
26.20: Umum itirhi idzowe isarhe ra aner Udimashku imaa ni idzowe aner Urusharhima nu Uyahudiya kishoo, ikɛi ni indzowe isarhe ra atsen abi Uyahuda, inggɛ umbɔ adzipa aba ru Unum, akorha abinkɛ aka idɛyiwe idzidzipambɔ.
26.21: Ngge itsu abi Uyahuda adzur umum ru ufɔm Iya-Num abee ifɛre umum.
26.22: Bɔr Unum unga ayika umum ĩba itsĩ irherɛ, ngge itsu umum iwu nggimi ni indzowe ideka ra akagɔng nu akaci. Isi irherhumum abin akase bɔr abin abika asɔm Arherhu-Num nu Umusa aka arherhe agɛ iwuri ikorhe rimi,
26.23: ugɛ awu ufang Ukiristo ahwa uver, na awu unggbaashi uwuku usok ra akpe, na adũwũ irhirhang ififɔrh ra anernga nu atsen abi Uyahuda.>>
26.24: Uburhu anu ikaa itsinga nukpi Ufestu abvutuwe arherhe Uburhu. Atsarhi irhaknga agɛ, <<A Uburhu, ungo uku uzhɔma! Idzursungo akarhãrhã iki idzipukungge itsingo.>>
26.25: Bɔr Uburhu agɛ, <<A uteiya Ufestu, isi izhɔmum ukpong. Ubinkpi umum iki irherhe uwu idzidzɛrhe nu uwu ubin ukpuku uyɛi.
26.26: Ungo uyɛrhe ungo uhwɛngo abina akɛrɛ, umum isi igũmum iwei irherha ake ru ungo. Umum ihwɛng ungo uku ugũo abin hã kishoo, ubinkutsu, asi ikorhumbɔ ake ri iwɔk.
26.27: A uyɛrhe Uagiripa, ungo udzowukɔ imangmang abika asɔm Arherhu-Num? Umum ihwɛng ungo ubemungo.>>
26.28: Mɔcɛ Uagiripa agɔr Uburhu agɛ, <<Ungo utsar ugɛ ri ungwɛ̃rhĩ ivang iyɛrɛ ungo ubee itsu umum iwu uner Ukiristo?>>
26.29: Uburhu agɛ, <<Ivang iki ici use iyiki ider, umum ifɛn-Num asi íwea ungo ukpekũ, bɔr kishoo abika akpeto ru umum irherɛ, awe ru nyaka umum, bɔr niba awembɔ ri inyãwã iyɛrɛ.>>
26.30: Uyɛrhe nu ugomna nu Ubani na abirabɛ aka asei nggu umbɔ asisok.
26.31: Umbɔ aka adzek ru ubã ha, umbɔ anu arherhe nggu adɔka, umbɔ agɔr agɛ, <<Utsak uwurɛ asi ikorhunga ubinkpi uku umɛ̃ɛ̃ igbigbang ru ugborzĩ use akpe.>>
26.32: Uagiripa agɔr Ufestu agɛ, <<Utsak uwurɛ abee umbɔ akũ arherhanga azĩ ra asu Ukaisar, uda umbɔ atsũwũkumbɔ unga.>>

27.1: Ivanga iki iwe umɛn iki igar izĩ abĩ Uitarhiya, umbɔ atsuke Uburhu nu abi ugborzĩ abɔɔ ru ubok uteiya abi iwa Uroma uwɔɔ itsoka igburh Ujurhiyo, unying ru ukpui abi iwa Ukaisar.
27.2: Umɛn iki itsĩ ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ uku udzeku Uadiramitiyum, uku uwuri utsĩrhĩ ifɛn akau iteu iyɔɔ iyiki iwe ra abĩ Uasiya, umɛn itsĩ uzɛ̃rhã ru ukau azɛ̃ akagɔng. Uaristaku, utsa Utasarhonika ra abĩ Umakidoniya, awu nggu umɛn.
27.3: Unum uvaa umɛn itsĩmɛn Usidon. Ujurhiyo amutuwe Uburhu, aneke unga azĩ anyã awɛrhanga umbɔ adzowe ubinkpi unga aka abee.
27.4: Umɛn iki isok umɔ ru ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ hã itsĩmɛn azɛ̃ akagɔng, ugba ukɛnkpɔ umɛn uzɛ̃rhã. Nggee umɛn ikɔre udiku undzing Usayifuru ra anangkɛ ugba usi ikerkpɔ.
27.5: Umɛn iki igar ukau azɛ̃ akagɔng hã ukpuku ukhapa ra abĩ Ukirhikiya nu Upamfirhiya, umɛn icipa ru uteu Umira ra abĩ Urhikiya.
27.6: Umɔ uteiya abi iwa Uroma aka akpo ukhukhɔɔ uwɔɔ uku udzeku Uarhekzandiriya uwuri izĩ abĩ Uitarhiya, unga atsu umɛn ru uwu ha.
27.7: Umɛn uzɛ̃rhã uku utɔɔɔ imaa inuma irhɛirhɛ nggu uver, umɛn iki ikhapa ru uteu Ukinidu, ugba ukɛnkpɔ umɛn izĩ ra asu, umɛn ikɔre udiku ubang ukau Ukirit afɛn akirakɛ aka ashike ru ugba uku uker, aka akhapa ru Usarhmoni.
27.8: Umɛn igũ uver ni itɔng ubang ukau Ukirit izĩ itsĩ anang akɔɔ umbɔ iki iyisa Anang Akika Ufɔrh, aka akhapa ru uteu Urhasiya.
27.9: Uzɛ̃rhãmɛn ughawe ivanga irhɛirhɛ. Mɔcɛ igbigba iwe ru uzɛ̃rhã hã. Ubinkutsu unum ikpem igha ubin uku utɔngkpɔ. Nggee Uburhu adzowe umbɔ itsũwã agɛ,
27.10: <<Umum inyã uzɛ̃rhã hã uwuri iwu igba abĩ ra asu, ukhukhɔɔmɛn nu abinmɛn nu urhɛmɛn uwuri igba abĩ.>>
27.11: Bɔr uteiya abi iwa asi ibemunga ubinkpi Uburhu aka arherhe, akpurha atsu amɛnnga ru uner ukhukhɔɔ nu uteiya ukhukhɔɔ ha.
27.12: Ngge iki isi izengge umbɔ agha idoi ru anang hã, irhɛmbɔ ibemumbɔ izɛ̃rhã azĩ ra asu, afosi izĩ atsĩ Ufinikiya, ngge iba imɛ̃ngge umbɔ agha idoyi umɔ. Akɛrɛ awu anang idɛ̃ɛ̃ akɔɔ aki akhukhɔɔ ru Ukirit aka arhi udiku unɔr uwu urhɛɛ nu ufã uwu urhɛɛ. Ufin inai nu ugba ukau
27.13: Ivangyɛ ugba ukpuku udzek unɔr utirhi ifɛu uku utɔɔɔ, anera atsar agɛ ubinkpi umbɔ aka abee uku ukpokpɔ, nggee umbɔ agbiir uzɔu ukpuku ukpɔm ukhukhɔɔ ha adɔsu ifɛn ukau uku ukhapa ru Ukirit.
27.14: Isi idãrhũngge ugba ukpɔɔ ugɔgɔngakpɔ ukpurukpi umbɔ iki iyisa ugba ufã uwu igɔ̃kpee, uku udzeku umpfũwã abĩ hã.
27.15: Ugba ha uku ukwɛr ukhukhɔɔ ha umgbɔ ufɔr irhi udiku ugba ha uda umgbɔ, umɛn idiki neke ugbaka uyii umɛn.
27.16: Umɛn iki idɔsu udiku umpfũwã uku uci umbɔ iki iyisa Ukauda, afɛnkɛ aka ashike ru ugba, umɛn igũ uver ni idɔrhi igbiir ukhukhɔɔ uwuku uci uwuku ukhapa ru ukhukhɔɔ ha.
27.17: Ivangyɛ anera aka agbiir ukhukhɔɔ ha atsĩ ru ukugɔnga, mɔcɛ umbɔ akũ arhi aboyi adzipa ukhukhɔɔ ukugɔng hã utsur umgbɔ uyarmgbɔ. Ikɛi umbɔ acipukumbɔ utatorho atorho ukhukhɔɔ ha na aneke ugba uyii ukhukhɔɔ ha. Umbɔ akorhe rimi ubinkutsu agũ iwei utsur umbɔ atsĩmbɔ uzuzeu Usiriti.
27.18: Unum uvaa ugba utsokpɔ akarhãrhã, utsu umbɔ atirhi akarh abinkɛ aka awe ru ukhukhɔɔ ha atsuyiwe ra amɛ̃.
27.19: Ru unum untaar, umbɔ atãyĩwe abin akɔɔ ikɛi aki itser ukhukhɔɔ ha.
27.20: Umɛn iki imaa inuma isi inyãmɛn ishaa unum use ídzɛɛr, nggaa ugba ukpu ufin inai ukpurhu udɛ̃ɛ̃ ikwɛr umɛn, umɛn isi ifosumɛn ibibɛk.
27.21: Aka adera anera aka asi ighambɔ ubingha, Uburhu asok adɛ̃ɛ̃ ra ateumbɔ na agɛ, <<Umbi anera, uda umbi agũmbi arherhamum iki igɔr ugɛ niba asombi ru ubang umpfũwã abĩ Ukirit, uda umɛn isi itsĩmɛn igba abĩ nggu ididak iyɛrɛ.
27.22: Bɔr icɛrɛ umum idzaa umbi itsũwã àka awe ri ikeramɛn, unera asi íkpea ru umbi, bɔr ukhukhɔɔ ha uwuri iyar ukpekũ.
27.23: Ubinkutsu utsuu ukpu arhɛkɛ ipfu itser iyiki idzeku Unum uwuruwi umum iki iwu uwu unga ni itɔ̃ itsernga, idɛ̃ɛ̃ akhapa ru umum,
27.24: igɔr igɛ, <Niba ugũo iwei, Uburhu. Awu ufang ungo iki idɛ̃ɛ̃ ra asu Ukaisar umbɔ avarhuwa arherhango, nggayɛ Unum ri imimutanga aka afɔrhuka abirabɛ aka uzɛ̃rhã nggu ungo.>
27.25: Nggee àka awe ri ikeramɛn, ubinkutsu umum iwemum ri imangmang ru Unum abin hã umbɔ aka arherhuwa umum, iwuri iwe rimi hã.
27.26: Bɔr awu ufang ugba utare umɛn nu ubang umpfũwã abĩ akɔɔ.>>
27.27: Ru utsuu ukpu usɔka na anaa, ugba ukpurhu adɛ̃ɛ̃ ikikɛn umɛn ru ukau akagɔng Umeditereniya, aka ayoka ikɔtsuuka abika akpai ukhukhɔɔ ha akaifɛrhkɔ agɛ umɛn iki ikhapumɛn abĩ.
27.28: Umbɔ amei ighor amɛ̃ anyã ake atsĩke adaka unaka nu isɔka ivaa. Umɛn iki igɔpa izĩ ukunjiir umbɔ amei ikɛi, akpo ighor amɛ̃ adaka isɔka utɔɔrha.
27.29: Agũ iwei utsur ukhukhɔɔ ha ugbopumgbɔ nggu atarh, umbɔ acipuwe azɔu akika amor anaa udiku undzing ukhukhɔɔ ha, utsur umgbɔ uzɛ̃rhumgbɔ uzɛ̃rhã iki ifefetem. Umbɔ atsĩmbɔ ifɛn-Num ukpee usar ifetem.
27.30: Abika akpai ukhukhɔɔ ha abee itĩ adzek ru ukhukhɔɔ ha. Nggee umbɔ acipuwe ukhukhɔɔ uwuku uci, akpeta agɛ umbɔ awuri icipuwe azɔu akika amor ra asu ukhukhɔɔ ukugɔng.
27.31: Mɔcɛ Uburhu agɔr uteiya abi iwa Uroma nu abi iwa ha agɛ, <<Anera abɛrɛ aba asi idɛ̃ɛ̃mbɔ ru ukhukhɔɔ ha, umbi asi íbɛkmbi.>>
27.32: Igũ rimi itsu abi iwa azharhuwe arhi ukhukhɔɔ uku uci ha, aneke umgbɔ uzĩmgbɔ.
27.33: Ukpee uku uwuri isar Uburhu ashɔ̃rhã umbɔ kishoo ama agha ubingha, agɔr agɛ, <<Irherɛ awu unum ukpu usɔka nu anaa nukpi umbi aka asei ri iwei, asi ighambi ubin.
27.34: Nggee umum ishɔ̃rhã umbi àka agha ubingha na abɛk. Igwar unermbi unying isi ígwirngge ri itsinga.>>
27.35: Unga aka arherhe rimi amaa, unga anyangu uborodi atar uwɛɛ ru Unum ra asumbɔ kishoo. Mɔcɛ unga azharhe atirha atãi.
27.36: Kishookambɔ akpo ikeramɛn na agha ubingha.
27.37: Umɛn kishoo ru ukhukhɔɔ ha iwu inera inaka ivaa ni isɔka utɔɔva nu utɔ̃ĩ (276).
27.38: Umbɔ aka agha ashur, umbɔ atsũwe imor ukhukhɔɔ ha atare ishaa abin ra amɛ̃. Ukhukhɔɔ ha uyarmgbɔ
27.39: Ivangyɛ ukpee uku usar abika akpai ukhukhɔɔ ha asi ihwɛngmbɔ abĩkɛ umbɔ aka awe, bɔr umbɔ anyã avarha akɔɔ aka awe ru uzuzeu, umbɔ abee ikũ ukhukhɔɔ ha azĩ afata umɔ.
27.40: Umbɔ atenge arhisa kishoo aki azɔu akika amor, abɔre ake ru ukau. Ri ivang hã umbɔ agarhuwe ubin ukpuku udzipu ukhukhɔɔ ha. Umɔ umbɔ aberuwe utatorho aka awe ra asu ukhukhɔɔ ha na akũ adzur ugba uku iyira umgbɔ ra asu na azĩmbɔ udika abĩ.
27.41: Bɔr ukhukhɔɔ ha ukwɛr uzuzeu utsĩ ra amɛ̃ ukãã ufɔr idzidzipa udamgbɔ, ukhukhɔɔ ha utirhi iyata udiku undzing itso amɛ̃ aka aker uke.
27.42: Abi iwa abee ifɛre abi ugborzĩ, utsur uwɔɔ ru umbɔ akwɛr izoyi adzek atĩã.
27.43: Bɔr uteiya abi iwa Uroma abee ifɔrhe Uburhu, akɛna umbɔ. Atsu umbɔ kishoo uwuruwi aka ahwɛnga ikwɛr izoyi unga ateer isha atsĩ ra amɛ̃ akwɛr izoyi agar nu abĩ.
27.44: Uteiya abi iwa ha atsu abika abubɔr afũ uakatako, abɔɔ afũ avɛtu ukhukhɔɔ ha. Rimi umbɔ kishoo aka afɔrh azĩ atsĩ nu abĩ.

28.1: Umɛn iki ifɔrh itsĩ ubang umpfũwã abĩ hã, umɛn irhusa igũ itsok anang hã igburh Umarhta.
28.2: Abi anang hã amatuwa umɛn akarhãrhã. Inai idoi, ananga aghɛnga, umbɔ ataiwa umɛn urha na ayɛi umɛn iwɛr urha.
28.3: Uburhu akarh itokũ atsuyi ru urha. Imanu urha itsu ighwɛr idze ikpɔɔr ni izũrhã nu uboknga.
28.4: Ivangyɛ abi umpfũwã hã aka anyã ngge iki izũrhã nu ubok Uburhu, umbɔ agɔr adɔkambɔ agɛ, <<Idzidzɛrhe utsak uwurɛ awu uner uwuku ufɛyi aner, àka anyã unga aka abɛk ru ukau ukpuku ugɔng, rimi hã kishoo iyiki ibewe ina idɔsa unga awuri ikpea.>>
28.5: Bɔr Uburhu azusu uboknga atsukuka ibvui ha ru urha, isi inayikungge unga.
28.6: Anera akau ra amɛnmbɔ agɛ anang hã awuri isengke use unga awuri igba ra abĩ akpe, bɔr umbɔ aka adãrhã asi inyã ifɛrhɛ ikorhungge nggu unga, umbɔ agɛ awu unum.
28.7: Ídɛɛ niyɔ ikhapa umɔ ra anang hã, iwu iyi Upubirhiyu, unga awu uyɛrhe umpfũwã hã. Unga ayɛi umɛn ri iyanga, na akorhuwa umɛn inna inuma itaar.
28.8: Utɛ Upubirhiyu aghonga unga, iyora imani anu nggu isurhã. Uburhu atsĩ ru unga afɛne-Num nu unga, atsorha abok nu unga na akerhuwe unga.
28.9: Ivangyɛ ifɛrha ha iki ikorhe, kishoo abi irhãrhã aka abɔr ru umpfũwã abĩ hã aka aba, akerhumbɔ.
28.10: Umbɔ adzaa umɛn igɔng ra atsĩndĩã arhɛrhɛ. Umɛn iki iwuri isok ru ukhukhɔɔ amɛ̃ ukugɔng, umbɔ akɔng abinkɛ umɛn iki ibee adzaa umɛn. Uburhu ru Uroma
28.11: Afɛ̃ɛ̃ ataar aka amaa umɛn isok ru ukhukhɔɔwi uku ugha idoyi ru umpfũwã abĩ hã, uwuku udzeku Uarhekzandiriya. Ra asu ukhukhɔɔ ha umbɔ aka atsɛ̃ uzirhzĩ akãrhghwɛ̃ anum.
28.12: Umɛn iki itsĩ uteu Usiraku umɛn imaa inuma itaar umɔ.
28.13: Umɔ umɛn isok izĩmɛn ru uteu Urigiyum. Umɛn imaa unuma unying, ukpee uku usar ugba ukpu unɔr uba, unum uvaa umɛn itsĩmɛn Uputiyorhi.
28.14: Ru Uputiyorhi umɛn iki igbopa angwɛ̃mɛn nu anapumɛn umbɔ ashɔ̃rhã umɛn imaa inuma utɔɔva nggu umbɔ. Ri imimasha umɛn ĩba itsĩ Uroma.
28.15: Angwɛ̃mɛn nu anapumɛn ru Uroma aka agũ isarhamɛn, umbɔ adzek aba agbanga umɛn. Abɔɔ adzeki Izɛɛ Uaffiyu, abɔɔ adzeka anangkɛ umbɔ iki iyisa Aya Atsen Ataar. Uburhu aka anyãmbɔ unga atar uwɛɛ ru Unum, na awe ru ikeramɛn.
28.16: Ivangyɛ umɛn iki itsĩ Uroma, umbɔ abemuwe Uburhu unga azĩ asei ikiyikanga nggu uner iwa abirabɛ aka adzɛu unga ri iyakɛ umbɔ aka afai uhwɛk. Isarhe Uburhu ru Uroma
28.17: Inuma itaar iki imaa, Uburhu ayisa anggbaashi abi Uyahuda umɔ. Umbɔ aka akɔng Uburhu agɔr umbɔ agɛ, <<Umbi angwɛ̃mɛn nu anapumɛn, umum ihwɛngmum isi igbamum uvau ra anermɛn use ra agbeyi atokamɛn, bɔr umbɔ adzur umum ru Urusharhima adzowe umum ra abok abi ijee Uroma.
28.18: Umbɔ aka arhisa umum abee itsũwe umum, ubinkutsu, asi ikpombɔ umum nggu uvau uwu ubinkpi umbɔ aka ifɛre umum.
28.19: Bɔr anggbaashi abi Uyahuda aka akpɛ̃mbɔ, ngge iwu ufang ru umum ikũ arherhunga umɛn izĩmɛn ra asu Ukaisar. Isi iwengge ugɛ umum itsu arherhe abimɛn.
28.20: Akɛrɛ ha atsu umum ibee inyã umbi ni ikɛki itsũwã nggu umbi. Ubinkutsu awu ubinkpi abi Uisrairha aka afosa itsu umbɔ abow umum nggu inyãwã iyɛrɛ.>>
28.21: Umbɔ agɔr unga agɛ, <<Umɛn isi ikpomɛn ubvur uku udzeku Uyahudiya uba ru umɛn ri itsingo, use ungwɛ̃mɛn use unapumɛn uwɔɔ aba nggimi nggu isarhe iyiki ibewe ri itsingo.
28.22: Bɔr umɛn ibee igũ ubinkpi ungo iki irherhe, ubinkutsu umɛn ihwɛng anera ri inanga kishoo arherhe iyiki ibewe ru ukpui ukpɛrɛ ha.>>
28.23: Nggee umbɔ atsũ unumkpi umbɔ aka igbopa nggu Uburhu. Unum hã uku uwe umbɔ awu arhɛrhɛ aka aba ra anangkɛ Uburhu aka asei. Udzur ru ukpeeka uba utsĩ urhɛɛ unga akpurha adɛ̃ɛ̃ idɛyiwe umbɔ arherhe ri itsi Iyɛrhe Unum abee itsu umbɔ ahwɛng Uyesu ru utsĩndĩ Íkpem Umusa na abvur abika asɔm Arherhu-Num.
28.24: Abɔɔ abemumbɔ ubin hã unga aka arherhe, bɔr abɔɔ ashimbɔ ri imangmang.
28.25: Nggee umbɔ atsĩmbɔ uning nggu adɔkambɔ, na atirhi ibɔre anang hã, Uburhu aka amaa irherhuwe umbɔ arherhe agɛ, <<Ipfu Isarsatangge irherhe idzidzɛrhe ru atokamɛn ra angwĩ uner uwuku usɔm Arherhu-Num Uishaya igɛ,
28.26: << <Uzĩ ra anera abɛrɛ, ugɔr ugɛ, <<Umbi awuri igũmbi ubɛn unuma bɔr asi íhwɛngmbi, umbi awuri irhirhi umbi ubɛn unuma bɔr asi ínyãmbi.>>
28.27: Ubinkutsu amɛn anera abɛrɛ awu akerketake, aka afɔmukumbɔ atombɔ, umbɔ aka abvurkumbɔ asumbɔ, utsur umbɔ anyãmbɔ nggu asumbɔ, utsur umbɔ agũmbɔ nggu atombɔ, na ahwɛngmbɔ nggu amɛnmbɔ, na idzipa aba ru umum ikerhukũ umbɔ.>
28.28: <<Umum ibee umbi ahwɛng agɛ Unum aka adene isarhe ififɔrh iyɛrɛ ra atsen abi Uyahuda, nu umbɔ awuri ikpembɔ ato.>>
28.30: Imɛka ivaa Uburhu asei ri iyakɛ umbɔ aka afai uhwɛk, ayɛi kishoo abika aba ru unga.
28.31: Unga adzowe isarhe Iyɛrhe-Num, amesuwe abin aki Uteijee Uyesu Ukiristo asi igũa iwei, unera asi ikɛna unga.

1.1: Idzeku umum Uburhu, uner itser Ukiristo Uyesu. Umbɔ aka ayisa umum iwe uner itser Uyesu, atsũ umum idũwũ Isarhe Iyiki Ize iyi Unum.
1.2: Isarhe Iyiki Ize iyi Unum aka abemuwe akũ abika asɔm Arherhu-Num ishaisha, ru nyaka umbɔ aka atsɛng ra asarkasar abvur Arherhu-Num,
1.3: ri itsi Ungwɛ̃nga ri iyornga awe unang Udauda.
1.4: Umbɔ abema agɛ unga awe Ungwɛ̃ Unum ri isisoknga ra akpe ri ijee Ipfu Isarsatangge. Unga awu Uyesu Ukiristo Uteijeemɛn.
1.5: Ru uboknga Unum aka adzaa umɛn imimuta na ayisa umɛn iwe abi itser Uyesu nggee umɛn iwuri iyisa kishoo atsen abi Uyahuda aba awe ru imangmang na adɔsa. Umɛn ikorhe akɛrɛ ha ri itsoknga.
1.6: Umbi ikɛi awu ra abirabɛ umbɔ aka ayisa ra atsen abi Uyahuda umbɔ awe abi Uyesu Ukiristo.
1.7: Umum inu itsɛnge ru kishoo abika awe ru Uroma Unum aka abema ayisa umbi awe asasar. Imimuta nu ididɔɔr iki idzeku Unum Utɛmɛn nu Uteijee Uyesu Ukiristo iwe nggu umbi. Uburhu abee iyepa Uroma rimɔ̃ɔ̃
1.8: Umum inggbaashia, itar uwɛɛ ru Unummum ri itsok Uyesu Ukiristo ru umbi kishoo, ubinkutsu aka asɔmukumbɔ isarhe imangmangmbi ru upfunga kishoo.
1.9: Umum itɔ̃we Unum itser nggu amɛnmum kishoo ri idzowe Isarhe Iyiki Ize iyi Ungwɛ̃nga, Unum awu idekamum iki iyita umbi
1.10: ubɛn ivangyɛ umum iki ifɛn-Num. Umum ifɛna unga aba abemunga, unga ama utsuruwa utsĩndĩã ru umum ĩba ru umbi.
1.11: Umum ibee inyã umbi akarhãrhã ni ĩdzaa umbi izũwã iyɔɔ iyi Ipfu Isarsatangge iyiki itsu umbi aker.
1.12: Ugɛ iwuri itsu umum nu umbi ifituwe adɔka ri imangmangmɛn.
1.13: Umum isi ĩbeemum umbi awe ru ida ihwihwɛng umbi angwɛ̃mɛn nu anapumɛn, ugɛ umum ibee ĩba ru umbi idikunga irhɛirhɛ, bɔr umum isi ikpomum ivanga utsɛku icɛrɛ. Umum ibee ikpo igbɛr abin ru umbi, ru nyaka umum iki ikpo ra atsen abi Uyahuda abɔɔ.
1.14: Umum iwemum ru uvɛrh anera kishoo, abi Uyahuda nu atsen abi Uyahuda, abi isarasu nu agugge.
1.15: Ngge itsu umum itsu amɛnmum idũwũ Isarhe Iyiki Ize ru umbi abirabɛ aka awe ru Uroma ikɛi. Ijee Isarhe Iyiki Ize
1.16: Umum isi igũmum atsa idzowe Isarhe Iyiki Ize, ubinkutsu ngge iwu ijee Unum iyiriyɛ iki ikũ ififɔrh iyi abika awe ru imangmang, utirhi ra abi Uyahuda uzĩ utsĩ atsen abi Uyahuda.
1.17: Awu Isarhe Iyiki Ize ha idɛyiwa umɛn ugɛ Unum anyanga umɛn iwe abika arhika, irhirhikayɛ iki iwe ri imangmang iyi inggbaashia izĩ itsĩ imimasha, ru nyaki itsɛng Arherhu-Num iki igɔr ugɛ, <<Uwuku urhika awuri ibɛk ri imangmang.>> Avɔm Unum ra abi arhim
1.18: Avɔm Unum adzeka ra afã aba nu atsi abirabɛ aka ashimbɔ ru Unum nu abika awe ri iyiki ibewe anera aki adɛmu idzidzɛrhe ri iyiki ibewambɔ.
1.19: Abinkɛ umbɔ aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ ahwɛng ri itsi Unum uwu ukupɛ̃ɛ̃ ra asumbɔ, ubinkutsu Unum aka ayanguka ake ra asumbɔ.
1.20: Udzur ri imimunu upfunga iwiweyɛ Unum aka awe umbɔ aka asi idɛ̃ɛ̃ inyãmbɔ, iyiriyɛ iki iwu ijeenga iyi ugbagbaa nu abinkɛ aka adɛyiwa ugɛ unga awu Unum, aka anyã ake ukupɛ̃ɛ̃. Anyã ake ra abinkɛ unga aka amuna, ngge itsú anera asi iwembɔ ru ubin ukpuku urherhe uku uka arhimmbɔ.
1.21: Ahwɛngmbɔ Unum, na asi ikpoimbɔ unga aka awe Unum, asi itarmbɔ uwɛɛ ru unga. Ifɛrhkɔmbɔ iwe ibɛm nu amɛnmbɔ awe uzĩ.
1.22: Umbɔ anu igɔr agɛ umbɔ asarasu, bɔr awu agugge
1.23: na afaruwe ikpikpoi Unum adzowe ra agberhekɛ aka awe ru nyaka anera nu anunu nu íjuɛ nu abinkɛ aki ikaikai ra abĩ.
1.24: Nggee Unum aneke umbɔ, ngge itsú umbɔ akorhu abin arhim iyiki ibewe amɛnmbɔ iki ibee. Umbɔ akorhu abin atsa nggu adɔkambɔ.
1.25: Umbɔ adzipu idzidzɛrhe Unum ngge iwe igbɛrangwĩ, anu idzowe igɔng ra abinkɛ umbɔ aka amuna na akpɛ̃mbɔ uwuku umumuna uwu ikpikpoi ugbagbaa. Iwerimi.
1.26: Nggee Unum aneke umbɔ nggu ikpona iyiki ikũ atsa. Uko atsɛ̃mbɔ akpɛ̃mbɔ irha nggu atsakmbɔ bɔr arha nggu akatsɛrh.
1.27: Rimi hã akatsak akpɛ̃mbɔ irha akatsɛrh ngge iki iwe ubinkpi Unum aka amuna na awu ra anyɔna nggu adɔkambɔ akatsak. Akatsak nu akatsak aka isaka arha adɔkambɔ, na ayɛi avau itser iyiki ibewambɔ.
1.28: Umbɔ akpɛ̃mbɔ iwe nggu ihwihwɛng Unum, nggee Unum aneke umbɔ ri ifɛrhkɔ iyiki itãrhãmbɔ, ngge itsú umbɔ akorha abinkɛ aka asi imɛ̃ke umbɔ akorhe.
1.29: Umbɔ awe nggu ikpũ iyiki ibewe, nu ikpona nu amɛn aka abewe. Awu nggu unyɛ̃ɛ̃, nu ifɛr uner, nu ifuw, nu ikpikpɛ̃ɛ̃.
1.30: Umbɔ awe abika avɛrha anera, abika akpɛ̃ Unum, abi ugbau, abika aberi itsi, abika afĩrhã, abika angwɛ̃ amɛnmbɔ ri iki ibewe, asi itĩmbɔ atei,
1.31: abika asheri itsoi, abika asheri imangmang, abika ashera amɛn, abika ashera atorh.
1.32: Umbɔ ahwɛngmbɔ Íkpem iyiki irhika iyi Unum iki igɔr igɛ abika akorha abina akɛrɛ imɛ̃ngge umbɔ akpe, umbɔ asi ikorhumbɔ akɛrɛ ha ukpekũ, bɔr umbɔ ikɛi abema abika akorha ake.

2.1: Nggee ungo ushiɔ ru urhɛm, ungo uwuku utsu uvau ru uwɔɔ, ungo uba utsu uvau ru uwɔɔ, ungo utsu uvau ri itsingo. Ubinkutsu, ungo uner uwuku utsu uvau ha, ungo uni ukorhe ru nyaku uner uwuku uwe ru uvau.
2.2: Umɛn ihwɛngmɛn ugɛ itsu uvau iyi Unum ru abika akorhe rimi hã iwe idzidzɛrhe.
2.3: Nggee, ungo uner uwuku utsu uvau ra abɔɔ, nu uni ukorhe iki ibewe ugɛɛ umbɔ, ungo ukaifɛrhkɔ ugɛ ungo uwuri ishɔɔtɔ ri itsu uvau Unum?
2.4: Use ungo ukwɛɛte urhɛrhɛ innanga, nu inineke nu idɔngamɛn? Ungo usi ihwɛngo ugɛ inna Unum ikũna ungo izĩ idzidzipa?
2.5: Bɔr iker itsingo nu ida idzidzipa amɛnngo ngge itsu ungo unu ikɔng avɔm ri itsingo ru unum avɔm Unum, ri ivang iyiki itsu uvau iyiki irhika iyi Unum iki idzeka.
2.6: Unum awuri idzowe ubɛn unera ugbɛtɛ ubinkpi unga aka akorhe.
2.7: Abika atɔ̃ itser abima ri ikorhu ubin uku uze na abee ikpikpoi, imor nu urhɛ uwu ugbagbaa, Unum awuri idzowe umbɔ.
2.8: Bɔr abika abema atsimbɔ na akpɛ̃mbɔ idzidzɛrhe na adɔsu iyiki ibewe, awuri itsĩ ra avɔm Unum.
2.9: Uver nu ayetnum awuri iwe nggu ubɛn unera aka akorhe iki ibewe, agbaashia akorhuwe abi Uyahuda, mɔcɛ atsen abi Uyahuda.
2.10: Bɔr ikpikpoi, igɔng nu ididɔɔr iwuri iwe nggu uwuku ukorhi iyiki ize, igbaashia iwe nggu abi Uyahuda, mɔcɛ atsen abi Uyahuda.
2.11: Unum asi itɛnga asu.
2.12: Abirabɛ aka asi ihwɛngmbɔ Íkpem na agba ra arhim, arhimmbɔ awuri itsĩme umbɔ, bɔr abirabɛ aka ahwɛng Íkpem na agba ra arhim, Íkpem iwuri itsĩme umbɔ.
2.13: Ubinkutsu, asi iwea abika agũ Íkpem awu abika arhika ru Unum, bɔr Unum awuri inyanga abika adɔsi Íkpem awu abika arhika.
2.14: Rimi hã, atsen abi Uyahuda, abika asheri Íkpem, ivang iyɔɔ umbɔ akorhumbɔ abin akɔɔ aka awe ri Íkpem. Awembɔ ri Íkpem ra amɛnmbɔ, uko umbɔ aka ashimbɔ nu Íkpem.
2.15: Itsermbɔ itsu anera ahwɛng ugɛ abinkɛ Íkpem iki igɔr, atsɛngmbɔ ake ra amɛnmbɔ. Ifɛrhkɔ amɛnmbɔ ikɛi idɛyiwe ugɛ iwe idzidzɛrhe. Ngge iki iwe ugɛ ifɛrhkɔmbɔ isaki itsu uvau ru umbɔ, ivang iyɔɔ ngge ikaa umbɔ.
2.16: Akɛrɛ ha awuri iwe ru unumkpi Unum aka itsu uvau ri iwiwɔk amɛn anera ru ubok Uyesu Ukiristo, ru nyaka Isarhe Iyiki Izemum iki irherhe. Abi Uyahuda ha nu Íkpem Umusa
2.17: Ungo uner uwuku uyisi itsingo uner Uyahuda. Ungo utsukɔ amɛnngo ri Íkpem nu ufĩrhã ri iwɛrhɛngo nggu Unum.
2.18: Ungo umesungo Íkpem ha. Ungo uhwɛngo ubinkpi unga aka abee ungo ukorhe, nu ubemu ubin uku uze.
2.19: Ungo akaifɛrhkɔ ugɛ ungo udarh abi ibvuta, irhirhang ra abi uzĩ.
2.20: Ungo ukaifɛrhkɔ ugɛ ungo uwu uner uwuku umesuwe agugge, uwuku umesuwe awɛkaci, ubinkutsu ungo ukaifɛrhkɔ ugɛ ri Íkpem ungo uku ukpo ihwihwɛng nu idzidzɛrhe kishoo.
2.21: Nggee, ungo, uner uwuku umesuwe anera, ungo usi imesukɔ itsingo? Ungo uner uwuku udũwã ugɛ niba avɛumbɔ ivɛu, ungo uvɛpɔ ivɛu?
2.22: Ungo uner uwuku ugɔr ugɛ niba atomumbɔ-dak, ungo utomungo-dak? Ungo uner uwuku ugũ ishĩ ugberhe, ungo uvɛpɔ ivɛu ru abã agberhe?
2.23: Ungo uwuku ufĩrhã nggu Íkpem, ungo usi idakukɔ itsok Unum ri izharhuwe Íkpemnga?
2.24: Itsɛng Arherhu-Num igɔr igɛ, <<Umbi atsu atsen abi Uyahuda arhenu Unum.>>
2.25: Usorhe uwekpɔ ru ugarh, ungo uba udɔsungo Íkpem, bɔr ungo uba uzharhukɔ Íkpem, ungo uwe ru nyaku uwuruwi aka ashia ru usorhe.
2.26: Nggee, abika asheru usorhe aba adɔsumbɔ abinkɛ Íkpem iki irherhe, asi ínyãnga umbɔ awembɔ ru nyaka abi usorhe?
2.27: Uwuruwi aka ashia ru usorhe nu iyornga na adɔsunga abinkɛ Íkpem iki irherhe, awuri itsuka uvau ru ungo uwuku uwe ru Íkpem nu usorhe, bɔr ungo uzharhukɔ Íkpem hã.
2.28: Unera asi iwea uner Uyahuda unga aba akpurha awu Uyahuda uwu iyor, usorhe usi iwekpɔ utsar ukpu iyor ukpekũ anera aka adɛ̃ɛ̃ anyã.
2.29: Ĩ'ĩ, unera awu Uyahuda uwu idzidzɛrhe unga aba awea ra amɛnnga, usorhe ukpu idzidzɛrhe uwe ukpu amɛn, ukpurukpi Ipfu-Num iki isaki ikorhe, asi iwea Ikpem. Ikpũ uner uwɛrɛ awu Unum akpoi unga, asi iwea anera.

3.1: Abi Uyahuda anang atsen nggu use, nggu ugarh use nggu uwe ru usorhe?
3.2: Ĩĩ, uwe urhɛrhɛ ru ubɛn udĩ! Ri inggbaashia, umbɔ adzowe abi Uyahuda Arherhu-Num.
3.3: Iwuri iwe iguse abɔɔ aba ashimbɔ ri imangmang? Isheri imangmangmbɔ iwuri itsũwũkũngge imangmang Unum?
